invigor-medical-pasco.text: Enzo from customer service was really helpful in helping me with all my questions. Thank you Enzo! Great job keep up the good work.
The service was great. Very quick and efficient. Delivery was quick too. And Enzo was a huge help! Thanks!

I ordered medication and kept it in the freezer like their doctors suggested me to do. The vial started developing some deposits after a while. The vial was never even opened and I did not get to use the medication even once. When I contacted customer service, they said they will not replace it.

northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.text: Dr. Michaelson saved our family's life. We had four family members with successful surgeries performed by him and no issues. The staff is caring and provide great care. Do not hesitate. He is definitely the best!

drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.text: Drip Gym has a fantastic and welcoming staff, they make the experience calming and comforting!
Had a fantastic facial. Very clean space and very conveniently located.
I had 3 areas in coolsculpting to treat (arms, chin and abdomen). I spent $6,000 with no results at all. After 4 months nothing happened in those areas. I feel cheated. Do not spend your money here.

lifted-beauty-wellness-seattle.text: I have been going to Lifted for the last few years and have always had  wonderful and relaxing experiences. All staff are extremely welcoming; and, very knowledgeable regarding their products and services. Inga has been my angel. She developed a plan for my skin (I have been travelling a lot for family) and my skin looks and feels amazing. Even my husband noticed!  Others have actually commented on how nice my skin looks. She always inquires first, if there are any issues with products etc, and if anything has changed since last appointment, before starting our  service.  If you are "on the fence" about going....please give yourself a treat and go to Lifted.
Loved my hydra-facial with Natasha. My skin looked noticeably better afterwards. So glad to have finally found a place I trust for regular facials/treatments. Highly recommend!

Dr. Fox is always on point which is always appreciated. I had my first session with Inga and she was just as delightful. The EmSculpt Functional procedure has been a great experience thus far. Looking forward to my next session.

I'm so grateful to Natasha and the rest of the team at Lifted for helping my skin look the best it ever has. I've struggled for 2 decades with acne that didn't respond to skincare, prescriptions, red/blue light, chemical peels, etc. Natasha recommended AviClear and I'm so glad I did it. It was somewhat painful but they had a lot of tools they used to help mitigate that, and Natasha really took my comfort seriously and did everything she could to make the experience as pleasant as possible. The hardest part was waiting for the results, because it does take time, but now that I'm a year out I'm so glad I did it. I've also been seeing her since for IPL sessions to help with scarring, which has been significantly improved. She showed me photos from my first appointment compared to my skin today and I was shocked - there was such a change! Truly appreciative to Lifted for making this possible.

The team at lifted is amazing! Each person is an expert in the field and truly cares about their client. The folks at lifted go above and beyond to ensure that each treatment is a positive experience and that you are satisfied with your skin care/beauty/wellness. I can’t imagine going anywhere else for a facial or other treatment. Thank you Beth, Haley, Inga, Dr. Fox and the entire Lifted team!!

intravene-mobile-iv-therapy-seattle.text: I had a great experience with Intravene today. They were super communicative from the start and were able to arrange for one of their skilled critical care nurses, Daniel, to come the same day. I super appreciated it because I’ve been in a bad migraine flare that I’ve been trying to kick. Daniel was excellent - informative throughout the process and a calming presence. The appointment was fast, just about an hour total (I’ve spent 3-6 hours at an infusion center before for the same migraine protocol!) and I felt relaxed the whole time. I’m already beginning to feel better. I’m really appreciative for their care and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them.

I received an IV immune boost today to help with cold and flu–like symptoms, muscle cramps, and fatigue, and I was extremely pleased with the experience. Daniel was calm, professional, and very reassuring throughout the entire process, which made me feel comfortable and well cared for. He took the time to explain what he was doing, answered my questions thoroughly, and ensured I was relaxed during the infusion. The service was provided promptly and efficiently, without feeling rushed. Overall, it was a very positive experience, and I would confidently recommend Mr. Daniel to anyone seeking high-quality IV therapy services.

I had an amazing experience with Alexandra! I wasn’t feeling well for several days at this point and finally called to reserve an immune boosting IV with Zinc, Vitamin C and more. Alexandra made sure I was comfortable and it was easy for her to find my vein (which sometimes can be a struggle). I definitely plan on booking again soon!

I had Andre’ as my nurse and he was amazing! He came out to my house same day at 7:30pm on Monday to save me a ER visit for fluids. He was professional, kind and made me feel better! 10/10 would recommend!

I recently had an IV treatment and had a great experience. The staff was professional, knowledgeable, and made me feel completely comfortable throughout the process. The treatment itself was quick and relaxing, and I noticed a real boost in my energy and overall wellness afterward. I would definitely recommend this service to anyone looking for a convenient and effective way to feel refreshed and recharged.

prime-iv-hydration-wellness-south-lake-u.text: I had an amazing experience at Prime IV Hydration & Wellness .  The staff was professional, knowledgeable, and made me feel completely comfortable throughout the entire process. The facility was clean, modern, and had a relaxing atmosphere. The IV drip itself was a game-changer—I felt refreshed, energized, and rehydrated almost immediately. The team took the time to understand my needs and recommended the perfect infusion for me. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a top-notch wellness experience. I’ll definitely be back!

I had a fantastic experience and would like to extend my thanks to Chyna and Nurse Haydy for their exceptional professionalism, warm demeanor, and welcoming attitude. They were incredibly courteous and supportive throughout my visit. As it was my first experience, I truly appreciated their care. The VIP experience was also great.

What an extraordinary service. I've been vegan for a year now and my B12 tanked. The service is great, the facility is great, and the people are great. Meghan was my nurse and she's just wonderful. Thank you!!

We had such an amazing experience here! My boyfriend and I came in with three friends after celebrating his birthday a little too hard the previous night. They were able to accommodate us all, which was amazing! Also the person who put our IVs in got them all on the first try. After the initial IV was placed we had ann amazing nurse, Destiny, who was so attentive while we relaxed in these giant cozy chairs during the IV session.   The staff and IV therapy were so incredible we cannot wait to go back. Definitely recommend supporting this place, even if you aren’t nursing a hangover they have a lot of other options too. Best decision we’ve made in 2024!!

Awesome Experience!
The staff was extremely nice and helpful. The zero-gravity massage chairs were absolutely amazing! If you want to feel like a VIP, come here—you’ll have an experience you won’t forget!

prime-iv-hydration-wellness-appleton-app.text: Excellent experience from start to finish! From the moment I walked through the door, I was greeted with outstanding service and a welcoming atmosphere. I was treated with genuine care and kindness throughout my visit. Savanna was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to help me choose exactly what my body needed to feel properly hydrated. I did the Glow Drip with added vitamins, and I was beyond impressed with the entire experience. Everything felt professional, relaxing, and personalized. I loved it so much that I even signed up for a membership. Highly recommend this IV hydration and wellness spa to anyone looking to feel their best!

I absolutely loved my very first IV treatment session 😊 the staff was so friendly and informative! The patient areas were also super cozy and welcoming. I was astonished by the number of IV treatments they have available to choose from! So excited to start my 6 month membership

The staff is absolutely amazing. It doesn't matter who I talk to, they are all super knowledgeable and really just care so much. I haven't chatted with Rob as much as Lindsay and the other ladies but he is a stand up guy from the conversations I have had with him and it feels like the work environment he has created is a positive space not only for his employees but for his customers as well. Worth every cent!

Great people to work with, relaxing environment & can't say enough about the recliners. Everything I have gone through with everyone at Prime IV on Kensington in Appleton has been fantastic. Thank you guys for your caring and understanding and getting me everything I need at every visit!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Prime IV in Appleton has a clean, relaxing atmosphere and a kind, knowledgeable staff. They took the time to inform me about IM shots and helped me choose the best options to achieve my goals. The service was professional, and I felt well taken care of. Highly recommend for anyone looking to optimize their health!

best-you-healthcare-solutions-iv-therapy.text:
I learned of Best you Healthcare when I was at home ill.  Angela came to my home treated me with fluids and vitamins that I was so desperately needing.
I have continued to see Angela for treatments  for overall health.  Angela is very kind, knowledgeable as well as easy to talk to.

I love Angela, my mom and I go here and receive the skinny shots and soon starting semuglutide injections as well. Angela has been extremely helpful from start, always answering our questions and concerns,  reading our blood draws to make sure there isn't anything deeper going on, resolving our skincare issues, taking care of us on video chats when sick to send medication to pharmacy. we've needed to get in there last minute and fit us in and they do that. this clinic is the best, they truly really care! Angela the owner is phenomenal! I will continue to go to this clinic and see Angela. I would highly recommend this clinic to friends and family hands down!

Angela is THE BEST doctor l've ever met. She genuinely cares and listens to her patients then works to find solutions to help them live the best quality lives they can.
10 out of 10 recommend!

I’ve been getting B12 shots regularly, and I can honestly say they’ve made a noticeable difference in my energy and overall well-being. Before I started, I was constantly feeling tired, sluggish, and unmotivated—even after a full night’s sleep. After just a couple of sessions, I felt more alert, focused, and energized throughout the day.

The process is quick and easy, and the staff is always friendly and professional. They take the time to explain everything and make sure I’m comfortable. I also love that it’s a natural boost without having to rely on caffeine or energy drinks.

If you’re feeling drained or low on energy, I highly recommend giving B12 shots a try. It’s made a huge difference in my daily life, and I’m so glad I gave it a chance!
Angela is so well versed in the medical field, patient and sweet as can be! I had a great experience there and the Vit. B shot I got has me feeling amazing!

fresh-iv-drips-fresh-meadows.text: I cannot say enough good things about Fresh IV Drips!!! They came when I needed them the most, and no one else has been able to come as fast as they did! This is by far the easiest and smoothest IV drip in NYC I’ve had. I got an immunity IV drip, and added some extras to help me feel more energized as well. For busy weeks, this is definitely what I need! And my nurse Nicole was sensational. Thank you guys again so much ❤️❤️❤️

I was really impressed with this service! I felt tired and ordered an IV and they called me to walk me through the whole process which I really appreciated. I got the peak immunity drip and felt much better after. Best IV therapy in NYC for sure!!!

Absolutely hands down the best service !!!! I was feeling awful with a terrible migraine, couldn’t keep food or water down. I decided to call Fresh IV Drips, and I’m so glad I did! The nurse arrived within the hour, was professional, neat, and explained every step of the process. I’ll admit I was skeptical at first, but by the end of the session I felt sooooo much better. I was finally able to eat and felt like a human again. Highly recommend! Best IV therapy !!

Jonathan was very professional and made the service so calm and welcoming. He was able to explain everything about the IV drips and the benefits it would give. He also came within an hour of me booking the service! He even helped keep my baby distracted while I was getting the infusion :) I would highly recommend him for IV infusion and will definitely be using Fresh IV Drips in the future.

Was not feeling well on a Sunday and made it obvious that I preferred treatment ASAP. 35 mins later, Fresh IV Drips sent their clinician John to administer the fluids and vitamins. Very professional, pleasant and prompt. My wife will likely be getting treatment in the coming weeks. Would absolutely recommend.

medivee-live-well-aesthetics-ferndale.text: Have you ever walked into a place and immediately felt welcomes, and like you made the right decision? This is the place for you then! This was my first Botox appointment, I was scared, didn’t know what to expect and Kim made the experience magical and then some! She’s beyond knowledgeable, loving and will talk you through anything (I know because I may have had a syncopa episode in her chair). 10/10 highly recommend. I will be back, and I cannot say enough good things about my experience and my injector Kim!

Love everything about this place! It's cute, clean everyone is friendly and welcoming ! Kim did my lips and I couldn't be more in love with my new look! She is amazing at what she does, extremely knowledgeable and explained every thing to me before she did it. I will be back! 10/10 recommend!

Nurse Kim did an excellent job with Botox. She was very informative in the consultation and I could tell we were on the same page when it came to the desired result. She also knew where to inject to avoid an overly hooded look, which has happened at other med spas in the past. Super happy with the whole experience! Def worth checking out!

I cannot recommend this place enough! Kim is the best of the best. She is professional, informative, and incredibly educated in what she does. Any treatment can make you a little nervous, but she made the whole experience feel easy-going and comfortable from start to finish. She took the time to walk me through everything, explained the process clearly, and the whole appointment felt seamless.
I got masseter Botox and felt zero pain. I was in and out. I’ve also been here multiple times for IVs and Kim is incredibleeeeee at them. Never once needed more than one poke, and just like the Botox, you don’t feel a thing. I’ve had terrible bruising from bad pokes at other places, but Kim? Miracle hands.
If you’re looking for someone who knows what they’re doing and makes the whole experience comfortable, Kim’s the GOAT. 🐐

These ladies were beyond great!! My first time getting lip filler I was scared, nervous, anxious all the above! Lol,  Clissa explained everything well.
She was very professional,  friendly,  most of all gental I felt no pain at all..
I will be going back to this place for all my services!! Also the ladie at the front desk was so helpful,  kind, informative for everything I asked!! You ladies rock!! Thanks so much!!! 💋

alpine-integrated-medicine-redmond.text: Check your billing statements carefully. Several reviews include billing issues. Mine does too- the office pushed me to get my lab work done in clinic, and insisted they would bill my insurance. Then they failed to bill my insurance correctly. I provided my cards repeatedly in person, via email, and gave them the information over the phone. They kept telling me someone from billing would follow up. Finally, billing reaches out to me, almost a year later. They still have me as self pay, they still haven't billed my insurance, and they are threatening to send me to collections. I also felt over billed in clinic, I had booked two one hour appointments back to back (one for my child and one for me).  However, the doctor told me to make another appointment instead of providing the full hour to us each- we were out of the 2 hour scheduled appointment in less than a hour. When I attempted to address it with front office staff- they had me pay for the appointments but would not explain if we were being billed for an hour appointment each. Instead they defered me billing, who never got back to me.

I cannot say enough wonderful things about Alpine Integrated Medicine. From the moment you walk in, you feel welcomed, heard, and genuinely cared for. The entire team is professional, kind, and efficient—but what truly sets this practice apart is Dr. Pangle. I can't thank her enough for everything.
Great Service! I tend to get my IV infusions here and the nurses are always helpful. The atmosphere is calming and welcoming. Will definitely be coming back soon!
Overpriced services with inexperienced nursing staff. The nurse repeatedly failed to find my vein, causing pain and frustration. I expected much better care for the cost.
Dr. Hannah was amazing! Great at starting IVs and has a beautiful and tender heart. Everyone in the office is kind and empathetic.

zyra-clinic-redmond.text:
My wife and I visited Dr. Jade at her office in Redmond WA. Dr. Jade was friendly and professional. I had the B-12 injection and my wife had multiple micro needling sessions. We are both very happy with the results. Dr. Jade went above and beyond to ensure that all our questions were answers. She reviewed the labs from my annual exam to make sure the B-12 injections were safe for me.

My wife can't stop looking at herself in the mirror. We highly recommend Dr. Jade for all your needs.

Jade is an AMAZING lip injector. Such a good eye, so natural and so skilled. The topical numbing gel worked SO much better than a different clinic I went to, so I couldn’t even feel it. My swelling is also way less than the other place I went. Great price, overall 10/10

I had an amazing experience at Zyra. I came in for weekly NAD injection, and Dr. Jade made me feel completely comfortable throughout the process. She is incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to explain everything in detail, answering all my questions with patience and expertise. She listened to all my concerns, went over my medical history, and suggested what would be the best treatment plan for me. I feel so heard and taken care of at Zyra.
I am someone who afraid of needle but Dr Jade made the experience so easy, quick and painless.
The space itself is so cute and clean, which made the experience less intimidating. Plus, parking was super easy, which is always a bonus!
I’m already feeling the benefits and will definitely be back for more treatments.

I had lip filler done with Dr. Jade and I could not be more pleased with my experience. Not only was she very personable, she was very knowledgeable about the technique and products she was using. She explained everything she would be doing and made sure I was comfortable before moving forward. I appreciated her honesty and cautious approach with filler/botox. Jade was super gentle with the needles and I left with minimal swelling and bruising. 10/10 would recommend. I will be going back for future treatments!

I went to Jade for Botox and filler, and she is seriously that girl. She has such a steady, gentle touch and explains everything in a way that makes you feel safe, seen, and in control. My results look smooth, lifted, and completely natural.. the kind of glow people notice but can’t quite figure out. Jade doesn’t rush, she actually studies your face and enhances what you already have. The whole vibe was clean, calming, and super professional. If you want someone who’s talented, honest, and has an artistic eye, Jade is the one. I’m already planning my next visit.

the-dripbar-fairfield-iv-therapy-fairfie.text:
Absolutely amazing experience at this drip bar! From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was clean, calming, and welcoming. The staff was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to explain every option, making sure I chose the perfect drip for my needs.

I felt the difference almost immediately—more energized, clear-headed, and refreshed. Everything was done professionally, safely, and comfortably, which really put me at ease. You can tell they truly care about their clients and their well-being.

If you’re looking to boost your energy, recover faster, or just feel your best, this is the place to go. I’ll definitely be coming back and recommending it to everyone I know!

I had an amazing experience at this drip bar. The staff was extremely knowledgeable, professional, and made me feel comfortable from start to finish. Everything was clean, well-organized, and explained clearly. I left feeling refreshed, energized, and well taken care of. You can truly tell they care about their clients’ health and wellness. Highly recommend!”

Priscilla & Anthony run a well oiled machine at this location. Always takes good care of me, consistent staffing I never feel like I'm with a stranger starting  all over again like I have at the locations in the city, here I always leave educated more about my health & have created a solid plan for my wellbeing. This location has everything you need to reboot with kind consistent staff to walk you through  this journey  Thanks to the staff at The Drip bar Fairfield

The DRIPBaR in Fairfield is truly top notch. I’ve been coming here for years, and every visit leaves me feeling relaxed, refreshed, and re-energized. Their IV therapies have made a noticeable difference in my overall health and energy levels, and I genuinely look forward to my sessions.

I also love the red light therapy and halotherapy - such a great bonus for total wellness. What really sets them apart is the quality of their vitamins. They use high-quality, safe formulations, including options that are appropriate for those with the MTHFR mutation, which gives me so much peace of mind.

As a doula, I’m very intentional about what I recommend to my clients, and I confidently refer them to The DRIPBaR all the time. The staff is knowledgeable, professional, and welcoming, and the environment is always calm and clean. Highly recommend to anyone looking to invest in their health and well-being!

I can’t praise this business enough! The nurse Priscilla is so educated & personable! She walked me through EVERY step, helped me understand any contradictions because of my aspirin allergy & overall got me back to health in the shortest amount of time EVER! I was so pleased that I became a member & started regular visits to keep that feeling going & help my body age backwards! Anthony @ the front desk is a gem as well! Always a smile & accommodating attitude to ensure every visit feels comfortable & puts me at ease! They’ve become my wellness family & I absolutely love the location in Fairfield so close to Trader Joe’s! Keep up the great work guys!

ethereal-aesthetics-vancouver.text: I just want to say that I had the most amazing experience. Jennifer is a master in whatever service she provides. I had cheek fillers and an IV drip procedure. She was so gentle and so professional. She is hands down the best in her practice. Her receptionist Ally was so sweet and very efficient in explaining services and cost. I would 100% recommend this company!

Jennifer and Alec are very warm and welcoming. Alec makes you feel at ease and comfortable as soon as you walk in their office. Jennifer is extremely knowledgeable regarding treatments and skin care products. I am a 72 year old female and after discussing my expectations, Jennifer recommended Protenza RF and I have had three Protenza RF treatments. I am thrilled with the results so far. Jennifer has explained that my results will continue to improve over the next several months. I’ve also had filler and Botox done at Ethereal Aesthetics with wonderful results. I would definitely recommend Ethereal Aesthetics for all your skin care needs.

Jennifer is a fountain of knowledge and she makes me feel comfortable and educated about the injections I’ve received. I referred my daughter to her and she is very pleased with the results of her Potenza Treatments. She goes above and beyond with her attention to detail. She is an absolute delight and we love her!!!

Jennifer is so sweet and patient. I tend to ask a lot of questions and for first time I tried Daxxify instead of Botox. It took around 5 days to see the difference and it looks really good. I will be checking on monthly specials for other services. Thank you, Gayle

So very impressed with this place. Haven't found a place I liked since moving here 7 years ago so I have been traveling to my old spot every few months for Dysport. Saw this team on Insta and thought I would try them out. Jennifer was very informative and so pleasant to chat with. Got Daxxify and am returning this month for some filler. Oh and it was very affordable! Thank you for the great service!

root-infusions-and-wellness-south-easton.text: Is it possible to give more than five stars? Root infusions was an amazing experience from start to finish! Maddie was amazing! Her experience, knowledge and the way she explains everything makes you feel confident in everything you’re getting. I highly recommend getting a drip today you won’t regret it. I feel amazing and I will be a life long customer!

The drip you didnt know you needed! I cant say enough good things about Maddie.  You walk in tired, foggy, run down..then walk out feeling sharp, hydrated, and ready to take on the world. She’s got this down to a science.  The vibe, the skills, and the setup that makes this whole thing easy (and kinda fun especially if being poked with needles arent really your thing like me). Highly recommend this if you like feeling like the best version if yourself 💪💉

Thank you Maddie! Will be back for many more 😎

I was getting sick over Christmas and wanted to stop it before it got worse so I could enjoy Christmas with my family. I frantically looked for a place that would take me Christmas ever and found root infusion. Maddie was super nice and it was a relaxing experience. She added in extra vitamins and a discount so it wasn't too expensive. It gave me soo much energy I was able to enjoy Christmas without feeling terrible. I did end up having strep but my symptoms were not bad. I am also one that gets sick every few weeks and knock on wood I have not been sick since.

I've been feeling run down lately, so I decided to try Root. Maddie was incredibly friendly and knowledgeable, and the infusion itself was relaxing and rejuvenating. I felt a noticeable difference in my energy levels almost immediately. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking to boost their health and wellness!

My husband and I did mobile IV services and the experience from start to finish was top notch! Maddison was professional, knowledgeable, organized and so personable! Not to mention, after the drip - we were feeling SO energized and ready to take on the day. Highly recommend root infusions!!!

inshapemd-clinic-redmond.text: I had both IV and Botox done at InShapeMD Clinic, and I couldn’t be happier with my experience! Echo is incredibly professional and attentive, and the clinic itself is spotless and welcoming. This has become the only place I trust and come to for my treatments. Highly recommend!
New owner, very professional and knowledgeable.  I got my NAD+ IV here and I feel amazing.  Highly recommend!
This clinic is perfect! I did a hydra facial today and the process was very comfortable, the staffs was incredibly friendly! And I can see the difference on skin immediately

I had an outstanding experience at this clinic. The staff is extremely professional and well-trained, making me feel comfortable and confident throughout my visit. The clinic itself is spotless and well-maintained, which reflects their high standards of care. What impressed me most is that they genuinely care about their patients, it’s not about making money, but about giving honest advice on what you actually need. I highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for top notch care and trustworthy guidance.

I just finished my mesotherapy session! Echo was amazing — she explained everything clearly beforehand, including the aftercare and what to expect during the treatment. I’ve been to many practitioners for skin boosters, and Echo is definitely someone I would recommend. It’s so important to use high-quality needles and change them frequently during the procedure — and she did exactly that! Her technique was gentle yet precise. Highly professional and attentive. I’ll definitely be coming back!

vio-med-spa-redmond.text:
I had my RF microneedling done here, and honestly, I was just checking out places where I’d feel comfortable coming back for future treatments. From the moment I walked in, Erica made me feel welcome and even gave me a short tour of the spa — something I’ve never experienced before. Normally, you just show up, get the service, and leave.

Vio Med Spa is truly amazing. I had Eli assisting me, and the experience was phenomenal from start to finish. He’s incredibly gentle, walks me through the entire procedure, makes me feel confident, and gives helpful information throughout.

His demeanor and style are such a vibe! Everyone at the spa is professional, friendly, and makes me feel like I truly belong there. Highly recommend!

I had a great experience here! Everyone from beginning-to-end was friendly, knowledgeable, and open to answering all my questions as a newbie. It feels more like a community than a spa honestly! I attended an evening learning/socializing event, which was informative but also just so fun to meet other local women. Both Andreyah (esthetician) and Katie (nurse) were incredible. I started with a consultation and VISIA skin analysis, and they helped guide my treatment in a conservative and data-informed way. So, if you're new to professional skin care, I'd highly recommend trying this place as they're welcoming, thoughtful, and highly professional.

I saw Andreyah at the Redmond location for facial and my skin feels soft and is glowing. I couldn’t be happier. The products she used were so gentle that it didn’t cause any reactions considering my skin is pretty sensitive. The whole experience was phenomenal throughout! Looking forward to booking my next appointment:)

I had a great BBL Moxi laser treatment at VIO Med Spa in Redmond with Andreyah! She was warm, professional, and made me feel comfortable right away. She clearly explained what to expect, checked in during the treatment to make sure I was comfortable, and gave really helpful aftercare guidance. You can tell she truly cares about her clients. I’d absolutely recommend her and already booked my next treatment! ✨

Only go if you want to be instantly greeted with a warm smile and receive 5 star luxury service! Adore this team and all their services have been amazing! My only face spa go-to. Today's facial with beautiful Andreyah was a comfy cozy delight! Dewy face, happy client! Highly recommend joining their membership. BIG perks:)

tri-cities-ketamine-infusion-and-wellnes.text: Kelly is amazing! She answers all your questions and concerns and makes you feel comfortable and seen. She is very helpful with pre and post treatment to ensure a pleasant experience. I am not one to use Botox or fillers. However, I decided to try RF micro needling to help soften acne scars from my youth. I am looking forward to some textural improvement. Number 1 of 3 is complete. Very pleasant experience.

I could give this establishment a 10 star review I would! I’ve been dealing with an  autoimmune disorder and they always go above and beyond with my care. I wasn’t able to finish one of their bags due to a flare up happening during treatment, they put half a bag on my file so that way if I come in again, I’m able to finish a full bag, even though they still have to throw away the bag I left half full. They also gave me a blanket because I was cold, offered it without even asking. I got an iron infusion and then right after got another treatment pack, my vein wasn’t really liking something in it so my nurse gave me a warm pack to help! I could go on and on about the incredible service i’ve received there. That was my fifth iron infusion and everytime i go im never disappointed. Sorry for the long ramble, but I can’t express enough of how amazing this facility is to have in Tri-Cities.

My doctor referred my son and I here a few weeks ago. He was suffering from OCD, anxiety and depression and started Ketamin infusions. I have noticed a difference in his overall being. The staff is always super welcoming and make us feel comfortable to be here. I definitely want to try their other services they offer as well. I definitely recommend this facility!

My very first visit anywhere getting Botox. Was happy with the ease and comfort, I felt coming into the unknown. Was educated a bit. As well as asked if I had a price range in mind. I thought that was super thoughtful and considerate to try to spread my money as far as possible with what I was trying to correct with Botox services. Tho I was willing to let them do as much as they thought I needed for what I wanted corrected❤️will be recommending people whenever I can!

I am part of the VIP Club at Tri-Cities Infusion and Wellness Clinic ever since my doctor retired. I get a vitality IV once a month, and they have beauty treatments and products as well as IV treatments. Check them out! All the nurses are very competent with what they do. One of the doctors that interviews you before you start any treatment was my primary care doctor before limiting her schedule. She chose the wellness clinic. The atmosphere is light and airy, and there is a sense of pleasantness with all who work there. Check it out!

prime-iv-hydration-wellness-spokane-spok.text:

iv-bars-edgewater.text: My first experience here is wonderful. The associate was informative, patient, and helpful with this experience. The process was quick and efficient. I left so wounded and in worst shape than I went in. I’m young and healthy and they tried saying it was because I was dehydrated so I drank a whole bottle of water, an entire bottle of Gatorade, waited a while in between attempts and nothing. I asked to get refunded for the month of August, since that was the only day I was available to come in and it’s not my fault they weren’t able to find a vein. They refused and when I asked to cancel they said the only way was to come in person. The worst part is I found out they’re not even nurses, the ones working there are paramedics. I wish I knew this before getting poked 7 times!! Would not recommend this place.

rejuvenate-wellness-aesthetics-iv-hormon.text:
I have had the best experiences at Rejuvenate Wellness & Aesthetics. All the thanks to the wonderful Kelly, her expertise and encouragement, Therapeutic Botox has made an incredible difference in my daily neck pain and tension headaches.

Before starting the treatment, I dealt with constant neck tension and stiffness along with daily tension headaches. The headaches were severe enough that I was taking medication every day just to try to help with the pain. Even with medication, the relief was limited and temporary.

Since Kelly started doing therapeutic Botox on me, the change has been both very noticeable and consistent. My neck muscles feel significantly more relaxed, my range of motion has improved, and the tension headaches that used to be part of my everyday life have dramatically decreased. I no longer rely on daily medication to manage the pain, I feel more comfortable, my sleep is better and I just feel more functional overall.

What surprised me most was how natural the relief feels. Instead of masking symptoms, Botox addressed the muscle tension that was causing both the neck pain and headaches. When the treatment starts to wear off, I can clearly tell how much it has been helping me, which only highlights further how effective this therapy has been for me.

I would absolutely recommend going to Kelly for therapeutic Botox to anyone struggling with chronic neck pain or tension headaches. It has been a safe, effective, and truly life-changing treatment for me.

Wonderful Service and a Calming Atmosphere

I had a wonderful experience at Rejuvenate Wellness and Aesthetics. From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with warmth and genuine friendliness that immediately put me at ease. The staff were incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and attentive, taking the time to make sure I felt comfortable and well cared for.

The atmosphere was calm, peaceful, and beautifully designed — exactly what you’d hope for in a wellness space. Everything from the lighting to the scent and music created a relaxing environment that helped me fully unwind.

It’s clear that everyone here truly cares about their clients’ well-being. The balance of professionalism and personal attention made the entire experience exceptional.

She is very knowledgeable about injections, and I have never had a single issue in the multiple years I have been seeing her. She lets me know about sales/ promotions without being pushy about selling them to me, which makes it a stress free, low pressure environment. My Botox always turns out amazing and she is really good about educating you about the aftercare to ensure excellent results.  No face rubbing! She reminds me multiple times because she knows I’m a face rubber! She checks in with me after 2 weeks to make sure I am happy with my results. Which I always am! Very responsive and kind staff. The front desk is great too. She is good about working with my schedule for appointments. The price you can’t beat. I know they offer many different treatments that one day I will explore further. Highly recommend this place and Kelly. Thank you for helping me feel beautiful ! ❤️

He uses an approach that I have found unique compared to other doctors I have been to. His approach I find to be preferable for my needs. Him and the rest of the staff that I have worked with listen to my needs. I prefer Apollo Health enough to keep my current job because my health insurance is accepted there.. otherwise I may quit my job.  It is nice that he has vitamins as well ( I believe many, maybe all are vegetarian and that  I prefer).

revive-drip-gig-harbor.text:
I LOVE RevIVe Drip! I am a return client and absolutely love the results!  Everyone is friendly, knowledgeable and knows what they are doing and what my needs are.  Every time I’ve had great results and so thankful they are here in Gig Harbor. Don’t hesitate to make an appointment you will be happy you did!! I’ve had the Myers cocktail a number of times and highly recommend it, I’ve also done add-on’s like zofran which really helps when you feel nauseated.
Kelli H.

Wonderful staff and great service. The NAD+ b-12 shot helped Tremendously with some Neuropathy issues I was having due to heavy stress and an MTHFR deficiency. Next day I noticed 70% percent reduction in my tingling feeling in my hands and feet. The folks here are passionate about this work you can tell.

We brought our baby in the next treatment and they were so good to us and the baby. Cindy and Bailey spent time holding here while we relaxed and enjoyed our infusion. Good place. Good people . Good treatments = 5 Stars

I have always talked about using their services, but finally did this week for a minor migraine for my daughter that didn’t warrant an ER Visit but we decided to give it a try and see if the migraine infusion at Revive Drip would do anything. It was super easy to book online, with tons of appointments available same day. The facility is beautifully done and comfortable. We were literally in and out in 30 minutes, offered snacks and water, and basically anything else she would have needed to make her comfortable. By the time we left, she was completely pain-free, and the cost was less than I would’ve paid in co-pays at the ER. Revive Drip has definitely earned our business, highly recommend!

Well they have a lot of signs where to go which was helpful !
I walked in the doors and there was a flight of wide stairs . The building inside is very clean and white , you climb the stairs and then I was immediately greeted by a tech . She was so lovely ! She was like are here for the wellness Wednesday and I said yes she said are you Marissa ? And I’m like yes ma’am .
Do your paperwork online they send you a link and it’s super easy to work through it just speeds the process up
.
She took my blood pressure and I let her know I was under the weather the last week since I too work with patients . So I got the b, zinc and gluco . I also had a raging migraine . So I really needed this to work .
She was an angel lined the needle up flawlessly and instantly was hooked up to the drip. You just relax on the chairs and then boom finished . I added an extra on and paid a total of $125 .

I felt very safe and well taken care of here . They have all the add ons or infusions printed out and what you are geared for .  The tech will help you decide if you aren’t sure .

This was by far a great experience and I will be back !
My headache stopped , and I felt recharged . I slept and was wide awake at 4am ready to go .

Thank you Revive !

This was my first time doing a drip.
I did it with 2 of my daughter's and it was so relaxing!
All the ladies were so nice, funny and attentive.
They also kept me apprised of the score of the Seattle Mariners game that was playing which was very important. 😂
All in all it was a wonderful, relaxing and enjoyable experience.
Cant wait to go back.
Jill M.

nouveau-medspas-gig-harbor.text: My experience with Dr. Rubin is relatively new. However, with my 2 visits, I have found her office to be a very warm and welcoming environment. I'm excited to begin my journey with Dr. Rubin and her staff. I couldn't recommend her more!

Went to Nouveau for 2 years. They were always super professional, friendly, and welcoming. I had a lot of questions and Dr. Rubin, Kelly, and Mary always took the time to answer everything and go over all of my concerns. Highly recommend, will always be my go to.

Wonderful helpful and patient staff.  Dr Rubin was very knowledgeable with information that was very helpful.  she spent a great deal of time with me to explain her recommendations and extend comfort.
Best med spa ever… fantastic place . Dr Rubin is brilliant I’d highly recommend there services … you wot regret it ! From infusions to hydrofacials and now GLP plus more. Go here it’s the best!!!

I appreciate Dr. Rubin and her staff for helping to get my weight under control. After menopause, no matter how active or healthy I tried to be, I could not get my weight to stabilize. Dr. Rubin has been able to help me.

empowered-med-spa-tacoma.text: I am always greeted with a smile and the front seat is always so helpful with scheduling. Shannon, Shannon and Jen are all amazing women! They are knowledgeable in what they do, gentle with their treatment and so easy to talk to. I never feel like they are upselling me. I love how conservative Shannon was with my Botox and fillers. I have loved every appointment I have had there and always leave feeling great about myself! Thanks ladies!!

Empowered Med Spa in Tacoma is exceptional. The entire team is professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in helping clients feel confident and empowered. Their range of services — from injectables and laser treatments to microneedling, body contouring, IV therapy, and weight-loss programs — makes it a one-stop destination for both aesthetic and wellness needs.

You can tell they care about safety, quality, and delivering real results. Highly recommend.

Shannon K. was amazing to work with. She is knowledgeable, honest, and passionate about the work she does. My experience was more than positive.

I also have to shout out to Gale at the reception desk for always offering great conversations in the waiting lobby! Due to Shannon and I’s consultations and her recommendations, I was able to maximize my weightloss results while on Semiglutide (before it was discontinued) and have lost a significant amount of weight in under a year. I am beyond grateful to have found Empowered Medspa at the time that I did. Whatever service you are considering, I would absolutely recommend Empowered Medspa!

As a first time newbie getting lip filler, I absolutely loved my experience getting my new pout! Cayla was so experienced and gentle taking all my fear of getting poked away instantly! I love how the RH3 product she recommended settled into my lips and I can’t wait to come back for my botox and NAD IV infusion visit next week! Excited to see the final result once my minimal swelling and bruising goes down! I mean take a look at my new lip shape!

I initially met Shannon for Botox/Xeomin and she has always done a great job with placement and suggesting where it would help the best. I then started seeing her for Semaglutide and have loved her care and attention to my weight loss journey. She is such a great provider, for the little and the big stuff! I highly recommend her!

pinnacle-health-and-spa-tacoma.text:
Had a great experience at Pür Life Medical. The staff were very friendly and knowledgeable. I went in curious about improving my health. I started out with a body scan that showed me the different areas of my body that needed improvement. It identified the circulation issues I have in my shoulders and arms (see video). Next I went onto the grounding machine.     After that I finished in the red light therapy bed. The red light therapy is good to treat skin issues, like stretch marks, wrinkles, reduce inflammation, repair muscle, and promote healthy aging.

Next time I come in I’ll be getting an IV with some NAD and vitamins.

I asked what else they offer and they offered weight loss solutions, pain relief and IV’s for health and wellness.

The shop is very clean and modern. The staff is friendly and you can tell they genuinely care about helping you get healthier.

A Life-Changing Experience at Pinnacle Spa – Highly Recommend!

I started coming to Pinnacle Spa in Tacoma in December 2023, and it has been a truly transformative part of my wellness and weight loss journey.

At first, I was a bit skeptical — I came in for red light therapy, unsure of what to expect. But I saw visible results after just one session: my face looked noticeably less swollen, and I felt more energized. That small change gave me the confidence to commit to their 3-month protocol.

During those three months, I went from 167 lbs to 145 lbs, and most importantly, the weight I lost was primarily fat. The treatments helped reset my body in a way I didn’t think was possible. I also made sure to stay active and follow the personalized nutrition guidance based on their scans. Now, I’m at 139 lbs, feeling strong, healthy, and more confident than ever.

I’m currently preparing for a natural bodybuilding competition, and I’ll be doing another round of their treatments because everything they offer aligns with clean, natural health practices.

Beyond the results, the staff is absolutely incredible. Every time I walk in, I feel cared for, special, and genuinely spoiled. They’ve become more like family than just a wellness team.

If you’re on the fence or just looking for a place that supports both physical and emotional well-being, I can’t recommend Pinnacle Spa enough. It’s been one of the best decisions I’ve made.

Had a wonderful time during our Red Light relaxation party. Me and a few of my girlfriends took advantage of the intro scan and red light and had a fun evening of it with David and Bri. Definitely good people and great vibe. Loved the experience and Options available for a health life. Looking forward to planning an IV and facial party next!

I had the red light treatment just after they opened and I am still dreaming about it. Since I am always in pain, getting out of the red light bed and feeling so good after the treatment was amazing. At the time it was out of reach, but I think I can try it again. Wish me and others luck.

Pinnacle is a beautiful space with great people who want to help you meet your health goals. David was super helpful explaining and walking me through their awesome Menlascan machine. It gives you so much information about your body, truly amazing. Highly recommend stopping in and checking it out if you want to be proactive with your health.

i-iv-hydration-wellness-bentonville.text: I’ve had a lot of IVs over the years to treat my migraines and this was the most luxurious treatment I’ve ever had! Paul was so attentive and had me set up for full relaxation during my IV! Every bit of it was perfect. The massage chair and pillow for my arm, the heating pad for the IV and heated blanket to keep me warm, and cold cap. They even had comfy socks for me so I could get the full massage chair experience. The cherry on top was the eye massaging mask. Everything I never knew I needed! I feel completely rejuvenated. I HIGHLY recommend I IV to EVERYONE!

I already can’t wait to go back! The location is right next to my office so convenience is an understatement. I went on a Friday afternoon and had the whole place to myself. My first experience was fantastic. Everything was easy as far as new patient set up goes. All my questions answered and one stick for the IV placement! Thank you to Paul and Whitley for the above and beyond service.
This place is amazing. They pamper you while you are there. Halle was amazing, she hit the vein first time which is especially hard to do on me! Will go back for sure!

I had the BEST experience at I IV Hydration & Wellness. I’ve had food poisoning for the last 6 days and I was DOWN BAAAAD 😮‍💨. I couldn’t keep anything in, lost a ton of fluids, and honestly felt like a shell of a human.

A couple of my friends recommended I try an IV drip, and I’m SO glad I listened. Halle got me all set up online with intake forms, and Paul took it from there with making sure I had  the perfect drip and the perfect comfort level. (I mean it’s relaxing just WALKING IN). Now I’m feeling like a whole new person.

Thankfully, I think the food poisoning has officially passed, but now I’m just looking for another excuse to go back… maybe tomorrow 😂 If you’re dehydrated, sick, run down, or just need a reset, I can’t recommend I IV Hydration & Wellness enough. Total game changer.

Love love love! The whole aesthetic of the place is so cosy from the usual sterile environment you would picture. The staff is so kind, the chairs are so comfy, they have leg compression available, eye massagers, heating pads, you name it. & the owner is so kind! 10/10 recommend. I will definitely be back!

outbound-wellness-hood-river.text: Fantastic!  Brooke has come to my rescue more than once.  Sick with a terrible flu that turned into pneumonia, the IV cocktail she gave me relieved a long list of symptoms.  She was very skilled in getting a needle in my very dehydrated veins.    Other times when I have not been sick, I have loved going in to the studio in Hood River.     It’s such a fantastic space.  I brought a hydrating mask, headphones and a book to settle in to an NAD infusion.   Never a bruise from the needle. I leave well energized and a very real relief from inflammation in the muscles.

I don’t often write reviews, but I absolutely love Outbound Wellness.  I’ve seen Brooke for infusions and Ellieana for facials many times now and they are both amazing.  Ellieana’s facial treatments are top notch, and she is just the sweetest most caring esthetician I’ve ever known, and she makes my skin look and feel the best.  It is great to see the revival of the historic Union Building and what Brooke, with her deep roots in Hood River, continues to do with the space and with growing her business, adding practitioners and modalities to promote wellness.  I look forward to continuing to be a client and to enjoying the care and nurturing I always receive there.

Outbound is an excellent wellness center. I have received regular immune support IV infusions and this is the healthiest winter I’ve ever experienced. I sought out chiropractic treatment from TJ for back pain and had great results. Brooke and her roster of practitioners can address all of your wellness needs with a wholistic, professional, educational and effective approach.

I have been receiving IV therapy at Outbound Wellness for about a year, and each visit has been a wonderful experience. Brooke is incredibly kind and knowledgeable, and she consistently goes above and beyond for her clients. I highly recommend this place! Give it a try; you won't be disappointed, and it's great for your health!

I really cannot say enough about the level of quality care that's given here.  Brooke is truly a rare soul.  I always looked forward to going, simply because everyone working there is absolutely amazing.  I did chiro with TJ and have honestly never experienced this level of care with a chiropractor.  He is attentive, knowledgeable, caring and has a wide variety of modalities to offer.  I was blessed to find him, after being in a car accident.  He helped my neck, shoulders, back and headaches improve tremendously.
I also had the privilege of working with Jess (chiro)- and was extremely impressed.  She was kind, attentive, knowledgeable & had unique offerings that helped my pain level go down.  **Entirely grateful for my experience at this impactful place.**.

prime-iv-hydration-wellness-east-vancouv.text: I had a wonderful experience at Prime IV Infusion. From the moment I walked in, the staff was incredibly welcoming and made me feel comfortable right away. They took the time to answer all of my questions and explained everything clearly, which helped me feel confident that I was in very good hands. The whole experience felt calm, professional, and genuinely caring. You can tell they truly care about their clients and the quality of care they provide. I left feeling refreshed, supported, and very well taken care of. I would absolutely recommend Prime IV Infusion to anyone looking for a safe and welcoming place for IV therapy.

Veronica and team are exceptional!  I look forward to my monthly IVs as the customer service is friendly and the massage chairs relaxing. I travel 50% of the time for work and credit IVs for Boosting my immunity and keeping me healthy through the winter months.

I absolutely love everyone at Prime IV! The staff is the absolute sweetest and this starts from the owner, Veronika. I’ve been going here for around a year to get IV’s and injections! I have to say they are the best! Not only do they offer your typical IV therapy vitamins, antioxidants, and minerals… but they are now offering peptides! They now supply me with my GLP1 Tirzepatide. I am bio hacking my body with their help!

The moment I walked in, I was so impressed. The energy is incredible. Smiling faces greet you and move you right along. Everything is clean and so stylish! But it was truly the staff that was the most impressive. These are happy employees, which is a reflection of management and the work environment. The explanation of the procedure was thorough and educational. No pressure to "buy more" but instead options were presented and benefits explained.
The massage chair was invigorating while I had my IV administered. Overall, the experience was relaxing and painless.
I can't wait to go back . . . as much as I can.

The staff and owner Veronika are so extremely knowledgeable at Prime IV in East Vancouver.  I highly trust them to help me stay healthy, repair myself after an illness, or to help reverse signs of aging.  They are never pushy or try to upsell me on things I do not need.

For instance, I recently had a bottom molar that needed work done at the dentist's office, I felt as I had developed a slight infection as my ear and jaw were hurting.  To prepare for the dental procedure, I visited this clinic and the staff was able to put together a plan, explain what my body was doing to heal itself, and most importantly, they LISTENED to me!

I also sought out an IV when I was facing a family trauma.  They helped my body be in optimal health so that I could face the emotional needs my family and I were facing.

If you are facing anything in life, go see Veronika and her highly trained, caring, supportive, and fun staff!  You will feel very spoiled and well taken care of!

elevate-wellness-chelan.text:
What a relaxing and wonderful experience at Elevate. We came out to Chelan for a girls weekend and wanted to relax while focusing on rejuvenating our bodies, Elevate is the local go to place exactly for this.

I absolutely love the self entrance with no real time limit on using the facility.  It was extremely clean, serene and had everything you needed for an opportunity to jumpstart the circulation in your body.

My first time at doing a cold plunge after a sauna was extremely addicting. I can't wait to go back just for this. Everyone was extremely friendly and professional. I really enjoyed the relaxing atmosphere and the ability to relax and chat with my friends.

On top of utilizing the facilities, I had a facial and felt 10 years younger. Thanks to Stephanie whose gentle yet educational process helped me understand my skin and it's ability to reverse aging with the right products and care.

10 out of 10 I would do this agin.

Love this place! It’s gorgeous and has so many options to make you feel beautiful. The new sauna and cold plunge is fantastic. It’s a beautiful and relaxing space that I love to bring people visiting to do as a fun afternoon. Stephanie and her team are amazing! Book an appointment, you will be so glad you did.

Loved the space! Went with a group of 6 and there was plenty of room for everyone in the sauna. We bought our day passes on Saturday. Access to the building was easy and the hours were flexible. The vibe was *chefs kiss*.

This was my first visit to Elevate while visiting Chelan. We spent several hours here. What a wonderful place to unwind, relax and get connect. We did the cold plunge and sauna, which was probably the prettiest sauna i have ever used. Additionally, I got the derma planing facial from the owner Stephanie. OMG my skin feels amazing 😍, I left glowing. Stephanie has created such a wonderful place, I highly recommend. Next time I'm back in town, I'm coming back!

This place is awesome!  Amazing staff!  The cold plunge and sauna are top of the line.  I got a service done by Stephanie and it was so good, had to buy the same service for my wife and mom.  (We were all on vacation together last week in Chelan)  Definitely welcoming to out of town vacationers, and a great spot for locals too.

iv-elements-hoboken.text: I had an incredible experience at IV Elements! My RN named Julizza was very accommodating, gentle, and informative. She took such great care administrating my IV drip. This was my first time and definitely not my last. The facility is very clean, hot decaf teas and water is served, there are reclining chairs in the lounge, and it’s in a great location!

I just want to start of by saying I’v element is such a beautiful place. I got the stress relief with extra magnesium. The girls are beautiful and kinds. Today is my first time and I must admit this is so relaxing. I will be back thank so much

Great experience at IV Element. Clean space, professional staff, and I felt taken care of the entire time. I’ve been feeling under the weather so coming to get IV therapy was the right choice. Highly recommend

Absolutely loved my experience here! The team goes above and beyond to make you feel comfortable and cared for. They take the time to explain everything, check in on you throughout the process, and you can tell they truly care about their clients’ well-being. The IV drip itself was quick, easy, and left me feeling amazing — refreshed, recharged, and ready to take on the day. The whole vibe is welcoming, professional, and super positive. Highly recommend to anyone looking for both great results and an even better staff!

I cannot say enough good things about IV Elements. I switched here from a franchise IV place, and the difference was night and day.

I have MTHFR, so not every vitamin combo works for me, and they actually took the time to treat me like an individual instead of a number. They asked detailed questions, confirmed the specific type of B12 my body needs, and explained what each nutrient in my cocktail was doing and why it mattered for me. That level of knowledge and care is rare.

The service was professional, thorough, and genuinely personalized. My nurse Jess was amazing! I felt a noticeable difference immediately after my treatment — something I never once experienced at the franchise location.

If you’re going to let someone inject anything into your bloodstream, make sure it’s people who are knowledgeable, professional, and honest. This is hands down my new go-to spot. Highly recommend. 💧✨

integrated-wellness-psychiatry-tacoma.text: I could never find a provider that just listened to you instead of them just listening with their mind already made up. Ms. Shenika Williams and her staff are absolutely amazing and so caring. She listens and wants to be a part of every medical step you're going through and that's rare. It's mostly what do you want and hurry up to the next appointment. I wish I would have found her sooner, she has been a true blessing to my life and care.

Ms. Shenika listens to my concerns and gives me all the options available for my treatment. She's caring and understanding. Her team is great to work with and easily accessible when questions or concerns arise. The last 6 months, my health has seen a major improvement. Highly recommend Mrs. Williams and bwe team.

I had my monthly appointment today and truly appreciate the convenience of being able to meet with Dr. Shenika Williams via Zoom. As a mother, student, and working professional, my schedule is incredibly demanding, so having the flexibility to attend my appointments virtually is a tremendous help. Dr. Williams is consistently kind, attentive, and genuinely listens to my concerns, something I’ve not always experienced with other providers. Her care and professionalism make a meaningful difference in my healthcare experience.

So far so good… NP Williams was great ! Very considerate I was able to get a telehealth appointment same day I signed up… I was able to get approval for the medication I requested. And hopefully I’ll have a smooth experience at the pharmacy when I pick it up !

This place feels like a home away from home. All of the staff are so personable and you don't have to question if they care about you... it exudes from every interaction that I have with them. If you're looking for a truly holistic approach to care then I highly recommend Integrated Family Medicine and Aesthetic Wellness!

okojie-wellness-iv-infusion-therapy-vanc.text: I had an amazing experience at OKOJIE Wellness Clinic. I just received an IV drip and everything went smoothly from start to finish. The staff was excellent, very attentive and professional. The environment was calm, clean, and welcoming. I felt comfortable the entire time and I truly feel great afterward. I will definitely be coming back.

I came here for IV therapy and I am glad I did. This is the only place in Vancouver WA that offers it. They do other wellness stuff too. Very clean clinic. Extremely kind doctor. Took time to educate me and answer all my questions. Was easy and relaxing. Many IV wellness options to choose from. Good pricing, easy to understand and get add-ons. They also to HRT, TRT, Botox, peptide therapy, and more. Worth the visit.

This place is great! Clean, quick, and painless. You can tell this place brings in people that come back. Super friendly environment and I will %100 be returning. Can’t wait to see how the IV therapy makes me feel these next couple weeks, but I’m already feeling better.

Wow, this place is incredible! If you're looking to recover from soreness or feel like you've been hit by a bus after being sick for days, this is the place to be. My wife received a Myers' cocktail IV for her cold and severe migraine while getting red light therapy! I did just red light and feel like I got a boost of energy…  She feels so much better now. Dr. Okojie was extremely helpful in selecting the perfect cocktail for her needs and went above and beyond getting her extra care… Highly recommend!

Price is higher than most so I expected my stuff to come on time. This is the second time I've missed injection dates due to Shiping issues or people dropping the ball. BEEN WAITING STILL WAITING. NOT ONLY WAS i ghosted for an appointment. I was told don't wory your estrogen blocker will be there. A month later it's still not here. Then he wonders why I'm mad.

thrive-wellbeing-battle-ground.text: In complete state of relaxation and comfort. Kimberly  is an absolute dream from start to finish. I felt like I was in the best hands for our first IV experience! The space is a perfect combination of cozy and zen.

Oh my goodness what an amazing experience. With Kimberly you are the only guest for your duration of your appointment. So relaxing and she’s very gentle with the IV,  I napped the whole time! My new self are go too!! Thank you so much!!
Thank goodness I found this gem. Kimberly is  amazing and this place is gorgeous, clean and peaceful. If you need IV therapy, this is the spot.

Thrive is Amazing!! I recommend them to anyone looking to learn and explore the benefits of iv hydration and other natural holistic ways to optimize your everyday physical and mental health through natural vitamins and minerals. The environment is clean and peaceful, the education is insightful, the experience is relaxing and the results speak for themselves. I have come back multiple times now and am always left feeling encouraged in my health journey and empowered in my ability to impact my health in a positive way with real tangible results to look forward to.

I had an awesome experience with Kimberly! She really listened to what I was going through and gave me the perfect supplements to help me feel better. The vibe was super warm and welcoming, and once I got home, I went from feeling totally drained to back to my old self—way more energy and a better mood! I highly recommend her

nadashaa-heeni-vancouver.text: I just had the best experience, and wanted to share. Not only was she supper professional. She also had a large base of knowledge in her craft. For me it brought me comfort. Her kind words and open communication helped a difficult process go smoothly. I highly recommend Anisha for Iv treatment. Until she retires I will probably never go with a different outfit. Lord willing I outlive that day.

I come to Anisha every time I start to feel a little under the weather or I have a big trip planned. Her IVs really boost the immune system and I feel a marked difference within hours after the drip. Anisha is very knowledgeable in this space and takes great pride in the work she does. Would recommend to anyone looking for that immune boost or just wanting a pick-me-up.

Anisha is amazing. She is so good at what she does and truly puts the needs of her customers first. She makes the whole process so smooth and simple. She truly listens with the intent to understand, and therefore was able to wipe away any sense of nervousness that came up. Her business is a family one and she 100% is helping families with their health in order for them to live the best quality of life they can. Y’all need to go see her. She has a gift and is a true miracle. So thankful for her and her practice, her thoughtfulness, attention to detail, and her kind heart. Thank you!

A totally smooth and easy process. Everything from setting up your appointment, to consulting with the different services offered and the actual appointment. Anisha is friendly and has a way with doing the IV making it painless and easy. I’m a anti needle person.
I would highly recommend Nadashaa Heeni to my friends and family.

I started going to Anisha 5 weeks ago after Bariatric surgery. After just one visit I knew this was the right place for me. She is very welcoming and made me feel comfortable talking about my health care issues from the very beginning. She is very knowledgeable about many health care concerns. I told my friend it is like getting a one on one consultation on my health concerns while I receive the iv hydration.  I think her background in neonatal care at the hospital has given her a wealth of knowledge. She cares about her clients and wants what is best for them. I never feel rushed when I’m there and she is always on time. She has a caring heart and I end up feeling better when I leave then when I came in; both physically and mentally. I highly recommend her.

three-points-healing-olympia.text:
I came in as a new patient to 3 Point Healing, and it took an entire week to get ahold of anyone across multiple locations (Olympia and Federal Way). When I finally reached someone, we discussed my medical records and referral, and I was assured I could start treatment on Friday to avoid doing multiple intakes.

Then, after being told everything was set, I was suddenly informed I still needed an intake — and now I couldn’t be seen on Friday at all. This was after explicit reassurance from Kim, relaying information from Dr. Mina.

At this point, I have no idea how this place is functioning as a business. I would strongly recommend staying away.

3 points healing has the best staff. Very kind and very open minded. Alot of options to get healthy mentally and physically here, and not to mention with appearance too. If you are looking for an amazing place to get healthy, this is it. As soon as you walk in the door you feel a sense of tranquility. I recommend you give it a try, you won't be disappointed.

The staff is amazing. Kind and welcoming at the front desk and knowledgeable and caring therapists as well as the psychologist. They have all types of therapy to meet each person where they are at and help them move forward!! I’ve been here for almost 2 months and already feel so much better

I've had nothing but good experiences here. As a veteran, it's important to me that I have some measure of control over my medical care. A lot of times the VA you get what you get. Here, I was given a few options on my treatment to choose from, and picked what I thought was the best way forward.

I would recommend them to other veterans.

3 Points Healing has been so beneficial to me since I have been coming a year ago. I feel very welcome and the staff is very professional. From being signed in by the front desk, to the services I receive are all top notch. I highly recommend 3 points healing for all your health and wellness needs. I would give more stars if I could.

rehydrate-iv-infusion-shelton.text:
I had my first appointment at Rehydrate in Shelton, CT and it was an incredible experience from start to finish!  The entire team was welcoming, professional, and genuinely attentive. They took the time to really listen to my goals and concerns, and I never once felt rushed.

Dominika, the owner, did my treatment and was absolutely fantastic! She was knowledgeable, thorough, and explained every step of the process in detail! She made sure I understood what she was doing, why she was doing it, and what results to expected to be. Her precision and professionalism immediately put me at ease. The level of care and quality of service truly stood out!

It's clear they prioritize both safety and results, and they go above and beyond to make sure you feel comfortable and confident. The space itself is clean, calming, and beautifully maintained.

If you're looking for a medspa that combines expertise, transparency, and top-tier service, Rehydrate is it! Hands down!!

I'Il absolutely be back and highly recommend them to anyone considering going to a Medspa for any kind of treatment!

Dominika and Staff are wonderful! They are very caring, and I feel not just like their client, but part of their extended family for well over a year now. They treat each of us with respect and have the experience and expertise to handle all situations. The services they provide to me ( including Injections, Red Light Therapy, Infrared Sauna and Compression ) allow me to feel like a better version of myself with each visit. The cleanliness of the Shelton CT facility is impeccable and the variety of their Medical Spa services is vast! Please stop by for a visit — there’s a holiday promotion going on — you will not be disappointed! 😀

This was my first time coming here and the experience was amazing! My appointment was for the red light therapy. Dominika was very gracious, kind, professional, and  patient. She answered all of my questions and concerns. She walked me to the red light therapy room, and gave me instructions on how to operate the red light therapy bed. The red light therapy felt so good. I thought I would overheat, but I did not. It felt very therapeutic. After my session was over, we discussed skin care and vitamin injections, packages and memberships. This place Is a well kept secret-it’s a gem in Shelton. Highly recommended and I will be returning. Thank you Dominika!!!!

I had the pleasure of meeting Dominika during a conference, and a few months later, I booked an appointment due to a vitamin D deficiency. Her team thoroughly evaluated my blood results, and we discussed the best ways for me to achieve a healthy level of vitamin D.

I was curious about other services she offers, and Dominika kindly took the time to explain them to me. During my visits, I often had questions about the services I was interested in, and the team was always ready to address my inquiries without ever pressuring me to book additional services or packages. This approach is refreshing; they genuinely focus on helping you rather than pushing sales.

The facility itself is amazing—peaceful, welcoming, and top-notch. It's clear that Dominika founded Rehidrate for the right reasons. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking to feel healthy and revitalized
Had an amazing experience under Dominika’s care. Thoroughly enjoyed the red light therapy bed and compression sessions. Would definitely recommend to anyone who is feeling out of it or sore.

twin-rivers-iv-wellness-lounge-clayton-n.text:
After having the stomach bug 2 weeks ago, I was absolutely running on empty. I started experiencing dizziness and decided to go to Twin Rivers. From the moment I called, I received the best customer service.
Hailey was incredible!! She listened to my concerns and was able to recommend several options. I also really appreciated that she asked me my budget before recommending anything. The infusion itself was quick  and easy and I left feeling much better. I'm so glad this service was available. I would highly recommend Hailey and the team at Twin Rivers!!!!

If you’re looking for someone who truly cares about helping women look and feel their best, I highly recommend Hailey Godwin.

Her attention to detail, professionalism, and ability to enhance natural beauty is unmatched. She doesn’t just provide a service—she creates an experience that leaves you feeling confident, refreshed, and empowered.

Women supporting women and helping each other shine… that’s always a win.

My first experience with the boutique IV services ever & I’m so glad I chose Twin Rivers! Hailey was so kind, personable, and I felt like I was meeting with a girl friend I’ve know for years. She did great with the services and explained everything in great detail and got my IV perfectly. Not to mention I already feel great after the service. 100/10 all around! I’ll definitely be back!!!

From the moment I walked in, the environment was incredibly relaxing, clean, and welcoming. The staff members are truly amazing, warm, attentive, and genuinely invested in making sure you feel comfortable and cared for. I tried both the IV infusion and the sauna, and each service left me feeling refreshed, rejuvenated, and well taken care of. The team took the time to explain everything clearly, and their positive energy made the entire visit even better. If you’re looking for a place to unwind, recharge, and be supported by an exceptional group of people, this is absolutely the spot. Highly recommend!

I had an excellent experience at Twin Rivers hydration spa and couldn’t be more grateful for Hailey, hydration specialist and Sarah who’s the manager. From the moment I arrived, Hailey and Sarah took the time to walk me through all of my options and made sure I fully understood what each IV offered. They were incredibly patient, knowledgeable, and never made me feel rushed. Starting the IV was handled so gently, which I really appreciated—it made the whole experience comfortable and stress-free. Sarah, was just as impressive, clearly explaining pricing upfront and going over potential side effects so there were no surprises. This  crew truly made sure I had everything I needed and that I  felt confident in my choice. I highly recommend this spa to anyone looking for professional, caring, and transparent service.

elevating-wellness-nw-llc-lacey.text: I recently visited this clinic and was immediately enveloped in its incredibly relaxing, professional, and personal atmosphere that put me at ease from the start. I appreciated the soft chairs that are so comfortable and plush. What truly makes this place special is their adorable clinic dog, who sweetly wanders around, as she follows the doctor and checks on patients with her intuitive ability to read people’s energy. She has such a polite and comforting presence, turning every visit into something heartwarming!

I have been a patient here for almost 3 years now. After searching for a provider that actually cares and listens to me, I am so grateful to have found Dr. Eric at Elevate Wellness. Their IV therapies are some of the best on the market unlike most clinics that offer this service. 10/10. Thank you Dr. Eric for getting me healthy again!

I love everything about Elevating Wellness NW!!  The staff is so friendly and helpful!  It is such a welcoming place when I walk in!  Dr. Eric is the best!!!  He takes his time with me and listens to what I  have to say and is very knowledgeable with the answers to any questions I have!  Call and make an appointment, you won’t be disappointed!
