I would definitely recommend Elevating Wellness!! Dr. Eric offers many great services,  at an affordable price. He really listens to his patients and takes time to answer questions. Dr. Eric also creates treatment plans personalized to the patient.

Took my dad to see Dr. Eric and I was truly amazed at the level of care he provided.  Dr. Eric took the time to actively listen and make my dad feel at ease.  I would highly recommend Dr. Eric to anyone looking for a naturopath physician!!

temple-natural-health-lacey.text: Dr. Jennea at Tummy Temple is amazing! We came in with no solution from gastro doctors, primaries and everyone else we could get in to see. We left our first appointment feeling better and with hope! Having the right care makes all the difference. If you havent tried colonic, we highly recommend it. Thank you, Dr. Jennea!
Dr. Wood provides excellent care and service to her patients. She works hard at educating me on opportunities to improve my health!

I can’t say enough good things about this clinic. Dr. Moses has been extremely knowledgeable and, unlike many other places I’ve been, they never feel rushed. They truly listen, care, and take time to understand all of my concerns. After years of dealing with insurance and bouncing between multiple primary care doctors and specialists, I finally feel like I’ve found a place that is putting all the pieces of the puzzle together. They’re helping me figure out my unique path back to health, and while I’m still in the process, I already feel incredibly grateful for the attention, care, and genuine interest they’ve shown in solving for my long-term wellbeing.

I recently had a colonic and the experience exceeded my expectations. Right away, I felt a noticeable difference—my belly felt so much lighter, and that sense of physical relief carried over into my mood and mindset. It was like a reset for my body, and mentally, I felt really good about making such a proactive choice for my health.

The procedure itself was far more comfortable than I anticipated, and I left feeling cleansed, refreshed, and more in tune with my body. It was a powerful reminder of how important it is to take care of our internal health, not just the parts we can see.

I’ll definitely be incorporating colon hydrotherapy into my wellness routine moving forward. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a clean start—literally and figuratively.

Dr Doughty is professional and kind provider.
I’ve been to her for NAD+ IV, it’s been a great experience for me. Comfortable and peaceful space!

paradigm-wellness-center-vancouver.text:
I hosted a small group event here for my birthday, and the experience exceeded expectations. Jen did an excellent job coordinating IVs for everyone who wanted one. She was professional, calm, and made the process feel easy and relaxed.

The facility itself is beautiful, clean, and thoughtfully designed. I felt completely comfortable receiving my own IV, which says a lot! The overall atmosphere struck a great balance between clinical competence and genuine warmth.

I would absolutely recommend Paradigm Wellness Center to anyone considering IV therapy or related wellness services.

I went in for an IV after having the flu for a much needed pick me up and had a wonderful experience.  Dawn & Jen took care of me and they were incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to really educate me on what would help me get back on the mend.  I loved the comfort and boutique style of clinic.  I've had many IV's in the past at different IV clinics and this was by far the best experience and pricing I've ever experienced!  Can't recommend enough!

I got my first vitality infusion and hyperbaric session at Paradigm and everyone made me feel so comfortable and it was such a relaxing classy environment. All the staff were so professional and I felt so much better immediately after finishing my IV therapy and feel like by body is more equipped now to finish healing from a recent virus it was holding onto.  Will definitely be recommending this place to everyone I know, so many options of things to support feeling your best!

I followed Jen from Camas Medspa because she’s THAT good.
From the moment I walked in, I felt completely at ease—the staff was welcoming, the environment was spotless and serene.
Jen is truly an artist. She takes the time to understand my goals, recommended a personalized approach, and delivers results that look natural. My forehead lines have softened beautifully, and my overall expression looks smoother and more youthful—but still completely “me.”
What stood out most was her attention to detail and gentle technique. The injections were quick and virtually painless, and there was minimal downtime afterward. Within a few days, I could already see a noticeable difference.

My buddy invites me to an IV party for his birthday before a weekend of going out and drinking. I tend to be a bit skeptical and am not great with needles. The nurse was very gentle and I barely felt anything. She was very attentive to the IV and making sure it went smoothly. It felt a little cold going in and other than that it was just a fun time with friends in a relaxing and homey environment. I felt very energized as we went out and could feel the rush of vitamins from the immunity boost. The next day, I definitely could tell my hangover was a lot better due to the IV.

body-balance-health-and-aesthetics-medic.text: I had an excellent experience thanks to Olivia. She consistently provides outstanding service and is always helpful, professional, and informative. I really appreciate how she takes the time to explain new treatments and make sure I understand my options. Her knowledge and friendly approach make every visit comfortable and positive. Olivia truly goes above and beyond, and I highly recommend her to anyone looking for great service and expert guidance.

Body Balance has been a game changer!
From the moment I walk through the door, I am treated like family. Alana’s personalized approach to HRT has truly changed my life. Her awareness, education, and guidance have empowered me to make the best decisions for this chapter in my life.
The beauty of Body Balance is that you also expertly address aesthetic needs. Who doesn't want to feel and look their best every day? Olivia’s approach to fine-tuning my facial balance has been nothing short of perfection. We work together to achieve my goal of healthy, lifted, glowing skin—she has a real talent!

Thank you for your excellent work.

I went to Body Balance for additional Fotona 4 laser treatments after having my initial sessions done by another provider in Portland, and I truly can’t recommend Body Balance enough. They were incredibly thorough—far more so than my initial provider—which made a huge difference in my experience and results.

They recommended a few additional treatments, and after discussing them with Alana, I decided to move forward. I am absolutely thrilled with the results. Choosing Body Balance is definitely one of the best decisions I’ve made in a long time, and I highly recommend them.

I had such a wonderful experience at Body Balance Health & Aesthetic Medicine! The spa is beautiful, clean, and welcoming from the moment you walk in. Alana was absolutely amazing — she’s professional, knowledgeable, and made me feel completely comfortable throughout my treatment. She took the time to explain everything and really listened to my concerns, which I appreciated so much. My results turned out even better than I expected!

If you’re looking for a med spa that combines expertise with genuine care, I can’t recommend Alana and the Body Balance team enough. I’ll definitely be coming back! 💆‍♀️✨

From the moment I walked into Body Balance, I knew I was in good hands.

The facility is beautiful, clean, and has a wonderfully relaxing atmosphere. The front desk staff was incredibly welcoming and professional from the start, making the check-in process seamless.

I came in for my normal Botox regimen  and had the pleasure of working with Olivia. I have been working with her the last few years and have gone where she goes. She is an absolute dream! Each time I visit Olivia, she takes the time to do a thorough consultation, ask if I have any concerns, and explains the entire process in detail, managing my expectations for the results and aftercare. When I visit her with limited time on my lunch breaks, I have still never felt rushed.

During the treatment itself, Olivia was gentle and communicative, ensuring I was comfortable throughout. I felt almost no pain, just a few "crunches and pokes" as she says.

I highly recommend Body Balance Health and Aesthetics and Olivia Pettit to anyone looking for professional work and genuine care. This is my new go-to place, and I can't wait for my next appointment!

holistique-iv-lounge-bellevue.text: Had the best experience at IV Lounge. I was scared at first, not knowing what to expect. I received the B-12 shot last week. I felt great like I was on top of the world. My mind was clear and mood was great. Also everyone was so sweet and welcoming which made it better. The experience felt like I was in a spa - relaxing. I am going back with my sister for the IV. Thank Again, IV LOUNGE!!!

I had the B12 shot a few days ago! I’m so excited that this place is here in Bellevue. The ladies at the front desk are soooo nice, professional, and amazing! I will be going back for IV therapy next time.

This is going to be game changing to the city! Wow!☺️☺️😊😊😊

Sit in the massage chairs too - they rock!

I love this place! I went in when they first opened for a hydration IV and loved my experience. I now go in regularly and I have even turned my freinds and family on to Holistique and they all go in now too. The staff is extremely friendly, comforting and knowledgeable about what they are doing. The facility itself is always very clean and has a very peaceful energy. Definitley reccomened Holisitique for whatever you may need!

Holistique IV lounge in Bellevue is AWESOME!
I’ve been going for about 6 months amd trust them so much I share with my friends, boyfriend but more importantly I have the Doctors work on my daughter she’s only 18 and has benefited from a couple of visits like The skin care IV you know teens and there acne? Also the Happiness IV aka vitamin D, and this morning we got her a jet lag IV being her soon to be volunteer trip to Costa Rica. She enjoys it and the staff so knowledgeable, relatable and FUN... how could this be? Not sure but they know there stuff and we adore them. Tamara you will meet at the onset of your visit and lucky you if you do engaging, multitasker, yielding, knowledgeable, terrific with all cultures (can I say that?) actually the entire front desk management so pleasant.. TIP... there website states... appt preferred as in walk ins accepted but in the last few months they have gotten busy, therefore make an appointment/reservation.
Love this place! Everyone is so kind. My only gripe is that chairs aren’t sanitized after each client. That’s almost enough for me to go elsewhere.

faces-in-bloom-vancouver.text: Did my first appointment to decide if I wanted to half syringe or full syringe for my lip fillers. It was my first time doing this , and it was also my birthday! So when I showed up these people people took there time to pick a room just for me and DECORATE FOR ME !!!!!!! There energy is energy you always want to be around and they are very smart in this field and keep you very safe feeling if you are a nervous person like me. They make sure you feel comfortable happy . Aside from that I ended up getting my lips done and OMG they are on point perfect! Today I did my follow up and they were willing to do anything I needed for my two week follow up if there was anything I didn’t like during my healing process they were pre paired and willing to correct it right there and then! But everything was perfect . Very respectfull polite happy out going crew and I honestly will continue going here thru out the years . 1 out of 10 by far a 100! Thank you , you guys so much for everything!

I went to Faces in Bloom for the first time today for Botox and lip filler. I was treated by Sarah B. What a great experience!

It is such a welcoming environment and Sarah is very knowledgeable. She answered all my questions, explained why she was injecting in certain areas, etc.

I left with the fuller lips that I wanted and am excited to see my final results. I have a follow up in two weeks.🙂

I had a wonderful experience at Faces in Bloom. Sarah M performed my BBL and Moxi laser treatment and was fantastic. She provided clear, thorough information before and during the procedure, which really helped ease any nerves. The service was professional and caring from start to finish, and I felt well taken care of throughout. I’m already anxious (in the best way!) to see the results. Highly recommend

I had my very first Botox appointment here three months ago, and came back today for my refresh — and I couldn’t be happier.
Not only is this team incredibly talented at what they do, but you truly leave feeling like the most beautiful version of yourself. From Jenna remembering your name (and special scheduling needs) the moment you walk in, to Sarah M taking the time to really listen, interview, and thoughtfully design a plan that fits exactly what you want — the care is personal, intentional, and empowering.
They genuinely make you feel like a princess.
This is absolutely the place to go for self-care. 💛

Faces In Bloom is the gold standard. From the moment you walk in, it’s clear they truly love what they do, care deeply about their patients, and are committed to excellence. Maddie is exceptional, and I won’t go anywhere else. She listens carefully and makes thoughtful recommendations with genuine intention and an appreciation for each person’s individual needs and preferences.Don’t bother looking elsewhere, they are the BEST!

emerge-natural-health-care-pllc-vancouve.text:
Sarah is all things I respect and love in a primary care provider - very knowledgeable, up to date on research/treatment protocols, creative with her approach in naturopathy as well as traditional meds as needed/appropriate, a wonderful listener and collaborator, down-to-earth - a wonderful ND and person!

She excels at hormones - so refreshing for these perimenopause years! Just got hormone pellets inserted (super easy and virtually painless!) and am so excited to feel the difference!

This place is so unprofessional, I would not trust them with my care. I scheduled an appointment for an Iron infusion and was told to upload all my labs so that Dr. Larson can review them before my appointment. I uploaded everything and filled out all the forms per the instructions given. The next day I got a call from Claudia telling me that my labs were not sufficient. As I was asking questions and trying to understand what exactly was needed, she started talking to me in an extremely aggressive and rude manner. She even spelled out her words for me, CBC, Cat…Boy…..Cat. Not only was she not understanding what I was asking, but her rude demeanor and how dismissive she was is not how any new patient should be made to feel. When I told her I didn’t appreciate the bad customer service and attitude when I was just trying to understand, she replied with people like you rule the world evidently.
Stay away from this office. If this is how they talk to patients, I can only imagine what kind of medical care they give. Claudia was one of the worst receptionists I have ever talked to, she definitely needs additional training in customer service and how to talk to patients on the phone. It’s a shame this office and Dr. Larson have to be represented by this inexperienced/incompetent individual.

DO NOT GO HERE. I recently started seeing Dr. Larson after my previous naturopath stepped away from this practice to start her own. Not once have I been offered any kind of natural option for anything. Isn't that what naturopaths are for? I originally wrote this review and it was so long I ran out of room. Let me summarize. Sara Larson attempted to give me a pelvic exam, and it was the most painful, uncomfortable, strange exam that I've ever had. And I've had exams every year for the past 26 years. She wasn't even able to complete the pap. I also asked for certain testing, and she just had me do a urine test, which in this case doesn't not even trst for the things I wanted. I've had several health issues going on, and I tried to talk to her about them, bit she stopped me and said I would have to make an appointment for each individual symptom,  because she wouldn't get paid otherwise. HER WORDS. She completely disregarded my concerns and only cares about if she's getting paid properly. I then had a missed appointment, due to the fact that I had to schedule so many and this one got missed. When my alarm for the appointment went off, I immediately called. No answer. I called 8 times. Apparently on Fridays they turn the phones lines off. Later I received a call from Claudia. She was nothing but combative and rude. She said this was my second strike and I could be terminated as a patient. Wow Claudia! Really? I didn't even know i had any "strikes"  She then went on to question me about why I even made the appointment in the first place. I told her it was a follow up, as directed by Sara Larson, and she proceeded to say there was absolutely no reason for me to be seen again. OK CLAUDIA.  Is she the doctor now? When I have health issues that need follow up and discussion? So unprofessional and just plain nasty and rude. I messaged Sara with my concerns, and she encouraged me to reschedule. We'll, I really did need to be seen, and so I did. HUGE MISTAKE. I was met with fake fake fake smiles. I am very good at picking up on people's vibes, and Claudia and Sara both were just fake as can be. I told Sara my health concern, and she took me to an exam room, took one look downstairs, and immediately diagnosed me with a stage 3 bladder prolapse! I was in shock, in tears, trembling. She then referred me to the worst possible women's clinic in Vancouver, told me to do some kegel exercises, and sent me on my way. Explaining that this would lead to surgery. I was so shook. I took it upon myself to find an appropriate OBGYN, and by luck I found an amazing doctor who saw me the next day. GUESS WHAT???? NO PROLAPSE. Not only did this doctor give me a completely painless pelvic exam, she also was able to complete a completely painless pap, and explain that there was absolutely no prolapse. HOW DID SARA DO SUCH A BAD JOB?  She literally misdiagnosed me with something this serious. She had me believing that my bladder was literally falling out of my body. Is this someone you would want to trust with your health?
Takeaway:
Sara fake. She pretends to cater to the more natural side, but actually just hands out prescriptions like any MD

Claudia in the office is a rude, nasty person. Reading a previous review from a patient confirms exactly what I experienced with her.

Sara has no business doing pelvic exams. She clearly doesn't know her way around a woman's anatomy. Sad really

I was completely misdiagnosed with a pretty severe thing, went through stress and trauma for nothing, couldn't eat or sleep, all because Sara is incompetent.

Save yourself and find a competent clinic, with a REAL doctor, and caring staff.

I AM SO GRATEFUL! Sorry for yelling, but finding Emerge has been a gift from above.

Going through cancer treatment is hell. Going through it alone, as a single person, is a special kind of hell. Dr. Larson's humor, warmth, compassion and expertise have made the side-effects a little less terrible and the experience a whole lot better than it could be. She saw me pre-mastectomy, post mastectomy, with hair and without, with an unmarred body and now an incredibly scarred body, and helped me find the beauty and courage within. I was recently admitted to the hospital for emergency surgery and she called to check on me throughout my recovery, waived my no-show fee, and hugged me when I was finally able to make it back in for treatment. I look forward to my weekly appointments for a boost to my spirits and a reduction in my pain. Thanks, Dr. Sarah, for everything!

I also see Dr. Lamont-Mitchell for Neurofeedback. It has helped relieve the brain fog associated with chemotherapy. I find our appointments relaxing, informative and helpful. Dr. Lamont-Mitchell does his research and turned me on to some affordable supplements that I pick up online--he's not in it for the add-ons--I never leave feeling like I'm being upsold. In fact, I rarely leave with products, just feeling a little lighter and a lot less chemo-brainy. Thanks for being honest, Dr. Greg!

I had to fight to find a good oncology care team but Emerge has been a reliable friend and constant source of help and relief. I walk in and feel like Norm from Cheers, Claudia and Coco light up in welcome greeting, and if one of the docs is between patients, they pitch in with more good cheer. The Emerge Natural Health Care Team are beyond excellent.
💗

I love that Sarah is multi-faceted in her approach to health. She offers a variety of traditional and non-traditional approaches to health. This is important because we (humans) are not one-size-fits-all when it comes to health.

evolve-aesthetics-and-wellness-vancouver.text: Sharla is amazing! I work in dental and I've ask a few of my patients where they get their lips done. Both said Sharla at Evolve! She is a gem! Super sweet and personable. I like that she gave me her honest and professional opinion on what I was looking for instead of just blowing me up like a blow fish. I totally trust professionals advice on what works best for me, and she did not disappoint! She truly cares about her expertise and patients. Already recommended my family to go there and she was also super happy with her results! I found my place and plan to keep going back! Thank you Evolve!

I had an amazing consult and had my first services today. Sharla was knowledgeable and educated me on different services and what would accomplish what my worries were. Kylie was great and even entertained my twins for a bit. The office was clean and parking very easy! I will be back!

Had an amazing experience at Evolve! Kylee at the front desk was very sweet and welcoming. I got lip filler from Sharla, and she did amazing!! So easy and nearly painless. She did an awesome job and made me feel so comfortable. Definitely will be back!!

I recently had the pleasure of visiting Evolve Aesthetics for a dermal filler lip appointment with Sharla Peterson, and I couldn't be happier with the results! After waiting several years to get my lips done due to a previous experience at another med spa that left me with overly large lips, I was feeling apprehensive. However, Sharla’s attentive and knowledgeable approach put me at ease.

She took the time to listen intently to my needs and desires. I wanted my lips to be lined (more vertical less volume) while also addressing some challenging prior filler migrations and bumps. Sharla’s expertise and knowledge in her field were truly impressive. She clearly explained what she could do and created a plan tailored specifically for me. She even squeezed the time in for me to get a few units of Botox that significantly improved my facial alignment.

I am thrilled with the outcome! My lips look perfect—exactly how I envisioned—without the need for dissolving any previous work, which was essential since I have a wedding coming up in a week. I left the appointment feeling amazing!

Additionally, the office is beautiful, conveniently located, and offers easy parking in Vancouver. I highly recommend Evolve Aesthetics and Sharla Peterson for anyone seeking a thoughtful and skilled professional. Thank you, Sharla and the entire Evolve staff, for a stellar experience!

I have been going to Sharla for years and swear I’ll never go anywhere else! She always makes sure to give me the best advice as to what i need done while maintaining a natural look. I get compliments constantly on how natural my work looks, and whenever i do, im so proud to recommend Sharla & the team at Evolve!

vigor-natural-health-clinic-vancouver.text: Best pediatrician experience I've ever had, very knowledgeable staff that feel they go above and beyond. Breaks down all the material and offers options to treatments while also being transparent about risks. Wish I had found this place sooner. Highly recommend!

They really take great care of my father (a current cancer patient) with his weekly IV vitamin drips. And their prices cannot be beat in this area! Their kindness & affordability keeps us coming back!!! Knowledgeable, professional, and efficient. I am so grateful my father has such a place during a stressful & scary time. Thank you Vigor staff!!!

Update: they saw my review and instead of reaching out, I received an automatic email from their payment processor saying that my client profile was deleted, ensuring I can't try to book with them again. I have lowered my star rating to a 1.

I enjoyed the people working here while I went, but lately they have really been a disappointment. They will have open spots available so I'll schedule, but then they'll cancel it or reschedule at a different time that they didn't confirm with me first. I don't get the B12 injections because I just love a little energy boost, but because I'm highly deficient and have to get them weekly. Last week I scheduled my spot, which they then moved to a couple hours later (without asking me). I promptly called and let them know that I had other appointments that day and scheduled it during the time that the online booking said was open, for a reason. They apologized and said it was the only time slot they had open for the entire week. Mind you these appointments take one minute tops and also why does the system say you have openings if you don't? That was actually a problem a lot with this place, but they would typically only move it 15 minutes so it wasn't a big deal. Because they had no spots open for last week, I had to skip, and let me tell you what a difference my body felt not getting that injection. I have felt so exhausted, brain fog and just overall not well. There's a reason I have to get them. Today I had one scheduled and was so looking forward to it because I want to feel normal again. Three hours before my appointment I get a call that there's nobody who can do the injections today. She suggested Friday, but I work that day. I have loved that they're affordable, but their scheduling is not consistent and I have to have a consistent injection for my health. I'll be taking my weekly business elsewhere.

I took my daughter here last year when she was 8, and Dr. Ariel told me that the symptoms my daughter was experiencing was normal. The doctor disregarded most of what I was saying, as they believed that what my daughter was going through was now the new norm for her age group.

However, when I went to the Vancouver clinic this last week, they informed me that what my daughter was experiencing was not normal. They listened to my requests and have now referred us to an endocrinologist. We did an x-ray there and her bone age came out 12 years and 11 months and she just turned 9. She has precocious puberty.

Her bedside manner when my daughter was nervous about the stick being in her mouth was also threatening. She needs to learn how to treat kids, especially kids who are nervous. On top of it, she spoke to other patients about my daughter who didn't want to have the stick in her mouth to another patient that went there 2 days after us, which happened to be my niece.

I like that it's a natural health clinic but didn't like how we were treated.
Dr. Haskins is wonderful. She is kind, patient, and very knowledgeable. I couldn’t imagine going to another doctor, I am very glad they accept my insurance. 🙏🏼

365-iv-drips-edgewater.text:
I recently tried 365 IV Drips and had an amazing experience. Booking was super easy, and the staff was friendly and professional. I went for the "Energy Boost" drip, and within minutes, I felt more awake, refreshed, and even noticed my skin looking better. The process was quick and painless—honestly, I didn’t even feel the needle.

They offer a variety of drips for different needs, and I love how personalized everything feels. I’ll definitely be back! Highly recommend if you're looking to feel better, faster.

I had a wonderful experience at 365 IV Drips! The atmosphere was relaxing, the service was amazing, and the entire team provided exceptional customer care. Everyone was professional, kind, and made sure I felt comfortable throughout my visit. I’ll definitely be returning—highly recommend!

I recently visited 365 IV Drips for their IV drip therapy, and I can't say enough good things about my experience! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by the friendly staff who made me feel right at home. The soothing ambiance of the spa instantly set the tone for relaxation.

I decided to try Hydration Drip and the process was effortless. The nurse was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to explain the benefits of the drip and what to expect. I really appreciated how they tailored the treatment to my specific needs.

During the session, I felt completely relaxed as I settled into a cozy chair. The drip itself was painless, and within no time, I started to feel revitalized. I loved having the chance to just unwind, sip on some herbal tea, and enjoy a little me-time. After the treatment, I noticed a significant boost in my energy levels and an overall sense of well-being that lasted for days!

I highly recommend 365 IV Drips to anyone considering IV drip therapy. Whether you're looking for hydration, recovery from a long week, or just a pick-me-up, this is the place to go! I'll definitely be back for more treatments. Thank you, Nurse Mo  for such a great experience.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
“Hands down the best IV drip experience in Edgewater!”
I stopped by 365 iV Drip and was blown away by how professional, clean, and relaxing the space was. The team truly knows their stuff — they make the whole hydration process smooth, comfortable, and even enjoyable. You can tell they genuinely care about their clients’ wellness. I left feeling refreshed, recharged, and ready to take on the day.

If you’re looking for a top-notch hydration boost or wellness pick-me-up, 365 iV Drip is the place to go. Highly recommend this spot — Edgewater is lucky to have them! 💧💪

I’m a repeat customer at 365 IV Drips and I absolutely love it here. Nurse Moe, who is also the owner, is the best. She is super professional, fun, and full of great energy. I have terrible veins and it has always been hard for anyone to find one, even at the doctor’s office or other IV lounges, but Moe gets it on the first try every single time. She really knows what she is doing. The place is spotless, the vibe is always good, and you leave feeling amazing every time. I highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for top notch IV services and great energy.

swifthealth-mobile-iv-therapy-and-housec.text: When my daughter became unwell close to midnight in NY the night before our journey home to Australia our travel insurance connected me to SwiftHealth. I arranged a virtual tele-health call and the Dr was fabulous. She quickly got the necessary history and reassured me we would be ok to travel. She arranged a prescription and then checked in several times including a few days later to ensure we were home safely and our daughter was doing ok. I was so grateful for her care and support. I’d have no hesitation recommending SwiftHealth to anyone.

I’m not kidding when I say Swift Health IV literally saved my life last week. I got a random food poisoning that made me go from fully functional normal day to puking my brains an dry heaving on my office floor.

There was no way I could drive my self to the nearest hospital, an it would have taken too long in this state to have someone come and take me . I knew I needed hydration period. I had nothing left in me. A friend of mine told me about this company that helped them with a hang over to get IV hydration therapy, and it popped into my head. So as I was almost dying I called SwiftIV and they had a nurse to my office with in 25min . I couldn’t believe it.

Nurse Pamela took great care of me , an with in 30min I felt half way back to normal. Sooooo freaking greatful with for this company and their services. After the IV I was able to function normal again an go about my day with some rest included. They also checked on me multiple times after the situation to make sure I was ok and back to normal.

Moral of the story, if you in need of quick come to you help or looking to feel your best, SwiftHealth IV and there team got your back!

There is no-one more knowledgable or patient then Aliza and the SwiftHealth Team! Aliza is available to answer any and all questions and support you or anyone in your house when they need the care and support! Aliza is so great that I worry less about illness because I know SwiftHealth will come to the rescue.

We’ve had the absolute best experience with Swift health for our family. Aliza makes herself available at all hours of the day and night. She sends the most amazingly attentive and caring nurses when she isn’t available herself. We are so appreciative of her incredible offerings.

First time using their services and I would highly recommend them! Thank you to Aliza for being so patient with all of my questions and for getting me on the schedule so quickly. The nurse Pam who administered my IV was so friendly and kind (especially considering I’m squeamish with needles). I appreciate you guys helping me out during a time where I was feeling really terrible.
Happy to report I’m already feeling much better!

healthy-living-liberty-lake-liberty-lake.text: I agree with the other positive review, Dr Ashley has been very focused on my health needs.  She listens to my concerns and proposes ways to improve my health with a focus on healthy living as a first priority.  That is why I went to her in the first place.  My blood numbers have improved substantially, largely without unnecessary medications.  I am very happy with the results!

Like others have say don’t even waste your time here. I called and the told me to call another number, left a message and also emailed for new patient appointment (before I really looked at the reviews) I never even received a call back 3 weeks later.  I’m glad I never got booked on a place like this. As a new patient coordinator at an office it’s really not that hard to follow up with patients.
Had my second appointment today at Liberty Lake Healthy Living. The staff were friendly and very personable! My nurse was beyond excellent! I will definitely go back.

I had been seeing Dr. Ashely for almost 2 years.  I would always have to schedule appointments weeks in advance.  Every appointment I would have to wait 30+ minutes to go into the back, and then another 15-20 minutes before I would see the doctor.  Even when my appointment was scheduled for 9:30am.  She did spend a lot of time with me during my visit, and I did feel she listened to me.  However I was looking for a doctor the favors Natural Medicine, and the Botox injection ads in the room made me question if I was in the right place.

What made me look elsewhere was how her staff treated my Mother, who referred me to this doctor.  After waiting for 7+ days for them to fill her hormone RX, and 2 phone calls to their office, she discovered she needed to be seen before they would fill her Rx.  Her office did not tell the pharmacy this, or respond to the refill request at all.  She had been out of her hormones for a few days when she finally reached the office.  Needless to say, she was upset and voiced her frustration the the person she talked with.  My Mom never yelled, cursed, belittled or called the person she spoke with any names.  She was just frustrated.  Later that week she received a letter stating that she could no longer be a patient at this Doctors office.  It was not on letter head and the signature was a stamp.  Evidently the person on the other end of the phone felt "Threatened"  and they have a 0 tolerance policy on threats.  So if you get upset because they don't return calls, don't respond to refill requested from the Pharmacy, and call to complain, you may be turned away as a patient.

I had a lot of health concerns and was hoping for a holistic approach that integrates mental health and was blown off. Contacting these people is incredibly difficult. Instead of suggesting anything remotely helpful, the 'doctor' suggested i buy a supplement from her other business made from cow hormones. They used my insurance to bill it as a annual checkup, but when I asked for refills on my migraine medicine I got the runaround for months.

vancouver-ketamine-infusions-vancouver.text: Absolutely amazing center instantly you’ll feel the energy walking through the door, very professional and great walk through of the experience. Wonderful ambiance and the team there is excellent to work with. Everything is custom tailored to your needs. Highly recommend to anyone.

I am 39 and have been attempting to find relief for my mental health concerns from the age of 6. It’s been a long road of trying a multitude of psych meds that ultimately caused far more harm than good coupled with facing extreme stigma regarding my condition from the very people that are tasked to treat it professionally. I’ve been misdiagnosed, dismissed, and made to feel worse in our traditional mental health “care” system more times than I can count. Then I found ketamine at a point that I felt I was very close to succumbing to my illness. The stress my brain put on my body was overwhelming and I was breaking down mentally, emotionally, and physically. Ketamine legitimately saved my life. It took continued work and several months of sessions, but I can now wake up and just live. It is quite remarkable. Beyond remarkable. The staff, Karl specifically, have created a space where I did not even once feel judged even on my worst day. This place has truly changed my life and I feel that I can finally live with hope for the future. I can’t remember ever truly having that feeling in my life before now. It’s like entering a new world. I world that I saw other people enjoying but was out of reach for me until now.

I have chronic nerve pain in my left foot due to a couple of back surgeries.

Carl has been amazing answering all of my questions. Probably at least a couple of hours. Phone calls in the past few weeks about what the session would and also he goes above and beyond for just recommendations for me and genuinely cares for me and wants me to get better
Due to a couple of reasons. I haven’t yet done the infusion so I can’t comment on that but if/when I do, I am definitely going to Carl as he seems the best.

My daughter has been receiving infusions at the Vancouver Ketamine Clinic and I am very impressed with the level of compassion and knowledge Karl and his team has. When we moved here I was worried we would not find a place where she would feel comfortable to go to every month. Well she has. My daughter has a port and following sterile protocol is way more important with a port than it is placing an IV. They follow complete sterile protocol and it makes me feel very safe knowing that.
Thank you Karl for taking such good care of my daughter,
Liz

The intake process with Karl is wonderful.  He's a very knowledgeable professional who really cares and knows his stuff.  He goes out of his way to make things easy for the patients I refer to the clinic.  Paperwork, explanation of process, procedures, medical education, patient safety, comfort, are just top notch.  I can't recommend this clinic more.

new-u-womens-clinic-aesthetics-kennewick.text:
I had such a wonderful experience at New U Women’s Clinic and Aesthetics! From the moment I walked in, the front office felt warm, welcoming, and genuinely friendly. Danielle made me feel completely at ease right away, which I truly appreciated.

Dr. Fidino was absolutely fantastic. She really listened to my concerns, took her time answering all of my questions, and was incredibly knowledgeable about Morpheus8. I never felt rushed, and I left my consultation feeling informed, confident, and genuinely excited about my upcoming treatments.

And I have to add… Dr. Fidino has the cutest, most well-behaved golden retriever puppy! I secretly wished he had attended my consultation because he is just the sweetest 😊

Thank you, New U, for creating such a positive and professional environment. I’m looking forward to my Morpheus8 treatments and highly recommend this clinic to anyone considering aesthetic services!

Dr Fidino’s New U Women’s Clinic weight loss program has made a significant impact in helping reach my goals. 55+ pounds!! Greatly appreciated always being greeted with such with welcoming smiles for each visit from all the staff team. NAD+ IV therapy with Abby which was a must have with boosting up my immune system and help with cell repair. Lastly, a big shout out to Danielle. You’re a rock star with all my Cell Sound Therapy treatments. Seen my before/after photos made me tear up. Love love love the slimmer look!! Am so happy of my transformation!!  Look forward to seeing you again.

I had an amazing experience with my facial treatments. The results exceeded my expectations, my skin looks smoother,  brighter, and more youthful. Dr. Rachel Fidino was incredibly knowledgeable, professional and made me feel comfortable and confident. Danielle Master Aesthetician, was wonderful, skilled, attentive and truly caring. The entire staff was warm and friendly from start to finish. I highly recommend New U Women’s Clinic & Aesthetics.

Before National Eating Disorder Awareness Week ends I want to thank New U and Dr. Fidino for all of their support on my journey to a healthy relationship with food and my body. Dr. Fidino took the time to understand my issues were beyond the number on a scale but more about deep rooted issue that spanned over two decades. A GLP-1 peptide has eliminated the noise that is usually so loud all day, every day. I have my life back and can focus on healthy eating habits without my brain telling me lies. Thank you Dr. Findino for caring about your patients and understanding all of the complex issues tied to disordered eating. For the first time in 20 years I feel healthy. The New U team has been incredible and shown a high level of compassion.

I love coming here. The atmosphere is welcoming, the staff (especially Piper) is incredibly friendly, and every visit feels relaxed and enjoyable. You can tell they genuinely care about their clients and take the time to make you feel comfortable and confident.

restore-hyper-wellness-issaquah.text:
Had to give 2- had a nightmare experience today.
One of the new employee didn't check or provide shoes for my spouse during their cryo chamber. Grave negligence. We are very disappointed. Niko the manager and staff acknowledged this and were supportive. But this is not to have happened at first place - things could have been very bad.

Great place. The gm assisted us with our first time full body cryo. She answered all of our questions and addressed all our concerns. Very helpful. The place is set up like a calming spa with a touch of medical. Very well organized and professional. We felt like we were in good hands from the moment we entered. They opened the store front for us about 10 minutes early because they saw us waiting outside. Thanks so much for the great experience!

What an amazing experience. Highly recommend for anyone seeking recovery or joint pain relief. My joints and muscles feel fantastic after a heavy 5 day workout week. The staff is very friendly and the manager Ryan was knowledgeable and explained things in a way that way easy for everyone to understand. I received services - compression therapy, cryotherapy 2:30 length, and a bit of stretching. I will definitely be back many more times.

The team was very responsive, quickly got answers to all my questions and the services they provide check all the boxes on what I was looking for.
There must have been some divine intervention or something leading me to Restore. I called the office at 4pm to ask about a specific brand of Vitamin C IV Therapy I was wanting and I was thinking it would be lucky if I could get them to special order it; the nurse let me know that I don't need to wait on a special order because that is the brand of Vitamin C they offer. I then found out there was an open appointment, I had my intake with the  nurse by 4:30 and soon after I was getting my first Vitamin C IV the same day. The office made me very comfortable with reclining chairs, heat for my arm and a blanket.
Today was my first visit and it exceeded my expectations.  The infra red sauna was amazing and Trevor and Sydney were knowledgable, kind and helpful!

access-iv-vitamin-lounge-boonton.text: This was my first time getting an IV and honestly didn’t know what to expect. Paul was so attentive and knowledgeable. He walked me through everything along the way and made me feel very comfortable throughout the experience. Great customer service is hard to find but this was stellar. I feel AMAZING. The trip to get there is absolutely worth it. Looking forward to the next visit.

This was my second time receiving NAD+, but my first time at Access IV Infusion Center & Vitamin Lounge, and I can confidently say I enjoyed this experience much more than my previous one elsewhere.

The lounge itself is spacious, extremely clean, and offers a wide variety of treatment options. From the moment we arrived, everything felt calm, professional, and welcoming. Paul took exceptional care of us—he took the time to sit down, review our health history, check our blood pressure, and thoroughly answer all of our questions. Throughout the entire visit, he consistently checked in to make sure we were comfortable and had everything we needed.

The chairs are incredibly comfortable and even come with cozy blankets. There were also snacks and drinks available, which was such a thoughtful touch during the infusion. Overall, the level of care and attention really stood out.

We will definitely be back! Thank you to Paul and the entire team for such a great experience.

I decided to go to Access IV Vitamin Lounge because I felt sluggish and needed a boost of energy.   Upon my arrival, I was happy to see there is plenty of on-site parking.  Once upstairs, the medical professionals greeted me with genuine warmth and confirmed what I previously chose from my online reservation which was the perfect formula for an energy boost and brain fog.  Every step from check-in, brief consult with their medical professional to the actual IV Vitamin infusion was smooth, reassuring, and refreshingly transparent.  I had B12, Glutathione, and Taurine vitamin infusion for energy and mental clarity.

The lounge itself is spotless and beautifully designed: soft lighting, soothing music, wall-mounted TVs and comfortable leather recliners made it easy to relax while my infusion did its work.

Most importantly, I felt the results. Within two hours of finishing, I noticed a gentle surge of energy and mental clarity that lasted the rest of the day, no jittery crash, just a steady feeling of overall wellness. The nurse even followed up with practical hydration tips to keep the benefits going.

If you’re on the fence about IV therapy, do yourself a favor and book a session here. I was initially hesitant because I was nervous about it.  But I'm glad I did and honestly should have done it sooner.  The staff’s expertise, the pristine environment, and the immediate benefits have made Access IV Vitamin Lounge my new go-to spot for proactive health and self-care.  I highly recommend this place!

I visited Access IV Vitamin Lounge because it was highly recommended by a friend.  I had the Glow and Grow infusion which is designed to boost the health of your hair, skin, and nails.  It is definitely worth it.  The medical staff were amazing as they were very friendly and informative every step of the way.  The lounge is very comfortable with a relaxing setting.  I'll be recommending to friends as well.

I recently had a fantastic experience at Access IV Vitamin Lounge! Setting up my appointment was a breeze; Paul made it incredibly easy and convenient. When I walked into the facility, I was immediately struck by how clean, bright, and inviting it was.

I was given a private room that felt so cozy, complete with a comfortable chair and a desk, allowing me to catch up on some work while I received my IV drip. The atmosphere was relaxing, making it easy to focus on my tasks without feeling rushed or uncomfortable.

Paul was truly exceptional. He started by checking my vitals and, after my IV was in place, he checked on me periodically to make sure I was comfortable.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I left feeling rejuvenated. I’m already looking forward to my next visit!

manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.text: Everyone at Manhattan Medical Arts is super helpful. I reached out to get copies of my labs via text and Christopher responded within seconds. Christopher was kind and courteous and sent me what was needed via email right away!

I've been going to this clinic for more than a year now. the staff are very professional and the providers spends time to talk and explains things to the patients. Their text message app is good as well makes it convenient if i need to ask something.
The staff is amazing! Super accommodating! My PA Crystal Chung is the best! So caring, she takes her time to go through everything ! Finally I found the place that truly takes care of me
I’ve been coming to this office for over two years and everybody has always been so nice and helpful! Crystal always gives me the best care when I go! Thanks team!
Christopher has been great over the phone, professional, responsive, and easy to communicate with. Appointments and questions are always handled smoothly.

mobile-iv-drip-new-york.text: Ishani was incredibly professional and arrived timely. She has a wonderful and articulate bedside manner & very polite. It was a wonderful first experience and she treated my dad who is 79 with multiple myeloma with the utmost care and focus. Thank you again!

I Arrived in nyc not feeling well I looked for a mobile IV place near me the booking process was fast and accommodating! Nurse IShani Arrived early and I couldn’t have been happier! I knew I was in good hands, she was very Kind I really enjoyed my experience with her she was so gentle with administering the IV. I got the flu rescue  IV bag and I’m already feeling better. thank you Ishani!

Joseph was absolutely incredible. He brought the IV directly to me when I really needed it and truly saved my day (honestly felt like he saved my life). He was calm, knowledgeable, and so attentive throughout the entire process. I felt immediate relief and was so well taken care of. I’m beyond grateful for him and can’t recommend Joseph enough

I recently used Mobile IV Drip when I was dealing with a migraine and mild dehydration, and Colleen was absolutely amazing. From the moment she arrived at my home, she was warm, professional, and incredibly reassuring. She walked me through everything, made sure I was comfortable, and checked on me throughout the entire treatment.

Colleen’s expertise and gentle approach made the whole experience so much easier. The IV worked quickly, and I felt noticeably better not long after she finished. Having someone so skilled and compassionate come directly to my home made a huge difference.

I highly recommend Mobile IV Drip, and especially Colleen. If you’re not feeling well and need dependable in-home care, she is truly outstanding.

I can’t recommend this service enough. I was a complete zombie after a ferocious bout of food poisoning. I wasn’t able to keep anything in my stomach and one of my clients suggested an IV… since I couldn’t move much, I googled mobile IV drip and Joseph showed up…

He mixed together a cocktail of vitamins, was super gentle, trustworthy, compassionate, and light hearted - made this entire experience actually really fun. Absolutely blown away! 10/10 would recommend! Ask for Joseph!!

Oh and I felt like a new woman within 5 minutes!!!

lifedripsiv-jersey-city.text:
I am leaving this review to warn others about the completely unacceptable service at Life Drips IV Practice in Jersey City. This was, without a doubt, a 0-star experience! My scheduled IV repair appointment was a complete failure, as the clinician was a total no show. I wasted time traveling to and waiting at the Base gym location only to be met with confusion. The most frustrating part was the response from the front desk staff at Base gym. They were utterly confused. The fact that front desk mentioned that this is not the first time the clinician has failed to show up. This happened multiple times!!

This indicates a profound and systemic failure in scheduling, communication, and basic professionalism!! How are they even practicing? How a business can operate with such a blatant disregard for a customer's time.  It's clear why their ratings on platforms like ClassPass are so low. I am now convinced that any top-tier reviews they possess are 100% paid for. Avoid this practice entirely. Save your money and, more importantly, save your time.
How are they still in business? Taking peoples money even though they are aware they do not have the products people are booking. Booked an IV and they didn’t even have b12.

Had a great experience! I did the Vitamin B12 shot. The doctors were very informative about how I’d feel afterward as well as when one should to get other shots and IV drips. The whole thing took no more than 20 minutes.

The only way this could have gone worse would be if I actually was allowed to get into my appointment. Showed up 5 minutes early to my appointment but someone walked up and was given my spot because the person working there has no access to the system that manages appointments. After waiting 20 minutes, I had to interrupt the session that was going on to tell them I have to be somewhere in 10 minutes and asked what recourse I could take. The person had no info and suggested I try tomorrow to get a walk in spot. Don't bother with this unless you have a flexible schedule or a high tolerance for chaos.

Just got another IV Revitalize from LIFE DRIPS this last Thursday and it did not disappoint! It’s been a week and I still feel it’s effects. I always get IV’s from this facility and they provide me with a significant boost of energy, clearer skin, and ultimate hydration! The area is completely sterile and the nurses are very well versed in providing wonderful patient service. I love this place and so will you (:

revive-wellness-kennewick.text: Revive Wellness is an amazing place, the team is incredibly friendly and makes you feel comfortable right away. Their services are top quality, the space is always clean, calm, and welcoming, and the location is very convenient with plenty of parking. They take the time to answer all your questions and make sure you feel supported and well taken care of throughout your entire treatment.
Always a wonderful experience!  I 10 out of 10 recommend Revive. The staff is amazing and the services are 10 ⭐️

So happy with the work Jessica does, the patience and kindness she has really makes one feel confident. Appreciate the information on skin care and their products. Wonderful experience and highly recommend !
Absolutely LOVE this place - staff is always amazing, so helpful, & extremely professional. I cannot reccomend this business enough- they are WONDERFUL!
Everyone there is so nice and welcoming and Nichole made it so nice and easy to get my procedure with the pellet done.

honey-glow-health-bonney-lake.text:
Tim is truly exceptional. From the moment I walked in, it was clear that he genuinely cares about his clients and prioritizes what’s best for them. He took the time to thoroughly explain how different peptides work, as well as the various filler and Botox options, helping me understand what would best address my individual goals.

What stood out most was his honesty and integrity. He doesn’t upsell or push unnecessary treatments, and his pricing is very reasonable. In fact, he actively looks for ways to help you save money while still achieving great results. It’s refreshing to find a provider who clearly values performance and patient satisfaction over profit.

Beyond his expertise, Tim is simply a wonderful person — charismatic, kind, and someone you feel completely comfortable around. I genuinely enjoy my appointments and would confidently recommend him to anyone considering treatment. Seattle people…he is worth the drive!!!

Tim and his team are amazing! His #1 priority is patient satisfaction, and he truly shows that every step of the way. He takes the time to listen, answer questions, and make sure you feel comfortable and confident with your treatment. You truly feel cared for.

I couldn’t be happier with my results and my overall experience working with him. I would recommend them to anyone looking for professionalism, expertise, and genuine care. If you’re on edge thinking about treatment, this is your sign to DO IT!

I always have an amazing experience at Honey Glow! The staff always makes me feel comfortable and at ease through every treatment I go there for. Tim is more than knowledgeable, and takes the time to explain every process and what to expect. The office is welcoming and offers a calming/ cool atmosphere. I highly recommend Honey Glow for all your self care needs - such a caring, professional environment!

Such a great experience! I felt completely comfortable and everything was explained so clearly. The laughs throughout the appointment made it even better, and he was so welcoming and personable with both my husband and me. I truly appreciated the professionalism and care.

Tim and the team at Honey Glow are top-notch. Tim is extremely knowledgeable and takes the time to explain what he’s doing and why, which immediately builds trust. You can tell he actually cares about doing things right, not just rushing people through or pushing product.

The staff is professional, welcoming and makes the whole experience comfortable from start to finish. If you’re looking for a place where expertise, honesty and quality matter, Honey Glow is it. Highly recommend.

lavie-skinthetics-wellness-spa-federal-w.text: LaVie is wonderful. Everyone is so kind and welcoming. My first visit was a consultation where they used a machine to analyze my skin. I thought that was very cool because I could see exactly what my skin needed and where my skin was doing well. From there I expressed my major concerns and they set me up with a plan. So far I've done a Glo2Facial with RF, XERF treatments, and Microneedling with RF. My goal is collagen production, and smooth tight skin with the main focus around my mouth and neck. My experiences have been wonderful, the ladies here have taken very good care of me. Thank you LaVie, I look forward to my next visit!

I recently visited LaVie Skin and Wellness Spa to get one of their wellness treatments and the experience exceeded my expectations. From the moment I walked through the door, I was greeted with a sense of calm and tranquility. The ambiance is immediately soothing, with soft music, elegant decor, and a welcoming aroma that instantly helps you de-stress.

The staff at the were exceptional. The receptionist was warm and helpful, guiding me through the service options, and my therapist was highly skilled and attentive.

Beyond the excellent services and professional staff, one of the most significant advantages of choosing this spa is their commitment to client accessibility. They are also a Women owned facility and LGBTQ friendl. Along with that I was pleasantly surprised to discover that they offer no-interest payment plans, making it much easier to budget for regular self-care treatments without financial strain. This flexible option really sets them apart and shows they genuinely care about you.The facilities are pristine and well-maintained, with comfortable waiting areas, luxurious treatment rooms, and excellent amenities.

Overall, LaVie Skin and Wellness Spa provides a top-tier wellness experience that combines expert care with fantastic client-friendly policies. Whether you're looking for a one-off treat or regular wellness maintenance, I highly recommend visiting them. Definately check out what they have on their menu. 10/10 going to go again.

I'll start with the pros: the staff is friendly, the atmosphere is pleasant and cozy.
Now about the cons:
I had experience with laser rejuvenation on a weaker device, the effect on the skin was stronger. I left with fair skin....
For 2 hours of work, the minimum tip was $88. Seriously?
And I also got the impression that prices are adjusted on the fly. I left there feeling like I was cheated.
During the consultation, I heard three different prices, as a result, I paid the highest of the announced ones and it is unknown whether there will be any results. I am unlikely to return and I cannot advise others

Leny has been in the business for quite a long time. My experience with her was amazing from the atmosphere, the attention to detail, professionalism to the service was top-tier. You can tell a lot of intention and passion she put into her work. If you’re looking for a wellness spa that actually delivers results, Skinthetics Wellness Spa is the place. Clean, professional and such a relaxing experience ✨ Highly recommend.

I purchased a scalp massage for 55 minutes.  I was taken back and started 15min late, total time was 45min.  The tech spent more time adjusting the water which was very stressful. Massage itself was good.  Overall treatment and experience was not great.  I will not go back for a scalp massage and treatment.  I purchased a special, thank goodness I did not pay full price.

bella-md-health-and-wellness-shoreline.text: I am over the moon with Dr Nguyen! Not only is she the warmest, kindest, most gentle and caring person, but ahe does a phenomenal job! I’ve had Botox quite a bit and my forehead and 11’s are the best Ive ever had! Please please take your time to visit and schedule with her! Thank you Dr Nguyen

I went to Bella MD to get help with skin texture and  evening skin tone and very curious about microneedling. I had a great experience with them despite being very anxious about it. The lidocaine cream made the process painless. They explained every step of the treatment which made me feel reassured. A day later my skin started peeling slowly which took a little less than a week to complete and I was able to see smoother skin. Already got a couple treatments with them. Can't wait to continue working with them and seeing more results!

I had my first Microneedling at Bella MD Health and Wellness last week. Dr. Nguyen is knowledgeable, professional, and incredible attention to detail. She listened to what I told her were my areas of concern and recommended the right service. I highly recommend Bella MD Health and Wellness to anyone.

This medspa has the most accommodating and friendly staff. I had some trouble scheduling my first appointment because of my busy schedule, had to move things around a few times. They went out of their way to accommodate my schedule. By the time I made it in, the dr made me feel incredibly comfortable since I’ve never had anything like this done before (micro needling). She walked me through the whole process verbally to let me know what to expect. The procedure went by faster than I anticipated with no pain. She wrote down notes of which cream I should apply to my face and when. My face peeled as expected the next day but once the redness and peeling subsided, my face felt incredibly smooth and fresh. Will definitely keep coming back.

She was so great! She took her time and went over the plan for my skin care, short and long term. There are a few things I’d like to do and she explained the steps to achieve my goal, more importantly how to maintain it and do it safely so I don’t further damage my skin. There are some things I’ve seen online that may not have been a good option which I didn’t know, and she laid out the pros and cons to help me understand. Highly recommend at least a consultation with her to start your long term skin care journey.

hello-nurse-llc-bothell.text:
I went in at the last minute because I wasn’t feeling very well, and Ms. Fatoumata Doelling got me in right away. I requested a vitamin pack (B12, B complex, C, Zinc, amino acids, and minerals), and she took care of everything quickly and professionally.

She was super clean, gentle, and had no trouble getting the IV in—no discomfort at all. Fatima is seriously the sweetest.  I’ll definitely be going back regularly.

10/10 experience!

I'm really happy to have found this place. Fatima provided a much better alternative to urgent care when we needed hydration due to morning sickness. She was extremely accommodating and made sure we were comfortable and well informed throughout the process. I would definitely recommend this place.

Fatima was fantastic. She expertly and gently inserted the iv with no pain. She monitored my progress and constantly checked on me to see if I needed anything from bed adjustments to handing me my personal effects.

Great experience and I highly recommend her services.

This was my first time at Hello Nurse, but not my first time getting an IV drip. Nurse Fatima is very kind, patient, and very knowledgeable. She puts you at ease and has excellent bedside manners. I will definitely return

Amazing little place to get an IV drip. I felt very taken care of while I was there and even tips on how to nurse myself back to health when I left. I will definitely be seeing her again whenever I need IV therapy

ivitality-bellevue-bellevue.text: I absolutely love this place! The staff are all so kind and nurturing. They really make you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in. The nurses are knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely caring, which makes a huge difference. I always leave feeling refreshed and well taken care of. Plus, their monthly IV deal for only $79 is such a great value! Highly recommend if you're looking for quality care in a welcoming environment.

This place is a true gem on the East Side! The service is excellent and very professional, and communication is quick and easy. I received my 10 shots of vitamin B complex, and I have to say, they’re worth every penny. Plus, the prices here are lower than what you would pay at any spa for the same vitamin injections. Highly recommend this place

This place is the absolute best! I love coming here to use the sauna to relax and detox. I must say that Georgia is so amazing. She always is always so positive, pleasant and professional. Adore her 🫶

Wonderful experience at IVitality Bellevue! The staff was wonderful and made us so comfortable for our first recovery experience. Facilities were clean and comfortable and all the services went smoothly. Highly reccomend!

First time here and tried the IF red sauna. The place is nice and staff is friendly. The sauna room is clean and private. I noticed they have a lot of other services I’d like to check out such as red light therapy, cryo and IV therapies. The only issue was that I was not prepared and didn’t realize that 30 min for a first IF red sauna was a long time! Start slow!

ivfusionmd-bellevue.text: Im grateful they booked a same day appt. I really needed iv hydration. It took 1 hour. I got the Meyers cocktail with anti nausea. I put on my headphones with nature sounds and let my body heal.  The staff is gentle and caring. I highly recommend this service & business. Thanks again!

Dr. Bowers is exceptional! I’ve known him for years and he is one of the most knowledgable doctors I know and trust. He’s always aware of the most recent research and literature, and leading with innovation.

Taking out 1 star as I had to wait 45 min for the session. Otherwise everything else went smooth. Dr. Robert was warm, cordial and friendly. He was knowledgable and confident about the overall process and IV ingredients.
Clean clinic @  Kirkland branch. Polite and accommodating doctor- Dr. Tseng. He spends an ample of  time to explain thoroughly what is to be done and what to expect after the procedure.
Dr. Robert Bowers is very caring and knowledgeable doctor. He always goes extra mile for his parents.

apex-health-wellness-bellevue.text: Dr. Harn is truly incredible! He is an absolute master of his craft. From my initial intake (which we spent an hour going over my history in great detail) to every future interaction, I’ve been so impressed by his attention to detail, knowledge on everything, and dedication to helping his patients achieve their goals. My main concern was my skin health & overall performance. Since I started implementing the things Dr. Harn put in my treatment plan, I’ve seen significant improvements in my skin and energy levels. He always takes the time to formulate a well-thought-out response and thoroughly explains the “why” behind everything we are implementing. I can’t recommend him enough! He caught things other practitioners have missed, truly listens to you as a patient, and looks into every possible link to find a solution to your problem.

Dr. Harn is professional, knowledgeable and compassionate. I went in with a spinal cord injury looking to find ways to help with my nerve and muscle damage, Dr. Harn and I explored multiple options of different alternative medicines and natural remedies to help with my situation. Looking forward to working with him in the future as I continue my recovery.

My consultations with Dr. Harn have been fantastic! I was having trouble losing weight and turning it into muscle. Doctor Harn helped me achieve peak performance by writing out a plan for me that fit my lifestyle and performance levels. He has completely changed my day to day eating and exercising style and I could not recommend him enough. The results have been incredible!

My consultation with Dr. Harn was a fantastic experience. He went above and beyond and was incredibly attentive. My energy levels have significantly improved since implementing his suggested health plan along with improved weight loss and strength.

I have been going off and on for he past year. Chance has been honest, direct and informative on what direction we will go for my IV's based off of my blood work and current lifestyle / training regiment. If you want to take care of yourself as an athlete or just day to day lifestyle Chance and his team have the direction / path for you. I trust his work so much that we have started a partnership to send our athletes to his office to start with him in the fall moving forward. Thank you Chance for your help to my goals and I highly recommend anyone looking into IV Therapy / Health & Wellness to make this your choice.

source-of-life-iv-and-wellness-union.text:
I had a great experience with my first-ever facial Botox treatment! I was a little nervous going in, but everything from start to finish exceeded my expectations. The provider was incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and took the time to explain the entire process, which made me feel completely at ease.

The treatment itself was quick and comfortable. The results were better than I expected - natural, and smooth without looking overdone. I feel more confident and still look like me, just well-rested and glowing.

Highly recommend!

I had a wonderful experience here and left with nothing but great things to say. The owner Franciele was so kind and personable. I had the Myers Cocktail infusion, which was great, and gave me an immediate energy boost. I was also so happy to see all the services and vitamin infusions offered. Looking forward to my next one!

Source of Life is amazing! Franciele is an outstanding professional — very skilled, attentive, and caring in every detail. She explains everything clearly and makes you feel completely comfortable. The clinic is clean, well-organized, and has a relaxing atmosphere. Excellent results and top-quality service! 💧✨

I had such a great experience at this IV infusion clinic! From the moment I walked in, everything felt clean, professional, and welcoming. The nurse who helped me was not only incredibly kind and approachable, but also very knowledgeable. She explained the process clearly, answered all of my questions with patience, and made sure I was comfortable the entire time. The environment felt safe and well cared for, and I left feeling refreshed and well taken care of. I would absolutely recommend this clinic to anyone considering IV therapy—you’re in excellent hands here!.

Amazing treatment . Felt great from the very start of arriving to location. Very professional and all my questions answered . Left feeling great and will definitely return. Will recommend to anybody looking for Iv infusions and hydration. Thanks Fran!

pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.text:
My husband and I went for our first time.
Clean kind staff. Comfortable rooms. Would recommend people check it out. Felt amazing after. 😊

This was my first time using a clinic. I was suffering from severe dehydration on the hottest day of the week. I drove all the way from gig harbor because that location was closed on Sundays. These wonderful people saw me immediately and made me feel very comfortable about the whole process. The nurses are very professional about the poking part. I'd highly recommend these people any day, and I would gladly travel miles again to see them!

PNW hydration & wellness was a blessing during my first trimester ! The staff was so nice,comforting and knowledgeable it made me feel at ease knowing that they knew just what baby and I needed ! I will for sure be going back for future drips as someone who suffers from severe ALL day sickness .
Very good experience! I’m not a fan of needles and they made me very comfortable and clam. Felt so much better after some hydration and vitamins as I had a cold. Will be back!!

My daughter was dehydrated from having had the flu. Instead of going to the ER we went to PNW Hydration. They were able to give her fluids and nausea medication through her IV. It saved us so much money and time. Will definitely use again.

true-heal-wellness-morristown.text: Extremely satisfied with the treatment and professionalism. I was greeted with smile and vast knowledge of not only the procedures but the product as well. I received a thorough explanation of what will take place and the results. All my questions and concerns were addressed and I felt so confident and comfortable. Loved it and will continue to come.

My husband and I absolutely love this mobile IV service! Our nurse is incredibly knowledgeable, friendly, and caring — she always takes the time to consider our pre-existing conditions and tailor each session for the best results. We truly feel the difference after every visit. If you’re looking to boost your health and feel your best, I highly recommend booking an appointment!

Alka ordered and used mesynchemal stem cells on me and injected them into my face, into my scalp and via IV into my blood, all at one time. I have since found out that none of these were approved by the FDA for cosmetic use and have had to take the arduous and horrific reaction my body had into my own hands and advocacy. I spoke to Alka for a year prior to going forward with this procedure. She tout the benefits and said she had “model” clients who do it and have amazing results and all she has seen are amazing results. Another nurse in her office also elaborated that she had it done and had great results by way, encouraging me to follow through with the stem cell IV.  Alka never took the time to VERBALLY go over the dangers or bad reactions that a patient could have. There was never a verbal one on one regarding that topic.  After Alka did this procedure on me, my life spiraled into the worst series of side effects I have EVER experienced and I am still battling with these to this day (I have had tons of procedures at many different places and this one left me in sheer hell). I have issues I’ve NEVER had before. My prior beautiful skin is now the WORST it’s ever been.  It is now sensitive, flushes all the time and my skin is weak and thin from constant inflammation due to her stem cell microneedle procedure and my reaction to the stem cell IV. After her procedure, I could no longer use any of my prior facial creams… permanently as it was THAT BAD.  My personal products I’d been using for DECADES now burned my skin so badly that it felt like a 2nd degree burn on my face!!! My body and central nervous system are now HIGHLY sensitive to so many things. I’m on multiple medications to control the flushing and sensitivities in my body (I was NEVER on any of this medications before nor had ANY of these flushing and sensitivity  issues). My face flushes and becomes inflamed on a regular basis, my skin burned horrifically for months to my horror post procedure. I was inflammAGING, not looking younger or better. This procedure has BRUTALLY turned my life upside down. After Alka did the microneedle on my face, she gave me the mirror and my face was screaming with red with marks all over it. I had a feeling at that moment that something was truly wrong. I reached out to Alka for help after months and months of suffering (I could not even go in the SUN for months and still have to be careful!!!!!!) and the only thing she could offer was a LOW HISTAMINE diet. I had to cancel a pre planned vacation because my skin was soooo bad. So bad that I cried for months but my TEARS WOULD BURN MY FACE!!!!!I have had to go to tons of doctors and specialists for help since seeing her. I went to her for years prior and thought I could trust her but I now know I was terribly wrong. I wish someone else would have written about their experience so I’d know to question or second guess what could become of my life, my looks and my health if I did that procedure (it’s very expensive and BRUTAL). PATIENTS need to be throughly informed of ALL potential outcomes and not just rushed through a procedure that could be LIFE ALTERING. Stop using cosmetic products that aren’t FDA approved!!! After reading the review about the Botox, I don’t even know WHAT she put in my body or if she was being honest and transparent. All I know is that NO ONE SHOULD EVER SUFFER LIKE THIS… EVER!!! I would not believe that Ali review on here before … but I do now!! I cried over this for MONTHS but I couldn’t truly let it out because my TEARS WOULD BURN MY FACIAL SKIN! Yes, it was THAT BAD!

Microdosing tirzepatide has been a game changer for me. I started it to help with lupus-related autoimmune inflammation, and the results have been beyond what I expected. My foot tendonitis went away, my whole body feels less inflamed, and I have tons of steady energy throughout the day. Even my rings fit better now. It’s been one of the most impactful changes I’ve made for my health.
Alka is amazing! So happy to have met her. She knows her stuff and advised me well. So happy with my results!!
