liquid-life-iv-south-hill.text: Billi Jo was absolutely amazing! The office makes you feel so relaxed and it just felt like all the stress was taken off my shoulders the minute I walked in!! I will definitely be going back!! Highly recommend!!

As an NBC-HWC, I’m extremely knowledgeable about IV therapy’s benefits. It also a key element in my complex recovery from a life‑altering collision. NAD+, for example, is essential to my long‑term TBI regimen and has produced great results.

I’ve done IV therapy all over the world, and this clinic is top tier. It should be seen as a serious clinical resource, not an average pop‑up drip cafe.

The team is skilled, warm, and detail‑oriented. They genuinely care about their role in healthcare and that's why I’ve made them part of my ongoing recovery plan.

Use the Biomat and hydromassage while you are there; these practitioners understand the synergistic effect of layering modalities.

If you or your company are serious about recovery, prevention, or longevity, I strongly recommend making Liquid Life IV Therapy your go‑to for managing burnout, improving productivity, shortening recovery, or creating a high‑impact wellness experience for you and your friends.

We had our first IV this week with Billi Jo and Jade! I suffer from migraines and wanted to try the headache drip to attempt to break the migraine cycle. Their IV concoction worked! I feel so much better! My husband got the energy IV and got his boost on, about, the third day. Billi Jo and Jade pampered us and were genuinely concerned about our wellbeing. We will be going back!
Jade and her staff were amazing! They make you feel so welcomed and comfortable. I’m 2 days after my IV and I already have more energy and I feel better over all. I highly recommend Liquid Life IV!

I had an amazing experience with Liquid Life IV! From the moment I arrived, Jade was friendly, knowledgeable, and made me feel completely comfortable. The process was explained clearly, and everything was done professionally and efficiently. I left feeling refreshed, and noticeably better than when I walked in. You can tell she truly cares about her clients’ health and wellness. I highly recommend Liquid Life IV to anyone looking for quality IV therapy and excellent customer service!

island-revive-chester.text:
Dear Island Revive,

It is my pleasure to write this review about my service today with Erica.

First, this was my first visit. I was searching for a place on the Eastern Shore (where I live) to begin receiving IV hydration. I came across Island Revive and a few other places, but Island Revive stood out because they were open on a Saturday after the Christmas holiday, which was a huge plus.

I decided to give it a try and contacted them, leaving a voicemail. Someone called me back promptly and answered all of my questions. She was very kind and professional—her name was Colleen.

I booked my appointment for the very next day, and Erica was my nurse. She truly impressed me—one stick and done. I am not a fan of being stuck multiple times, as that is usually a dealbreaker for me, but that was not the case here at all.

It has been about an hour since I left, and I feel amazing. I went straight to the gym and worked out feeling fully hydrated and energized. I will absolutely be returning and have officially found my go-to IV hydration location. Thus, I never leave a review unless I have visited a few times, but - I truly feel so amazing and here is my honest first impression review.

Thank you, Island Revive!

I ran the Tuckahoe 25K this past weekend and decided to try IV Vitamin Hydration therapy to help combat dehydration.   I have had severe cramping during this race in the past and was hoping the IV hydration would help prevent cramping and improve my recovery from the 15ish mile run.  IT WORKED!!!!   I sailed through with my fastest time yet and literally had NO COMPLAINTS!   My joints felt better! NO MUSCLE CRAMPING OR TIGHTNESS!   The process was easy.  I was able to schedule online and the trained nurse guided me through the entire process.  It was relaxing and comfortable.   They even have recliners so you can kick back, relax and watch TV if you choose!   I've already scheduled my next appointment in a few weeks. This time I'm going to try the "Immunity" Blend since I will be traveling to Florida for that race!

Woke up slightly funky feeling today so figured I’d give this a try. I chose the immunity bag to combat what ever is trying to take me down. Very clean and comfortable during the entire process. The nurse was fantastic, very pleasant and knowledgeable! Offered a heated massaging eye mask, blanket, and a nice massage recliner. By the time I left my energy level was back and over all just felt a lot better. Definitely recommend!

As first-time visitors, we couldn’t have asked for a better experience at Island RevIVe. The owner and IV tech were extremely personable and welcoming. They made us feel completely at ease throughout the entire process. I felt better and more refreshed before the IV was even finished.

We’re already looking forward to our next visit and would highly recommend Island RevIVe to anyone curious about IV therapy. You’ll be in great hands!
Erica was very careful when choosing the right vein and has great technique. She’s also personable and interesting to talk to.

new-wave-functional-aesthetic-medicine-r.text: I had my microneedling done by Shreena, and she was amazing! She made me feel super comfortable and explained everything clearly. The treatment was smooth, and my skin already feels so much better — glowing and refreshed! Shreena is so kind, professional, and really knows her stuff. Highly recommend her if you’re thinking about microneedling or any skincare treatment!

I have been going to New Wave Medicine for about a year now and I can’t give enough praise. I am treated like family, I never have to wait for an appointment, everyone knows your name. If you are tired of seeing whoever is on call, waiting weeks for an appointment, and just being a number, I encourage you to call New Wave Medicine; you won’t be disappointed. Best life investment!

Shreena administered Botox for me in my forehead 2x now and I have noticed much less headaches. It’s been a game changer. She is professional and personable. She gives recommendations based on what I actually need, not over doing anything. Highly  recommend!

I am so incredibly thankful to have found Dr. Bita and the New Wave Medicine team. From the moment you walk in, the practice feels warm and welcoming. Dr. Bita is not only brilliant but also kind, compassionate, and truly invested in her patients. Unlike other providers I’ve seen in the past, I never feel rushed—she takes the time to listen, understand my goals, and work alongside me to bring them to life.

Her passion for her patients is evident in everything she does, and that level of care makes all the difference. I genuinely feel like I have my life back, and Dr. Bita has played a huge role in that. If you’re searching for a new provider, look no further—New Wave Medicine is the best place to be!

New Wave Medicine is a true sanctuary for whole-body wellness. Whatever your health goals or concerns are, they can help you! I had my very first IPL treatment on 7/30/25 with Emily and she was phenomenal. I was very nervous going in but Emily explained everything thoroughly, step by step, and constantly checked on my comfort level throughout the process. Her incredibly calm, reassuring energy really made the experience so much less scary. She absolutely earned my trust, and I’m now excited to book more aesthetic services with her! Dr. Bita is equally amazing. She has helped both my daughter and I with our weight loss journeys. Her approach is empowering, guiding us through lifestyle changes and supporting us with nutritional injections and peptides. She created a safe space where we could be open about our insecurities and then gave us a clear, manageable plans to build confidence and feel good in our bodies. And Dr. Ashley is simply the best provider I’ve ever had. I started seeing her in 2022 after a friend’s referral. She truly listens and has a real passion for healing from the inside out. Since becoming her patient, I’ve been able to stop six medications thanks to her root-cause holistic approach. She helped me get off blood pressure, anxiety, and depression meds, and guided me away from needing cholesterol meds entirely. Her care has improved my quality of life. Every person at New Wave makes you feel seen, safe, and supported. I’m beyond grateful for their impact on my health, mind, and spirit. Their practice has truly been life-changing and highly recommend all of their services.

arctic-elevation-renton.text: I had a wonderful experience at Arctic. The staff are simple phenomenal. From getting set up with Kiana and Julian, to getting assisted by the nurse, everyone was wonderful. I came in for an IV after feeling under the weather from traveling. I can confirm I felt MUCH healthier within 24hrs of receiving the IV. Excited to come again with friends and family!

Arctic elevation is amazing! This place offers a variety of services including sauna,  red light therapy, compression therapy, and cryo, which was my personal favorite. You will leave feeling relaxed and rejuvinated, and all of the staff is incredibly kind and professional. Highly recommend for personal appointments and group ones!

I recently visited Arctic Elevation, and it was an outstanding experience! The facility is impeccably clean and well-organized. I have to give a shout-out to my friend Kristal and Rio who invited me to visit this place, the nurse who assess us is an incredible nurse. She made me feel completely at ease, especially since I was nervous about needles. Her friendly and professional demeanor truly made a difference.

Lillian was also fantastic so sweet and accommodating. She offered us water and even a warm blanket to ensure our comfort. I highly recommend Arctic Elevation to everyone. It’s a wonderful place that radiates positivity!

Jillian is very helpful. I would recommend this place.

Landed in Seattle and knew I had to come try Arctic for myself after hearing so much positive feedback about their services. My main takeaway is the atmosphere of their facility. Welcoming, peaceful, and excellent. I knew from my first few minutes that they are the real deal. Got an IV and tried cryotherapy for the first time! Safe to say that I’ll be back💪🏽

Phenomenal service! I received red light therapy, compression sleeves, and IV myers with glutathione add on and left feeling so much better and only got better throughout the day! Woah 🤯 definitely can’t wait to come back and buy a membership. You get treated like royalty there and the staff are top notch. They think of every need you may have before you even know you may need anything. Exceptional cleanliness in all treatment areas.

iv-league-hydration-and-wellness-llc-cam.text: Nicole was amazing and made the process so relaxing! She made sure I was comfortable and answered all of the questions I had. I highly recommend her business! She was very professional and knowledgeable.

I had gotten into contact with Nicole mid afternoon a couple weeks ago about getting hydration booked for my great uncle who had been having trouble eating from battling pneumonia. Within two hours, she was at his house administering his infusion and vitamins! I can’t thank Nicole enough for her knowledge and promptness in helping my loved one—especially in the comfort of his own home! I would highly recommend IV League Hydration and Wellness to anyone looking for a quick pick me up or in need of hydration!

My father in his 80s was having a difficult time recovering after radiation for lung cancer and pneumonia.   He was dehydrated and struggling to eat/drink.
Nicole came several times into his home to provide the IV hydration needed to help get him through these hard weeks.
It is amazing to see the improvement after each infusion. It truly was life saving.  Thank you so much!
Do not hesitate to consider this service for your loved one.

I would highly recommend IV League for any of your hydration needs.  This was the first time ever visiting a facility like this. After returning from Mexico and becoming very dehydrated, I was in desperate need of fluids.  Nicole was very experienced at starting the IV.  I could tell that she was experienced and in good hands.  I felt very relaxed and at ease the entire time.  The office was very professional and extremely clean.   IV League saved me a trip to the ER with a long wait.  5 stars plus.

Nichole came to my house. She was very pleasant and professional. She started my iv and kept checking to make sure I was comfortable. It was a quick and easy appointment and I was feeling better before she even left my driveway. I'll definitely be using iv league hydration again!

elevate-wellness-nw-woodland.text: I came in for a consultation last summer and explained to Acacia about my low back pain and overall inflammation. All of my joints had been hurting for a while, but the back pain had been intolerable the last couple months. It was really helpful to hear a list of all of the things she can provide that would help me and she was able to work with my budget on what specifically would be the most impactful treatment right then and consider additional treatments later. Acacia is so genuine, friendly, knowledgeable, and has a big heart for helping her community, that I felt at ease right away. I’ve made the small and valuable investment in some hyperbaric packages and have been so pleased. After just a couple sessions, I was already moving with more ease and was so shocked.  It was helpful to learn she uses the only FDA approved hyperbaric chamber too. Elevate Wellness provides a military discount for clients who have served our country as well. As a USAF veteran, it warms my heart when businesses honor veterans in this way and is so appreciated. I’m excited to add their IV therapies into my future appointments and know I’ll likely be returning with one of my athletes as well. I’ve heard great things on the rapid healing for sports injuries and energy boosting IV therapies. So grateful to have Elevate Wellness in our community!

Acacia & Ashley were amazing and so kind during a girls outing for some IV hydration. They were both knowledgeable and even gave us a tour on each product they have and all the health benefits each offers. Already booked my next visit!

From Hyperbarics, to red light therapy and my MOST favorite (IV’s) Elevate Wellness can take care of you! These ladies are absolutely incredible and have played such a HUGE part in me getting my health back on track. From Gut health testing, to different IV’s and treatments. They take pride in their ability to help others and get you feeling your best! I’ll be forever grateful!

Acacia is amazing & she was SO wonderful keeping my daughter calm before and during a hyperbaric treatment! Highly recommend her. Very cute and clean space! I also got red and blue light therapy for a burn and it helped speed up the healing process significantly! Love all of the knowledge she is willing to share and her passion for what she is doing to help people heal and get healthy! 10 stars 🌟

Acacia is a ROCKSTAR! So glad we have another holistic clinic in the area! I am always greeted with a smile, a snack and Kangan water. I’m afraid of needles and Acacia holds my hand through the whole process of IV therapy. She answers all 743 questions I seem to come up with in an hour appointment. She explains all vitamins, minerals and supplements AND WHAT THEY DO! No western medicine doctor would give me the time of day. Elevate Wellness NW doesn’t have crazy up charges or high pricing like other clinics I’ve experienced. If you’re looking for a wellness clinic that cares for you like family, you HAVE to go to Elevate Wellness NW. Making the medical world a little less scary every time you visit 💕

sculpt-wellness-pasco.text: Brought my daughter in for an injury recovery treatment and from the moment we walked in the team has been incredible!  Sarah helped my daughter with cryotherapy and let us know all the wonderful benefits.  She is now doing red light therapy with cryo and the recovery has been going so smooth!  Thanks to Sarah and the whole Sculpt team, we signed up for a monthly membership.

I enjoy coming to sculpt multiple times a week! The services are amazing and I always leave feeling great. The staff are super friendly and welcoming. My favorite things are the massage chair with compression and sauna pod.

I really love the entire team here. They listen and really want you to succeed at the pace and level you set. The service options are wide ranging and allow me to customize my weeks. Come check them out!!

My experience at Sculpt has been amazing! The staff is knowledgeable and friendly. This wellness spa also has so many services, and great availability to make appointments! I am addicted to the benefits of Cryotherapy and the Sauna Pods, and highly recommend Sculpt to anyone looking for a healthy, and fresh start for their bodies!

Cryofreeze is an amazing experience. Today was my second visit because yesterday was such a great experience for my first visit! Everybody should try it at least once. The Sculpt staff was very friendly and helpful.  I called before I went because I had a few questions. I was well informed on everything. I went to both locations over two days and the experience was perfect both times. No matter how many questions I asked, they were polite, gave all the information I needed, and were great at sharing their experience to make my experience the best it could be.  Ill be back as often as I can!

moses-lake-aesthetics-and-wellness-moses.text:
I had an amazing experience at Moses Lake Aesthetics and Wellness! From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed and at ease. The atmosphere is calming, beautifully designed, and perfect for relaxation. The staff is incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring! I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a high-quality wellness experience. Can’t wait for my next visit!
Also have been loving my new crew neck, so soft and my new favorite!

These stars should be diamonds! I am now 'Mommy New Face'. The sheer brilliance that Kristina brings to every appointment compares to no one in ML. Her knowledge of the products to determine my specific needs is superior. I've recommended her expertise to several of my co-workers and friends

I have loved every service I’ve had completed here! From a lash lift with Kaylee to vitamin B shots, dysport, and microneedling from
Kristina; they’ve all been amazing. Kristina sets a high standard with being extra transparent and communicative in determining what will be best to achieve my personal skin care goals, and she succeeds in meeting my needs every time! Although I no longer live in Moses Lake I find myself traveling from over an hour and a half away just to complete services here because of my continued extremely pleasant experiences!

I’ve now had three facials from Kiven, and I cannot recommend her enough! The entire experience is incredibly relaxing, and she takes such care in ensuring you are comfortable and relaxed throughout the treatment.

Kiven is truly an expert in her craft. Her facials are not just about skincare—they are a full experience, offering both relaxation and rejuvenation. The products she uses feel luxurious, and her technique is flawless. I left with glowing skin and a calm, refreshed mind.

If you're looking for an esthetician who is not only talented but also genuinely cares about your well-being and experience, Kiven is the one. She is a GEM and makes every visit a true treat!

Highly recommend! The staff is incredibly friendly, knowledgeable, and professional. They made me feel completely comfortable and confident throughout the entire process. From Botox to self-tanning, every service has been top-notch, and the results speak for themselves. If you’re looking for a place that truly cares about their clients and delivers amazing results, this is it!

vancouver-wellness-studio-waterfront-spa.text: I had asked for a gift certificate as a Christmas gift as I had been to Vancouver Wellness previously and just loved it. They are always professional and the spa is beautifully quaint. . Zanthe provided a great facial experience. She had a calm, yet expressive demeanor . Communicated clearly what she would be doing during the procedure and asked me what I wanted to experience during my facial. I was fully expecting this to be a face only experience but she made sure that my arms, neck and head (everything leading to my face) was taken care of too. It was wonderfully relaxing and enjoyable! She even checked in with me the next day to see how my skin was doing… I will be going back to Vancouver Wellness.

While visiting family, I booked a massage with Lauren at this studio. I was very impressed with the cleanliness and overall ambience. Lauren was an excellent therapist, with wonderful skills in pinpointing my concerns, and also a kind, intuitive person.
I had an add on foot soak with James, which was another very relaxing experience to end my visit. He was very friendly and informative. If you are in Vancouver please take advantage of this spa to enhance your health.

Visited this spa for the first time today for a 90 minute massage with Robin. She was incredible! Hands down one of the best massages I have had in a long time. Plus, it was a very welcoming experience all around and smelled heavenly everywhere inside. Can’t wait to return!

The spa is relaxing and clean, front desk staff are incredibly kind and helpful. I see Zanthe for waxing and she makes the awkward, somewhat painful process easy to get through. She is extremely professional and makes sure I feel comfortable. I would highly recommend her!

Zanthe is amazing! they helped me figure out what i needed for my first ever facial, and walked me through step by step so i knew what they were doing, and why they were doing it. couldn't recommend anyone more!

driptherapy-flagler-beach.text: My husband I love DripTherapy. We have had Lydia come out twice now to our home for IV therapy. We first tried it after the holidays when our immune systems felt like they were in overdrive trying to keep us from getting sick. After getting the IV therapy from Lydia we felt great! We just did another round of IV therapy before leaving for a trip out of the country so we can feel our best and give our immune systems a boost.

I was looking for iron infusions in Palm Coast, and am glad I found DripTherapy as I was able to get an appointment with Lydia in the office (they offer at-home, too) which was super pleasant. The space is within East Coast Acupuncture and you get a private room with medical recliners that massage AND heat. All in all, it's a very smooth, easy and helpful experience. I'll be returning for more infusions and look forward to trying out vitamins, too!

Lydia is truly the best! She is not only extremely knowledgeable and thorough, but she also treats her patients like family. From the moment you walk in, you feel welcomed and cared for. She takes the time to explain everything and makes sure you’re comfortable throughout the entire process. Her professionalism and genuine compassion really set her apart. I would highly recommend Lydia and Drip Therapy to anyone looking for exceptional care and service!

I recently used DripTherapy for in-home IV drip therapy after my chemotherapy sessions to help with recovery, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. From start to finish, their team was professional, attentive, and genuinely caring. Scheduling was quick and easy, and the nurse arrived right on time with everything needed for the treatment.
What stood out most was how knowledgeable and friendly the nurse was—she explained every step, made sure I was comfortable, and even followed up afterward to check on how I was feeling. The treatment itself left me feeling refreshed and energized, and the quality of care exceeded my expectations.
It’s rare to find a company that combines medical expertise with such a personalized, compassionate touch. I highly recommend DripTherapy to anyone looking for safe, convenient, and effective IV therapy in the comfort of their own home.

Lydia is Great, very nice, and knowledgeable! After letting my previous TRT clinic know that they are getting too pricey and I can’t afford it anymore they just Ghosted me…
I got referred to Lydia at Drip Therapy and I’m so happy I came here. She actually cares about how you’re feeling, checks up on you, and here Prices are WAY better! Highly recommended!

illuminateme-silverdale.text:
I cannot recommend this office enough. Not only does the staff fully support and lift patients up they do so with such care. I am doing the 4 week program with the Exopod, Liptovite shots and supplements.

My family has said I have been happy and had much more energy than and detox I have tried in the past.

The office has so many other options. Call today and make your appointment  you will not be disappointed.

Kelsey isn't pushy. Her face is that of a normal human so I automatically trusted her NOT to make my face look overdone.

I originally went in for Botox in my jaw because my clenching causes pain. My jaw hurts a lot less and my chin looks thinner.

I was a little brave last time and had her do my crows feet and that was an amazing experience. My face isn't completely frozen in that area, just less wrinkly. My husband hasn't even noticed I had it done but keeps complimenting me 😇

This time I had her do a lip flip and that sucked but not because of Kelsey.

It's super easy to book online. They have appointments early-ish in the morning that are very convenient for me. AND there's always a good parking spot available in their lot.

I love Kelsey and Rayshell!! What I truly appreciate about them is how down to earth they are, they will educate you on the services but are not going to push you into anything. They want you to make an educated choice on what is best for you. I use them for my semaglutide and I love how transparent their practice is with this medication.
I’m a fairly new client…. But, Kelsey is fabulous! I take a ferry ride to come see her which is becoming more frequently!
A very pleasant experience.  Friendly, quiet and relaxing.  I am happy with the results of the injections (and they didn't hurt!)

remedy-health-and-wellness-richland.text: Joe Poston & Remedy Health are amazing! They have been giving my father exceptional care and really spend the time helping figure out complex health issues. The direct primary care is so worth it!

Absolutely love Remedy and everyone that works there! From Micayla and Geri helping me to get scheduled, meds ordered, and the ease of communication which I have questions outside of the clinic, to Joe and his excellent services he offers and knowledge. I genuinely feel like my care is a team effort and all my concerns and issues are being heard and addressed at an affordable price. I highly recommend!
really appreciate his approach. not too western medicine. pretty good insight for natural supplements. I do feel a difference in my quality of sleep and that's been really helpful.

For anything urgent care related for my family! With having young children sitting in a waiting room can be challenging. It is so nice to be able to stay in the comfort of your own home! It is pretty incredible to receive top quality health care from such a great person from your living room! Thank you so much for such a great experience!

revel-medspa-richland.text: I have been getting Botox for years and realized that a certain area on my forehead wasn’t really changing even with botox, I wasn’t getting the results I wanted. So at an appointment with Dana we talked about me possibly getting filler in the future and after a couple of months I finally made up my mind and I am so happy with my results already!! I am on day two and I already love my results. I couldn’t have chosen a better most knowledgeable person to go to! Thank you Dana!

Dana is truly the best! She’s not only incredibly knowledgeable and professional, but she also creates a memorable, comfortable experience every time. She’s made me feel so confident and genuinely excited to come back. I appreciate how honest and straightforward she is, especially when it comes to starting young with Dysport and filler, she always gives thoughtful guidance that puts me at ease.

Dana took excellent care of me and my crows feet lol. I got the client experience I was looking for, she listened to me and understood my desired outcome. I trust her 100%  I also love that she guarantees her work. Thanks Dana!

Dana is amazing!! She makes everything look so natural! I’ve gotten Botox, my lips done and have had the “vampire” micro needling done. She is top notch! Personality and precision! Also, her salon is beautiful. If you are considering it definitely consider her first!!

Dana is amazing at her craft! My second time coming in for my dysport and first time getting my lip filler! I fell in love with my new lips and love my flawless lift ! 😍 Thank you so much for making the whole process smooth and comfortable. 💕

pure-skiin-spokane-valley.text: I am fairly new to Pure Skiin but I am already very impressed. I am doing laser hair removal with Nellie. She is so professional and skilled at what she does. I have really enjoyed working with her and feel that she stands behind her work. She thoroughly answers all my questions and my appointments have been prompt but not rushed.  The space is clean and relaxing. Overall I am very happy to be working with Pure Skiin.

Lazer hair removal has changed my life! No more in grown hairs. No more prickly grow back for my arm pits and Brazilian. Thank you PURE SKIN! I cant reccomend you guys enough. Nellie always made sure I was comfortable, even amidst the quick discomfort of the lazer treatment. If you're considering hair removal, do it! I wish i did this years ago.

I've been seeing Nellie for a while now, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. She’s not only highly professional and skilled at what she does, but also a genuinely kind and caring person. Every treatment I’ve had with her has delivered great results, and I always feel comfortable and well taken care of. I highly recommend her to anyone looking for quality service in a welcoming environment.

I can’t say enough good things about Pure Skiin Wax! The space is spotless, calming, and they’re always so considerate of your time, you’re in and out quickly, but never rushed.

A huge shoutout to Nellie, who is truly the best! She’s professional, quick, and somehow makes waxing way less painful. She’s so thoughtful and makes every appointment comfortable & enjoyable.

I went in for their waxing package which got the legs, armpits, and the Brazilian. I had Martha who was absolutely amazing!! She made me feel so comfortable for my first time, and chatted the whole time.

The waxing was not as painful as people can make it out to be, and Martha did such a phenomenal job making it as painless as possible. My appointment flew by!

I highly recommend this place. It was phenomenal!

the-lab-aesthetics-wellness-spokane-vall.text:
Do it, you'll love them! Great prices, clean cozy atmosphere, and amazing employees.

I've been getting Dysport for about 3 years now and was looking for a new place to try because I wasn't super happy with the last place I was going to. I was drawn to The LAB's website because first of all they have Xeomin, which ngl I am not interested in personally but I haven't seen that offered at many places and was super impressed, but what got me was that they have an incredible membership rate for Botox. I haven't tried Botox before but was not opposed, so I joined their membership and banked a couple months of units and just went in today for my appointment. They also have Alle!

Loved the staff, they are so friendly and welcoming from the front desk to the provider, and I was not pressured to buy anything I didn't inquire about and they didn't even try to push their skincare on me like the other places tend to. Although they did have the good brands fyi if you like them.

They're very upfront about pricing (listed on the website even) and expectations, they didn't hurt my feelings about what I could use done after asking my goals, and have amazing options available for treatments to help some of my skin issues. Really impressed with the cleanliness of everything too, it was pretty immaculate in there. They also loaded the syringes in the room in front of me and told me exactly how many units and where they were putting them which I also found a green flag. I don't love when they have them preloaded or do it outside of the room (cuz why?).

Anyways tbd about my results in 2 weeks when it settles but I really liked them and will see how my follow-up goes! Unless Botox doesn't work for me compared to Dysport I'm probably going to be a lifelong customer.

Excellent atmosphere. Friendly. You feel like you are welcome here and that you've known these people for years after just a couple visits. Knowledgeable and flexible on scheduling. Relax sense of humor which makes conversation that much more pleasant.

I recently visited again after not stopping by for nine months, and it felt like reconnecting with old friends—Aaron and Tyler made me feel instantly welcome. They’re incredibly friendly, truly listen to my needs, and consistently provide excellent recommendations and services. I highly recommend The LAB Aesthetics & Wellness Med Spa.

Amazing staff, welcoming environment. Down to earth- not pretentious at all! I’ve been to other med spas that were uppity and felt unwelcoming. Not this place. Super clean and beautiful facility and my micro needling was so comfortable. I definitely got 5 star service. Very much a fancy spa feel in a warm and friendly atmosphere.
My Diamond Glow with Lizzy was extraordinaire! So relaxing! My face felt so clean and smooth! She provided knowledge tips to increase my skin to the BEST that it can be! Definitely will do it again!

cor-institute-spokane.text: At COR, the therapeutic options are vast and the staff is INCREDIBLE! They are helpful, compassionate, knowledgeable and kind. Friendly staff. There are so many options to improve your health and well being. Going is like a day at the spa. Prices are reasonable. It's a great way to do something special for yourself or someone you love.

Absolutely love this place, they have everything you can think of to help you in your recovery needs. Arman and the team are very knowledgeable and I’m happy to have them in my corner to help me be as recovered and healthy as possible for my mma fights 💪🏼

Ahhh-mazing. For years I've battled the conventional western healthcare system to become an active participant in my own health, to no avail. The hyperberic chamber treatments have helped me immensely. I would 100% recommend the services here to anyone who want to improve their health in general. It's truly a unique and valuable asset for Spokane.
COR Institute is absolutely amazing! They offer so many services and will help you create a holistic plan for any goal you may have. Highly suggest!

clinic-5c-functional-medicine-spokane.text: Leah is an exceptional functional medicine practitioner who has truly enhanced my approach to health. Her thorough practices helped me identify and understand my baseline, and also explore alternative modalities to expand and deepen my care. With her thoughtful, grounded support, I’ve been able to regulate my nervous system and make sustainable, longevity-focused changes that align with my body’s needs. I highly recommend partnering with her—her care and expertise make a lasting difference!

I have seen Leah Streich, PA-C at Clinic 5C Functional Medicine a few times now and it has been life changing for me! She was able to discover my food sensitivities and developed an action plan to help me change my eating habits and lifestyle. She also completed several injections to my knee and wrist that have greatly improved my mobility and function. I am extremely thankful for Leah, her expertise and guidance!

From my first appointment, Bri Fleeman took the time to listen to my concerns and dig deeper into the root cause of my symptoms. Unlike other providers, she didn't just treat symptoms with a pill, but actually took time to create a plan tailored to my needs and lifestyle. I highly recommend Clinic 5C Functional Med, especially Bri, for anyone that is looking for a provider and clinic that listens, investigates the root cause, and genuinely cares about your health.

I saw provider Bri Fleeman at Clinic 5C Functional Medicine for ongoing gut issues. The team made the discovery process easy to understand. Ordering an at-home test was simple and convenient. Once my results came in, Bri took the time to walk me through everything and build a personalized treatment plan. We also discovered the root cause of some gut issues - which may have been eating questionable food while traveling/food poisoning, which disrupted my gut microbiome!  It's early in my healing journey, but I left feeling supported, informed, and hopeful. I'm grateful to have a local clinic that truly listens and helps create a clear path forward!

I started seeing Bri Fleeman, and she has changed my life.

I am a very busy entrepreneur that has struggled with feeling tired and fatigued most of my life. I have high energy, but always knew I should feel more mentally clear. Well... after some extensive testing, Bri got to work. Now, through taking supplements, changing my diet and following Bri's exact plan, I feel 1000x better. I feel more mentally clear, more energized and more level headed. Now, I can put my all in at work and still come home and give my all to my family. My testosterone is way up (without TRT), my mood is less agitating, my mind is more clear, my drive is higher, and I just feel so much better.

Highly highly recommend Bri.

the-metabolic-institute-spokane.text:
I can’t recommend The Metabolic Institute enough! Debbie is absolutely incredible. From my very first appointment, she made me feel truly seen and, most importantly, gave me hope that I could get better. My journey to improving my health has had its challenges, but thanks to Debbie, I now have the tools and guidance I need to navigate it.

I often recommend The Metabolic Institute to friends, and many have found solutions to health issues they couldn’t resolve with previous providers. The entire team is wonderful—every time I walk in, I’m greeted by name with a warm smile.

If I could give 10 stars, I would!

I forgot about this business until lately I’ve been inundated with emails from them. I had an office visit and Debbie saw me and said she thought I had Lyme. She fancies herself as a Lyme expert so I believed her. She did traditional labcorp testing which came back negative for Lyme. So then she told me I didn’t have Lyme. Two years later of progressively getting worse, I saw a real Lyme literate practitioner who did the proper testing which came back positive for Lyme and several co infections. A perfect example of having just enough information to be dangerous.

Debbie and her staff have been kind, caring and thorough. I’ve had the opportunity to get a more complete look at what is going on inside my body. I’ve had fatigue and some other issues for a few years now. She did suggest several supplements but explained how they work and also said which might be most important if I didn’t want to spend money on all of it. I’ve already started feeling better and have some answers. I’ve never had such a complete work up and I’m truly grateful for the time Debbie has spent with me, explaining things to me and listening and giving some real, science based suggestions for my well-being.

Debbie is an absolute top tier provider. She takes a full body system approach to health. She cuts no corners and provides a wealth of knowledge to her patients. Not only does she truly care about you as a patient and person - she's incredibly kind and easy to talk with. She also has a competent staff that is always friendly. Highly recommend the Metabolic Institute and specifically Debbie Judd!

If you want to take corrective action and make an effort to get to the root of your illness and not just mitigate the symptoms the Metabolic Institute is the place to be.  Debbie and her team will work WITH you, based on your individual needs and objectives to get you where you want to be.  It is refreshing to work with a Practitioner who actually listens to the patient and respects your individuality and unique characteristics.  Unlike the HMO where I am allotted ten minutes, rubber stamped and referred out Debbie actually takes the time to get to know who you are, what you want and how to get you there.  Buffy is great and treats you like a fellow human being and not just another number on the days schedule.  If you want to get outside the standard HMO box and get some real help set an appointment.  My first appointment was seven years ago.  I don't think I would be here today without their input.  Thanks Mike, Debbie and Team!!

evo-med-spa-spokane.text: My experience with Tamara was so wonderful! This was my first time coming here, after not being pleased with my last experience with Botox. She was so kind and caring, and took the time to get know me and determine what my best option was. I've been to multiple different injectors, and I can tell Tamara is very experienced- the process was simple and practically painless. The med spa is beautiful! She helped get me set up with an Aspire account (which gave me a discount) and she also offered me a new client discount, so I ended getting about 15% off my services! The results are excellent, I'm so happy this time around. She told me to reach out in a couple weeks if for any reason I wasn't happy. I appreciate that she cares and wants to make sure I received the results I was looking for. I will definitely be back, thank you, Tamara!

Tamara is a gem! Her expertise, professionalism, and warm demeanor made my experience here truly exceptional. She was patient, informative, and ensured I felt comfortable throughout the entire process. From the initial consultation to the post-treatment care, Tamara's attention to detail and genuine care were evident.
The medical spa itself was clean, modern, and welcoming. The staff was friendly and accommodating, and the atmosphere was relaxing. I highly recommend Evo Med Spa and Tamara to anyone seeking top-notch medical spa treatments, Thanks Tamara!!! 🥰

Have absolutely loved my experience so far at Evo Med Spa.

Syrah has made my visits enjoyable. She goes above and beyond to make you comfortable talking about your imperfections because you are on a journey and she is there with you!

Highly recommend Evo Med Spa to anyone looking to better themselves ❤️

Evo Med Spa is incredible! If I could give it more than 5 stars, I would. Tamara goes above and beyond and is truly such an amazing nurse. She cares deeply about her patients and makes you feel so taken care of. I am so grateful for this place!

I have been utilizing Tamara's services for the past 3 months, she is professional, talented and fun to work with. I have been able to reduce sun spots/ discoloration dramatically with her laser services. Her state of the art equipment is comfortable and Superior than older models that I have experienced, especially her micro-needling with RF and ultrasound. Next up is concentrating on crepey skin. The Improvement in this short of time has been excellent and I plan on growing old gracefully at Evo Med Spa!

luminess-lounge-spokane-valley.text: Keanna was absolutely amazing. She is extremely knowledgeable, caring and experienced. I felt confident and so excited to be getting my spider veins treated here. She made it comfortable and easy as well as affordable. So far I am very satisfied with the results and highly recommend Keanna and Luminess Lounge.

Keanna was an absolute delight. Not only is she fantastic at what she does but just a very knowledgeable professional practitioner and sweetest woman ever.  I received an IV infusion and tried Botox for the first time and absolutely love the results. My friend and I loved the experience and benefits. Thank you Luminess Lounge.
Keanna was extremely kind and understanding, my virtual appointment was on time and felt like I was able to address all my concerns.

I highly recommend Luminess Lounge for all your beauty and health needs. Keanna is both knowledgeable and very professional. She made me feel completely comfortable right away. I've had other great experiences with vitamin IV treatments, and she still managed to surpass my expectations!! Very relaxing. I still feel amazing weeks later. Her suggestions for the right treatment for me, based on the outcome i was looking for, was perfect. Hands down the best.
Ps. Booking online was very easy!
Luminess Lounge treats me like royalty. Kianna is profession, kind, soft spoken and so very helpful in areas of need. I feel so much better after my appointments and always look forward to the next.

the-regenerative-institute-spokane.text: I had an amazing time (again) at The Regenerative Institute. The staff are so friendly, knowledgable, and skilled at what they do. I went in for a Myers Cocktail infusion and Kristin was incredibly attentive to all my needs. I felt very well taken care of throughout my time in the (comfy) chair with blanket and warm glove over the injection site. I've been before and I'll be back again, Regenerative Institute! Seriously--check this place out. You won't be disappointed. I'm still reaping the rewards from my "little pick me up" yesterday morning!

I have seen both Dr. Pasma and recently I saw Dr. Anderson and - WOW! I will refer EVERYONE I know to the TRI. Both doctors are a wealth of knowledge, both listened to my concerns, addressed issues that I was having on the spot that day and then proceeded to make a collaborative plan with me that left me feeling cared for in the moment, my concerns heard and addressed and a plan in place for me to trust I'm not being left hanging for unknown periods of time. I am the BIGGEST fan of this group and everyone that I have engaged with in the office is organized, intelligent, compassionate and thoughtful. If you want a holistic approach to your care with doctors who actually will listen to what you say...go see anyone at The Regenerative Institute. You will be in good hands!! Thank you Dr. Pasma and Dr. Anderson. You have my greatest appreciation and admiration!
Dr Pasma is very thorough and extremely kind. His knowledge and expertise with injuries is superior to most physicians. His staff is also very competent. I highly recommend this clinic.

After HA injections proved ineffective, I was told by a PA at the clinic where I had two previous knee surgeries that a knee replacement was my best option to relieve the pain. Instead, I opted for Platelet Rich Plasma (PLP) injections after viewing YouTube videos by Dr. J. Peng that document the effectiveness of PRP. I received a series of injections from Dr. Pasma at The Regenerative Institute, and I am now able to bike, ski, and sleep without pain in my knee. The treatments I received from Dr. Pasma at The Regenerative Institute definitely improved my quality of life.

I first visited the Regenerative Institute about two years ago with multiple joint issues, the most concerning being my inability to extend my left elbow fully. After a few physical therapy sessions with Dr. Rob, he recommended I see Dr. Pasma for a PRP injection. Before that, I had even been referred to an orthopedic surgeon to discuss surgery.
By the time I finally met the surgeon, I had already received a couple of PRP treatments and regained significant mobility in my elbow. The surgeon told me surgery was no longer necessary and advised me to continue PRP therapy.
About a year after my first injection, I could fully extend my left elbow—and now I’m even planning to play golf this spring! Today, I have zero joint pain and couldn’t be more grateful to Dr. Pasma and his team. This is the best clinic in Spokane, and I’ve recommended it to many people.
Not only have they given me my life back, but they’ve treated me like family every time I’ve visited. This is what medicine should feel like—and they exemplify it every day.

wholebody-wellness-aesthetics-spokane-va.text:
5 Stars

Christina is hands down the best cosmetic injector I’ve  met. Her technique is so gentle—it’s like she has a weightless touch. The injections are practically painless, and the results speak for themselves. I can’t recommend her enough!

For anyone looking to improve their hormone health, Kendra is phenomenal. She’s knowledgeable, caring, and really takes the time to understand your body’s needs. The team uses thorough blood work to personalize your treatment plan and truly empower you to take control of your wellness journey.

The hyperbaric oxygen chamber was also an amazing experience—completely rejuvenating. It helped clear the heaviness I’d been feeling in both my head and body, leaving me refreshed and energized.

If you’re looking for a place that not only offers top-tier aesthetic services but also genuinely cares about your long-term health, look no further. WholeBody Wellness Aesthetics is the real deal.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Kendra is thorough in her review of your health history, actually listens to you, and has many tests and supplements available in office that help her create a customized HRT plan to meet your individual needs.  She also makes herself available for questions or concerns between appointments. I would highly recommend WholeBody Wellness Aesthetics.

After visiting 17 (yes, 17) physicians over eight years without finding solutions for persistent health issues, a friend recommended WholeBody Wellness Aesthetics. There, I met Kendra Johnson, who truly changed my life. She listened attentively, understood my struggles, and validated my experiences. Among the 17 doctors I had seen before, I was misdiagnosed, told my problems were simply due to my age (a personal favorite), and informed that all my blood work fell within normal ranges. But normal for whom, my friend asked? It was clearly not normal for me. Kendra ordered blood tests (conducted in her office), and when the results arrived, they revealed several abnormalities. Together, we devised a comprehensive plan to tackle the issues at hand. Seven months later, I feel better than I have in nearly a decade. The team at WholeBody Wellness Aesthetics is outstanding. Kendra Johnson, Christina Nelson, and Leeaura Sanders have provided exceptional support. I genuinely look forward to my monthly visits. While WholeBody Wellness Aesthetics operates on a private pay basis, some people hesitate at the idea of paying out of pocket. For me, my health is priceless. Being unwell has cost me far more than my visits to WBWA.
I introduce Wholebody Wellness Aesthetics to every woman I meet who is facing challenges in their bodies. Kendra Johnson develops a customized plan tailored to your individual needs, ensuring it's not a one-size-fits-all solution. Treat yourself to the greatest gift of all: health. Contact Kendra Johnson for a consultation. The only regret you'll have is not discovering her sooner.

Kendra and Christina really do a great job informing you and taking care of you and truly Doing what’s best for you and your health. They take time to explain things, answer questions at any time, and are just fun to be around when you’re with them!

I loved the results at the end. I also got a facial done by Shel, and my skin looked hydrated and glowy! Definitely would recommend this medspa!

All in all there is only one word to describe R&R medical spa: SUPERB !
Thủy is highly skilled aesthetician with eyes for artistic in beauty , and her gentle golden hands will bring out the best for your face, help you retain your natural and fresh look , while keeping your  discomfort and minimal
She is cheerful, caring and professional. She listens to you , understanding your concern and offer sensible advices and suggestions. The results are the best outcome that may happily surprise you !
Her assistant Michele is also skillful at doing microdermabrasions. Together they make the best team to take care of any of your skin concerns.

I had an amazing experience at R&R Beauty Spa. Thuy and her team are so wonderful and treated me like family. I had dermal fillers done and absolutely look & feel refreshed. Thuy was detailed during her consult and explained things so well. You have a client for life, thank you!

the-iv-method-spokane.text:
My husband and me were there last Friday. Nurse Kathy is the best! She was taking care of us all times very professional and warm she even let my kids feel
comfortable  and gave them snacks. We love this place and we will use it every month! Highly recommend it 👍

Great experience, will be back! Went to Spokane Hydration for an IV boost for an upcoming trail race series. The Athlete infusion gave me the recovery and hydration I needed to run a longer race. The team was knowledgeable, environment was great, and I’ll certainly be back for many more sessions!

This is a wonderful place!  All of the treatments are extremely effective.  And you can't get better than the nurses that work here.  I have been coming here for a very long time and have never had a bad experience; nor do I believe that I ever will.  Great job you guys!

Great service. I got the athlete IV and i feel great. It has helped a lot with my workouts. Great atmosphere at The IV Method. The whole health and wellness center is awesome. My new go to spot in Spokane.

IV therapy has been a lifesaver for me, and the staff here are the best! They are knowledgeable and caring, and present a welcoming environment with a strong sense of community.
The cost is affordable here, and they offer monthly specials!

restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.text: I visited Restore for an IV treatment, but my experience was unpleasant. The staff completed the entire IV in just 20 minutes, even though the ingredients I received — glutathione, vitamin C, B12, B complex, glutamine, and L-carnitine — should normally be infused over at least 60 minutes. As a result, I felt dizzy, extremely fatigued, and weak. I hope the clinic reviews their procedures and ensures safe infusion speeds in the future.

Signed up in November and was told I'd receive information about a military discount. After three weeks and three phone calls, I finally received an answer: their member discount is 30%, military is 20%, so no military discount applies. This policy was never explained at enrollment.

More frustrating than the policy itself was the runaround. Multiple promises that a manager would call. Claims that my phone "wasn't working"—yet it worked fine when they finally called today. Three weeks for a simple yes or no.

The services may be fine, but the communication and follow-through were unprofessional. Veterans considering this location should ask pointed questions upfront and get answers in writing before signing anything.

Truly thankful for the team at Restore Kirkland! Highly attentive, very clean and great friendly service!

Thanks to Nurse Michelle who always goes above and beyond with educating me on every visit!

I had an incredibly disappointing and frustrating experience at this establishment. I purchased a 10-session package for hyperbaric therapy, and not once did the chamber reach the correct pressure level. Despite repeatedly informing the staff, the issue was never resolved. The pressure never even reached 4 PSI — far below the advertised 1.3 ATA.

Every visit was plagued with issues: staff were unprepared, disorganized, or in meetings when I arrived (despite being told to come early). On multiple occasions, the chamber wasn’t ready, sheets were unchanged. Constant miscommunication and lack of professionalism made this a complete waste of time and money.

To make matters worse, when I requested a refund for the sessions I didn’t use due to their failure to deliver the promised service, they refused. I even offered to pay for the three faulty sessions I did attend, despite the pressure not being correct — and they still wouldn’t refund the remaining balance.

I’ve never experienced such poor service, especially for something this costly. I do not recommend this business and will be filing a dispute with my credit card company. Avoid at all costs.

I’m so happy to have found Restore.  State of the art equipment, knowledgeable staff, easy access and scheduling.  I’ve been there three days in a row and I feel amazing!   (Cryo, RL Therapy and Infrared Sauna)

divine-aesthetic-lounge-mill-creek.text:
Got forehead Botox for the first time and I had such a good experience!

The location is super convenient with plenty of parking, which already made things easy. As soon as I walked in, the vibe was so welcoming and comfortable.

I was a little nervous since it was my first time, but Divine explained everything step by step and really listened to what I wanted. She is incredibly detail-oriented, carefully considering even the tiniest lines and the overall balance of my face before treating. I really appreciated how customized everything felt.

The whole process felt safe, smooth, and honestly so much more comfortable than I expected. Most of all, Divine is so sweet and genuinely trustworthy, which made me feel completely at ease. You can really tell she cares about her clients. Definitely coming back and telling my friends about this place!✨

I came into Divine on a whim for Botox and I’m sure glad that I did. Divine not only makes you feel comfortable she walked you through her steps and procedures. The fact that she didn’t over Botox my face was great but what was even better was at my two week follow up I went back in for a touch up. We did photos again and she knew exactly where we needed a little more. I appreciate her guidance and knowledge of choosing which tox solution would be the best for me.  I know I will be back for more treatments in the future as her prices are one of the most reasonable around.

I had microneedling with PRP done by Grace, and I couldn’t be happier with my experience. Grace was extremely kind, professional, and knowledgeable. She took the time to explain everything step by step, which made me feel very comfortable and confident throughout the treatment. The very next day, my facial redness was almost completely gone, and my skin already looks great. I’m really happy with the results so far and with the care I received. I highly recommend Grace to anyone considering microneedling or PRP treatments! ❤️

I can’t recommend DIVINE enough if you’re looking for someone you can truly trust with your Botox. As a board-certified Nurse Practitioner with experience in oncology, dermatology, laser science, family practice, and advanced medical aesthetics, she brings such a high level of knowledge and professionalism to everything she does.

What I love most is her holistic approach. She doesn’t just treat lines on your face — she cares about your overall well-being and how you feel walking out the door. She takes her time, listens, and you can feel the patience and intention behind her work.

Yes, I love the outward results (smooth, natural, refreshed), but the part that surprised me most is how my forehead feels. I hold so much stress there, and after seeing her, it feels softer, lighter, and genuinely more relaxed.

If you want beautiful, natural results from someone reliable, experienced, and incredibly kind, she’s the one. 💛

JUST BOOKED MY CHEMICAL PEEL!!!

I had an amazing first-time Botox experience at Divine Aesthetic Lounge! From the moment I walked in, I felt completely comfortable and at ease. The space is spotless, calming, and very welcoming.
Divine is incredibly knowledgeable and experienced—she took the time to explain everything thoroughly and answered all of my questions, which really put my mind at ease as a first-timer. I never felt rushed and truly felt I was in expert hands.
I’m so happy with my experience and would absolutely recommend Divine Aesthetic Lounge to anyone considering Botox or aesthetic services. Five stars all the way! 🌟✨

skin-addiction-medspa-health-clinic-mill.text:
I was looking for some holiday Botox and scheduled with Sarah who I had never met before. I walked in and she asked me what I wanted. She is extremely educated and knowledgable, comforting and a bright light! You can feel how genuine she is when you walk into the room! You feel like your sitting having a conversation with your best friend and she hears everything you say. She is my spirit animal beautiful inside and out. If you want to hit the jackpot
of providers Sarah is your ARNP Guru. I have been getting botox for 15 years. I can honestly say this is the best treatment I have ever had. Thank you Sarah!! I’ll see you in three months 😁

An excellent beauty salon with a very professional and attentive team. I had laser treatment here and was extremely happy with both the results and the overall experience. Everything was done carefully, hygienically, and with great attention to detail. The staff is friendly, knowledgeable, and truly cares about their clients. The salon also offers a wide range of other beauty treatments, which makes it a great place for complete self-care. Highly recommended!

I had one of the best experiences getting fillers at this medspa. Sarah was friendly and made me feel at home right away, she was a strong recommendation from another esthetician. Sarah made sure to ask me what I wanted and helped me achieve a look for my lips I’ve wanted for a long time, this was my third time getting fillers and I didn’t bruise and my lips were only swollen for a day. In the past I’ve had a terrible experience where my lips for swollen for over a week and badly bruised. With Sarah I barely felt any pain as she walked me through the process. Prices are competitive and affordable but the customer service is what sealed the deal for me and I will be going back because once I find a good provider I am loyal for years and will follow them anywhere(except leave the state)!

I had same day consultation and appointment with Sarah! I was very nervous but Sarah's transparency and confidence made me feel comfortable. Her office, aura and philosophy made my first time receiving injections a cool and pleasant experience. I did not feel rushed or pushed to do anything I was not comfortable with nor did she try to upsell me which I have experienced before. She explained what she was doing, what products she was using and also the anatomy of my face and why we are doing what we are doing. Definitely going back to her! If you are looking for a transparent and awesome medical professional go to Sarah.

I have had amazing experiences with both Sarah and Tori at skin addiction. Both are incredibly knowledgeable and kind. I had my first IPL laser treatment done by Tori today and it was a 10 out of 10 experience. She explained every step of the process, and ensured I was as comfortable as I possibly could be the entire time. Highly recommend!

radiance-aesthetics-wellness-bonners-fer.text:
Busy lifestyle, best immune support!!
This is my second immunity booster IV treatment and blue light therapy. I loved being able to get both at the same time. Joslyn and the entire team is incredible! I feel welcomed and comfortable the whole time and the space is beautiful! I highly recommend making an appointment to experience it yourself!

What a great place! Ashley and Joslyn are such wonderful professionals in what they do.  The Atmosphere is very clean and relaxing.  Booking online is super easy.   So glad to have Radiance in our community, it's what this little town needed. I'll be back soon fir my red light therapy!🤩

From the first time you step into Radiance Aesthetcs you feel welcomed and cared for. All your questions will be answered by a  person who truly cares about you! I have been there twice and have also taken my husband for anniversary IV infusions . We will continue to frequent this place for out future health needs! I highly recommend it!
I loved the informal, quick approach of this dermaplane service! It was perfect for my very busy schedule. The treatment was efficient, comfortable, and my skin felt incredibly smooth afterward!
This is such a great addition to our town! Ashley and Joslyn were so sweet and knowledgeable! They helped me find products to add to my skincare routine! Can’t wait to schedule an appointment!

well-iv-hydration-stafford-township.text: I had an awesome experience at Well Hydration! The staff was so friendly and welcoming — they really made me feel at ease the entire time. The space has such a calm and comfortable vibe, and everything was super clean. The IV I got was amazing — I felt refreshed and recharged afterward! Definitely planning to come back again soon and would recommend them to anyone looking to boost their hydration and energy.
I got an IV drip here and felt extremely refreshed afterwards! The providers are so sweet and informing. I’ll definitely be coming back for another one, it’s worth every penny!
Best place ever! The whole staff was so friendly and welcoming. I will definitely be coming back for some hydration!!

Kelly is amazing. I have used her service a few times. IV Hydration & B12 shots.

She is very careful, everything is clean, she offers the service at your house or at Black Sheep in LBI.

I would highly recommend her service for anyone that needs hydration (especially if you’re hungover).

Also, try the B12 you’ll be happy with how great you feel afterwards.

Super cute and relaxing environment. I got the Meyers cocktail IV, which left me feeling super refreshed. The staff was really nice and super informative about which IV would be best for me. I also highly recommend the tea with the IV!

iv-nutrition-nashville.text: We had a wonderful experience here! Two friends and I wanted a solution for a classic Nashville hangover and one of the girls were also feeling a bug coming on. The two gals working were so informative and kind. It was a relaxing experience and we felt the effects quickly.

Amazing experience! Ashton was so sweet and informative. He answered all the questions I had! I’ve tried other infusion places! But definitely noticed a good difference with Iv Nutrition. Will for sure be back.

Michelle was amazing! She is answered all our questions and managed the whole store on her own and remained pleasant and sweet while issues services. Will be back for her to give me my injection and IV.

Came here to get information about wellness. I was very informed. Ashton did a great job. I highly recommend the store which is located in a heart of downtown easy parking easy place to find compared to other wellness centers. I find this to be by far one of better.
We love IV Nutrition Nashville! I feel amazing after my infusion and it was so easy. The staff is knowledgeable and listened to what my needs were. Can’t wait come back!

ivitality-issaquah-issaquah.text: IV, Cryo and Scrambler therapy - the professionals are top notch! Dr. Trinka was super patient, informative and helpful. Courtesy at all levels and understanding of unique and individual needs or wants,  they accommodate for it all.

IVitality has been a game-changer for my bodybuilding journey! I’ve been doing monthly vitamin IVs, quarterly lab work, and using their cryotherapy regularly! I notice a big difference in my recovery, energy, and overall wellness has been incredible. The staff is knowledgeable, welcoming, and truly care about your goals. Whether you’re an athlete or just looking to feel your best, I can’t recommend IVitality enough!
Great experience! Tried the sauna, red light, cryo, compression, and b12 shot! Feel like a new man! Thanks for the great services!

Awesome clinic & staff with many innovative treatments. I treat myself once or twice a year with a Meyer's Cocktail IV drip plus compression therapy & cryo-chamber.  Super clean & very professional. Book with one of the Naturopathic docs & get your hormones checked while you're there.

IVitality is my cheat-code for healthy living 💪.  Be the fitest Dad in your kids school 😆
Clean, comfortable and all around a delight! Nurse Leah is incredible and the rest of the staff was so friendly!

iv-drip-booth-burlington.text: It is a great idea place to relaxing while you’re taking your nutrients. I really like that it’s quite clean, the chairs are so comfortable. Nurse is very nice.
Naomi was kind, attentive, and very knowledgeable. I came in after a 9-day migraine and left feeling so much better. I’m so glad I found this place—highly recommend if you’re on the fence!

AMAZING! I had my first visit yesterday. I have Rhematoid Arthritis and Fibromyalgia. Usually, my foot pain in the morning is a 9/10. I woke up this morning and minimal foot pain. I had a feeling I was vitamin deficient again and this did the trick! Wow.

I went in for the immunity boost drip - it was my first “drip” and I’ve heard amazing things about it. My son is in preschool and we’re getting sick every two months… so as soon as I woke up with cold symptoms I went in for my drip and felt amazing for two days following! I also DIDN’T GET SICK! Yay!
Will be returning ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Fantastic service. Calm and welcoming atmosphere. The "hangover cure" lived up to it's name! Will return.

peak-by-md-jersey-city.text:
What a great discovery!  I found Peak by MD through Kevin's Instagram page - I was very impressed with the way he explained and approached the services they offer.   I made an inquiry through their website and was very happily surprised when their appointment team got right back to me.  Going to the office was a very nice experience - nice team and a very clean, professional space!   Kevin was even nicer and more professional in person and really took the time to consult with me.   Looking forward to going back and experiencing some more of their services!
I would absolutely recommend Peak by MD to anyone who is looking for cosmetic / medical skincare services!   5 Stars!

Best new addition to Jersey City! I first brought my fiancé to PeakMD during men’s health month to get a full blood panel and some wellness exams— and I was honestly jealous of the level of care and attention he received! So I decided to stop in for myself, and I’m so glad I did. I just finished my first laser facial (out of four!) and my skin already looks brighter. I’ve also been getting multivitamin shots and will be doing a full blood panel evaluation soon. Every visit feels personalized and professional — the team truly takes the time to explain everything and make you feel comfortable.

Highly recommend PeakMD if you’re looking for a place that combines advanced treatments with genuine, caring service.

Kevin is incredibly patient and really takes the time to listen to what you want. He explains everything clearly and makes you feel comfortable throughout the process. The results were amazing—natural, balanced, and exactly what I was hoping for. Highly recommend his Botox and filler services!

Had my first IV drip and was scared, but Dr. Dukshtein made me feel comfortable and kept the process pain-free. The office is so clean and the IV therapy chair set up was cozy. I was falling asleep in the office with how relaxed I was! I feel amazing after the IV drip and will return for more. Dr. Dukshtein is incredibly knowledgeable, so I’m also looking forward to trying new treatments tailored to my health in the future.

I was recommended to Peak MD by a family member. I did not know what to expect.  I was pleasantly surprised by the quality and professionalism of Kevin my PA
He answered all my questions and my results were great
I recommend Kevin to anyone in the area

wellness-for-life-anacortes.text:
I’ve had wonderful experiences with Wellness for Life over the last year, and look forward to continuing my health journey with them. Amanda Lovecchio has an incredible gift for looking at the whole picture. She takes the time to truly listen and assess your needs holistically, always working at a pace that feels comfortable and supportive.

What really stands out is how she pieces everything together — lab work, symptoms, history, and subtle clues — like solving a puzzle to uncover and treat the underlying issues, not just the surface symptoms. She’s thoughtful, thorough, skilled and knowledgeable and not afraid to think outside the box.

On top of that, the staff, team, and facilities are all fantastic, making the entire experience feel welcoming and professional from start to finish. Highly recommend!

I recently joined the Signature Vitality Membership and couldn’t be happier. The value is incredible, especially for treatments I was already investing in like hydration IVs, Sculptra, and Dysport—all included. I’ve been in twice now, and every provider is warm, fun, and genuinely top-tier. It feels effortless, elevated, and so worth it.

Wellness for life has changed my life!!

What an amazing place that I am so grateful for.  I have been having hormone replacement therapy for a year now and have never felt better! I now have more energy and feel amazing! As a woman in my 50's, to finally have my hormones balanced has me wishing I would've known about this so much sooner.
Amanda is great.  When you have a consultation with her, she spends time with you and will go over multiple things, unlike going to your PCP and you can only discuss one thing at each appointment.  Amanda makes you feel comfortable and she is so easy to talk to.
Everyone at Wellness for Life is so nice and caring.  Rachel Ann is gentle with waxing, gives an amazing facial, good with skin care and is fun to be around!
When you walk in the office, the energy with everyone is so positive, comforting and so welcoming. (Must be an amazing place to work!)
I highly recommend everyone to make a consultation appointment and see how they can change your life.  You will be so glad you did.  I am so grateful my friend referred me!

I can’t say enough about wellness for life!  I lost 20 pounds, balanced my hormones, and got through some mentally challenging times under Amanda Lovecchio’s care.  I’ve called her for advice at random times and she was quick to respond, professional and effective.  I have recommended Wellness to my best friends and mother and strangers on the street, and would do so again.  100%.

Fabulous! What an amazing, professional, ethical clinic to find in Anacortes.
I’d never had any facial procedures other than a rare facial and with older skin I really wanted a refresh. However I was also a little nervous about looking odd or different. Caitlin and Cindy (along with Amanda’s entire staff) took great care of me. They listened, asked questions and made me feel so comfortable!
I am ecstatic about the results!! I’m still me but look younger and brighter.
Thank you Wellness for Life. I can’t imagine going anywhere else for skin care needs and am looking at some of your functional medicine for the future.

forever-young-aesthetics-seattle.text:
I heard about Forever Young through a friend and I’m glad that I came to visit. Minh is really welcoming every time I visit.
I recently did a microneedling treatment (my first time) with Summer, and she was absolutely wonderful. She was professional, she took time to explain every step of the process to make me feel comfortable. I would recommend this place to my friends.

Young did an absolutely fantastic job. I came in for my first lip filler ever, and he made me feel so comfortable and heard with my requests. I didn’t feel a thing with the lip block (highly recommend) and was able to walk out with absolutely beautiful lips! Young is a true artist. Thank you Young for making me feel and look beautiful!!

If you’re looking for a place that combines aesthetics and wellness, Forever Young is it! I went in for Botox and Zepbound and couldn't be happier. Young has a fantastic eye for detail—my Botox looks refreshed and natural, never 'frozen.' Beyond the injections, the guidance on the medical side has been professional and encouraging. The team has a wonderful bedside manner that makes you feel comfortable right away. I highly recommend them!

Young was very thorough, he answered all of my question and demonstrated with me how to use the product. I am comfortable knowing I can reach out at any point in my treatment with questions and am sure to get a response. I highly recommend Forever Young for all your beauty needs. Young is so knowledgeable. You will be happy with any service he provides.

I started compounded semaglutide in August after lots of thinking and going back and forth on the pros and cons. I was guided with facts and Young was so open to all my questions I finally decided to give it a try and I’m SO happy with my decision. Down 17 pounds with minimal side effects! I’m grateful to have people I can trust to discuss such a personal decision! Highly recommend Forever Young, they are detailed and honest with a focus on YOU!

ivtology-staten-island.text:
Exactly What I Needed After a Tough Weight Cut

After finishing a brutal weight cut for my fight, I knew I needed to rehydrate properly and recover as fast as possible. IVTology absolutely delivered.

From the moment I walked in, Mr K was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in making sure I got exactly what my body needed. He understood the stress a hard weight cut puts on you and tailored the IV to help me rehydrate, replenish electrolytes, and bounce back quickly.

Within a short time, I could literally feel the difference — clearer head, better energy, no lingering dizziness, and my body didn’t feel as depleted. By the next day, I felt strong, full, and ready to perform. The recovery was night and day compared to trying to rehydrate on my own.

Clean environment, smooth process, and top-tier care. If you’re an athlete cutting weight or just need serious recovery support, I highly recommend IVTology. They helped me show up at my best when it mattered most.

I’ve been to IVtology a few times and have had a wonderful experience each time. The office was very clean and the staff was friendly. K, the nurse practitioner who administered my IV was extremely knowledgeable and very pleasant; he even followed up the next day to check in to see how I was feeling. I was unsure which trip to choose at first, however, I knew I wanted to focus on immunity during the busy holiday season. Kay was able to tailor the drip to my specific needs while keeping immunity at the forefront. I felt great each time after receiving the drip and it allowed me to stay energized throughout the holidays. I would definitely recommend their services!

First, I want to say K from IVTOLOGY is amazing. He is caring, kind, understanding, & listens to your concerns. I have inflammation in my spine due to herniated disc’s & spinal stenosis, with the pain shooting down my leg.  I went to Quhyn for my kinesiology appointment on Tuesday, I was in so much pain, Quhyn called K, explained my level of pain, & without an appointment K was at the office within 30 minutes. I never did IV therapy before, so I wasn’t sure what to expect. I did the RELIEF IV with GLUTATHIONE added to the IV. When I was finished I felt immediate relief.
