After a few days, I went back & had the RECOVERY IV, with a push of GLUTATHIONE.  I am in shock that I woke up today with no pain, & not having to taking pain meds. I’m sharing on Google because I’m sure there are others living with pain caused  by inflammation.
All I can say is, it works! The best part the office is immaculately clean!
Good luck to anyone wanting to help themselves & I’m forever grateful for K.

So happy I tried this! As a mom of two, it’s hard to find time for myself, and this experience was exactly what I needed. I felt more energized right away and left feeling refreshed and recharged.  Friendly staff and calming environment . Everything exceeded my expectations. Definitely coming back and highly recommend for anyone needing a reset!

I wanted IV treatment to help with a shoulder problem, which felt much better afterwards. I also had a boost of energy, something I did not expect. Kay was very comforting during the process and answered all my questions thoroughly. I’m looking forward to my next treatment.

vitality-wenatchee-wenatchee.text: I was treated very professionally by Mr. Stroop and his staff. He listened to me and didn't try to make me feel like I was imagining the way I feel. He laid out what I need to do and what care if any that I need. He is very thorough with his explanation and details. Some medical personnel tend to push what they think you need but he doesn't pressure you at all. I very much recommend this office.

My experience with Vitality has been nothing short of extraordinary. My clinician Doug has been helpful, supportive and knowledgeable and presented a few options for me. Doug is very accessible and was able to help me with my vitality and mens health and provided me with everything I needed. I told this to Doug in person, but I wanted to share this in my review - I am truly happy that we have such a top notch men's health clinic here in the valley!

Rachel was very informative and helpful. Vitality is a clean, calm space with private treatment rooms. My questions were answered, results were delivered in a reasonable amount of time (one week for hormone & vitamin level checks).  I appreciate this alternative approach to medicine. Rachel considered the whole body, nutrition, exercise, sleep and mind space for the best approach. This was a wonderful experience and I am grateful for Vitality Wenatchee!

I'm happy to provide my feedback. Doug is an excellent clinician and has extensive knowledge and expertise in Mens Health. He truly listens to what my needs are and works with me on my goals. I highly recommend him!

Thank you,
Joel

Rachel is incredibly knowledgeable and truly listened to my concerns.  She meets patients right where they are at and is amazing at guiding you through decisions so that you feel like you are in charge of your own health.  I would recommend her to anyone looking to improve their health.

rebel-med-nw-seattle.text:
Can’t say enough good things about my acupuncturist Khai - she has had a tremendous impact on me, my family, and my friends. Highly recommend her to anyone, for both mental and physical health. She’s been transformative to my well-being over the last two years and I’m extremely grateful - hope everyone can experience this!

Also shoutout to my naturopath Megan Willet, she has provided excellent care for women’s health, comprehensive blood panel, and cranial-sacral therapy.

So glad I found this place 🫶

Been meaning to write a review for a while now. Rebel Med is a great facility. Kind and knowledgeable staff from the Doctors to the front desk people (Hi Valerie!).  I have been going weekly for GLP-1 shots and they have been encouraging and delighted at my progress.  I get warm welcomes every time!  Thanks all!!

I've had nothing but great experiences at Rebel Med NW! Dr. Hightower and Dr. Simon are wonderful listeners, educators, and doctors. I was struggling with an illness for close to two years and not feeling a lot of hope for recovery. However, I'm starting to see some big relief through their interventions and couldn't be more grateful!

I found Rebel Med very upfront about pricing, including their concierge fee and membership options, giving me all that information during a free consultation so I wasn't surprised. I appreciate that they have a naturopathic approach but don't shy away from considering all medical options. They offer what I consider to be a huge number of options on-site for a relatively small practice - check-ups, biofeedback, LENS neurofeedback, massage, acupuncture, IV treatments and vitamin injections - they pack a lot into their practice and do it all with care and skill.

The team here is always so friendly and accommodating. I typically work with Dr Schales and she always takes time to listen to my needs and has such a wide variety of services. I love that I can get almost everything I need on my health and skin journey in their office.

Rebel Med literally changed my life. I have had a few major back injuries and Khairul's acupuncture treatments have been a major factor in my healing process! I feel like getting acupuncture at Rebel med has made it possible for me to continue to participate in the sports that I love. Forever thankful.

village-medicine-seattle-seattle.text:
I love Village Medicine. Dr. Kira Baum and Dr. Tiffany Jaramillo have been INTEGRAL to restoring my health. I predominantly work with Dr. Baum on gut health and Dr. Jaramillo on hormone health. They are incredibly knowledgeable and they take their time to understand me holistically before making recommendations. Their recommendations always feel spot-on and true to me. They have helpful tests that have made me understand my body a lot more and that data guides us when making decisions together. Albeit, the tests can be expensive because they're *sometimes* not covered by insurance. They also encourage me to continue seeing my UW providers and ask for me to share my UW results with them. It never feels like "us" vs "them" which I appreciate. Another cool thing -- with my consent, they will talk about my case together to brainstorm and make better diagnoses/recommendations. I feel like that almost never happens in healthcare! I've had mostly good doctors throughout my life, but these ones take the cake!

I agree with the other review that some of the front desk staff aren't very helpful. Although I've had other experiences that are totally fine. It really depends who you get.

Overall, I highly recommend Village Medicine. Particularly Dr. Baum and Dr. Jaramillo, but I imagine other providers are great too.

I cannot start other than by saying this place changed my life in short. I really try to write something more "original" but this is just the truth. I knew what I needed, I just didn't know where to start and where to look for it. I was new to town and all I wanted was a good acupuncturist... After searching on google for a while I narrowed down to a few in the neighborhood. Dr. Kira Baum was one of them. When I read her Bio on Village Medicine´s website, I wanted to start working with her. The website was so easy to fill out those many forms and they responded me immediately. Booking me with Dr. Baum for the following week. I later established my primary care here with Dr. Daniels as well. Dr. Kira Baum listens to you very very deeply, and collects all the little details about you without overwhelming you. She follows up with you on all the important steps in your life to give you the best advice possible. Now I truly understand what a "holistic" approach means, before meeting Village Medicine I thought this was just another hip terms of our time! I have done one full year of monthly routine acupuncture treatments with Dr Baum to maintain my health and I have been following her advice on the supplements and other wellness routines. Whenever I feel under the weather I find really good remedies with her. I have returned to the good balance that I missed in my life both emotionally and physically. If you are looking for a peaceful and respectful place to get healthy, this is your place.

I came to Dr. Paul Miszczyszyn with a knee injury that wouldn’t heal despite trying various treatments. Dr. Miszczyszyn recommended prolotherapy using dextrose injections, a regenerative medicine approach that avoids steroids entirely.

The results have been remarkable. I’'ve regained a significant portion of my mobility that I thought might be permanently lost.

What sets Dr. Miszczyszyn apart is not just his medical expertise, but his exceptional bedside manner. He took the time to patiently explain every aspect of the treatment process, ensuring I understood what to expect. His kindness and compassion throughout my treatment made a challenging situation so much easier to navigate.

I have been with Dr. Tara Shelby for about 15 years now and so has my daughter. In this time, we have learned so much about our selves and how to manage our health. One of the most important things is addressing the root cause of illness and not just managing the symptoms. The education she provides along the way is so empowering. There is so much good about this Practice. Her team is amazing and they all work together. I continue to see her even from Montana, via tele health. Healthcare does not get any better than this folks.

Ballard Village medicine has been really great for me so far. However, there is one caveat.

Since I started seeing Dr. Daniels, I truly believe I have made progress in my holistic health journey to heal my body from within. Dr. Daniels is super attentive and supportive, and I am glad I found her.

The front desk staff though….less than extraordinary. I feel unwelcome every time I check in or leave the clinic. Not to mention most, if not all, of the front desk staff have virtually no answers to my questions (do I have to fill out all this form or where can I drop off my lab samples?). These are basic questions that I feel the front desk staff need to know to make the operations smooth at the clinic. I have been directed to do the wrong thing several times making me feel frustrated in the end.

All in all, I personally left 4 stars because the practitioners at this clinic are phenomenal and I do not want the front desk staff to undermine their hard work.

exhala-wellness-wenatchee.text: Claudia and the Exhala team are top tier and SO knowledgeable. I’ve learned so much from Claudia and she is a true expert in the field of esthetics and wellness. I highly recommend Exhala to anyone looking for a great experience with all things skincare, massage, injectables and so much more.

Aura is amazing this was my very first time getting Botox and she did not disappoint she made me feel at ease knowing she knew what she was doing!!! If you are scared but want to try I definitely recommend going to see her!!

I have been getting the NAD+ shot to help with energy and sleep.  I thought I was going to have to travel out of town, but it was a great surprise when I found that Exhala provided the service. Claudia Brambila is great to work with.

I received a gift card as a gift for my birthday in December and haven’t been able to find the time until now - I shouldn’t have waited this long! I received a facial from Claudia, she was such a joy to converse with and she did a phenomenal job on my facial. I am very low maintenance and just like deep cleans when I go in - and she hit the mark. Thank you! 🤍
Peyton is so incredibly knowledgeable and talented! Had an amazing facial from her and appreciate her expertise in helping me achieve clearer skin!!

pacific-northwest-wellness-center-pllc-e.text:
I’m very impressed with the quality of care I receive at PNWC. Kylie is so knowledgeable in aesthetics as well as general health. She’s a great listener and explains everything thoroughly. I’m so pleased with her service and have complete confidence in her.

Also, after several years of seeking help from numerous doctors, with no avail, Karl diagnosed the cause of my issue and put me on a plan that completely rectified it. I appreciate their focus on getting to the root of the problem rather than just treating symptoms.

The entire staff is professional and friendly.

I can't recommend the Pacific Northwest Wellness Clinic enough! As someone who deeply values holistic, preventative, and thorough care, this clinic has exceeded all my expectations. The team here is truly dedicated to providing comprehensive care that addresses the root causes of health issues rather than just treating symptoms.

From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed and understood. The staff takes the time to listen to my concerns and develop a personalized treatment plan that incorporates both modern medicine and alternative therapies. This integrated approach has made a significant difference in my overall well-being.

The team is not only knowledgeable but also incredibly compassionate. They focus on preventative care, ensuring that I am not only treated for current ailments but also educated on how to maintain optimal health moving forward. The thoroughness of their examinations and the depth of their knowledge are unparalleled.

If you're looking for a clinic that combines the best of holistic and conventional medicine, Pacific Northwest Wellness Clinic is the place to go. I feel more in control of my health than ever before and am grateful for the profound impact they've had on my life. Highly recommend!

Our family has nothing but good things to say about PNW Wellness Center. The staff is wonderful and their attention to detail is top notch. They’ll work hard to get you to your best possible state of health. One of my favorite services they offer is getting your hormones optimized. We’ve been members for years and I don’t see that changing.

Over this Thanksgiving holiday I had the opportunity to be treated by Kylie for Botox and lip fillers. She was kind, professional, gentle. Kylie listens to her patients and overall provides amazing results. I’ve already received several compliments on how “refreshed” I look. This is music to my ears because that is exactly what I wanted. I highly recommend that you schedule an appointment with Kylie!

I love this place! Staff is so amazing, the front desk is always so welcoming and helpful and the nurses are very kind and make the space feel very safe! They are all super well versed and educated on what the clinic offers and it has a very “team” orientated feel where they all put in effort to make the entire space feel warm and welcoming!

funk-regenerative-med-clinic-wenatchee.text: I have been seeing Dr. Funk for about 3 years now for various treatments and she takes time to listen provide a great plan of treatment. I had constant aches and pains on my right knee and with one treatment of PRP from Dr. Funk and now all my symptoms are gone!. I've also had high ozone IV infusion that felt amazing, the biggest change with that was feeling mind clarity, less neck pain, my brain felt refreshed. With Dr. Funk you are in good hands 💯

Dr Funk is fantastic I have been seeing her for the past couple of years now and she really cares about her patients. She also uses techniques that actually work when I came to her initially I was in a ton of pain and she has helped me tremendously with my condition I am forever grateful for her skills and expertise. I have recommended her to several family members and friends and will continue to do so!

Dr Funk has been a godsend for helping me address my years (and years!) of chronic headaches. She has a holistic approach for long-term health and healing, and she also proactively works toward short-term pain relief. This two-prong approach makes me feel truly cared for and understood. She's compassionate, energetic, intuitive, and honestly, just brilliant. I'm beyond grateful to be able to work with such a gifted healer.

Dr Jum Funk is simply wonderful! She has so many tools in her box and a real desire to heal and make you feel better!
I have been doing facial rejuvenation, and my skin looks so much healthier, brighter and more firm now.
It makes me feel good, happy and confident!
On top of it, Dr Jum is so nice, friendly, fun, and I am always so looking forward for my appointments, because she makes me feel so good and well taking care off! 5 stars hands down!

After 11 months of knee pain following an injury and osteoarthritis pain which came to a head during a long distance run, I was treated by Dr. Funk. I had tried rest, ice, stretching, taping, switching to biking and an orthopedic consult. I went to PT which significantly helped but I was still having pain at night and after prolonged sitting.  I was far from my baseline activity. Dr. Funk completed a holistic history and physical including nutrition, sleep, activity, lifestyle and my goals. She recommended changes I could start with for overall health. I had two sessions of perineural injections and had immediate results of increased range of motion by the end of my first session. I slept through the night without pain for the first time in 11 months!! Since then I have been making gains with returning to my active lifestyle. Thank you, Dr. Funk for giving me back my life and my hope!

elite-med-spa-wenatchee.text:
I had such an amazing experience at Elite Med Spa! From the moment I walked in, the space felt clean, calming, and very professional. The staff was welcoming and made me feel comfortable right away.

Brittney took the time to really listen to what I wanted, explained the process thoroughly, and answered all of my questions without making me feel rushed. I appreciated how honest and knowledgeable they were.

The procedure itself was quick and much more comfortable than I expected. I’m absolutely obsessed with my results. Exactly what I asked for!
I highly recommend this place. I’ll definitely be coming back for future treatments!

I have been curious about micro needling for awhile. Due to my very demanding schedule, I wasn’t able to come in the office for consultation so Elite’s very knowledgeable team offered to meet me virtually and was able to answer any questions and concerns I had. I had a microneeding session scheduled with Chloe and I was very nervous about as it. Chloe was so amazing and eased any fears I had. She guided me through the whole process. She is simply very in tune with her clients. She answered the questions I had as I was thinking them. After the first session was done , I was relieved. I haven’t felt a thing though I looked as anyone would after micro needling. I left the office with supplies to help me through recovery as well as the package of 2 more sessions. I was so relaxed after my session that I forgot what I just did and went to Dutch Brothers. I wish I can apologize to the barista for scaring them 😂. If you have been curious about any of the procedures they offer, just call them. The team is so knowledgeable so kind and not pushy at all - which is a big bonus in my book. They will support your wellness journey however that looks making you feel and look your best self 😘

This was my first time getting Botox and laser hair removal, and I honestly couldn’t have asked for a better experience. I was a little nervous going in, but Sam made me feel so calm and comfortable from the moment I walked in. She explained everything step by step, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt completely at ease before starting.

The Botox was quick and almost painless, and the hair removal process was way smoother than I expected. Sam’s professionalism and gentle approach truly made all the difference. I’m so happy I trusted her for my first time — I’ll definitely be coming back!

Highly recommend if you’re new to these services and want someone who is patient, knowledgeable, and reassuring.

Great place to walk into! The staff was very friendly. My technician Chloe was amazing. Very knowledgeable and genuinely interested in what I wanted to see in my results and also helped me plan for the next steps in my skin care. Seriously, try them out if you need a change in life or simply to maintain what you have!

BEST EXPERIENCE!!!
From the warm greeting at the front desk to my IV therapy & NAD+ with Brittney, the attention to detail was unmatched. My whole experience was top-notch. Looking forward to my next self-care GLOW UP.

valley-laser-skin-wenatchee-wenatchee.text:
I was disappointed with the line still around my mouth. I wish I was told that wasn’t going to get a smooth as I had anticipated. We’ll have to see what we can do in six months.
The staff was very professional and courteous. I appreciate that.
I do have some dandy bruises. One is a lovely shade of purple. I don’t even think I have a sweater that dark of purple but I’m sure it will heal.
I do have some concerns about above my lip. It seems on my right side there is more than the left I’m hoping that will calm down and be fine. Just let me know when I can check on that when the practitioner comes back from her holiday. thanks, Lynn

I had my first appointment today. I loved that Corinne was guiding a new employee that was in training, and Lauren, the front desk person, was very informed and so kind as she helped me set up my account through an app to support additional savings. Corinne is extremely skilled while injecting, I am sure her medical background is so helpful. I did not leave with bruising or any pain, and her injections were flawless, I almost could not tell there was a needle going in. I am happy to be on board with this fabulous establishment! Additionally, I need to mention that I attended their open house last week, and got a call the next day, that I had won their grand prize of a huge amount of services! $5,100 of products and services!

I was nervous going in but the staff put me right at ease. I had a consult with the doctor and came up with a treatment plan. The laser treatment went smoothly and I left the office informed of what to expect and very satisfied with my treatment.I would highly recommend to any of my friends and family!

All of the gals at Valley Laser have been super friendly and great to work with. They are all knowledgeable in their fields and express genuine consideration for your individual treatment. Would recommend them to everyone!
My experience was great. Absolutely satisfied with the staff and how I was treated. The consultation was quick and I was able to get my first session in right after. I highly recommend this place.

skinwell-co-spokane.text:
Today Lisa did lip filler for me.
This is so beautiful, Lisa!!!! I already love it, even with the swelling, I don't want my lips to get smaller haha! I already love the way it looks! As always, you did a great job! Thank you and Samantha for making my visits as comfortable and painless as possible!

Skinwell absolutely nailed it. My Botox turned out fantastic! natural, fresh, and exactly what I wanted. The whole team was on it from the moment I walked in to the moment I left. They’re warm, professional, and clearly know their craft. I felt taken care of the entire time.
I won’t go anywhere else. Highly recommend

Cheerful, sweet, gentle, professional, and very knowledgeable. As a man I always watch my wife have this relationship with these amazing women and now I have one. I really love these amazing professionals for who they are and what they do!!!
Lisa has been my injector for years , I am beyond pleased with my results. Everyone at Skinwell + Co is amazing !
Lisa is incredibly talented and experienced. The office is beautiful, the staff is so kind, and I felt completely at ease and well cared for.

odara-medical-spa-spokane.text: I have been getting treatments done at Odara for several years now. Every service has been exceptional and each visit has been great! My esthetician, Shyane puts me at ease with every visit. I like to know exactly what I’m in for before undergoing any sort of treatment. The instructions and explanations are always completely transparent and thorough. Each product recommended has worked out perfectly for my skin type! I’ve never been displeased with anything I’ve taken home. Everyone in Odara is so sweet and really makes you feel welcome. Overall, I highly recommend Odara, and especially Shy! ❤️

I can’t say enough good things about this medical spa. I’ve had all sorts of treatments here, and every experience has been amazing. The entire team is incredibly friendly, welcoming, and professional—they truly make you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in. I really appreciate that they take a conservative, honest approach and never try to overdo fillers or push unnecessary treatments. They focus on natural results and what’s best for you, which makes me trust them completely. Highly recommend to anyone looking for high-quality care and beautiful, natural results!

I LOVE Odara!  The team at Odara is friendly, professional and knowledgeable about services being preformed.  I have had a few treatments throughout the past year and have always loved the results.  They are so understanding of my age and expectations and I completely trust their advice keeping my goals in check.  Can hardly wait for my next visit.

10/10 recommend!! I had an amazing hydrafacial at Odara! My aesthetician was soooo kind and knowledgeable giving me great product recommendations, the front of spa staff were super welcoming and the medspa itself is just beautiful and clean! I recommend Odara to all my family and friends!

Noel is an amazing injector! She’s kind, gentle, and truly skilled at her craft. She takes the time to listen to your concerns, explains everything thoroughly, and makes you feel comfortable throughout the entire process. Her eye for detail is incredible—she knows exactly how to enhance your natural beauty while keeping results soft and natural. My lips look amazing and natural which is very important to me. She also does my laser facials. I couldn’t recommend her enough!
I also love ALL the girls at Odara, i would trust every single one of them. Plus the front desk girls are AMAZING.

cor-regenerate-spokane.text:
I had such a great experience at COR Regenerate! I tried the hyperbaric chamber, the HOCATT, and an infrared red light therapy session and every part of it felt intentional and restorative.

The staff was incredibly friendly, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in my wellness goals. You can tell they truly care about helping you feel your best, not just physically but overall. They took the time to explain each treatment and made sure I felt comfortable the entire time.

If you’re looking for wellness therapies in Spokane whether it’s recovery, healing, or just investing in your long-term health I highly recommend COR Regenerate. I’ll absolutely be back!

I've purchased services over the past several months. Services are good, pricing is straightforward. While they're very friendly and inform ppl of services, they're not pushy in the ways of up-selling, which is super nice.
Generally it's pretty chill/calm there. Clean.

I've utilized a combination of HBOT and their em-line(ie the emsculpt corp, multiple products) to help with a myriad of health issues. I would say it's helpful in recovery from injuries/surgeries etc for *me*.

HBOT can be pretty spendy in general, but I think it's worth it. The benefits of HBOT are it's own review! They've got monthly "subscription" to services that really make it incredibly affordable and, if I schedule the date ahead, it's pretty flexible.

They're extremely prompt: I've never been overbooked, moved, or had someone else's session cut into mine  That's over the course of months.

I’ve been coming here for about six months, and I couldn’t be more pleased. The front desk manager, Jessica is so competent, attentive and caring that I just assumed she was the General Manager. The treatments are state-of-the-art, and the place just has a healing vibration. This is the level of Cara I was looking for and not finding. I always look forward to going.
Dr. Steven Battaglino, DC

This was an amazing experience!
The staff is  friendly and welcoming!
The Hocatt ozone sauna is hard to describe in words.
One of the most relaxing and peaceful half hour everyone should experience!
This treatment really helped my everyday lower back and leg pains! Thank you for this experience!

I had a wonderful morning at COR. I used the HOCATT and had it programmed for Lymphatic Cleansing, I used the massage chair, and also the Soma Dome which included light and sound therapy as well as a Higher Dose PEMF mat. Pure Bliss! I am excited to check out the hyperbaric chamber and EmSella next time. I highly recommend checking it out.

ivnv-wellness-coeur-dalene.text: I received top notch, professional service at IVNV! I have very tricky veins and they were able to use an ultrasound machine to find them and spare me discomfort. I felt well taken care of while receiving IV treatment and the staff is very knowledgeable and helpful. I appreciate their scientific and professional expertise.

First visit, have the crud and just having trouble beating it. Talked with a friend and she swears by these treatments so I gave it a shot. Great clinic, very friendly staff, the nurse who put the needle in was amazing and I have tough veins.

24 hours later I feel so much better! Going to make this my ritual once a month for total health as it's actually affordable.  They took my HSA card, which I appreciated.

IVNV is THE place to go for all of your IV therapy needs. I have been coming since 2020 and I would never go anywhere else.  Eric, Rachel, Alex and Madeline are all great to work with, are very professional and always greet you with a smile.
Stop reading reviews and call to make an appointment,  you won't be disappointed.

IV therapy is something I didn't know anything about and, to be honest, I was apprehensive due to life long needle phobia.  Now that it's a bi-weekly part of my life for the past few months due to a diagnosis, I see so much value in IV therapy.  The team at IVNV have been amazing with working with my needle concerns and are always attentive to my comfort.  The skill and knowledge I experience with everyone at IVNV is top notch. Whether it's for the occasional vitamin boost to fight a cold, to athletic training or recuperation needs, up through chronic disease treatment, I highly recommend the team at IVNV. Everyone there is so caring and such a joy to know. I kind of think of them all as my IVNV family!

IVNV is very customer service oriented. I was a little nervous at first but their technician really put me at ease. The experience was very relaxing.
The results of one Defender bag were felt the same day. I recommend IVNV to anyone that is wanting to be pro actively healthy and live the best life possible.

thrive-iv-hydration-mobile-spa-tulsa.text:
I always have such a great experience here. From the moment I walked in, the staff was welcoming and attentive, and the whole environment felt clean, calm, and professional.
Bonnie did my IV and she was amazing. Kind, patient, and incredibly knowledgeable. She took the time to explain everything, checked in on me throughout, and made sure I was comfortable the entire time. The IV itself was quick and painless, and I felt very well taken care of from start to finish.
I highly recommend this place, and especially Bonnie, to anyone considering IV therapy.
Feeling down or just looking to feel amazing come see Brody at Thrive IV with 2 locations and mobile services available you can't go wrong coming here or having them come to you when you need it!

This place took such great care of me. I’m an educator and wanted to get an immunity boost before going on vacation. The massage chairs are a great addition to the experience and make it even more relaxing.

I’ve been getting over a stomach bug and even though I was starting to feel better I still couldn’t keep anything down. I decided to take a chance and call Thrive on a Saturday hoping they could get me in and they really saved the day.

Bonnie took care of me and was absolutely wonderful. She made me feel comfortable and at ease throughout the whole process. The experience was relaxing and by the time I finished I felt like new, which was perfect because I have a full schedule. Thank you 💜
I had the best experience at their new second location off of 91st Street! Bonnie was amazing. This will be my new go to place when I need help kicking my migraine.

iv-hydrate-cafe-bronx.text: I must be honest I was a little nervous I never received IV hydration before, but my body was so depleted from life stresses I needed help. Once I arrived Latoya explained thoroughly every step. I felt calm and the ambiance is extremely relaxing. The place is lovely. I was even able to adjust my order. They work with you. The hours they offer works with a busy schedule too. I highly recommend IV hydration cafe as an addition to self care.

IV Hydrate Cafe Had the best service. When you first walk in you’re greeted with a personal at the front desk. As you enter you immediately feel calm as the essence of the environment is so calming. As the nurses get ready to fulfill your IV hydration needs, you can listen to music read a book or even get a massage on their Nice lounge chairs. Nurse, Latoya or Latisha are so hands on they would ask you if you would like any tea, water or any snacks during your stay. If I were you I would check out this beautiful Bronx location for your IV Hydration, B12, Lopo shots and etc. Tell them Terr sent you!!!

This was my second time getting IV Therapy & my first time visiting the hydrate cafe! The space is very comfortable, clean & inviting. The ladies are very sweet, professional & knowledgable! I absolutely love this business and will be back every time I’m in town!

I had such a great experience at IV Hydrate Cafe! I came for the first time with a friend who had already been there before, and I immediately loved the cozy, inviting atmosphere—it truly feels like a cafe but with the comfort of home. Latoya was incredibly kind, making me feel at ease throughout the entire process. Her hands are gentle, and she was very attentive, ensuring I was comfortable the whole time. The service was top-notch, and I left feeling refreshed and re-energized. I highly recommend IV Hydrate Cafe to anyone looking for a relaxing and effective IV hydration experience. I can’t wait to come back!

IV Hydrate Cafe is a total vybe. My husband and I received a Detox drip together and we felt so welcomed. The atmosphere is cozy, vibrant and therapeutic especially the amazing scent that greeted us at the door. I can’t wait to return. 10/10 recommend.

iv-wellness-lounge-long-beach.text: Needed iv hydration and was happy that it was so easy to book a same-day appointment online. Every single staff member was incredibly welcoming and knowledgeable. The space is beautiful and clean and it was nice having a private space. My infusion was quick and painless. Rebekah, the owner, shared some nutrition advice that helped me even after my visit. Will definitely be coming back!

10/10! I can’t recommend this place enough! Great location, easily accessible, clean, comfortable. Rebecca, the owner, is absolutely amazing. She is a licensed NP who clearly knows her stuff, she’s super friendly and a joy to chat with. She went above and beyond to not only get me in asap but also accommodate a somewhat unconventional IV request timed perfectly with my IVF treatment. She also offers functional medicine services which I will likely be returning for. I definitely will be recommending this place to all of my friends.

I went to IV & Wellness Lounge in Long Beach last week and tried their Performance IV drip, and I can’t recommend it enough!  After a tough week of training and recovery, this IV therapy gave me a real boost — I felt more hydrated, energized, and ready to take on my next workouts. The staff was incredibly kind, professional, and knowledgeable about all the different vitamin IV infusions and wellness treatments they offer.
The lounge itself is clean, modern, and super comfortable, making it the perfect spot to recharge and recover. If you’re into fitness, wellness, or just looking to boost your immune system and overall health, this is definitely the place to go! I’ll be coming back regularly as part of my recovery and self-care routine.
Highly recommend IV & Wellness Lounge to anyone in Long Beach or nearby looking for the best IV hydration therapy, vitamin infusions, and wellness experience around!
Highly recommend! Felt amazing after my peak performance IV. Everyone was so kind and gentle even with my crazy fear of needles. Bought the membership and will be coming regularly.
Very comfortable and relaxing environment, staff is very nice and professional.  I got an NAD IV drip and hydration.  Definitely will be back soon for more IV Therapy.

next-health-in-bellevue-bellevue.text:
Such a clean and elegant place. I love the staff there and the biohacking tech is awesome. I felt everyone listened to me and takes the time to explain everything.

Honestly their pricing is so good if you get vitamin IVs regularly, you should look at their membership - you get two IVs a month plus shots and using their tech services (cryo, ir sauna, red light and even hyperbaric oxygen!?) for the same price as one iv anywhere else!

I was familiar with Next Health from their location in West Hollywood years ago. I’m so happy they are situated up here in Bellevue now! I had a fantastic first experience here with the LED therapy and the IV treatment was incredible! I look forward to my next visit.

I had such an amazing experience at Next Health! The IV therapy was incredible I left feeling refreshed, energized, and overall just so good.
I worked with Johnny, and he was absolutely amazing. He’s knowledgeable, professional, and made me feel extremely comfortable throughout the entire process. You can tell the team truly cares about their clients and takes the time to explain everything clearly.

Also, shoutout to Sabrina for informing me about Next Health’s first Washington location I’m so glad she did! Everyone there was welcoming, professional, and made the whole experience seamless.
Great service, wonderful environment and they treat you like family! Sabrina, Christine, and nurse Bianca treated me so great! Definitely coming back! Truly a unforgettable experience

I scheduled myself an appointment at the Next Health spa services today and my experience was outstanding. From the moment I walked in it was bustling with activity with their specialists and other guests. I was seamlessly, escorted from one service to another like I was the only person in the room. I started with their IV Drip immune booster. Moved over to the infrared sauna for a 30 minute sesh with House music quietly bumping in the background. Capped it all off with a 2 minute 30 second Cryo service. Really for the weekend!

Highly recommend for your next pampered service!

medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.text: Alecia is the best! She is professional, listens to what you want and diagnoses uniquely to your specific needs. I have friends who have seen her for years as well. Before and after scans done to truly show results. Highly recommend getting the bundle packages to get more for your skin care investment!

There simply isn’t enough praise I can give to Dani  Roberts and her excellence in the world of injectables! She is THE Michelangelo of facial refinery…  always striving for the safest and most ethical approach to the fountain of youth. Obsessed with my results every single time. I’ve been with her for 11 years. Her continued education and additional certifications make her the number 1 choice in all of the Pacific Northwest!

The team at ProClub Medical Spa is outstanding. Bree is exceptional! She knowledgeable and attentive. The IV therapies (especially the NAD and the Brain Enhancer) and vitamin shots leave me feeling focused, and recharged.

Kayla is also fantastic! She is incredibly knowledgeable and professional and makes every visit seamless.

The front desk staff is always welcoming, efficient, and kind. They set the tone for the entire experience.

Every visit feels personalized, professional, and restorative for wellness care.

I love Cary, who does Botox and her assistant. However, the ladies at the front desk are not friendly at all. It really turns me off every time I go.

I have been going here for a few years because of Cary,  and a member for at least 15 years. It is surprising to me, as the staff at the spa and greeters go out of their way to be gracious and friendly.

Absolutely love this place. Everyone is very nice and welcoming. Professional aestheticians ready to explain every detail of your procedure, precisely assess your needs and recommend appropriate level of care. Highly recommend!!!

iv-glow-bar-los-angeles.text: I had such a wonderful experience at IV Glow Bar! I just finished an IV class with Hannah and she was amazing. She made the whole process so comfortable and was so encouraging the entire time. I really appreciated how she took the time to pay attention to each of us and made sure we felt confident. You can tell she truly cares and wants everyone to succeed. I left feeling supported and excited to start doing IVs like a pro! Highly recommend!

Hannah is amazing. It’s my first time getting a mobile IV treatment (I usually go in to a clinic), but I felt so uncomfortable this morning that I couldn’t move. Booking with Hannah was straightforward and fast, and her professionalism and compassion immediately helped me feel at ease. Would definitely recommend to anyone in need of an at-home treatment!

Every time Hannah leaves my house I feel better inside and out. She is my earth angel/ nurse and I’m so grateful for how she takes care of my boyfriend and I. Hannah has become our family, we call her for everything and she always answers the phone with such joy!
Her knowledge and wisdom about medicine and health puts us at ease. I would highly recommend her for anything you need!
She is truly such a beautiful soul, thank you Hannah for always giving us the best treatments, we love you so much!

Hannah is very professional and truly cares about my weight loss journey. She closely monitors my progress, gives the best advice and helpful tips for GLP-1 treatment, and always checks in to make sure I’m doing well. Since working with her, my weight has been going down, and my menstrual cycle has become regular again. I highly recommend her to anyone who needs support with weight loss—she’s amazing! I absolutely love her ❤️

We had the absolute pleasure of being cared for by Nurse Hannah, and I can’t say enough great things about her! She was gentle, skilled, and incredibly attentive making sure we were comfortable and feeling okay throughout the entire experience. Her kindness and expertise made all the difference.

If you’re ever in need of IV care, Nurse Hannah is exactly who you want by your side. Thank you, Hannah, for such a warm and welcoming experience—you’re a gem! We will be back!

the-dripbar-beverly-beverly.text: Amazing! Very professional, clean and inviting space. The staff is very intelligent, thoughtful and caring. Plus I feel so much better than when I came in. Highly recommend for all sorts of remedies.

I had truly the best experience!  Ive gotten a lot of IV's in the past but I will never go somewhere else again! Adrianna, Kiera and Sam made me feel at home, at ease and took such good care of me.  Not only did I leave feeling so much better physically but I left with a smile on my face from meeting those ladies!! Trust me, go to here!!

This DRIPBaR is impressive. This place has so much to offer! I had such a great experience with my NAD drip. Camille and Derek were incredibly welcoming and kind. Derek was knowledgeable and answered all of my questions thoroughly. Very excited to go back!

DRIPBaR has quickly become one of my favorite places to reset and feel genuinely taken care of. The infrared sauna, halo therapy, and B‑12 shot were all AMAZING on their own, and what also stood out was how thoughtfully everything is done. Nothing feels rushed or transactional ~ it’s the kind of space where your whole system exhales the moment you walk in.

The environment is spotless and calm in a way that feels completely natural, and there’s a grounded, welcoming energy that makes it easy to settle in. Derrick and the team bring a depth of knowledge and genuine care that elevates the whole experience. They explain what they’re doing, check in without hovering, and create a space that feels personal rather than packaged.

I’m also really excited to be hosting a yoga pop‑up with them in February. It feels like such a natural fit ~ their commitment to intentional wellness pairs perfectly with the kind of practice I love to share. I can’t wait to bring people into a space that supports both physical reset and a little spark of joy.

If you’re looking for a place that blends high‑quality services with real human warmth, DRIPBaR is absolutely worth the visit and the memberships!🙏🏻🍒

I went to the Drip Bar and told the staff (who cared enough to contact me in their own personal time to accommodate me) that it was my daughter’s birthday, and i wanted to bring her to the drip bar for some vitamin therapy.   The man was so nice and very professional.  He instantly accommodated my needs.   Upon our arrival at the bar the following day, it was immaculate and extremely aesthetically pleasing.  We got a lovely tour which revealed all the amazing surprises that await; (sauna with sea salt spray, massages soon to come, the state-of-the-art facial machine, the privacy room, the soon-to-be botox/filler room, and the very impressive laboratory room, where they sterilize everything and create their custom vitamin blends!   When I thought it couldn’t get any better, they brought out a personalized cake (even with my daughter’s name on it) and a lovely card for her.  i got a fast doctor’s appointment to clear me for my drip, and the nurse that gave me the IV was beyond professional and also worked at Mass General!   The effects I got were so fascinating!  I felt so good!!  I felt refreshed, energized, and better than I had felt in a long time!  I cannot wait to go back, and highly recommend the drip bar beverly mass for vitamin therapy!

symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.text:
I was going to go to this place but definitely changed my mind after doing some of my own research. There is NOT an MD on site.
There’s a chiropractor but no MD.
And I know some ppl are desperate for relief and they sure sound good in their seminar but that’s just it, it was this long drawn out sales pitch and there are no guarantees, so you spend anywhere from $2-6,000 dollars that ins does not cover, for something to try, I need more than an another try or hope at the place I’m at in life.
I need medical doctors who specialize in certain procedures. Take the stem cell rejuvenation they offer. You HAVE to be board certified with logs of how many procedures you’ve done and a degree in metabolic training and the stem cells themselves are not FDA regulated but the facility that they are kept in at just precise temperatures are federally regulated. You have to have all these different degrees in order to know safely and precisely where to inject the stem cells. And with all the vitamins and cocktail injections, you can buy those yourself for way way cheaper and do it at home. The “Blue” drink, is just a wash, there is no evidence to back it one way or another. This place has red flags all over it.
Just please do your homework and ask the right questions and put your eyes on some masters or bachelors degrees or even an MD who is accompanying a nurse who has also has extensive training. Put your money where it’s going to work and you’re not going to end up disappointed and out the money. Just do your homework ppl!!! Idk they might be right for some but with fibro, they are not right for me. Nor are they compliant with a ton of regulations. Good luck!

The team at Symmetria has been remarkable since my reaching out for service following a car accident. From the moment I completed my new-patient intake, I've been met with compassion, care, and outstanding service. Every team member is dedicated to the care of their patients, creating a positive healing environment, and making everyone feel comfortable at every step of their individual journey.

The expertise in treatment options is clear from recommendation through to execution, and I trust that each person treating me has my best interests at heart.

I highly recommend Symmetria for post-accident treatment and ensuring you're back on your feet as soon as possible. Thank you all!

I have been receiving treatment  on my left shoulder. I had an MRI to see what was going on. I have 2 tears. The rehab seemed to be moving slow and still on a lot of pain. Dr Haymour started working with me . He has me working with a squishy ball against the wall.Working on strengthening and getting my arm to be able to move with out so much pain. He has helped me so much. I am able to pull up pants up, I am starting to be able to pull my cover over me with my left arm. The seat belt possion is still painful. Closing the the door is getting better. I just can't express how much this has and is helping me.

These folks are the definition of exceptional.  I've been a patient now for a little on a month and every time I go in the front desk crew are incredibly friendly and always share a chuckle.  That's even before you get to the actual patient care which is top notch, it feels like every member of the team takes special effort to ask how you're doing, share in any milestones you've reached and just generally be encouraging, supportive, and informative!

Not that I'd ever wish anyone -need- their services, but if you're ever in doubt, this entire organization is exceptional.

I am a medically complex patient, chiropractic has become one of my pain management needs. I also have some life things and require female medical professionals. It’s hard to find female chiropractors. Dr Schuette is absolutely amazing. She knows her stuff and is also compassionate, a safe person, and determined to help any way she can. If something doesn’t work, we make adjustments until it does. I’ve also utilized Symmetria’s decompression and laser therapy in addition to chiropractic. I 100% recommend  Dr Schuette to anybody inquiring about chiro. I’m grateful to have found her, just wish it would’ve been sooner!

jubilee-clinic-dpc-marysville.text: Jubile is amazing. I feel great and can’t wait for my next session. Everyone needs to try this, seriously check it out. The benefits are endless! Also, there is a lot more room in the chamber than you would think. It’s kind of like I was laying in a two or three man tent:) Thank you for a relaxing and wonderful experience.

Today, I had my first hyperbaric treatment at Jubilee Clinic. My purpose for getting this treatment (and future ones) was to oxygenate my tissues for boosting my immune system.  They gave me detailed instructions on how to handle the session, even though I've had hyperbaric sessions elsewhere in the past. So, that showed me they have a good focus on giving me a safe and enjoyable experience! Since, phones are not allowed in the chamber, I just took a very restful nap. The hour went by quickly!

Had a lovely time receiving my first infusion. It was a super easy and relaxing process. The nurse was very friendly and informative. Apparently, I’m among the few who can smell the infusion—was like tasting a multi-vitamin 😂. Overall, it was a very pleasant experience and would definitely suggest this place for anyone interested in getting an immune boost for the upcoming autumn and winter season. Thank you for having me!

I recently visited Jubilee Direct Primary Care and had a wonderful experience! From the moment I walked in, the clinic felt warm and welcoming!  The staff took time to really listen, answer all my questions, and explained everything thoroughly! I especially appreciated the Direct Primary Care model with transparent pricing, personalized care, and accessibility! If you’re looking for primary care, I highly recommend Jubilee DPC in Marysville, WA!
Jubilee Clinic took excellent care of me. Just had my first immunity IV infusion. What a great experience and an amazing crew….including Ty, the golden doodle, who also has a beard. Thanks, all!!

ism-health-integrative-naturopathic-clin.text:
I've been going here for almost a year now and it is the best experience I have ever had in a doctor's office. Dr. Frances Lee, Dr. Isabella Merrill, and the receptionist Marty Peterson are always exceptionally kind, accomodating, professional, and just overall amazing! Incredibly welcoming environment where everyone smiles and greets you the moment you walk in and calming music with comfy furniture once inside, with water and tea waiting. Check-in is always so swift, I never even go up to the counter, because they know me the moment I enter the clinic and check me in within seconds.
This clinic has the highest quality treatment I've ever received in my life! I have a very complex medical profile and their responsiveness to my needs and concerns, attentive nature to lab results and my symptoms, and ability to maneuver and truly understand my needs are otherworldly! I've seen over a dozen doctors within the past 3 years alone, and ISM is by and far the best in every way. They don't throw prescriptions at you every chance they get, are never quick to diagnose because they always want to understand the bigger picture, and provide a variety of treatment options from simple breathing and exercise to medicinal over-the-counter supplements.
Dr. Frances Lee, who has been my primary care provider since I started going here in Jan 2025, has a sense of humor that eases the tension in the room that can come with medical concerns, is very encouraging of my progress, never irritable or curt, even when multiple treatment methods keep failing, and always asks questions, gets curious, and more creative whenever all else seems to fail. She always asks for my thoughts on any treatment plan she suggests, ensures my personal comfort with everything discussed, and goes out of her way to detail my visit summaries extensively because I have very poor oral memory.
I can't recommend them enough!! Some of the sweetest doctors (and people) you'll ever meet! You will be well-taken care of!

I have been wanting to take a different approach to women's health. Specifically thyroid and hormones. I met Dr Merrill, I LEARNED  so much from her in my 1st visit. I have already scheduled my 2nd appointment. The moment you walk into the clinic there is this calm peacefulness warm and inviting.  The front desk staff is ready and waiting for you very friendly and helpful. Thank you IMS for a beautiful clinic with amazing doctors and staff

I have had a fear of doctors since I was small but the staff here at ISM really helped me overcome that fear, especially Dr Merrill. She has a down-to-earth personality, so smart and yet humble, and is kind and considerate. She provides a safe space to work through health issues; I feel safe to bring up anything. I also felt heard and seen by her and be enabled to take charge of my health by having discussions instead of simply being told what to do. They have different kind of tests and solutions that I haven't seen anywhere else; it's a one stop shop. I haven't felt the need for and importance of PCP until I came here. The rest of the staff are nice, smart and friendly. I am always greeted by warm smiles and conversation whenever I come in.

Came here recently to get my covid vaccine and it was fast and easy. Jaime has great customer service and made me feel very comfortable while there. She also provides offers other services! From Vitamin B shots to Naturopathic visits. Definitely coming back!

Dr Jamie,
U R awesome. Laid back. Straight forward. No nonsense.
Dr. J gave me more information during a 30 minute CDL physical than I've received in the last 35 years. I'm definitely going back to Dr. J.

specialty-natural-medicine-lynnwood.text: By far one of the best experiences I have ever experienced when dealing with doctors. I felt welcomed, and comfortable going to Dr. Janel. I have gained so much knowledge and confidence in my health journey. Thank you! I will be back

I only got the nerve to write this after realizing what happened to me. I went to this clinic for weight loss help in the midst of the GLP1 craze and the pandemic. I was charged nearly TRIPLE for the medication in addition to the clinic visits. In my desperation, I didn’t realize there were other more affordable options (Zoom+ care). Also, I was charged $200+ for an appointment that I didn’t have. I was scheduled to see the doctor but had to cancel due to covid, and there was no substitute virtual visit. The assistant insisted I had the appointment and I owed the money. Then I got a letter threatening to send it to collections. I paid it because I was tired of fighting with him. This is also before I realized that UNPAID MEDICAL BILLS UNDER $500 DON’T AFFECT CREDIT SCORE. While the actual “care” at this clinic might be good for some people, the ethics certainly are not.

I have been taking my 2 sons to Dr. Lang for about 2 years now. She has been absolutely wonderful to work with. She is compassionate, knowledgeable and quick to answer all our questions. With her help, we have identified and worked to manage food sensitivities and digestive struggles. I brought my daughter in today for a consult and also had an excellent experience. We have done telehealth and in person appointments and always walk away feeling empowered in our health.

The front office staff, phone support and behind the scenes office staff have all been wonderful to work with. Michael is very detailed and helpful with all my scheduling questions and requests.

Just don’t waste your time. $425 for a 45 min appointment to only talk to the doctor for maybe 20 mins. Other time was spent waiting to come into the room or leave to put bloodwork in a different room. I’m sure there’s timing with all of that but I would have appreciated more time actually talk about symptoms and idk, having a conversation with the doctor. Was not personable just very in and out. Then on the way out was pushed into her “special” vitamin blend for other things we discussed and immediately looked around the room and noticed it’s just a lot of things for sale. Do yourself a favor and find a doctor who wants to help you without the first line of defense being”buy this”.

If you do decide to go you might as well skip the follow up $15 min zoom call. Basically read verbatim test results without giving any special information. Best to save another $300 if you want to.

Largely was very willing to pay out of pocket for what seemed like a very “naturopathic medicine” way and approach to my health but it was quite the opposite.

Caring, knowledgeable staff, & beautiful clinic. Dr Janel is very perceptive & after a thorough examination, was able to diagnose my issues & had very helpful alternative treatment recommendations. I am so thankful for relief from my symptoms! Kaela at the front desk was both friendly & accommodating, answering any questions I had readily & intelligently. Must also mention that  the office is beautiful! Very relaxing environment. Definitely feel like I am in good hands at Specialty Natural Medicine. Thank you for your wonderful care and expertise!

better-body-healing-aesthetics-centralia.text:
Natalie did the micro channeling procedure, I have to say it was a very good experience. At first I was a little nervous about the idea of the procedure, but I have to say in all honesty. IT DID NOT HURT!!!! Natalie is very professional and talked me through the whole procedure before we began, and then kept the conversation light and flowing. I was extremely relaxed throughout the entire process. After the procedure my face was slightly pink but back to normal color by the evening. I had a little peeling on my nose and forehead two days later, but nothing moisturizer couldn't handle. Overall I feel it did help my wrinkles around my mouth, eyes, forehead and neck. I do have a lot of age spots and do notice some lighter spots now. I will definitely re-schedule for another appointment in one month per her recommendations.
The staff at EVEXIA NW are the sweetest girls and every time I go in there they are friendly and seemed pleased to greet me.
The picture on the left was after the procedure and the right is before. You can see the difference between the wrinklesaround my mouth and neck.

I have been going to Evexia for quite a while now and they are so wonderful to work with. They genuinely care about your health and take the time to listen to your concerns. We are so lucky to have them in our community!
Natalie is very good. She is experienced and explains everything she is doing. She gave me great advice about improving the appearance of my skin. I won’t hesitate to book another appt!

Absolutely can't say enough wonderful things about Evexia NW! I love their staff, as they are helpful and friendly as well as knowledgeable. I have suffered from Chronic Lyme Disease, Chronic Epstien Barr Virus Major, hormone imbalances as well as Endometriosis. Their team has helped me so much and worked with my doctor's IV protocols to help me heal and find a renewed health. My favorites are the Biote bio identical hormone pellets, the NAD IV infusions and my high dose Vitamin C IV Infusions. Thank you Barb and Jen for your vision in Lewis County to bring health and healing naturally!

I have had the best experience here. They are very informative and knowledgeable. They listen to what you are going through and by the end you feel like you are in the right place. I went with the pellet therapy and it went flawlessly. Happy I found this place!

velvet-skyn-aesthetics-olympia.text: I wanted to try a laser treatment for my 59 year old face and decided to make a visit to Lisa.  She walked me through all the services and how much downtime would come with each one.  The entire staff there is amazing to be honest, personable,  helpful and makes you feel at ease.  I am very happy with my results and it gets better every week.  I look forward to going back for maintenance in the future!

I could not be happier and more enthusiastic about booking with Velvet✨
Velvet Skyn is a true gem in Olympia! From my first consultation with Kendra to my treatments with Montana, I’ve felt completely cared for.
Montana is so knowledgeable and thoughtful—she listens, tailors everything to my needs, and focuses on lasting results. The whole team is professional, welcoming, and never pushy. I always leave feeling confident and like my best self. Highly recommend booking a consultation—you’ll be glad you did!
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

I had been following Velvet Skyn on my socials for a while, and just loved their vibe. I decided to pull the trigger on some treatments and I am so happy I did. The office is beautiful and the staff at Velvet Skyn are so incredibly nice and accommodating. I met with Montana for my consult and instantly felt comfortable and at ease. Montana is always eager and willing to listen to my concerns and answer any questions I have (I always have quite a few). She also did a wonderful job with my treatments; I just could not be any happier with my results. I will be returning here and entrusting these beautiful and meticulously skilled ladies with my future skin care needs.

Had my first HRT appointment with Stephanie today at Velvet Skyn Aesthetics last week and it was a great experience! The whole staff was welcoming, the office feels comfortable, and Stephanie made everything easy to understand and stress-free. Excited to see the results and glad I chose Velvet Skyn!

I recently had an ultherapy chin lift at Velvet Skyn, and I couldn't be happier with the experience—thanks in large part to Lisa! From the moment I arrived, Lisa made me feel comfortable and well-informed about the procedure. She took the time to explain everything thoroughly and answered all my questions with patience and professionalism.

During the treatment, Lisa's expertise and gentle approach made the process smooth and virtually painless. She checked in with me throughout to ensure I was comfortable, which I really appreciated. The results are fantastic—my chin looks more lifted and defined, and I can already see a noticeable difference.

stryker-optimal-health-wellness-spokane-.text: Dr. Sara Stryker is absolutely amazing. She is incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate and takes the time to communicate clearly and honestly, which makes you feel completely comfortable and cared for. The receptionist was also very friendly and welcoming, creating a warm and positive experience from start to finish. Phenomenal care and outstanding service. I’m truly grateful and highly recommend Stryker Optimal Health and Wellness.

Sara is extremely helpful! I did functional lab testing with her and she spent an entire session reviewing the results with me. She walked through what everything meant and explained it in a way that felt clear and understandable. I left with actionable steps I can take to feel better and I feel much more in control of my health.

I saw Sarah for weight loss in December and want to start by saying both she and her daughter were incredibly kind. Her bedside manner is excellent, and I genuinely liked her.

I was prescribed a GLP-1 for three months and gained 12 pounds. I’ll be the first to admit I live a very sedentary lifestyle — I sit at a desk for 10+ hours a day and wasn’t very active during that time. However, my appetite was never suppressed at all, which was the main reason I sought this treatment in the first place. When I asked about adjusting the dose, I was told no. I chose to discontinue treatment, but was still charged $350 for the following month—despite it not having started yet.

It’s important to know that there’s a 30-day cancellation policy in the contract, so if you're not seeing results, consider canceling sooner rather than later if you’re thinking about switching providers.

Separately, my husband was on testosterone therapy at $125/month. It was on autopay for six months, during which he received only two vials and had no follow-up or check-ins. While I take responsibility for not tracking this more closely, I expected better oversight.

In total, we spent $2,682, gained weight, and received minimal medication. Since moving to another provider, I’ve lost 35 pounds in four months. While I still think highly of Sarah as a person, I found the experience disappointing and encourage others to carefully monitor billing, services, and progress throughout treatment.

Things to watch out for:

Auto-deductions: Monitor your account closely — charges may continue even if services stop.

30-day cancellation policy: Cancel early if you think you may want to stop — don’t wait until the end of the month.

Dosage adjustments: Be aware that dose changes may not be considered even if you're not seeing results.

Lack of follow-up: My husband received no contact or monitoring during the months of treatment.
Time was taken to listen to my reason for being there as well as thorough follow up on findings. Kind and compassionate staff. Highly recommend!!
Sarah is a God send!  She helps with your body issues, hormones , weight, etc., and she is confidential in nature.  What a great team they are in that office!!! Thank you!!!

rejuvenationmd-bothell.text:
I have been a patient of Navee at RejuvenationMD for over a year and have undergone a variety of treatments, including BBL and MOXI laser, PDO threads, Kybella, Botox, dermal fillers, and most recently the Agnes treatment. I have been extremely pleased with the results of every procedure.
Any questions or concerns I have raised have always been addressed thoughtfully and thoroughly. It is clear that Navee genuinely cares about her patients and their outcomes. She takes the time to explain each treatment in detail, ensures all questions are answered, and prioritizes my comfort during every visit. Her enthusiasm and dedication to achieving excellent results are truly appreciated. Additionally, the entire staff is consistently warm, professional, and welcoming. I highly recommend RejuvenationMD to anyone seeking knowledgeable providers and outstanding care.

I received Botox, Broadband Light (BBL), and Halo treatments from Nancy. My first time with BBL & Halo, and Nancy made the experience as pleasant as it could be. Once I went through the healing stage I went back to have her look at the results and take after pictures. Let me just tell you that the results were pretty amazing. My main objective was to get rid of my horrible facial spots, and in just one treatment of BBL, it reduced them to the point of me not feeling like I have to put a lot of makeup on to hide them. In the photos I have no makeup on (except mascara) for reference.  Very satisfied from start to finish. Thank you Nancy!!!!

I have been going here for months  and have gotten Botox, PRF, and filler from Nancy and I couldn’t be happier. She is not only personable but she always listens to my goals and gives me advice based on what’s best for my personal anatomy. I trust her to make decisions based on what’s going to get me to my goals and what will actually make sense in the end. She’s honest and caring and you couldn’t ask more from a medical professional. I tell all my friends (and anyone who will listen) to go see Nancy. Plus everyone thinks I’m younger than I am and that’s a testimony to her hard work. If I could give more than 5 stars I would.

This is the absolute best experience in 15 years of getting Botox. I moved recently and needed to find a new provider. And I was amazed. Location is beautiful, clean and welcoming. Process is organized and seamless but the best part was Audrey! Not only knowledgeable but super skilled!

The team here is so amazing and kind Tammy, Michelle Moeh , Alanna Nancy  and Misty were just so kind  and took the time to help me .. I will be back they have an amazing team here.  They actually care.   Nancy had no time limit with me.  Took  the time to explain things to me.

vitafusion-doctors-lounge-and-wellness-v.text: I had a bunionectomy in September 2024 and had gone through 4 rounds of PT and 10 sessions of dry needling to get rid of inflammation and severe pain to no avail. Finally in December 2025, I found MLS laser therapy that I could afford at VitaFusion! Honestly, the cost appeared too good to be true, but I decided to go for it. By the time I finished my 7 weekly sessions, the inflammation in my foot was gone and the pain was significantly reduced to 3/10! This is thanks to Angela for whom I am grateful: her kindness, professionalism and judicious calibration of each session got me to a much comfortable/near normal quality of life.

MLS has been wonderful for my post-surgical shoulder recovery! My pain and inflammation improved after the first treatment and continued to improve over the course of 6 sessions. Now I come every 4-6 weeks for maintenance and am able to live pain-free when combined with strengthening exercises. Angela is great with the laser and has an excellent attitude every time she treats me!

Came to Vitafusion expecting very good experience from the reviews but Catharine and Angela went above and beyond and ensured that I was comfortable during the entire time and that the entire IV therapy went by seamlessly. Would definitely recommend this place and their selection

The staff at the Tysons location are outstanding.  Detail-oriented, attentive, patient, flexible, supportive.  AND most importantly my father's chronic toe pain he had for about 6 months was healed.  We are now working on both of his shoulders.  Can't thank them enough.

I have received several treatments at Vitafusion Doctors & Wellness Center including: MLS Laser Treatments, the Myers Coctail infusions, and am currently receiving Tri-Immune shots. The professionals at Vitafusion are the absolute best. All treatments that I have received have helped me immensely. As a person with Rheumatoid Arthritis the laser treatments have significantly reduced discomfort I have with my hands as well as helping with a tennis elbow issue. The infusions and tri-immune shots have done wonders for my energy level and overall health.

These treatments have been great for me and I can, without any reservations, recommend Vitafusion if you are seeking any treatments if this type.

envy-iv-infusions-bridgewater.text: Great experience! Zakiya is super pleasant to work with, has great bedside manner and knows her stuff. This is my first time receiving an IV Infusion, so naturally I had a ton of questions. She answered every question and made me feel so at ease that I’m looking forward to my next infusion. There are other services offered and I returned twice within one week to receive additional services. I’m a girly girl and wanted “all of the things” but Zakiya did not promote or try to push any added services on me just to get more money. She in fact kept it real and let me know that I didn’t need those things that I inquired about. That act alone has gained her a loyal customer, showed that she truly cares for her clients and has our best interests at heart. Thanks to Zakiya, I look and feel great!

I had an amazing experience at Envy IV Infusions in Bridgewater. From the moment I called as a new customer to the moment I walked out, everything was exceptional. Zakiya Agosto went above and beyond to make me feel truly special, comfortable, and cared for. She was professional, kind, and attentive, and she took the time to explain everything, which immediately put me at ease. The entire experience was smooth, welcoming, and reassuring. I can’t recommend Envy IV Infusions—and especially Zakira—enough. I will definitely be returning. Vanda

I recently had the pleasure of receiving IV hydration treatment at this infusion center, and I cannot recommend it enough – largely due to the outstanding care provided by Zakiya.  From the moment I arrived, she was welcoming, professional, and attentive, making sure I felt comfortable and informed every step of the way.
Zakiya  demonstrated an incredible level of expertise and knowledge. She explained the entire process to me in detail, answering all of my questions with patience and clarity.
What truly sets Nurse Zakiya apart is her exceptional bedside manner. She was not only compassionate and empathetic but also remarkably skilled. She was constantly checking to make sure I'm ok. Her kindness, made this visit a memorable. 💗

I’ll start off by saying this is the first time I was itching to leave a review. From the moment I stepped into this facility I was impressed. The decor is beautiful and the place is spotless. Zakiya and Katherine greeted me with a welcoming smile. After expressing I’ve had a few bad experiences with IVs Zakiya distracted me with great conversation while Katherine flawlessly placed the IV and started the drip. Even after everything was in place they both stayed and we proceeded to have a conversation about traveling, food, genetics, health and wellness, etc. It is not very often I feel that comfortable with strangers, my ambiverts or introverts will understand. It is an absolutely art form to create a space in  which time passes quickly while there is an IV your arm. After a painless IV placement, amazing conversation and great recommendations for future treatments I was ready to go in what felt like minutes (It was about an hour). On top of the amazing experience that perfect cocktail I was infused with left me feeling uplifted and energetic. If my interaction with Katherine and Zakiya was any indication of the sort of customer service I will get during a facial or any other service, sign me up!

I had an incredible experience at Envy IV Infusions for my IV infusion treatment! From the moment I stepped in, the welcoming atmosphere and friendly staff made me feel right at home. The facility is clean, modern, and beautifully designed, which instantly put me at ease.

The team took the time to explain the different IV options available, ensuring I understood the benefits of each one. They listened carefully to my health goals and tailored the infusion to meet my specific needs. Their expertise and genuine care were evident throughout the entire process.

The infusion itself was comfortable and quick. The nurse was not only skilled but also attentive, checking in with me regularly to ensure I was doing well. I loved the cozy setup, complete with soothing music and relaxing chairs, which made the session feel more like a spa day than a medical treatment!

Afterward, I felt an amazing boost of energy and clarity that lasted for days. It’s been a game-changer for my overall wellness routine. I also appreciated the follow-up call to see how I was feeling, which shows how much they truly care about their clients.

If you’re looking for a professional and nurturing environment for IV infusions, look no further than Envy IV Infusions. I can’t wait for my next visit!

his-and-hers-hormone-health-wellness-che.text: I’ve been dealing with chronic fatigue for years not only have I been seeing a naturopath doctor, but I also have a primary care doctor and an endocrinologist my labs had been coming back fine I recently started HRT with my naturopath however I was still feeling fatigue so I decided to come see Ashley let me tell you how welcoming and nice they all are in this office. They listen to you. They explain everything Ashley really does care she goes above and beyond and I am truly grateful. I know that we are going to be getting to the bottom of my chronic fatigue. Thank you so much to Ashley and the rest of her staff.

Ashley at His & Hers Hormone Health and Wellness is incredible! She made me feel completely comfortable and valued from the very first visit. She takes the time to explain everything in detail and makes sure I actually understand what’s going on with my body, not just what the numbers say. Ashley truly cares about how I feel and takes a whole-person approach that’s both educational and compassionate. I always leave my appointments feeling heard, supported, and confident in my care. I can’t recommend her highly enough and her office staff is equally kind and responsive.

My experience at “His and Hers” with Ashely was wonderful. She is very professional with a personal touch that is comfortable and educational. She’s eager to answer your questions and help you understand everything you’re curious about. Even with sensitive topics, she’ll leave you feeling better after you leave than you did before coming in.

His and Hers has absolutely been a life changer for me. Ashley absolutely cares about people and goes over and beyond for her patients. I have lost over 100 lbs since I’ve started seeing Ashley, she has walked with me through each step and continues to be a huge support in my health journey. I would also like to thank the entire care team at His and Hers for all the support and professionalism. This team is absolutely amazing.

Ashely at His and Hers hormone health and wellness are great. I went in to have my hormone levels checked. Ashley sat down with my wife and I and went over my blood panel, she was very informative and a great person to work with. I would highly recommend Ashely and her team for any of your hormone health needs

adorne-medical-aesthetics-chehalis.text:
This place.....
