Phew they DESERVE 5 stars 🤩 I don't even have to tell them what I want because they're so good and passionate about their profession, I trust them to know exactly what I need to get the look I'm after and I've never been let down. Particularly with my lip filler, no joke I was so scared to get it cause I'm not.... "That" type iykyk and the result is just flawless. Take all my money!! 💸💸 But really these ladies are so phenomenal. I hope these ladies' days are as amazing as they are
Excuse the Pokemon, the atmosphere here is grade A quality, hard to find type of vibe
I love them

I can’t say enough good things about this med spa! From Dysport to facials, every service I’ve had has been exceptional. The team is knowledgeable, professional, and truly cares about delivering natural, beautiful results.
What I appreciate most is that they never try to upsell or push treatments I don’t need. I always feel heard, respected, and confident in their recommendations.
Scheduling is also incredibly easy, which makes keeping up with appointments stress-free.
If you’re looking for a med spa you can trust, this is it!

Love this place!   Each and every single person is great!   It’s a one stop for all
Your beauty needs. It’s less expensive than most.  Becoming a VIP member saves you even more. I highly recommend Adorne.

I chose Adorne a few years ago to help me with some of the obvious signs of aging, and can honestly say that I could not be happier with my results. The staff is always kind and attentive, and I truly feel like I’m meeting up with a friend each time Crystle steps in to treat me! Thank you Adorne
Love Adorne! I have gotten facials, laser hair removal,  and Botox here and all experiences have been excellent. Great staff and good environment.

medical-massage-acupuncture-chehalis.text: As always excellent service and therapists. I have been using Medical Massage and Acupuncture for several years and would highly recommend the facility to anyone who is in need of massage therapy. Today my therapist called in sick and they were able to get me in the same time with a different therapist. I saw Sage for the first time today and she was wonderful.

Todd is knowledgeable and skilled. I felt very comfortable and appreciated his explanations and gentle technique. I had never had acupuncture before, and he made It a good experience that I received noticeable medical benefit from. After my first treatment I felt a decrease in body stress and pain and an increase in relaxation and ease.

Michelle is a professional clinician who was thorough & responsive during intake. She offered compassion while asking all the right questions and allowing space for me to feel safe to share. Michelle came up with an approach to this acupuncture session that was the perfect fit for me. Michelle created a peaceful ambience during the session where I could truly relax and let her talents truly work. The music, the lighting, the warming blankets & lamp all added to feeling safe to relax and let go. She checked in with me often during the session. At the end of the session, she explained why I felt the things I did. Her clinical yet compassionate approach will keep me coming back.

Joshua is very professional knowledgeable and really cares about his clients. His goal is to help you feel better inside and out. I would recommend him to anyone looking for a Massage Therapist. He is hands-down the best therapist I have ever met.

Kim is a very talented acupuncturist. She is calm, professional, and takes the time to explain everything - multiple times when I need it. The treatment itself is relaxing and effective—I typically feel so much better when leaving. The space was peaceful and welcoming, and I feel genuinely cared for the entire time. Highly recommend for anyone looking for real relief and a great healing experience.

interactive-health-clinic-lynnwood.text: I’ve had a wonderful experience at this clinic! The staff is incredibly professional and knowledgeable, making me feel confident. The office is welcoming and well-organized, and the overall atmosphere is calm and reassuring. I truly appreciate the range of services they offer. Highly recommend it to anyone seeking professional and compassionate healthcare!

Dr Cochran is the most knowledgeable ND I have ever encountered. I have been a hardcore biohacker for nearly 20 years, and usually doctors don't know half of what I am up to and it's tricky to get good care. Dr Cochran is the exception. He cut to the core of my issue but was so carefully nuanced in his recommendations. He knows what labs to order and takes the time to explain everything to me. I am getting noticable improvements in my complex health issues. I am lucky I found him. Outstanding doctor and great care. Worth every penny.

Sadly, I agree with other comments that the front desk is less than helpful when emergency situations arise, which is the fault of management for putting them in this position. I was prescribed three supplements that, when combined, caused me significant pain and distress. I asked to be seen but the time until the next available opening was extensive. There was literally no one who would return my calls or come to the phone to advise whether the pain would subside or if the supplements needed to be stopped. The manager is never on site and the front desk must email her and then eventually she may email the patient OR simply have the front desk call the patient back to decline to help or answer any questions. This isn't a plumbers office (see the comment below left by the "owner" comparing his practice to a plumber or electrician for insight on how they view patients who need medical CARE ), this is a medical office, and a nurse or MA (or the manager) should be available to take calls, relay information to the physician, and get back to a patient within a reasonable amount of time, especially if they are having a reaction to supplements. I am being literal when I say not one person I spoke to cared. They were just humdrum and casual about the whole thing. As an aside, Dr. Cochran and his manager refused to refund the money for these three supplements (all of which caused extreme gastritis) even though the company from which they came said they would refund Dr. Cochran if he returned them - their office could literally have refunded me, set up an appointment to see the Dr., and resolved this matter relatively easily and refused to do so. As a result, I suffered an enormous amount of pain and I'm out well over $100. Managers, especially of health clinics, should be onsite at all times. Leaving folks who have zero decision making power having to be in the middle, while the physician who owns the practice gives all decision making power to the manager who is the only person who does not work on site does not equate to good patient care.

I've been seeing Dr. Cochran for about 7 years and he has literally changed my life.  He truly works with you to find the best path forward and always takes the necessary time to educate me on my options.  I wouldn't trust anyone else to my personal health care.  Also, can't say enough about the staff.  They are always courteous and helpful.  Interactive Health Care deserves 5 stars!

Dr. Cochran is brilliant. He is a very caring doctor, is very knowledgeable and researches constantly to bring the best care to his patients. I am so fortunate to have him as my Doctor. I have a chronic disease which is much more manageable with his guidance. He discovered that I have other underlying health issues, and I had assumed the symptoms were from my disease!  I don't hurt like I did, I have more energy. No other doctor every came close to figuring this out. Dr. Cochran finds the WHY.
The front desk staff are wonderful. They are up front about what insurance does or does not pay for, or they let you know that you should contact your insurance company FIRST.  This is a very professional, caring health clinic.

heart-of-wellness-tumwater.text: Dr. Spring Stephens has been treating me for well over a year with Procaine injection therapy. My neck and shoulders are shot after decades of working in dentistry, and although I regularly see a chiropractor and massage therapist, these injections have changed my reality from one of “I’m just ruined for life now” to “holy cow, I don’t HAVE to live in pain anymore!” Dr. Spring is the kindest, most gentle and caring practitioner I have EVER had. This therapy is the real deal…take it from a former skeptic!

I’ve been seeing Dr Michelle Deisering for 5 years. She is a relentless seeker of the best healthcare for me as a person. Truly a unicorn in the healthcare field. She has gotten to know me beyond the diagnosis and sees me as a whole person.

I was not asked to leave a review. I have been a mechanic for over a decade. I never once thought about my body and physical health until my thirties. My visit with Gary Black really has been life changing. He explained to me what we were doing, how we were doing it, and why we were doing it. He informed me of multiple resources and inexpensive equipment I could use at home. I left with immediate pain relief and excitement for my next visit. Remember to take care of yourself folks.

My insurance changed when I got a new job and multiple staff members (including the doctor I was seeing) told me my insurance would be accepted. We’ll, they didn’t end up accepting it and since it was verbal confirmation I wasn’t able to do anything about it. I had to pay completely out of pocket. They are also nearly impossible to get ahold of over the phone and have a terrible online scheduling system. I used to love this place but recent issues have caused me to take my business elsewhere. This is also the FIRST REVIEW I have ever written as an almost 30 year old. That should tell you how negative my recent experiences have been.  If I could give zero stars I would.

Scheduled an appointment as a new patient over the phone for a week out, 15 min later the receptionist said someone else booked that appointment because she didn't hit refresh to lock it in or something. So I'm the one that had to reschedule for a month out.

A full WEEK later I get a voicemail saying that my appointment time was booked by someone else, so they were canceling mine and there were times available 7-8 weeks out that I could go online and schedule myself. I suppose I would have to book it myself because no one knows how to use the scheduling software?! No thanks.

inspire-physical-and-hand-therapy-tumwat.text: I've had hand therapy twice at Inspire, following surgeries for thumb arthritis. Both experiences were great: the care was excellent and tailored to my needs, the providers are experts, and it's a welcoming and enjoyable environment. Everyone that works here, from the front desk to the primary provider, is professional and friendly. My recoveries were excellent.

I found inspire after my third wrist surgery, so I have been to more than a few therapists over the years.  Inspire has been the best without a doubt.  Renee and Brian are amazing.  I really think the success of this last surgery was largely a result of their therapy.  I can't recommend Inspire enough!

Nothing but praise for Christina and her team! Sarah tailored my hip replacement therapy to help me rapidly recover and build strength and flexiblity in my new right hip. The interns were well versed in helping with exercises ensuring proper form throughout. Thank you all for an outstanding recovery experience!

The people are all great! The front desk is happy to give all the info needed regarding appts, insurance, etc. The providers are knowledgeable, caring, and really listen when it comes to their recommended treatment plan. They listen and work with me and are very in tune to my progression and goals.
A+ folks here!

ERIN IS AMAZING! I sought treatment for pelvic floor and was so incredibly impressed, with her patience and with her guidance, she not only helped me to fix the issues but did it in a very kind, articulate way and the results were fast!! If you are looking for pelvic floor care, this is worth the drive to see her and quick, easy access from I-5 too

nearing-total-health-lacey.text:
Very friendly staff. The place is beautiful and has an amazing vibe. Sometimes you get a pretentious feel from these sorts of places but that is not the case at all here! It’s very clean and well kept. I do the hyperbaric chamber, sauna and cold plunge and the way I feel when I walk out the door is AMAZING and I cannot recommend these services enough to those around me! They are very easy to reach and being a text away from setting an appointment is so convenient. I also love that they have the LMNT drinks for purchase after the sauna.

My only issues are I do wish I had gotten a better initial walk through. It was more of, here is each service. When I did a float at another location the staff was so informative on the service, the benefits, how the machine cycled and filtered the water you were in etc. I do wish there had been more of that. I also don’t love that they ask you to bring your own towel. It’s a spa and I feel like that should be a given. Lastly I don’t love that I have to pay $5 for a rinse off. After sweating in the sauna, then sitting in the cold plunge pool, I feel a rinse off shower should be a given. When I did the float at another location the shower after was expected and no one wants to have to feel funky after leaving a spa and have to go home to shower. The prices have been raised quite a bit so it would be nice if that sort of thing was included. It feels a little like we’re being nickel and dime’d.

This is the best place! I started the hyperbaric treatments last year and also the sauna, magnesium soaks and massage. Emily and Eric are awesome to work with, all employees are kind and professional, I am a very happy client. I am healthier now and I am blessed to have such wonderful healing modalities available. Thank you!!!
I would also like to say that Holly and Paige are excellent staff as well and I am very impressed!

I was very skeptical on my first visit, the staff was very kind and helpful through my first hyperbaric experience,  from my very first visit I could feel it helping. The process helped me with my mornings and stamina through work  day seriously thinking of  purchasing a unit to travel with me in summers with work. When return this fall will be scheduling  more visits that will included massage and soaking.
My experience with nearing total health was amazing  felt they went above and beyond  for their customers, and very clean throughout.
Thank you for the great experience and look forward to my return

I’ve been going to Nearing Total Health for almost 3 years and I don’t see myself going anywhere else. Emily-Crunchy Muscles Massage is AMAZING, I can’t say this enough. I definitely recommend getting a magnesium soak prior to a massage. Not only is the environment relaxing, but it is exactly what my muscles need before a massage, especially when they are tight or hurting. I’ve also done the Infrared Sauna and Hyperbaric Oxygen Chamber, which are both also incredible. @nearingtotalhealth_ on Instagram gives you details on all the services they offer as well as the benefits of each one, which I find extremely helpful! All their staff is amazing and kind! The place itself is beautiful and has a comfy home-y feeling. You should definitely check it out!

Been going to Nearing Total Health for about a year and I have had the best experience. Staff is professional and knowledgeable, my massage therapist listens and adapts her plan based on my current needs. When you go, you have to do the magnesium soak pre-massage, the soaks are so relaxing and really maximize your massage time.

savvy-rejuvenation-and-iv-bar-stanwood.text:
Firstly let me begin by saying I am a Master Esthetician of 20 years. I have spent most of my professional career working in medical spa's or plastic surgery. I am not a stranger to the vast variety of injectable techniques. I cannot recommend Savannah Kieth at Savvy Rejuvenation  & IV Bar highly enough! Her technical skill is unmatched; she has an incredible eye for detail and always achieves results that look refreshed and natural, never 'overdone.'
Beyond her expertise, Savannah radiates genuine kindness and professionalism. She takes the time to listen to your goals and explain every step of the process, making you feel completely at ease. I am also deeply impressed by her generosity—she is so giving with her time and knowledge, ensuring you never feel rushed. If you are looking for an injector who combines skill  with a truly caring heart, look no further! Schedule with her right away!💕

Savanna is so warm and welcoming. I was instantly at ease and the services I received were truly pain free! I will definitely return for more when the time comes. She is a true professional and from now on, I won’t go anywhere else!

My husband and I have been to see Savannah at Savvy Rejuvenation several times.  Our first trip was for the IV vitamin treatment and now I just had my second microneedling procedure.  Both experiences were 5 star.  I look forward to going back!

The website was complicated and kept scheduling me multiple time slots. I figured out how to cancel all but 1 so I assumed all was well. Fast forward. 2 hours before my scheduled appt I get an automated text notice to remind me of my appt.  5 min later I get a separate text from Savannah telling me she was sorry but needed to reschedule because she saw the appt I had canceled and now she was not able to come in today.  Not 1 time did anyone attempt to reach out in person and although it is holiday season the available time choices seemed liked her business is not her first priority. I will be avoiding this establishment and seeking a professional one.
Savannah is the best! Professional and gentle. Have been seeing her for over 3 years and won’t go anywhere else.

infusion-solutions-everett.text: If it weren't for my nurse, who is incredible! I would've found a different place long ago. From a nurse who filled my PICC line full of blood when she shouldn't have and made comments about how I should do better on my IV drips and how I couldn't get through the 2 hours there. They didn't retrain her or anything. Just told her to not interact with me. Lastly, My bills are consistently wrong. I have needed to call higher ups for them to fix it. Random double charges and an out of the blue $500 charge? Now I'm hesitant to pay anything to them. It's bad when the patient notices billing issues before the billing department. Front office and my nurse and supplies do a great job!

I’ve had my share of infusion centers, but this by far is amazing!  This place was very clean and nurse and staff members were so pleasant and made this experience more at ease.  My nurse was Tammy, she was very knowledgeable and took the best care of me. I would definitely recommend this place to own friends and family.

Saida, Rebecca, and John at the Everett office took amazing care of me. They worked me into the schedule incredibly quickly when my medication changed, and they were kind, patient, and gentle during the appointment. They took time to answer my questions, repeatedly offered drinks and snacks, and make sure I felt cared for. I can’t recommend Infusion Solutions enough!

This place has been a God send to my mother. Mom has dementia and doesn't like water. We go once a week and she gets hydrated enough to keep her out of the hospital. We still push water in our home. Infusion Solutions is  still our back up. The team is great. John especially has a way with Mom. She can get  a little inappropriate. They all handle it with humor and grace. 100% with time and money. Wonder service.

Callie went out of her way to get the medications the hospital ordered prepared and delivered as fast as humanly possible, so that i could get discharged as promptly as could be.  Arrival to the hospital was crisply punctual.  Communication with me far exceeded that of the hospital itself.  The professionalism demonstrated was outstanding.  The kindness, understanding, and overall quality of service was top tier.  Thank you Callie, and thank you to Infusion Solutions!

radiant-beauty-med-spa-and-wellness-snoh.text:
I have had such a great experience at Radiant Beauty Med Spa and Wellness for GLP-1 injections. I was honestly pretty nervous to try it, especially postpartum, but it has been such a supportive and positive experience. I have already seen real results with stubborn postpartum weight that would not budge before.

Kanchana is incredibly knowledgeable, kind, and patient. She takes the time to explain everything and is always available by text if I have questions or need anything. I never feel rushed or judged, and I always feel supported.

I am so glad I decided to do this and could not recommend this med spa more.

I have been going to this med spa for several months now. My provider is top notch! Extremely well educated,friendly, and non-judgmental. The cost is very reasonable and I 100% trust that I am getting legitimate, top quality medication. I highly recommend Radiant Beauty to anyone looking for a high quality provider to prescribe GLP-1 medication. They work one on one with patients and have the knowledge and experience to help you reach your goals safely. I have tried several other avenues to obtain GLP-1 meds. (Online programs, getting it prescribed through my doctor, etc) and Radiant Beauty is hands down the most best service I have received (and for the best price) considering that my insurance put a blanket denial on all GLP-1s being used for weight loss with or without co-morbidities! You should absolutely check them out for safe,reliable, and affordable weight loss medication

I’ve gone to the same Botox person for years and was nervous to try someone new because I really like to ‘look like myself’ if you know what I mean. Not only did I feel like I could trust Radiant Spa after we discussed my goals but two days later I am so please with the results! I was pleased to hear that I could get a b12 shot as well, so I decided to give that a try and now not only do I feel like I look refreshed I feel amazing on the inside, too! Highly recommend!

Today (12/1/25) I visited Radiant Beauty Med Spa for the first time. It is not my first rodeo with botox, in fact, I try to get 20 forehead units or so once a year as preventive maintenance. I am 31 and have been dabbling in preventative since I was 25 for reference! My trip to this med spa was off to a very rocky start, simply because I foolishly forgot to plug my cell in to charge the night before and it died on me while I was 7 minutes away from my destination in unfamiliar territory! I managed to follow my instincts following Snohomish signs and eventually ended up at the CVS on 2nd street where a kind woman (thanks Kim) let me borrow her phone, in which I frantically got in touch with Kanchana, my amazing injector, who met me with warmth and understanding and gave me further directions on how to get to Radiant. Phew! Now that I had finally arrived, I could start to relax. This med spa is located above a lovely thrift shop, and Kanchana was more than happy to meet me outside to make sure I had arrived alright. We walked up the stairs and off to the left where her studio was, which was earth toned, incredibly cozy, and smelled fantastic. Cute and clean! Kanchana met me with so much warmth. She's very knowledgeable about what she does and made it a point to not over-tox. Many injectors will try to push for more, because it means more $, but Kanchana did just enough for me. No overselling, no gimmicks after, none of that. My concern was always that I scrunch my face and furrow my brow hard in my sleep that I wake up with headaches from the tension, so her placement of injection is sure to help that. In fact, it's already settling nicely and I an eager to see results in the next 2 -3 days. I have posted my high regard to her on my Instagram and raved to my friends and fam already about how happy I was with my appointment today. That is how excited I am to be a patient here! After bouncing around from injector to injector most of my 20s, I can confidently say that I can see myself being a long standing client here. Do not hesitate to book, especially if there are new patient specials available! Thank you Kanchana, for sharing your expertise and your beautiful spirit with me today!

Highly recommend! Very sweet and professional nurse practitioner owned business. She listened to my needs and fulfilled all my requests and goals. This will be my one stop Botox and facial needs shop going forward.

bellevue-skin-and-wellness-bellevue.text: Bellevue Skin and Wellness offers a truly calm and relaxing environment that immediately puts you at ease. I received a facial that included dermaplaning (a light exfoliation on the skin) and a thorough cleanse, and my skin felt exceptionally smooth, refreshed, and well cared for afterward. The treatment was performed with great attention to detail, and Heather’s gentle approach made the entire experience both comfortable and rejuvenating. I felt a high standard of care and professionalism in the space! Overall, I would highly recommend Bellevue Skin and Wellness to anyone seeking a high-quality, sooting skincare experience and I look forward to returning in the future 😊.

I had an amazing experience at Bellevue Skin and Wellness! I came in for a chemical peel with a friend who had already spoken so highly of their services, and they absolutely lived up to the praise.

I was treated by Heather, who was truly wonderful—professional, knowledgeable, gentle, and incredibly attentive throughout the entire process. My skin already looks and feels fantastic.

Dr. Hong is exceptional and has an incredible understanding of what your body needs, all while making you feel completely comfortable and cared for.

And I can’t say enough great things about Jackie, who supports and reassures you every step of the way—she truly goes above and beyond.

The entire team is warm, welcoming, and highly professional. From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable, valued, and well taken care of. I highly recommend Bellevue Skin and Wellness to anyone seeking quality skincare, personalized treatments, and an overall outstanding experience!

🌟 My Moxi Laser Experience at Bellevue Skin and Wellness – 5 Stars! 🌟

Thank you,  Bellevue Skin and Wellness!  It is together and part of the Bellevue Surgery Center in Bellevue.  I had my first Moxi and BBL laser treatment done 4 days ago, and I’m already seeing signs that it’s working! The procedure was gentle and surprisingly comfortable. The provider  and Heather explained everything clearly, and I felt like I was in great hands.

After the session, my face was a bit red and warm, which was expected. By day 2–3, I started noticing tiny dark specks on my skin (called MENDS) — totally normal and a sign that the laser is doing its job. I’ve been following aftercare instructions closely: gentle skincare, sunscreen (I love my EltaMD SPF 50+), and staying out of the sun and heat.

What I appreciate most is that Moxi is non-invasive but still targets melasma, pigmentation, and texture — which are my main concerns. I’m being patient and letting my skin heal naturally, and I can already tell that it’s going to look brighter and more even once the MENDS finish shedding.

I would definitely recommend Moxi to anyone looking for a low-downtime laser treatment that actually delivers results — especially for melasma or early signs of sun damage. I can’t wait to see the full results in the next few days!

Thank you, Thank you, Thank you!

✨

I’ve tried so many different skin treatments over the years, but this is honestly the first time I’ve seen results that make me feel genuinely confident. From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed and taken care of. The staff really is so knowledgeable, and I never felt rushed or like just another appointment on the schedule.
I had a combination of BBL, MOXI, and pro fractional laser treatments, and Heather was amazing throughout the whole process. She explained everything in a way that made sense and helped calm my nerves, especially since I was a little anxious at first. She’s not only incredibly skilled, but also kind and patient.

What really stood out to me was the follow-up care. I had questions afterward, and the team was so responsive and supportive— it made the whole experience much less stressful. I’m honestly blown away by how much my skin has improved, and I wouldn’t trust anyone else with it now.  I can NOT remember the last time I was comfortable leaving my home without makeup on!

Bellevue Skin and Wellness is just on another level. If you’re on the fence about investing in your skin, you’ll be so happy you found the right place! You (and your skin) deserve this kind of care.

I’m here for a Performance and Recovery Infusion and it’s been a great experience so far! The staff are super friendly and made me feel comfortable right away. The infusion itself feels amazing —almost like a mini runner’s high!  Looking forward to seeing improvements in my weight lifting and soreness this week. Exciting.

If you’re looking for a boost in recovery or just want to feel recharged, I’d definitely recommend checking this place out. Everything feels very professional and relaxing — I’ll definitely be back!

northwest-ketamine-clinics-bellevue-bell.text: NWKC Bellevue is a treasure. The experience is so comfortable and safe. It starts immediately with Patti the front desk welcoming you in. The doctors and nurses there are so thoughtful and knowledgeable, providing a great experience. Everyone is kind and caring and I cannot recommend it enough if you are looking for alternative therapy.

Everyone at NWKC is kind and patient. Combined with the effort to establish a cozy resting environment and the infusion treatment itself, it's like a mind-body oasis where each goes off for their own recuperation and comes back together after. For any who are curious about the process, I would recommend attending NWKC.

UPDATE: Austin, their operations manager, worked with me over the phone to provide me a satisfactory resolution. He issued a refund of the difference plus an extra $50 to attempt to regain my confidence.  This should have never happened in the first place.  But I am glad it is now resolved and hopefully a valuable learning lesson for that employee who did that shadiness.  I want to state clearly and plainly that if you agree to pricing over the phone, charge a credit card, and then hangup the phone—that you should never silently refund and then charge more.  That is theft/fraud.  I hope they take this matter seriously internally.  As for me, I am satisfied.  As a 4 year patient of NWKC, I will continue to use them now that this has been resolved, and of course, it does not affect my opinion of the great nurses and care I have received over the years!  Best experience, and Ketamine continues to save my life.
—
ORIGINAL: Wont honor the agreed-upon pricing. Been a long time patient for many years. Told me over the phone that it would be $3550 for a booster pack. Confirmed details and card details. They reneged on their pricing, but never told me. Found out on my credit card statement that they later that day refunded me and then charged me MORE. Absurd and deceptive behavior. Unbelievable. Where are the ethics? Whats insane is I even have it in writing. Its a $50 difference in billing. But that is still unethical, and in my opinion illegal. Maybe we should see what the AG says.

This review is very personal and makes me feel vulnerable to share, but I believe it’s important. Without going into the details of my own experience, I reached out to NW Ketamine in hopes of finding relief from years of depression, PTSD, and trauma.

I filled out the online form and booked an intake phone call. I was surprised to receive a call the very next day from Sara, a registered nurse (who sadly just had her last day with them—I’m truly going to miss her). Although I missed her initial call, I called her back, and we talked about my history and whether this treatment would be a good fit. We agreed that it was worth trying, especially after I’ve exhausted so many other options over the years.

I then spoke with someone (I believe it was Patt) about the financial details and booked my first in-office treatment. I was incredibly nervous—trying something completely new is scary, especially when it involves your mental health.

From the moment I walked in, Patt greeted me with the warmest, bubbliest smile. That alone helped ease some of my anxiety. Then Sara sat with me and talked through everything before my first treatment. She helped calm me down, and I’m so grateful for her kindness and patience.

That first session was filled with fear of the unknown. I didn’t know how my body or mind would react. But afterward, I felt an unexpected sense of relief. I started to see my trauma differently—not as something I caused or deserved, but simply as something that happened. That shift alone began to lift a lifelong burden of guilt.

The second treatment was more difficult. I remembered things I didn’t want to remember. But I think part of me expected it, and even though it was painful, I knew it was part of the process.

The third session? Disneyland. That’s the only way to describe it. It was light, fun, and exactly what I needed after two emotionally intense experiences.

My fourth session was just yesterday. It was different, but powerful in its own way.

Sara was with me for my first two treatments, Cameron for the third, and then Sara again for the fourth. Different people, different personalities—but the same kindness, the same compassion, and the same commitment to helping you heal. They talk with you during treatment if you want them to, and for me, that made all the difference. Just knowing someone was there brought me comfort when things got overwhelming.

I cannot recommend NW Ketamine enough. They changed my entire perspective on this kind of treatment. I’m 51 years old and have lived through a lot. For the first time in my life, I can say I’m okay. And I mean it.

If you’re struggling with depression, PTSD, or trauma, and you’ve tried everything else—please consider reaching out. I’m not a doctor, and I can’t say this is right for everyone, especially if you have a history with substance misuse. But for someone like me, this has been life-changing. I only wish I had found it sooner.

Thank you to Patt for your warm welcome, to Cameron for your calm and sweet presence, and to Sara—I’m going to miss you more than I can say.

I have absolutely nothing but good things to say about this clinic. I’ve been going to the Bellevue location now for a few weeks and I’ve already begun to feel so much better. The staff is very kind, warm, welcoming and incredibly knowledgeable. If you’re going through, or have gone through trauma or have anxiety that makes getting through the day really difficult, I would highly recommend trying this treatment. Couple this with therapy, and you’ll find that you’re able to navigate your feelings with renewed perspectives, and a hopeful outlook towards the future. I’m so incredibly grateful and fortunate to have found them, and very glad I tried this treatment even though I was nervous at first.

ayurvedic-and-naturopathic-medical-clini.text: Excellent experience from start. Staff are so welcoming and supportive and professional. the-wellness-vault-cheney.text: Ever since joining in April, I have grown to love this place more and more. All instructors are top notch, knowledgeable, fun and non-judgmental. It's a place to be exactly who you are on that day, and in that moment. I recommend The Wellness Vault to anyone looking for community and wellness.

The most caring and upbeat instructors who consistently challenge and encourage you in every class. The Wellness Vault has increased both my inner and physical strength, as well as my confidence. I recommend it to everyone!

The Wellness Vault has been the best workout place I have ever been too. I usually hate working out in front of people and at a typical gym, I hide behind equipment because I strongly dislike anyone watching me. The Wellness Vault is the most uplifting, positive, judgement-free environment I’ve been a part. It’s incredible! Highly HIGHLY recommend!! I tell all my friends, family & clients how amazing it is!

We are so lucky to have this studio in Cheney! They offer a variety of great classes. The instructors are knowledgeable, encouraging, and fun to be around. The environment at the Wellness Vault promotes joy in movement and body positivity. The group fitness atmosphere motivates me no matter which class I take, barre, yoga, strength, Pilates, all are wonderful! I highly recommend trying their unlimited 2 week trial of you're thinking about changing up or starting your fitness regimen.

I've only taken two classes here (Restore The Barre and Candle-Lit Restorative Yoga), and I am about to start my two week unlimited trial period. But even with only two classes completed there, I'm positive I will continue to come to The Wellness Vault, and I plan on purchasing a student class pack for the next quarter. This is the first and only fitness environment I have ever been in, that's supportive for any and all levels of experience (speaking as someone who has zero experience), is body positive/inclusive, very fun, and also pushes you to your full potential.

The facility itself is beyond adorable and makes it super rewarding just to enter it each time (adorable interior design). Something that's really important to me that The Wellness Vault offers, that I also haven't found anywhere else, is the lack of focus on mirrors in sessions. The mirrors are spread out just the right amount that I don't ever feel like I'm looking at other people during sessions too much, that I'm being judged while working out, or am even able to judge myself (unless I so chose to place myself directly in front of a mirror). Additionally, the hot towels are amazing and a treat after each session!

The classes themselves are just the right size. Not too big that you can't receive individual support from your instructors, but not too small that the attention is solely focused on you.

The instructors remember you by name and make modifications for every single exercise (whether that's for more advanced or easier exercises). A yoga class, I took a year ago at a different place, didn't make any modifications for exercises and left me feeling clueless on what to do and initially turned me away from yoga/exercise classes, feeling like I was already way behind everyone else.

Thank you to The Wellness Vault for making exercise feel rewarding and an enjoyable thing that I actually want to do, instead of a chore. I can't wait to start my two week trial period.

I had a 90 minute massage this morning and I’m honestly still thinking about it. It was the best massage I’ve ever had, no question. I’ve tried so many massage therapists over the years, and none of them have been able to get in there the way Kim did. This wasn’t surface level or “relaxing for an hour” work. She found the root of what was actually causing my pain and went straight for it. If you need deep tissue, she is absolutely your girl. You can feel how knowledgeable she is about the body with every move. I walked out feeling lighter, looser, and genuinely relieved in a way I haven’t felt in a long time. I won’t be booking with anyone else.

I happily choose to see Kim every other week because she uses the perfect amount of pressure, is knowledgeable about massaging necks/shoulders, and knows how to massage backs that have hardware placed. She is down to earth, funny, relatable, knowledgeable about billing insurance, and I truly feel like I can be honest with how my body is feeling. By the end of my session the “band” that was around my temple was gone and my vision so much clearer!  Was feeling much better quickly!  Atmosphere was brry relaxing and was even able to nap in the massage chair with a warm, cozy blanket listening to music!  A very relaxing experience!
My second “drip” during the holidays gave me that extra boost to keep going and keep healthy during the holidays!
Give Thrive IV a call and get a consultation with Shannon!!

eazy-iv-hydration-wellness-clinic-center.text:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting Eazy IV in Centerville, Ohio, and I can honestly say it was an incredible experience. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was welcoming, clean, and professional. The staff was friendly, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain all the services they offer, which immediately put me at ease.

The IV therapy itself was fantastic! I opted for the hydration therapy, and I could feel the benefits almost immediately. I walked in feeling sluggish and dehydrated, and left feeling recharged and revitalized. The entire process was quick, comfortable, and surprisingly relaxing.

What really stood out to me was the personalized care. The team at Eazy IV tailors treatments to meet your specific needs, and they make sure you’re completely comfortable throughout the entire process. They also offer a variety of options, from energy boosts to immune support, which makes it easy to find a treatment that fits your goals.

I also appreciated how clean and well-organized everything was. It’s clear they prioritize both customer care and safety. The pricing was reasonable, especially considering the benefits I felt immediately.

I’ve been to several different Wellness IV establishments in the Dayton area, and Eazy IV is easily the most exceptional of them all. It’s not just about hydration, like all the other places offer, but the importance of wellness and relaxation that truly sets Eazy IV apart from the rest. Brittany genuinely cares about your health, and it’s obvious in the environment she has curated in this facility. The memberships offer value far beyond simple IV drips and are affordable, which makes this place all the better. I walk in feeling tired and depleted, and leave feeling refreshed and revitalized. Eazy IV has a customer for life with me. Thank you for everything!

I never write reviews, and honestly, I’m impossible to impress. I’m the kind of person who could sip water from the Fountain of Youth and still say, “Eh, could use more flavor.” But Eazy IV? It completely disarmed me. I walked out thinking, Okay… fine… this place is magical.

From the moment we walked in, the space felt warm, charming, and beautifully put together. You can tell that Brittany Kafka, NP, poured her heart into creating an environment that feels safe, calm, and healing. The attention to detail is flawless.

What really sets Brittany apart is her deep, honest, patient-centered care. She didn’t just ask a few quick questions, she took the time to review my medical history right there with me, walked me through what she saw, and explained exactly what my body needed. I felt truly seen, understood, and completely cared for.

Her bedside manner is nothing short of immaculate! Compassionate, confident, incredibly knowledgeable, and full of genuine warmth. She listens in a way that makes you feel like you matter.

The IV experience itself was pure bliss. The massage chairs were unbelievable, the kind you sink into and never want to leave. The entire environment was so calming and comfortable, making it the perfect husband-and-wife day date. We walked out feeling lighter, energized, and completely renewed.

One of the most emotional moments for me was watching how she connected with my husband. He’s stubborn and rarely listens to anyone about his habits, but Brittany spoke to him with such gentle honesty and kindness that he actually heard her. And he’s already making changes, something I never thought I’d see. That meant the world to me.

The receptionist Shay was welcoming and kind, and the whole appointment flowed effortlessly. Even simple things like having plenty of parking around back made everything easier.

What stands out most is that this is real, thoughtful medical care, not the franchise-style, cookie-cutter approach I’ve experienced elsewhere. Brittany doesn’t just throw an IV bag at you. She looks at what your body truly needs and focuses on the root cause of how you’re feeling.

After being out of the country for three weeks, I genuinely couldn’t wait to come back and that says everything.

Eazy IV is an absolute gem in our community. There is nothing else like it. Brittany’s heart, expertise, and compassion make this the only place I’ll ever trust for hydration and wellness care. She deserves every bit of recognition and new business coming her way.

If you’re considering IV therapy go to Eazy IV. It will change the way you feel inside and out.

What an amazing facility, all the good vibes. Brittany ( NP) and her MA Shay were fantastic, you can tell they just want you to feel your best self. I haven’t been happy with similar services in the area, and their tailored approach was a lovely experience. While getting my drip they have zero gravity massage chairs that help you relax and enjoy your time there. It’s definitely something that I’ll be adding to my monthly self care routine💕

5 star experience for Eazy IV! Not only did the team help me determine which fluids would benefit me best, I also got to relax in the full body massage chair while receiving my fluids. The spa is a very modern and calming environment. The best part, the entire team consists of medical professionals best suited to select a care plan based on your needs. I absolutely recommend going and letting them fuel your body properly!

renewd-med-spa-everett-wa-everett.text: I had the pleasure of booking an appointment with Michelle for facial injections. She was both professional and a compassionate caregiver. My injections went smoothly and with very little discomfort. She is very thorough and her facility is spotlessly clean. I highly recommend Renewd for aesthetic needs!!

I found Michelle after I had moved to Everett via a Google Search.  I've seen her a couple of times and plan on returning in the future.  This last time I asked her to do something different than we traditionally do and I didn't like it.  She was so easy to work with "fixing" what I had asked for.  She offers a variety of neurotoxins and is knowledgeable of the pros and cons of each for you.

I had an absolutely amazing appointment with Michelle at Renewed last week. She’s incredibly knowledgeable, and you can truly see the passion she has for what she does. I received some light Botox in a scar that’s bothered me since childhood. As I’ve gotten older, especially since it’s on my forehead, it’s become something I’ve really disliked.

Having never had Botox or any injections before, I was a little nervous—but Michelle made me feel completely comfortable. She explained every step in detail and made the entire experience so easy and reassuring.

Now, I get to spend my birthday this year without feeling self-conscious or looking back at photos I don’t love because of that scar. Renewed truly lives up to its name—I genuinely feel renewed. Thank you, Michelle! I will be back for my lips and To start  my gpl- 1 journey at renewed!!

Cannot recommend this place enough! Michelle is so caring and a one of a kind person. We discussed what I was looking for and went with the IV drip. I am now working to get this into my personal wellness routine.

Thanks Michelle!

For people who just read the first few lines I will lead with the lead. I have been doing aesthetic procedures from 28- present (54). I have been to all the Beverly Hills top Docs. Michelle is the best I have ever been to. I'll get into details below, but for now I'll say she is THE BEST and I could not possibly more highly recommend everyone go to her for a consult. She is a fountain of information and a pleasure to speak to.
Michelle is the sweetest person and has an amazing bedside manner. Especially for people new to this stuff it's important to have a practitioner who is supportive, understanding and validating. She is a career nurse and was the Director of the entire nursing staff at Providence. She is there for You- nothing else. She will match to what you want and need perfectly. She is a perfectionist. This is your face and it is vital you only have a detailed perfectionist work on it. She is highly skilled. Not everyone doing Botox or whatever else is created equal. Some are great, some are ok and frankly some are not that good. Michelle is an eleven out of 10. Like I said she's a perfectionist who would never settle for 2nd best from herself. She is passionate about self care and practices what she preaches. She's gorgeous and does everything in her practice on herself...lol and it shows. She'll tell you all about her personal experience with Anything she recommends to you. I feel like there's more but I'm running out of steam. If you're still reading just 100% make an appointment for a consult with her. There is no way you will regret it.

option-care-health-everett.text: Overall my experience with Option Care has been great. I have a rare genetic neuromuscular disease that requires 5-7 hour infusions every other week. I have received 4 infusions from Option Care so far and my nurse Pius has been amazing all 4 times. They try their hardest to make you feel comfortable and cared for. I feel very comfortable with them managing my infusions.

Wyatt was a fantastic infusion nurse! I've been getting my infusions nearly 3 years and in my first session he explained things I'd never been told at my prior place, including how to know if I was having a negative reaction. You'd think that would be standard, but I guess it isn't ... unless you're with Option Care.

Definitely happy to be here. Highly recommended!

Not a pharmacy. Not open 24/7. The people were nice but took no accountability for Google incorrectly stating this is a 24/7 Pharmacy. I drove 45 minutes and they just laughed it off, “happens all the time.” Well then…fix it.

I’ve been coming to Option Care for infusions for several years, and in the past, the Everett office truly cared about their patients. Unfortunately, things have gone downhill. Whoever is managing the Everett location now seems disconnected from patient needs.
Scheduling appointments has become a frustrating process, and it often feels like the default response is to blame insurance rather than taking the time to look into the issue. I understand the healthcare system in the U.S. has its challenges, but patients still deserve timely and reliable service from their providers especially when it comes to critical treatments like infusions.

If the office hired enough staff to handle insurance matters and respond to patient concerns promptly rather than relying on voicemail callbacks patients wouldn’t be left waiting while their health worsens. For a facility providing such important treatments, delays like this can have serious consequences.

I was very pleased with the treatment I received at Option Care in Everett on 9/16/2024. I cannot remember the name of the clinician who cared for me that day, but he was very clean, paid attention to detail and sterile protocols, and was very gentle when removing my dressing and cleaning the area. Thank you for being so kind and empathetic with your patients!

purity-integrative-health-wellness-cente.text: I recently had an appointment with Dr Lindsey Josephson and was thoroughly impressed by her extensive knowledge and clinical experience. After searching for a primary care physician for a few years, I finally feel I’ve found the perfect fit. She is incredibly focused during visits and highly responsive to follow-up messages. Additionally, the office's use of text messaging for appointments and administrative tasks makes the entire experience seamless and convenient.
My favorite acupuncture with Dr. Sue Yang. She is the best. So thoughtful and careful and understanding the whole body.

I can’t even express how amazing Dr Smedley has been. I have lost a lot of hope in providers when it comes to seeking out why I am gaining weight and she took so much time with me going through my labs, research, and nutrition. She even knew I was nervous about taking a specific medication and she called me and provided me research she took the time to look into to reassure me. I recently went to my (former) PCP who dismissed the possibility of me having insulin resistance/PCOS even after all my work-up, and this made me realize how much I appreciate providers like Dr. Smedley. Dr Smedley has kept me feeling hopeful in an area of my health that has caused me a lot of depression/anxiety as a young woman.
I just wanted to let everyone know what an Awesome, Super Intelligent, Kind &  Caring Doctor Brandi Seley is!  Thank You for your excellent service Dr. Seley!

Dr.Seley is not only kind and patient but understanding of what you bring up to her!
Came to her because of a car accident and provided me the best car and now after 4 months of healing i'm feeling a lot better!

wellness-institute-for-sleep-and-health-.text: Dr. Patel truly sets a high standard for what physician care can be. He and Lorrie are incredibly thoughtful, taking the time to answer questions in depth, offer realistic guidance, and provide genuine support through consistent communication and follow-up. I really appreciate their data-driven approach and how clearly Dr. Patel explains complex concepts in a way that feels practical and approachable. I look forward to continuing to work with them to optimize my health and would highly recommend WISH to anyone seeking supportive guidance to better understand and improve their sleep!

By far the BEST doctor’s appointment I’ve ever had. Dr. Patel took his time, answered every question thoroughly, and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand. I’ve never had a doctor actually educate me about how the body and brain work together during sleep. I left feeling informed, supported, and genuinely cared for.

Dr. Patel and Lorrie were very helpful in getting my sleep situation addressed and in helping me build a plan to improve my sleep quality which will have dramatic effects on the rest of my life. Dr. Patel is very knowledgeable, eloquent, and engaging in his communication clearly outlining what is going on and what little changes we can make to create big improvements. The quality of care provided here is superior and they sincerely care about bringing some healing to the world. Don’t be stubborn like me and continue putting off your health. Contact them today if you think your sleep needs some help.

Great experience. As someone who has struggled with sleep and wake issues and seen many neurologists who were often rushed or dismissive, it was refreshing to meet someone willing to take the time to explain things thoroughly and truly dive into my concerns. I highly recommend Dr. Patel he is extremely knowledgeable and professional in his approach.
Very attentive! Staff walked me through the entire new patient steps. The Doctor was efficient and explained things in a manner easily understandable. Thank you!

pnw-rejuvenation-enumclaw.text: LOVE Anne-Marie & the staff at PNW Rejuvenation!! Everyone is so professional, welcoming, knowledgeable, and kind. The spa is darling and has the most relaxing vibe. I have never had anything done at a med spa & was hesitant for years to try anything. Years of infertility and unsuccessful treatments took a huge toll on my body and completely altered my appearance / self-confidence. I am so grateful to Anne-Marie for helping me feel so comfortable and beautiful in my own skin again. I highly recommend trusting these ladies with any of your wellness needs - I know you will love them too!🤟🏼

This team is SO awesome! The space is spotless, beautifully designed, and truly feels more like a retreat than an appointment. The level of care and attention makes all the difference. If you’re looking for expert services with a personal touch, PNW Rejuvenation is absolutely the place. They truly set the bar. Highly recommend to anyone looking to feel better inside and out!

PNW Rejuvenation is absolutely amazing! I go there for HRT, laser, dysport, IV's—basically all the things—and every experience has been incredible. The entire team is so warm, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about their patients. Anne Marie, Inge, Heather, and Brooke are all wonderful! They make you feel comfortable, listened to, and totally taken care of from the moment you walk in. If you’re looking for a place to feel your best inside and out, this is it! 💚✨

Anne-Marie and team are phenomenal. I initially came here for Christmas presents for my wife. Had no idea what I was doing. Inge is awesome. Made a gift bag full of goodies. Wife was extremely happy. Second, if you have questions about peptides, which are somewhat new, Anne-Marie is an encyclopedia and has a plethora of knowledge. Highly recommend

I’ve had such a wonderful experience at PNW Rejuvenation! Anne-Marie and the client care coordinator, Inge, are both so kind, professional, and welcoming. Anne-Marie takes her time to explain every step of the procedure (I get Dysport done) and always makes sure I’m comfortable. She’s incredibly skilled and I’m thrilled with my results. Highly recommend PNW Rejuvenation if you’re looking for a team that truly cares and delivers amazing results!

coastal-health-port-angeles.text: I love everything about Coastal Health. Dr Detorres is so kind, listens intently and treats accordingly. I have seen many Drs in my life and she is by far the best. After a very long time of feeling sluggish, exhausted, not sleeping well and overall just not feeling like myself, I decided to make an appointment with Dr Detorres. All I can say is I wish I had done it sooner. After a complete lab, we sat down together and went through all of my deficiencies and health concerns and together made a treatment plan. I feel amazing, am sleeping well again and have energy that I haven’t had in years. I tell everyone - GO SEE ALISHA!!!

I've been a patient at Coastal Health in Port Angeles for my TRT, HGH hair treatment, and several other medical services, and I can't recommend them enough. From day one, the entire team has been incredibly kind, professional, and non-judgmental—it's made discussing sensitive private health matters feel completely comfortable and safe. Dr. Detorres and her staff truly listen and provide thoughtful, effective care that fits my needs. If you're looking for a welcoming place for hormone therapy or holistic primary care, this is it. Grateful for the positive impact they've had on my well-being!

Coastal Health is an absolute gem in Port Angeles! From the moment I walked through the door, I felt genuinely cared for. The entire team radiates warmth, professionalism, and true compassion. They take the time to listen, explain, and make sure every question is answered.

The clinic is bright, clean, and welcoming, and the staff’s positive energy instantly puts you at ease. It’s clear they truly care about their patients. I always leave feeling not only healthier but also deeply appreciated and supported.

If you’re looking for healthcare that combines expertise, kindness, passion with a local touch, Coastal Health is the place to go. I can’t recommend them highly enough — thank you for bringing such exceptional care to Port Angeles.
Much love to you ALL!

Dr. Detorres is the best doc I’ve EVER had, i’ve seen more doctors than most people in their lifetime being a pro skateboarder 🤕 and I can honestly say that I’ve never had one that cares about personal health in a way that I’ve never seen before. Took a bunch of tests showed me Results then recommendations in certain areas to help my overall health & multiple options onsite to get started right away!!! IV THERAPY IS AWESOME!! Check it out 💪

I called to see if this dr would be able to help me - I've been to many many providers with no luck. I was told the only way I would be able to communicate with her is by making an appt ($70 copay). Seems like this dr is more interested in money than helping people get better

petal-and-thorn-naturopathic-wellness-an.text: Petal and thorn is amazing! Dr.Avery is very sweet and caring . She really cares to help people. I love seeing her!

Dr. Colby’s clinic is second to none. Instead of feeling like a “patient” you feel warm and welcomed the second you walk in. I have recommended countless friends and relatives and have heard nothing but success stories. As a person who works in a hospital setting with modern medicine I love hearing and learning the natural treatment plans that focus on the well being of the human body. Dr. Colby is interested your well being and is focused in a long term care plan vs a quick fix and  only worried about getting as many people in and out of the door.

One of my favorite treatments are her IV therapies. They are a quick and easily was to help me get back to feeling better. Dr. Colby continues to invest in her practice, products and is a staple in serving her community.

I am so grateful for all she has to offer.

If I could give 20 stars I would! I’ve been seeing Dr. Colby for over 6 months and she has helped me in so many ways! She listens and is willing to try things I want, understands and cares, and is super knowledgeable. I’ve turned to her for my medical care in all areas that I’m able to. The infusions have been amazing getting me thru the winter with the typical blues. I would move right in the clinic if they’d let me, it’s stunning! So comfy here!  Her front desk staff is amazing as well, thanks to all of you at Petal & Thorn you guys are great!!

Dr. Colby is extremely thorough in her evaluations of my health concerns. She is knowledgeable and compassionate. She takes the extra time to communicate, I never feel rushed. I love the B12 & MIC injections and have occasionally received IV Therapy. I highly recommend Dr. Colby and her staff.

I am SO thankful for Dr. Avery! Her ability to listen and validate every concern makes you feel welcome and heard. She is knowledgeable, has helped me understand my body’s needs better, and made several supplement recommendations that have truly changed the way I feel on a day to day basis. She has been a tremendous resource to my health/ wellbeing. I highly recommend her to all my family members and close friends.

renewed-skin-wellness-camas.text: Elizabeth at Renewed Skin and Wellness is amazing!  She is so knowledgeable and took the time to explain the process and what to expect.  She knows so much about facial and skin care and what treatments will work best for you personally.  The process was really quick and I’m so happy  with the results.  She also has great prices and incentives. Go see her.  You won’t be disappointed!

Lillie is awesome. She does not try to sell me on things I don't need, she gives me her honest professional opinion. In fact she has actively disuaded me from buying products and services in favor of what is best for my skin. It builds trust and also is super annoying at times 😉🤣. My skin looks significantly better, more clear, more even, more healthy for weeks after her treatments! I really can't say enough good things!

I can’t say enough good things about Elizabeth! My experience with her actually started with just a B12 shot, and after feeling so comfortable in her care, I eventually went back to try Botox for the first time.

I was honestly a little nervous since I had never done it before, but Elizabeth made me feel completely at ease. She never once made me feel like I needed anything — instead, she made me feel confident in my natural features while thoughtfully guiding me toward subtle improvements that enhanced what was already there. Nothing overdone, nothing unnatural — just refreshed and still completely me.

She is incredibly knowledgeable, professional, and truly has an eye for balance. You can tell she cares about her clients and takes pride in her work. I highly, highly recommend her to anyone considering injectables, especially if it’s your first time!

Elizabeth is the best Nurse Practitioner at Renewed Skin & Wellness! She is amazing at Botox and fillers painless, gentle, and incredibly skilled. She truly listens to your needs and delivers exceptional, natural-looking results every time. She’s honest, upfront, and never overdoes it you always leave feeling refreshed and glowing.
She’s funny, professional, and extremely trustworthy, with a kind heart and genuine empathy that makes her easy to relate to. From the moment you walk in, she makes you feel welcomed and treated like family. The office is clean and inviting, and she offers many other great services. I love this place and always look forward to my appointments.
Thank you, Elizabeth Docea, NP, for making my skin look youthful and glowing! ✨

I can’t say enough good things about Elizabeth! She’s very personable, detailed, and truly cares about her patients. You can genuinely feel her passion for her work and her practice. My Botox and lip filler results are phenomenal, and I already feel more confident in my appearance. 10 out of 10! Highly recommend!

prime-iv-hydration-wellness-valparaiso-v.text: Love my experience! I was greeted by the friendliest staff.   Her smile was contagious and beautiful 😃.  My Nurse Isabella was awesome! She was able to start my IV like a well experienced nurse. Her kindness and professionalism spoke volumes ))))))))))❤️.   The massage chair was the best!  I fell asleep from such great comfort and the time flew by fast.  The experience was relaxing and welcoming.  Thanks to everyone and job well done !!! I will definitely be back as I now have a membership 🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉😃😃😃

I LOVE Prime IV Valpo! I originally went in on my doctors reco to support B vitamin levels. Prime IV offers the active form of B12 that other places don’t. The experience was so relaxing and delightful. Flavored electrolyte water and a warm welcome at check-in, fabulous explanation of all offerings, massage chairs and complimentary oxygen therapy! I feel noticeably better after IV therapy and quickly signed up as a member so I can enjoy the benefits at least monthly. Everyone there is so fabulous but I must call out Isabelle who made me feel so comfortable my first time in (and always does!) She’s a pro with the IVs - don’t feel a thing! I look forward to my appointments!

My husband surprised me for my birthday with IV therapy and we absolutely loved the experience. Asia was our nurse and she was amazing— so kind, professional, and made everything feel easy and comfortable.
The place was beautiful, super clean, and such a relaxing vibe. The massage chairs were an unexpected bonus and they were seriously incredible. 10/10 experience-can't wait to come back!

This was my first time and I wasn’t sure what to expect. The staff was great from the moment the I walked in until I left. The service was outstanding and Asia gave me advice on which service was best for me and my goals. It was so relaxing that I made 2 more appointments. Highly recommend!

Top notch facility. Calm, quiet, serene & relaxing. All the ladies were friendly and helpful. My nurse listened to my concerns and gave her suggestions and explained in detail to make sure I understood and allowed me to make my own choice. There were no pushy tactics. Just options. I will 100% be back and bring my daughter. Thanks everyone for a great experience!!!

skin-therapy-gig-harbor-gig-harbor.text: Pilar is amazing! So precise & gentle. Beautiful office & super comfortable set-up. I have seen her for several years and don't wear make up any more thanks to her micro needling and eye lash crimp & tint! She really listens to what I want and personalizes so it always looks natural, not overdone.♥️

Pilar is super knowledgeable about skin care and she is informative to her clients about all types of services she offers! It’s awesome to learn from her and get treatments I know are benefiting my skin long term. Thank you for everything so far, Pilar! I’m so happy I found you on the KP! I’d definitely recommended going here for facials, micro blading, micro needling and more!

The gal, Maddie, I think, is super friendly, very good at her job. I was nervous cause I never had any type of professionally done skincare, but she's super down to earth, the consultation felt more like just a chat. Can highly recommend this place.

Pilar is the best! I’ve been going to her for regular treatments (facials, peels, microneedling) for the past few years and continue to be blown away by the caliber of her services. My skin has improved significantly under her care - I wouldn’t trust anybody else with it!

I had a great experience with Pilar! The facial was relaxing and informative. I left with happy, glowing skin and future appointments to help keep it that way. Highly recommend this experience to anyone with skin care concerns or the need for self care.

alchemy-aesthetics-and-wellness-gig-harb.text:
Courtney is incredible. The reason I keep coming back to her year after year is because of her knowledge,  when we chat at my appointments she tells me yet of another class she’s taking to better herself in her field. I think that’s fabulous.

Her customer service is top tier. She’s very friendly, you can tell she genuinely cares about the wellbeing of her clients. If you’re ever nervous or just need deep clarity of a procedure she preforms, Courtney is your gal.

Her new location is located in the heart of historic Gig Harbor over looking the inlet. Very clean, calming and beautiful.

100% satisfied with every procedure I have received.

( Photo is the view from Alchemy’s waiting room)
-Jordan

I had the most amazing facial with Selena! I booked the 90-minute Signature Facial, and it truly felt like I was floating on a cloud. It included a full upper body, face, and head massage that left me completely relaxed and glowing. After a long day at work, it was exactly what I needed. Selena was incredibly kind, professional, and knowledgeable, and she made the whole experience feel so wonderful. The space at Alchemy is absolutely stunning… calming, inviting, and beautiful! I could go on and on! Highly recommend!!!

Can’t say enough good things about Alchemy!!! The vibe and atmosphere are so welcoming and calm — you feel it the second you walk in. Such an overall good feel!

All of these ladies are amazing!!! I had my Botox appointment with Courtney, and she is both personable and incredibly knowledgeable. I truly trust her and the plan we created to reach my end goal. I can’t wait to see the results and feel refreshed!!

As a mama of two, stepping away for some self-care doesn’t happen often — but my visit at Alchemy today absolutely filled my cup.

Thank you, Courtney, and thank you, Alchemy, for being the highlight of my day! ✨

I had such an amazing experience getting my fire & ice facial! From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was calm and welcoming. Selena was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to assess my skin and explain each step of the process. She also had great recommendations for future services!
I’ve already received compliments on how amazing and smooth my skin looks. I can’t wait to book my next appointment—highly recommend!

I had the absolute best first experience with Aleigh today. She is so sweet, so professional, and immediately made me feel safe and at home. Her spa is stunning, spotless, and the views are seriously beautiful. I also really appreciated her honesty and the way she explained what my skin needed in a way I could actually understand. I’m not an expert, so I truly value being in the hands of someone who clearly is. Kind, compassionate, and top-tier service. I can’t wait to come back.

sanctuary-skin-brush-prairie.text: I highly recommend Nicole Newton at Sanctuary Skin! Nicole is fun, easy to talk to, and immediately makes you feel comfortable. She’s incredibly knowledgeable and takes the time to explain options without ever being pushy. Her supportive approach makes the whole experience relaxed and enjoyable. If you’re looking for someone who truly cares about helping you look and feel your best, Nicole is wonderful!

Always the best experience. Nicole is personable and listens to her clients concerns and questions. Always makes me feel at ease at my appointments!! I trust her 100%.

Ps..her skincare line she carries in shop is top notch!! It has helped my skin SO much!!

I’ve been going to Nicole for the past 4 years and I honestly wouldn’t trust anyone else. She is truly a perfectionist and is incredibly thorough in everything she does. She takes her time, pays attention to detail, listens to everything I ask for 😀 I always feel confident in her care and consistently love my results.

Nicole is seriously amazing! She’s incredibly talented and always makes me feel completely comfortable with my treatment plans. I love that she’s constantly learning new techniques—her knowledge really shows in the natural, beautiful results. On top of that, her witty personality makes every appointment fun, like you’re just hanging out with your girlfriends. I’ve been seeing her for years, and I always leave feeling confident, refreshed, and happier with how I look. I couldn’t recommend her more!

Nicole was absolutely amazing to work with. She listened to my concerns with curiosity and created a plan of action with me. I say with me not for me because she was so awesome and involved me every step of the way. She answered all of my questions and made me feel individual and cared for . I highly recommend her expertise and care.

cosmetiq-medicine-vancouver-botox-filler.text: I love the Dr so much! She’s sincere, knowledgeable, and does great work! I’ve been coming for years after some prior bad experiences. I’ll never go anywhere else. I highly recommend! There will be two locations now too with the same Dr! Yay!
I’ve been coming here for years and I highly recommend! Entire staff is super sweet and she does great work! 10/10

I received attentive and personable experience when seeing Dr. Salti. She makes it easy for me to discuss and explore treatment options. At the same time she is very reassuring to me when I shared my fears.
I learned so much during my appointment and was so glad I made the choice to see her.
Every appointment has been met with caring professionalism,  cleanliness and high quality work. I haven’t only received amazing results!

Cosmetiq truly has the best injector. She is the reason this field deserves to be recognized as an art. With over 15 years of experience, her work speaks for itself through the beautiful results seen on every client who walks in and out of Cosmetiq.
She brings the level of discernment and integrity that patients—especially those new to cosmetic medicine-really need. She helped me understand what balanced results actually look like and showed me how facial balancing is unique to every individual.
This is what makes her such a rare gem and the most trustworthy injector I have ever met.

hey-sister-medical-spa-vancouver.text: I cannot say enough amazing things about Renee! I have been seeing her for 3 years and I don’t trust anyone else. She is patient, educated such a great person. I’ve been treated for my rosacea, had Botox regularly and lip filler. Hands down the best in the PNW! I recommend her too all my friends!

Renee has been so incredibly helpful in my weight loss journey! Not only was I able to cut down costs on my medication, but I still received excellent care and saw amazing results. She took the time to meet with me, review my overall health, and fine tune a personalized health and weight loss plan. I feel better than ever and highly recommend her!
I wish I could give 1000 stars! Renee is so easy to talk to, listens, and provides informed care with every interaction. She provides a safe space to talk and explore options with great follow up.

Absolutely love the ladies here! Renee has literally helped saved my life and brought back my self esteem! I came in for help with weight loss and she has gone above and beyond! I’ve not only lost weight, but have learned a whole new way of healthy eating. She goes through all your medical history and checks in with you weekly, makes sure everything is going smoothly while on the medication, she doesn’t just throw you to the wolves! I’ve never felt better!!! Thank you Hey Sister Spa and especially Renee!!!

I can’t say enough about the amazing experience I’ve had here. From my very first visit, I felt heard, supported, and genuinely cared for.  Renee takes time to understand her patients  goals and creates a plan that truly works for them.

I came in for help with weight loss and hormone balancing, and the results have been life-changing — my energy is up, my mood is stable, and I finally feel like myself again. They’re not just about prescriptions; they combine personalized care, nutrition guidance, and ongoing support that makes you feel completely looked after.

I’ve also had some of their anti-aging and skin treatments, and my skin has never looked better — refreshed, natural, and glowing. Every service is professional, results-driven, and done with such warmth and attention to detail.

If you’re looking for a clinic that blends medical expertise with genuine care and cutting-edge treatments, this is the place to go. I recommend them to everyone I know!

vibrant-u-med-spa-vancouver.text:
I’ve been coming to VibrantU for years now, and every time it’s spotless, beautiful really. The staff’s fantastic—always on point, gets things ready quick, and makes sure you’re taken care of. Stephanie’s my go-to for Botox or Dysport; her touch is super gentle, no bruises, no pain, nothing rough. She’s pros all through, sharp and careful, makes the whole thing easy. Been using her products specially the one with Tretinoin,
And other ingredients have change my skin. Love it here!

I've struggled with weight my whole life. I've always been overweight and have tried WW, dieting on my own, going to the gym, and others and nothing has stuck. Someone recently mentioned Tirzepatide and that it was life-changing for their weight loss and digestion. I know all bodies are unique and respond uniquely to medication but this gave me hope. Not gonna lie, I was quite nervous and unsure about starting treatment. Nakesha (Nah-key-sha) is extremely knowledgeable. She answered all my questions and explained how the medication works in easy to understand terms (which is fantastic for my sleep-deprived brain!). She was familiar with how the medication could be impacted by my pre-existing conditions and how the conditions could be impacted by the medication. I felt so much more confident in my choice to give it a go. Then came the first scary bit - the blood draw. I am not afraid of needles but am not a fan of the pain associated with blood draws. I have teeny veins, and Nakesha did great! Quite possibly the least painful needle stick I've had. The second scary bit was the injection. She walked me through how to do it, made sure my questions were answered, and had me do the injection. I didn't feel a thing! She ensured I had the spa's contact information and knew how to get in touch. Lastly, the final scary part - the cost. I was surprised by the great price! So reasonable! The labs are included too?! What?! Amazing!
