I am so excited to start this journey.  I am confident in giving myself the injections. I know that I have competent, caring supporters in the Vibrant U Med Spa team.

While some might consider the multiple 5-star reviews a red flag (at the time writing this, there are only 5 star reviews), I encourage you to take this as a sign that the team at Vibrant U Med Spa is full of experienced, knowledgeable, competent, and caring professionals who prioritize their clients and seek to help.

HIGHLY recommend. ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

stephanie is not only the absolutely most exceptional nurse practitioner but also person!!! she’s super informative and does magic on any work i get done, especially my lips!! she’s the only person i would trust to do  work on me. also everyone in the office is so great, i always feel so comfortable and welcomed!

I trust Stephanie and her team - Tia, Nakeisha and Sophia. I love that they continue to bring new products and techniques to the practice. It shows that they want to provide their clients with the gold standards and new devices and products in this ever changing industry. I also love how excited they get explaining procedures and are honest about what to expect before, during and after the procedure. Highly recommend Vibrant U!

Amazing!! I’ve been coming to Stephanie for years and this is the best place to come for Botox and other injections. Easy to get an appointment, fun and friendly staff, great price, and I feel great after coming. 💯% recommend.

tite-medical-aesthetics-vancouver.text:
I’ve been coming to Tite medical since they opened.
Dr. Kang  really knows her stuff, is constantly learning to provide not only a better experience each time you visit but with new research and innovative modalities that contribute to your desired look and goals.
I’ve had everything from laser treatments to facials and each time I visit it is such a wonderful and warm experience. The entire team truly cares about your time.
Thank you for taking care of me!

We’ve been seen a few times for vitamin injections and they have been truly awesome to work with. We always leave there feeling better holistically! They also have much more to offer. Highly recommend Tite Medical!

I had a great experience at Tite. The entire staff were very friendly and accommodating. I thought their Beauty Club was a good deal, too. I appreciated their conservative approach to my needs and the Aura picture that shows problem areas was very beneficial in guiding me on future treatments. Thank you, ladies!

I had a GREAT experience at TITE Med Spa! The staff was welcoming and professional from start to finish. I came in with some clogged pores, and the facial really cleared them up — my skin felt hydrated, refreshed, and glowing afterward. The atmosphere was calm and relaxing, the perfect way to spend my day off. ✨
I will definitely be coming back!💗
Amazing crew and most up to date tech.  Prices are competitive and team is well organized for scheduling and follow ups.  Highly recommended.

boost-iv-wellness-portland.text:
Crystal was absolutely amazing! From the moment we walked in, she was so friendly and calming, which instantly eased my nerves. This was only my second IV ever, and since my first experience elsewhere didn’t go well, I wasn’t sure what to expect. With Crystal, I felt completely comfortable, it was  like i was at a friend’s house. The whole treatment was relaxing, smooth, and enjoyable! I barely even noticed the IV insertion.

She also went out of her way to recommend a pastry spot across the street, which was such a thoughtful touch (and so delicious!). I’m so grateful for how kind and comforting she was, it was such a positive experience. Highly recommend Crystal!

I love this place. So happy I started going here. I always feel sooo great after getting an IV or a vitamin shot. My current favorite IV is the Meyers Cocktail. The team here is also so kind and knowledgeable, I can’t stay away and will be back again very soon!

I have been thinking about doing IV therapy for a while now for chronic health issues but it seemed too inaccessible and expensive but finally needed iron infusions, they had it in stock while there was a national shortage and my doctor could not order it.

This was much easier than dealing with insurance and far more cost effective too!

I decided the membership deal was beyond a good deal and I do not regret doing it!

Not only is my iron at a good level for the first time in my life, so is my vitamin D and less getting sick from vitamin C infusions.

ALL the staff is ALWAYS AMAZING.
I am grateful for the resource that they provide.

I cannot recommend Boost IV and Aesthetics enough! From the moment I walked in, the staff was welcoming, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable. The clinic itself is clean, modern, and relaxing exactly the kind of environment you want when you're focusing on your health and wellness.

I got an IV drip for hydration and energy, and the results were almost immediate. I felt refreshed, recharged, and ready to take on the day. The nurse explained everything in detail, made me feel completely at ease, and checked in often to make sure I was comfortable.

They also offer aesthetic treatments that are subtle but effective I left feeling like the best version of myself. Whether you're looking for a wellness boost or a glow-up, this is the place to go.

Five stars all the way!

I was feeling a bit under the weather this week and decided to visit Boost IV to help with my recovery. I selected the Summit Boost IV since it’s packed with vitamins, improves energy levels and provides immune system support — just what I needed! Nurse Gabby took care of me and she was super nice and friendly throughout the experience. I also really enjoyed the calming vibe and spa feeling inside. Good music taste too! Highly recommend Boost IV.

best-self-aesthetics-and-wellness-pllc-b.text: Alexis is the absolute best! No bruising, and fantastic results every single time. Her technique is wonderful. I barely notice much pain during injections.
Alexis is amazing! Very friendly, professional, and knowledgeable! She explains everything very well and makes you feel very comfortable! Would highly recommend!
Really nice, professional experience. The studio is very comfortable and calming. Alexis was very thorough and asked me all the questions before starting. I would definitely recommend.
Amazing experience. Great service. Alexis is very professional and patient. I did the Botox and it didn't' hurt. The studio is clean with a very relaxing vibe.
Alexis is fantastic! She does phenomenal work! She’s funny, educated, and gentle. I will continue to go to her for my beauty enrichment goals.

good-iv-lake-oswego.text:
I had an outstanding experience yesterday. Nurse Vega was incredibly professional and kind throughout the entire process, making everything seamless and comfortable.
​I felt fantastic today and had a very successful speaking engagement. I highly recommend her services to anyone looking for top-tier care! 5 stars.

Vega was my nurse for an iron infusion and I had the best experience ever! Pain free and very comfortable. The doctor and Vega took the time to really educate me about my labs, what to expect as a result of the iv (bloodwork wise and symptom wise) and answered all my questions with patience. Highly recommend going here!
Dropped in for a B12 shot. Vega, the RN, was welcoming and took the time to explain the dosage as I had been recommended a different dosage. The shot was painless and the service was great.

Wonderful spot. I hate IVs, but really benefitted from these with some health issues I have had over the last couple of years. Their people (all health professionals) are masters at getting a vein easily. The rooms are comfy and quiet. They have also been super flexible with me as my schedule has been difficult with hospital visits, health complications, etc.
Environment was quiet and relaxing. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Sat comfortably with my book and hot tea for about 40 minutes. Will be back again!

md-medspa-wellness-centers-birch-bay-bla.text: I did the 90 min facial and it was heavenly. The bed was heated. The room was so relaxing. It was my first time getting a facial and I was nervous. Kristal provided the service and she was so friendly and personable. She made me so calm and relaxed. The massage during the masks were also very amazing. I highly recommend coming here and look forward to booking again. Very satisfied.

11/10! For the past 3 months, my facials with Kristal have been nothing short of amazing. Her expertise and attentiveness are truly second to none. My sensitive skin has never felt better - I know it's in the best hands with Kristal! The spa itself is a haven of clean, inviting comfort, making every visit a complete oasis of relaxation. I can't recommend them highly enough!

First time getting a facial and Kristal was amazing! She was careful and very attentive. She let me know all the products she was using and what they were for. Highly recommend everyone get a facial at least once in their life!

I have been seeing Kristal for my laser hair removal treatments. She is super nice and professional. She makes me feel comfortable even when i'm in a vulnerable position, and she always checks on me to make sure i am handling the procedure well. 10/10 recommend.

I have had 3 treatments at MD Spa & Wellness and have been impressed each time with the professionalism & care that I am treated with. Today I had an incredibly relaxing facial with Joy. She approaches her facials with total wellness in mind & even gave an amazing foot massage! The owner Marika is always pleasant & so helpful. It looks like they are adding some new & exciting treatments as well. The spa is beautiful, clean and so-o-o-o relaxing. Make an appointment with them today. You won't regret it:)

aleris-aesthetics-woodinville.text:
I recently received a Botox treatment from Paige and couldn’t be more pleased with the entire experience.

Seeing a new injector can feel a bit nerve-wracking, but Paige came highly recommended; and she exceeded every expectation. From the moment I walked in, the clinic made an impression. It is absolutely beautiful and impeccably clean. I was warmly welcomed by the front desk and brought back to a treatment room right away. Paige knocked and entered shortly after, fully prepared and already familiar with my intake forms.

As a first-time patient with her, I appreciated how thorough and thoughtful she was. We discussed my areas of concern in detail, and she carefully assessed my facial anatomy, pointing out areas that required a nuanced approach, subtle asymmetries she noticed, and even areas I had never treated before but might consider. Her clinical eye and ability to clearly explain her reasoning immediately built trust.

After mapping out the treatment plan, she walked me through the order of injections and proceeded with confidence and precision. Her technique was efficient and steady (no hesitation!) and she used a tapping method for distraction that made the process surprisingly comfortable.

I am genuinely happy with both my experience and my results. Paige combines technical skill with attentiveness and professionalism in a way that makes you feel completely at ease. I highly recommend her and will absolutely be referring others to her moving forward.

I had an excellent experience at Aleris Aesthetics and can’t recommend them highly enough. I had microneedling done by Kate, and she was absolutely fantastic from start to finish. She took the time to explain the entire procedure in detail, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt comfortable every step of the way. The treatment itself was surprisingly pain-free, and I felt completely at ease throughout.

The space is immaculate, calming, and beautifully maintained, exactly what you’d hope for in a medical spa. Every staff member I interacted with was warm, kind, and highly professional, which made the experience feel both luxurious and safe. You can really tell they prioritize patient care, cleanliness, and high clinical standards.

Best of all, I could see a real, noticeable difference in my skin after the treatment, smoother texture, more glow, and an overall healthier look. I’m genuinely excited to come back for another session and continue my treatments here.

I just had an amazing facial with Kate! I went with the hydrafacial and she did not disappoint! Aleris is beautiful inside and my treatment room was really luxurious feeling with a warmed bed and fluffy blankets. I was lucky enough to meet most of the team and was really impressed. I highly recommend them for your next treatment or a great gift for a friend or family member.

I recently visited Aleris Aesthetics for a PRP facial with Kate, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Kate is truly amazing at what she does—professional, knowledgeable, and made me feel completely at ease. I noticed immediate results after the facial, and my skin has never looked better!

The office itself is beautiful—clean, modern, and calming. Everyone I interacted with was warm, welcoming, and highly professional. I also appreciated the thoughtful touch of having a private exit to the parking lot, which made the whole experience feel even more discreet and comfortable.

I will definitely be going back and highly recommend Aleris Aesthetics to anyone considering a treatment. Ask for Kate—she’s the best!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Aleris Aesthetics Review
I had such a great experience at Aleris Aesthetics! I did microneedling with PRP, then a week later a VI Peel Precision Plus with peptides both with Kate, who was amazing and super gentle. My skin feels smoother and has such a nice glow!

My friend got Botox and lip filler with Cyndi and loved her results too. Everyone there is so kind, professional, and knowledgeable. Highly recommend Aleris Aesthetics for anyone wanting healthy, glowing skin! 💆🏽‍♀️✨

koco-medical-aesthetics-woodinville.text: I’ve been seeing Kellianne for Botox and filler for over 8 years, and I can’t say enough great things about her! She is incredibly knowledgeable, professional, and has such a friendly, welcoming personality that instantly puts you at ease. Her eye for detail and natural results are unmatched — I always leave feeling refreshed and confident, never overdone. I completely trust her expertise and would recommend her to anyone looking for someone who truly cares about their clients and delivers amazing results every time.

I just started to see Kelianne for Botox 6 months ago and couldn’t be happier. She is truly an expert at her craft and the only injector I’ll let touch my face. I go for my masseters because my jaw is so sore from clenching when I’m stressed. The results have been amazing! Thank you!

Keli is very professional in her care of patients. I trust her completely. She is very knowledgeable about the different botox products. She is very warm and calm and wants to make sure you are happy and comfortable. Thank you Keli! You’re the BEST!

I've been treated by Keli for more than 5 years, and I would not want to go anywhere else. She's extremely knowledgeable, caring and very professional. I appreciate her efficient and simple booking system, and it's always a treat to be treated!
Kelli is so gentle. She listens to your concerns and answers honestly. I highly recommend her practice. Only if you want the best results.

salt-co-aesthetics-and-wellness-mount-ve.text: Katie is amazing! I've never had such a professional Botox experience! She listened to me, explained things so I could understand and made me so comfortable! Even the way she injects hurt less and was a better experience! She checked in on me halfway and honestly cared about my questions and results. I am so happy I found her and love my results! I mean look at those lips! She customized the traditional lip flip to give me what I needed! Obsessed.

I was nervous about getting treatment for the first time, but Landi made me feel completely at ease. She was gentle, knowledgeable, and never rushed me. The results are subtle and exactly what I wanted — I get compliments on looking “well-rested” all the time. I’ll definitely be coming back!

I had such a pleasant experience with Landi! She’s incredibly warm and welcoming. Even though I came in for aesthetic procedures, she made me feel confident and reminded me of my natural beauty.  After my Botox treatment (which turned out amazing) we talked about my interest in PRP for hair loss, and she connected me with Katie, who was so thorough in answering my questions and made me feel truly seen.

You can tell these ladies are passionate about helping women feel their absolute best, not just on the outside, but in confidence too. I couldn’t be happier with my experience and my results! Will be coming back in a few months.

I was afraid to try Botox until I met the owner. She is so knowledgeable and funny. Totally disarming and won me over. I love these treatments and cant rave enough about how great everyone is there! Highly recommend

I recommend salt & co to anyone and everyone!! Katie does a great job making you feel comfortable and is working to enhancing your natural beauty. I've had a vampire facial, Botox, and lip filler done. I and will definitely be back.

pure-skin-wellness-spa-mount-vernon.text: Been getting massages from Lisa S for many years she is amazing with her energy work, polarity and cranial sacral, she’s a phenomenal fascia massage therapist and she is so in tune. Her skills go beyond that, she has so much knowledge, essential oils and chakras, so much more.

Korah’s Touch Facial was absolutely the best!!! It is worth the $$! The massaging techniques she uses and in the combination that she does is the ultimate stress relief. Korah really knows the exact pressure points and how to release tension in the head and neck. She’s the BEST!
I had the most amazing facial today for my birthday from Korah. She has the most amazing hands, machines and products. I highly recommend going to see Korah Knight.

It was my first time getting a facial and going to Pure Skin & Wellness. I received the most wonderful facial from Callie. She was very attentive and gentle during the entire process and also provided information about what products and techniques she was using during my facial. The spa was also very clean and welcoming. The room where I had my facial was clean, calming and smelled amazing! I definitely recommend this spa and getting facial done by Callie. She does not disappoint and gives a great head and neck massage!!

Madison C. Is AMAZING! I've been coming to her for years. I love how friendly she is, and I love the products she uses and recommends. The new location is so nice and I can't wait to try some more of the amenities.

bouncebackiv-medspa-mt-vernon.text: Annette  and Shamalee did an assessment to find out my health to customized my l.V drip. I was very dehydrated and was so dry, meaning my tongue, my skin. I felt so good  during the drip, my tongue was moist and face felt plump and hydrated. Happy customer, highly recommended. Reasonable prices. Thanks Bounceback iv.

I had a great experience at The Bounce Back IV Med Spa! The staff was friendly, professional, and made me feel completely at ease. The place is clean and calming, and best of all—I didn’t even feel the shots! I left feeling refreshed and energized. Highly recommend!
Amazing experience with Anna and Annette. They treated me so well and I felt amazing after my massage. Will definitely be coming back

Annette is very professional and took time to answer all my questions about the weight loss injections. She showed me how to inject and how to maintain my weight and gave me a plan on what to eat and to exercise at least three times a week. The pounds are melting off slowly which is healthy. And the Botox to my forehead just made the lines disappear without looking fake. Thank you Annette 👍🏾

This is the first time I’ve had such an amazing experience for a facial and extraction. Ana Castrillion was so calm, instructive and detailed in her work to help cleanse my acne prone skin. I’ve already booked my next appointment!

renew-nd-medspa-everett.text:
My experience with Dr. Luba has been truly exceptional. I completed a series of IPL treatments on my face to address age spots, along with microneedling, and the results have been beautiful. My age spots have faded significantly, and my skin looks brighter, smoother, and more youthful.
Dr. Luba is incredibly kind, highly knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about her patients and their results. She takes the time to listen and ensures you feel comfortable throughout the entire process. Her attention to detail and dedication to achieving the best outcome really stand out.
I highly recommend Dr. Luba to anyone looking for expert care and transformative skin results. I'm excited to return for body sculpting next.
Thank you Dr.Luba

I recently had a combination of treatments with Dr. Luba — RF microneedling, Genesis laser, and an eye treatment with microcurrents — all done in one day, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From the very beginning, Dr. Luba was warm, professional, and incredibly attentive. She took the time to assess my skin, explain every step, and create a customized plan just for me.

It’s only been a day, and my skin already looks refreshed, smooth, and glowing! ✨ I’m so grateful for her thoughtful care and highly recommend Dr. Luba to anyone looking for beautiful results and a truly personal experience.

Dr. Luba is professional, friendly and very personable.  I came in for laser tattoo removal for two tattoos on my face.  Upon emailing Dr. Luba she was very quick in her response time and I was able to book an appointment very quickly.  Upon arrival she greeted me and took me into the room to get started after I filled out intake forms.  She was very friendly and informed me on what to expect during my removal.  During the removal process there was very very minimal pain, and she asked me how I was doing multiple times throughout the process.  While she’s doing laser tattoo removal she has this cooling air she uses to ease any pain you may have, this definitely came in handy.  Honestly I can say that this tattoo removal session was quicker and less painful than when I got them tattooed on my face.  Laser tattoo removal is a process and she is very upfront and honest with how many sessions she estimates you may need.  I truly appreciated this because it gave me realistic expectations on my tattoo removal journey.  Yes, you may blister, it’s normal and yes you may feel tightness and scabbing after, it’s also normal.  If you’ve gotten a tattoo you already know whether you’re putting ink in your body or removing it, it’s not gonna be 100% painless and there’s always a healing process. I wish I would have found Dr. Luba sooner than I did. I definitely recommended her if you’re in need of an honest, friendly and professional  tattoo removal specialist.

Luba, she knows exactly what she is doing- a great professional. She took such a good care of me. I always have wonderful experiences there when I start and finish my treatments. I got laser hair treatments and C02 laser facial treatments from her. She always makes sure everything is ok for me during my treatments and follow up after the treatment as well. I enjoyed talking with her and felt very comfortable there. Thank you Luba.

Very negative and shocking experience. During my visits, the pricing and services were not clearly explained despite me asking direct questions multiple times. My questions about cost were repeatedly ignored. Dr. Luba also charged me extra for services that were advertised as included in my membership, without my knowledge or permission.

I was shocked to later discover that my debit card had been charged multiple times for large amounts that were never discussed with me or authorized. I cannot describe the sickening feeling of receiving notifications of charges that I never authorized.

When I tried to contact Dr. Luba to clarify the charges, she blatantly ignored my texts.This lack of transparency and communication is extremely concerning, especially from someone presenting herself as a medical professional.

I strongly recommend being very cautious about providing your credit or debit card information. I always felt that I could trust a professional, especially a doctor, and never expected to be treated with such disrespect.

hyper-health-wellness-center-medina.text:
Hello,
Jessica, Mark, Courtney, and the entire team at Hyper Health and Wellness are amazing. I love this wellness center! The atmosphere is calming and welcoming. The moment you walk in; The staff is incredibly professional, caring, and attentive to your needs. Every visit leaves me feeling refreshed, relaxed, and truly cared for. The team goes above and beyond to create a positive experience, and I highly recommend them to anyone looking to improve their overall well-being!!

Nicole Ressler

I absolutely love coming here 🥰 everyone here is extremely nice, friendly and helpful! Coming here for the last year has taught me so much about my thyroid, my gut and overall functional health and I feel amazing and full of energy after each visit! I highly recommend Hyper Health and I’m so glad I came across them and made them part of my healthy lifestyle 💕🦋

I really enjoy coming here. It’s very calming inside. Everyone's so kind and helpful. I wasn’t sure what  IV therapy to get today so after talking with their professional, she suggested a post surgery IV mix. Everyone was very easy to talk to as well. Thank you for your help.

I’m so glad I decided to try Hyper Health in Medina! I’ve been receiving treatment for a couple of months now, and the biggest improvement has been my sleep. I used to wake up exhausted, often with headaches, and would be up multiple times throughout the night. Now, I’m finally sleeping through the night! Before Hyper Health, my sleep app showed only about 20 minutes of deep sleep. After a few months of treatment, I’m logging more deep sleep than ever—and it’s truly been a game changer for me.
Mark, Jessica, Jen & Tina are wonderful!! I look forward to continuing my health journey with Hyper Health.
Hyper Health has been amazing.  Their staff is phenomenal.  Questions are answered immediately and they are full engaged in your health journey.  Highly recommend!!

fluid-revival-mobile-iv-therapy-austin.text: Leslie was great. She was on time, very professional, no issues with inserting the needle. She gave me a heads up she had someone shadowing her which was no problem either. Will recommend their service in the future if needed again.

This has been one of the easiest experiences we’ve ever had! From the very beginning, communication was clear and prompt, and everything was done exactly as promised. Heather was absolutely amazing, kind, professional, and such a pleasure to work with. Because of her, we would highly recommend Fluid Revival to anyone. Thank you again!

Zoe is amazing! My IV infusion experience was relaxing, professional, and rejuvenating. I felt my energy lift and my body refresh almost instantly. If you’re looking for a wellness boost or just need to feel renewed, I highly recommend Zoe; she truly has the magic touch!
Was nervous about having an IV since I associate them with surgery, but Leslie was very professional and made it a  comfortable experience.

First time using a mobile IV service.
I was in Texas on a business trip and underestimated the Texas heat, which had me overly dehydrated, coupled with dinner cocktails I could not make it into work the next day for business meetings! I looked on the Internet and found FLUID REVIVAL and instantly, filled out the online forms and got a text from Leslie B, a RN who walked me through next steps.

After a quick virtual consultation and necessary forms that I was able to fill out on my iPhone, I had a nurse at my hotel in less than two hours.

Leslie was kind understanding, gentle and guided me on what her professional recommendations would be for my symptoms. I went with a Myers cocktail and began feeling better within the first 30 minutes of my IV infusion.

Once the infusion was complete, I was  About 80% revived and able to immediately jump up and make my way to the office. Then by the time I got to the office, the Infusion had done its job and I was almost completely back to normal.  Most importantly, I was able to continue with my day without a struggle.

Huge thanks to fluid revival and especially my registered nurse Leslie B.

fir-lane-care-shelton.text: I was sent here for 2 weeks to recover from early stages of heart failure. The staff was amazing. They were helpful and caring. Night shift was not as helpful. The food was good quality but sometimes the portions were very small. I would recommend this to others.

I am extremely happy with the education and therapy I received. I'm mobile and I wasn't before! I'm very grateful to the whole therapy team for their time and training.  I'm going home today with much optimism

If I could give this place a negative rating I would. My father in law has Dementia and was a patient of theirs for 2 weeks before ending back in the hospital due to their neglect! The entirety of his stay, he was not once showered, and never had a dressing change on his bed sore that became infected. This place is horrible and I wouldn't put my enemies there! This is a picture of his dinner they decided to just set on his table ALONG with his used urinal and a depend. This place needs to be shut down!

I heard from a friend that the facility was hosting a Trick-or-treating event. I decided to take my kids here because it was raining and I thought maybe it would be nice for the residents to have children come by as I have heard children help to lift their spirits.
When I got there my children and I were excited to see that the areas we were allowed in were decorated with care, it was truly exciting and spooky!
The residents looked so happy passing out the candy to all the kids. The kids had a blast as well!
The facility was very clean and the staff were all VERY KIND and attentive. I will be recommending this facility to my in-laws for their loved ones in need of memory care.

My grandmother is currently a resident and when I visit she acts like she can’t actually tell me what’s going on. She has been ignored and denied treatments she needs to breath. The staff is rude and ignored me for 30 mins at the front desk. As I was leaving we spotted a biohazard mattress sitting outside right in front near the doors. Never in my life have I reported a place so fast. Please if you love your family, try to find somewhere else first.

advanced-pain-and-regenerative-medical-s.text:
I scheduled and arrived for an appointment, but unfortunately the experience was very unprofessional. When I arrived, there was no one at the front desk. A man asked what I was there for and appeared confused. Shortly after, a woman entered visibly angry, using profanity, and looking for someone I assumed was a provider.

Eventually, the man went behind the desk and told me I would need to call back and reschedule. As someone who works in the healthcare field, I found the environment to be hostile and disorganized, which was concerning for a therapy setting.

I truly hope that if I decide to visit again, the experience will be more professional and welcoming, as that is especially important in a health environment.

I had a 9:15 a.m. appointment today. I was called at 9:17 a.m. and told it was canceled due to staffing issues—even though I had already driven 45 minutes to get there. I scheduled this appointment for a reason, and when I arrived the front desk staff didn’t seem to know what was going on. I was not even halfway through my IV treatment.

This was extremely inconvenient and unprofessional. Please let me know how this will be addressed and when I can be rescheduled.
Zero. I came for my appointment. Your office was closed. Three other women were there as well who had earlier appointments. Totally unprofessional. Very disappointing

I had a great experience during my visit with doctor Rohit Ramanath. He was very informative as well as the staff. I’ve been looking for that type of service for years and i was lucky to have stumbled upon it on social media. The icing on the cake is that, they expect most insurance! I highly recommend anyone to look into it and see which treatment fit you best. At the end of my consultation, i had scheduled appointments for two family members. Additionally, i will recommend more………

We had the pleasure of visiting Advanced and pain center for the last few months now  and was truly impressed by the exceptional service provided by the staff, especially Viva and Mariah. Viva went above and beyond to ensure I felt welcomed and attended to, her warm demeanor and attention to detail made my experience unforgettable and very knowledgeable of what she doing. Mariah was fantastic, offering friendly and efficient service. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking for top-notch service and a welcoming atmosphere!

vida-integrated-health-everett-everett.text: I saw Brent Duncan and he was great! He was thorough and explained everything well. He caters his treatments based on how you like to be adjusted which is very nice and considerate. I am looking forward to my next visit! Thank you!

My first visit there today was beyond expectation! A welcoming front staff, friendly MA’s and a Dr. that walked me through every procedure with either modeling or talking me through each step so I knew what to expect! Great positive vibe in the clinic! I’m so happy to have found a clinic that offers chiropractic care as well as massage, PT, acupuncture and more!

Dr. Duncan at the Everett location is phenomenal. After my first chiropractic appointment, I’m already feeling so much better. Adjustments are great, but I love that he also uses other alternative therapies like cupping & muscle work.

Dr. Duncan is fantastic! Super passionate, personable and shows genuine care for his patients. If you want someone to assess your needs each time and not just do the same routine adjustment each time, he’s your guy!
I had a massage with Lorena at Vida and it was amazing! She was so kind and professional, and really listened to what my body needed. I left feeling super relaxed and refreshed. Highly recommend her!

pure-infusion-suites-of-kirkland-kirklan.text: I love coming here! Wonderful staff and so caring and attentive to needs. Individual rooms with tv/Netflix, snacks, water, and an easy call button if you need a nurse. And it is so quiet, which really helps to keep you relaxed.

I didn't know infusions clinics could be so nice! My nurse was Dani and she was so sweet, so gentle, very knowledgeable. Everyone was extremely kind. The rooms are comfortable with TV and comfy recliners. I cannot say enough good things about my experience. I actually look forward to my next appointment!

I've been getting my infusions here for about 7 months now and always have a pleasant experience. Comfy chairs, yummy snacks and amazing staff. They make sure you are extra comfortable for the infusions and even guests are comfortable. I would definitely recommend this place over a hospital setting where I was previously getting infusions too!

Pure is such a great place, I'm leaving two reviews! From the friendly reception (Taylor) to the gentle kindness of my infusion nurse (Dani) and the comfort of a private room, recliner, TV, snacks and drinks... I could go on and on. Definitely the best infusion clinic I've been to and I've been to a lot in the past 15 years. I'm actually looking forward to my next infusion! -Lynne Keohi                         ...So I just had my second ocrevus infusion here at Pure. It's such a nice facility. I really can't say enough positive things about Pure and especially the wonderful ladies (Taylor and  Dani) that make it so easy, relaxing and "homey". I'm grateful for my experience at Pure. Many thanks to you all! -Lynne Keohi

I had an amazing experience here! From the first call and beginning of this process through my first appointment. Taylor was so nice and patient and walked me through all the steps to getting me set up and scheduled. It’s already stressful and hard enough to be dealing with a medical condition and have to get medical treatment. I’ve had so many bad experiences at other places where you can tell the staff is just there to get a paycheck. However, the staff at Pure Infusions made me feel welcome and at ease as soon as I walked in. The staff is so warm and attentive, they treat you with kindness and dignity. My nurse, Joanna, was the best. She made me feel I was her priority, heard, and so comfortable. She took the time to double check, get things ready, and explain everything she was doing, which created trust and made me feel at ease.
To top it all off, the place is so beautiful and relaxing. I got a private room, which I really appreciated for privacy and comfort, and had my own TV. I honestly forgot I was there to get treatment. The snacks and coffee station are great too!

I am sincerely grateful to the staff for making this scary and stressful experience a positive one.

Absolutely recommend this place!!!

templum-aesthetics-wellness-kirkland.text: I’ve been going to Pegi for years and I truly wouldn’t trust anyone else, she is incredibly knowledgeable. Her work is consistently natural and subtle, never have looked unnatural or overdone. She gives honest recommendations and genuinely cares about her clients. Skilled, trustworthy, and detail oriented, she’s THE best!!!!

I've been going to Templum Aesthetics for several years. Pegi Stewart is the best I've found and I won't go anywhere else. She always does a perfect job, she's caring, funny and does amazing work. You will not be disappointed! She has extensive knowledge, experience and a medical background as a PA. I've never had a bad experience, only good!

Pegi is a professional who takes initiative to tell you exactly what would be beneficial to you. It's so refreshing to be treated by such a talented person. Not to mention - her personality is second to none! Even though her business moved south, I travel to see her! Thank you for 5+ years of amazing treatments!

I have been seeing Pegi for almost 10 years and wouldn’t trust anyone else. She’s incredibly knowledgeable and always does a perfect job!

She’s also genuinely funny and makes every appointment a hoot — it feels more like catching up with a friend than a treatment.  Highly recommend!

Peggy is absolutely amazing at what she does! She’s incredibly personable and makes you feel comfortable throughout the entire appointment. You can tell she truly cares about her clients and takes pride in her work. The office is beautiful as well — such a welcoming and relaxing environment. I can’t recommend her enough!

longevity-medical-clinic-kirkland.text: Dr Dina Swenson is never listen and  she always do what she think when if  u ask her for an lab order she refuse till ur body get worse I don’t want to go in the totem lake anymore.

Looks like there are a couple of Google links and this is an older one.  The others have more 5 star reviews, so I wanted to leave mine on here to balance things out more. ;-)

I've been with Longevity for about 2 years.  Very glad I've done it.  Don't ever see it changing.

I really like the mindset of maximizing your health and approaching medicine by not just going along with the average instructions you get from your doctor (really the insurance company).  Think about it, the insurance company doesn't really want you to live very long do they?

I'm a biochemist and I am convinced this is just smart medicine.

I'm in my late 50's and frequently I am told that I look like I'm in my 40's.  I am physically fit, but not from the exercising that I should be doing but rather from this program and the common sense approach they have.  I do have to get back into excercising.

The question is, how healthy do you want to be in your 70's, 80's and 90's?  Going the standard route with your normal doctors? ... You can probably plan on sitting back in a chair, drooling while watching TV in a nursing home?  Good luck.

I had an exceptional experience at Longevity Medical Clinic. From the moment I stepped in I was warmly greeted by Dan and Frederick and the rest of the staff. I heard about Longevity through a friend and I wanted help with inflammation and pain I was experiencing. The doctors here are extremely knowledgeable and their holistic approach to wellness was refreshing. I appreciated that they emphasized natural remedies and lifestyle changes rather than just prescribing medications. They also have Bellamedica and I’ve gotten some treatments done as well. I love getting hydrafacials from their master aestheticians!

I ordered the Quick Start for the Optimal Relief System last week (Charge on card was 1/20) and received the package yesterday (1/24) The omega 3 gel cap was the largest pill I have ever seen.  I took one, it hurt my throat and I could feel it going all the way down!  I think they call that a "horse pill"!  I have taken vitamins all my long life so swallowing pills doesn't bother me.

I signed into the web site yesterday morning, it wouldn't accept my password.  I asked for a password recovery through my email but never received a response.  I called your phone number this morning twice and got hung up on!  Third time it went through. I explained the problem to the customer service person and she cancelled any further orders.  I would have liked another solution like the choice of a smaller capsule.  Oh well...

I appreciate Longevity because they're able to help with a lot of different symptoms and ailments. I feel comfortable taking medications when they test so often to monitor my results. They care and the staff is very welcoming.

axis-stem-cell-institute-kirkland.text:
I cannot speak highly enough about Bryn and the AXIS team. Bryn is an incredibly knowledgeable person who genuinely cares about the wellbeing of her patients. She has experience across so many different areas including stem cells, gut health, nutrition and long covid recovery and much more. She has helped me with a number of different issues over the past few years and I continue to see her regularly for my health and wellbeing maintenance. I have even introduced my son to her because I trust her that much. He is a student athlete and she is currently treating him for an ankle injury.

From the moment you walk in she has a way of making you feel understood, supported and completely at ease. She listens carefully and really tries to get to the bottom of whatever is going on. Every appointment feels calm and positive and you always walk out feeling like you are in good hands.

Kay at the front desk is also lovely. She is organised, warm and very welcoming. It all adds up to a very supportive and professional environment where you feel genuinely cared for.

I would absolutely recommend Bryn and the AXIS team. They are exceptional and I am very grateful to have found them.

Goldie L

Having stem cell therapy in my knees has made a major difference in my life. After trying to recover from a major inflammatory episode for months, I went to see Bryn. The treatment began to work within a couple weeks. After 3 months of continuous improvement I feel great. Thank you Bryn!

Absolutely amazing!!! The staff here truly understand what their doing & how to make a patient feel welcome. I had an extremely bad lower lumbar issue that has been resolved by only one injection. 100% improvement from what looked like a very painful future. Thank you soooo much to everyone involved with Axis & your support through this. I have my life back.

I cannot say enough good things about the Axis team. They were extremely welcoming, and Bryn was very knowledgeable on any questions I had about the process. I got treated for a significant torn quad muscle using a combo of peptides and stem cells, and I have made great progress towards getting back to the activities I love. I had 3 different orthopedic surgeons tell me there was nothing I could do, that they would not operate on me, and that I just need to leave it alone. Alternative medicine is my first stop at this point for any health issues.

What sets Axis aside from the multitude of doctors I have visited is their effort beyond the procedure to show that you aren't just a number to them. Bryn's willingness to answer questions and concerns through a quick text or email whenever one popped into my head, and her effort to quickly respond with thoughtful answers truly made me feel like she cared about my health and wellbeing, and was invested in the results of my procedure. Any doctor can poke you with needles and send you on your way. Very few healthcare providers take that extra step to prove you're not just a dollar sign to them.

If I won the lottery tomorrow, Axis would be my first stop and I'd order one of everything off the menu for every friend and family member.

I came to Axis with two major problems.  I have an SCI (incomplete) and am paralyzed from my chest down. I  have been working on recovery for 16 years and can take steps with a walker.  I also have a torn right rotator cuff, which has severely affected my abilities to due daily tasks.  After much research on stem cell therapy I contacted Axis Institute in Kirkland.  Bryn was very patient with my concerns, answered all of my questions, and sent many case studies at my request. I noticed there weren't many studies or testimonials regarding SCI problems.
After a lot of deliberation and knowing I didn't want to do surgery on the shoulder and be further compromised, I decided to try the stem cell therapy.  I went in February, 2025 for two injections, one for my shoulder and one for my spinal cord. I decided to give the stem cell therapy a try on my spinal cord. I'm happy and relieved to say both produced improvements!
My right shoulder is now 95% pain free and still getting better.  I feel strength returning, allowing me to perform daily tasks without thinking:  dressing, transferring out of the wheelchair, computer work, lifting a book to read, etc.
Even more exciting was the change neurologically.  Within an hour after the injection of umbilical stem cells below my spine my whole body was trembling, shivering. The nervous system was definitely responding. The shaking lasted for 6 hours or so.  Three days after the injection I took a shower and felt the warmth of the water from my chest to below my stomach - the first time I have felt heat/cold in 16 years!!  A week later the warmth was felt down to my left ankle and down to the right knee.  Unbelievable!!  Two months after the injection I could feel wetness (sweating) on the bottoms of both feet.  My muscles/leg strength has improved and thus my steps when stepping with a walker are stronger and more confidant.
For any one who has a spinal cord injury, I think I can say you would like to feel and see improvement. Any improvement is hope. I firmly believe the stem cell therapy helped me and I would highly recommend calling Axis Stem Cell Therapy and talking to Bryn. I risked giving it a try and I am now a believer.  The stem cells definitely changed/stimulated my peripheral nerves  and causing improvement.

ocean-beach-health-ilwaco-clinic-ilwaco.text: Thank you so much to the walk in clinic for excellent care.  No one likes to get sick while on vacation but I couldn’t have chosen a better place for care.  From check in to my visit with the provider the staff were kind, caring and thorough.  The wait time was reasonable.

My wife was taken by paramedics at 5:30am to OP ER, w/ a STROKE. She was unable to feel her left leg. An ambulance to transport her to Kaiser/Sunnyside/Clackamas arrived at 3:30PM. It took 3 more hours to arrive at the Stroke Care Unit just south of Portland. By that time she had no feeling in her left arm. That's 13 hours after being picked up at our house until arriving at her final destination! Absolute shock! The paramedics would not take her to CMH, which has a better ER, only 10 mins. further away! That's 13 hours for some body with a STROKE to get seen by someone who has a clue! She could have died at OP and luckily she did not. However, the people there were friendly but seemingly lacking any experience. I should have driven my wife to CMH myself.

I made an appointment to establish as a new patient in January, and the first available appointment was June 29. I called today to reschedule, a full two weeks in advance, because I'll be attending my father's funeral that day.
The first appointment offered me was September 1st.
This is unacceptable. Waiting 9 months for medical care is too long. I do understand that this is a busy office, but at some point I do feel that they could try a little harder to make things work for situations such as this, where there are obvious, extenuating circumstances.
Definitely feels like they don't want me as a patient.

I had a seizure in March 2024, got taken to Ilwaco for it informing them of a impact on a single point on my chest with 300 lbs. They didnt check anything. Just wanted a COVID test and Vac. I wound up in a different ER 2 weeks later for the chest injury. I will not use this Hospital if at all possible. They are incapable, would not even call them DOCTORS!!!!

As someone else said. They have no clue what they are doing. But, they will take your money. Gerald Weaver is one of those guys that can do a colon and endoscopy. Act like he can help you. Prescribe horse pills that you can't swallow for a month or two. Then say he does not know what is wrong but come back in a few months, basically so he can get paid. Then when you find a doctor that knows what they are doing. Then tells you, you have esophagitus years later. You realize that looking up doctors reviews like Weaver's. You find he has lied about diagnoses, like mine and other peoples on paper. Along with leaving paitents with serious conditions untreated. On top of only being a surgeon and acting like he is a professional and can help you. Plus, he might send you a extra bill to possibly pay in cash unless you clarify it before it goes to collections. Even though the bill was fully paid by your health insurance. Thanks for all the prolonged pain and suffering! This place is a joke!

ocean-beach-health-ilwaco.text: I saw Dr. Williamson this morning for a med refill appointment. My appointment time was 10:00. The awesome RN put me in a room a bit early, took vitals, let me know that the doctor would be right in. It was 10:45 when the doctor came in and turned the appointment into a mini physical. What should have been a 15 minute appointment turned into an almost 90 minute appointment. I appreciate her being thorough but also felt that she was totally disrespectful of my time. If she was 45 minutes late entering the room she should have expedited my med refill. I'm a retired RN with 25 years experience in public health, primary care clinics and corrections health.

Did physical therapy! Was clean well kept place. Staff is very welcoming and helpful. Russell Robertson was an EXCELLENT physical therapists! Russell  would do the exercises right along with me and made it a fun and enjoyable! Even thought he was a traveling PT he was involved in the community. He would verbally share community events. That Russell felt was in the rage of interest of the patient.over all had a great experience with PT.
Russell Robertson truly loves his job and all of his patients. With his warm hearted, kind,and friendly demeanor. Would highly recommend.

Went to Ocean Beach Hospital ER and then admitted to the hospital for a few days. The entire staff from the Admissions, Doctors, Nurses, Housekeeping - literally everyone that I came into contact with was extremely friendly and caring.  I did not feel like I was just another patient like you might at some other hospitals.  All of the medical staff spent time with me and I never felt like I was rushed or dismissed and I felt like any of my concerns were listened to and that I was involved in my treatment.  I cannot say enough about how I felt like I was truly cared for from everyone.

Had serious pneumonia near intubation. The ER nurse Anna, and Dr Derry took excellent care of me great bedside manor. Moved to a patient room for 5 days. ALL the nursing staff
Amy, Kristine, Sara, and Samantha where excellent and could not have been more helpful in my treatments and recovery all under the direction of Dr Fabiano.
The food was great for hospital food. I liked the toast with jam hashbrown and sausage.  Meatloaf mashed potatoes and gravy not bad either.
100% recommend this hospital as a Retired Flight Medic.

In May 2024 I had a walk-in clinic visit. As a travelling Canadian I had an infected tooth and needed some antibiotics to get me home. The ladies at the desk were lovely although a little confused because I was a Canadian and they couldn’t figure out how to get me in the system. At the time, I was clear I had no Medicare or any insurance to be billed. It wasn’t a problem and I was able to see the Dr quite quickly and got my script sent to a local drugstore. I paid my invoice in full with my credit card and off I went. I was super pleased with the entire experience. Fast forward to February of 2025 when I received an invoice in the mail, dated January 30/2025, for an extra $48.00 US dollars. No explanation or anything - just a “your responsibility”. “THIS IS A BILL”  in capital letters. I called and explained that I paid the full invoice I was given at the time. The customer service gentleman kept telling me I owed the money and I kept saying I paid what you presented me. “You can’t re-invoice me a new amount 8 months later”. Finally he told me he would take it to the manager. Guess what.. today I received another invoice… I would like it if the manager who thinks I owe this money would like to give me a call and explain it to me. Until then - you are a bunch of shysters. If your team billed me incorrectly in May, that is your problem, not mine.

naturomedica-issaquah.text:
Today I had an appointment at Naturo Medica.. I highly recommend Dr Wada. She spent time with me going over my blood work and setting a plan. She is great at making you feel at ease. You walk away feeling excited to work on your goals. Front desk people are great too.
Great business and great care everyone.

Hereby nominate Dr Jhaveri for sainthood. Incredibly knowledgeable, patient and always pointing to data as the source of truth.

Never have I once felt the frustration with Dr Jhaveri that I have in the past with other doctors. Give her a raise and then give her another one.

I brought my 87 yr old mom in to see my doctor-.Dr.Free. She was incredible. She spent 2 hours with my mom 1:1 and exceeded my expectations. She was caring and listened to everything my mom said. My mom adored her. I highly recommend Dr. Kimberly Free.

We highly recommend Naturomedica for a holistic approach too getting well.  10 years ago Dr. Bryant successfully helped our daughter with allergies and skin with fantastic results.  Now it's moms turn and the consultations, diagnosis and treatment plans are clear steps to a healthier life.  Staff is responsive and helpful, including working with your insurance.  You feel supported all along the way to getting better.  Our family is here to stay.

Extremely shocked at the lack of communication. I called with some symptoms, was told the Dr would like to have a brief phone call.
I Was not told there would be a $140 charge for this 5 minute phone call.
This is absolutely something that should be told to clients before they agree to a phone call.

When I called to discuss this with the receptionist she had a bit of attitude and told me if you talk to a Dr you should plan on paying.

How about you communicate this with your clients before hand instead of assuming people will know this.

Won’t be coming back.

elevated-natural-health-seattle.text:
I have been seeing Dr. Jessica Corbeille-Harris every other week for over 6 years for IV Ozone Therapy. During that time she has proven to be a knowledgeable, compassionate naturopathic health care provider with a special gift I like to call "Healing from the Heart". I remember two separate times she lowered my systolic blood preasure by 40 points with a gentle noninvasive technique called Cranial Sacral Therapy. She just has that magical healing touch. She has also been an awesome guide for me on my never ending quest to improve my metabolic health.
Thank you so much Dr. Corbeille for your continued support of my journey to Elevated Natural Health!!

I always look forward to my appointments with Dr. Jessica. Her care and skills have helped me more than I can say. I visit her for neural therapy and prolozone joint injections, which have not only reduced my pain and increased my mobility (I have arthritis and lyme diease), but eliminated my edema, long-Covid symptoms, and support my mental and emotional well-being in a way that no other therapy has.
Dr. Jessica is so kind, supportive and dedicated to her patients, and I feel beyond grateful and lucky to have her as part of my healthcare team.

Dr. Timmer has been very helpful with starting hormone pellet implants. My experience is that roughly every 4 months I drop by to get another implant after the previous one dissolves (10 minutes max, straightforward and painless), have a follow-up lab to check hormone levels after 4 weeks, with another follow-up implant if the levels are too low. And her experience and knowledge shows when reviewing lab results and discussing which nutrients / hormones are too high/low and how to address it.

Our family has been working with Dr. Corbeille and Dr. Timmer for several years. Besides being excellent doctors we've found them to be the best we've ever had. They both have an excellent bedside manner and are easy to talk to, and you can tell they really care about their patients. They are very knowledgeable about many different issues and have been instrumental in keeping all of us healthy. They've been even more valuable helping us deal with some serious health problems. We can't recommend these doctors enough!

I have been seeing Dr McKenzie Timmer now forover 4 years, I'm not the easiest patient because I have a lot of serious health issues that under the care and support from her I've been able to keep things in check plus a lot of Health Improvement not just for me but also my daughter who also suffers from some serious health issues that unfortunately most western Medics don't even know what to do with us. So I'm so grateful we found her oh, she's always willing to listen, come up with great Solutions that support our body getting into balance and healthy. I highly recommend her or her partner.  So glad we found her

in-light-hyperbarics-llc-vancouver.text: It’s not often you come across something that changes your life, but today was such a welcomed surprise.  I went into In-Light unsure of what to expect, and I left that building a new woman. There are so many treatment options and Cait walked me through everything helping me choose the right treatments for me. The oxygen chamber was so cool!  It was surprisingly comfortable and got my body ready to do some healing!  Red light therapy is something I wasn’t really familiar with, but after a detailed explanation of the befits of it I was all in!  Now my plan is to be back every week!  The TRT treatment is life-changing.  I went from constant knee pain all day everyday, to feeling like I had brand new baby knees!  I have never been more excited about any treatment in my life!  I can’t wait to get back in there and see what wonders it can do with my hips!  Edna walked me through everything and explained what she was doing every step of the treatment and exactly how it worked.  I was elated by the time I left!  Everyone at In Light is amazing and I can’t wait to go back.

The symptoms from an automobile accident left me in excruciating pain, unable to stand or sit for any period of time. I was restricted to laying on the floor or in bed for 15-20hrs a day.
Then I met the wonderful team at InLight Hyperbarics !!!
Hyperbaric Oxygen and Red Light therapy got me feeling alive once again. TRT reduced the compression and nerve pain, ultimately promoting my body’s natural ability to heal itself.
I was up against 3.5 years of repeated flare ups that left the muscles on the right side of body atrophied. The BTL Neo Emsculpt and Emsella therapies were crucial in strengthening my abs, obliques, pelvic floor, glutes and quads when traditional therapies led to compensatory injuries. The BTL ExoMind therapy promoted a calming and relaxing mental state that reduced stress, perceived pain and anxiety.
If you are searching for alternative treatments and self healing modalities, you are in the best of hands at InLight Hyperbarics. From physical, mental and emotional impairments, to dare I say, spiritual enlightenment. The thoughtful and caring team of angelic healers at InLight are there for you !!
I’ve made life long connections with other’s searching for answers and relief that are not found in traditional medicine.
Thanks Again Team InLight !!!

Met with Caitlin, super friendly, easy to talk with, she explained everything in length, answered my questions.  Loved my first treatment, 14 more to go. I may become a lifetime member.
I would highly recommend this place if you are looking for a way to up your wellness game, heal from an illness or surgery (like me), or getting ready for surgery.

Esther was an excellent provider today! The explanation of how the Shockwave machine worked and the communication during the entire procedure made the visit easy and straightforward in regards to what to expect through out the entire treatment.

I went in for HBOT and could not have asked for a better experience. Staff was so warm and Caitlin took all the time I needed talking with me like a friend beforehand. They really know what they are doing here.

therapeutic-health-services-snohomisheve.text:
I was a patient at THS in everett and shoreline for many years on and off and the the staff at the front desks, we're always courteous, never judgmental. We're always very, very helpful. My counselors at both locations were the best. I've ever had, and I've had lots and lots over the years, and I received mental healthcare as well as methadone as well as treatment/
Counseling for my heroin addiction. I think it's awesome that they take care of both of those things at once. Because you can't have both of those issues and only work on one of them because it wont-work. And my life improved tenfold, while I was there. I can safely say that they saved my life on more than one occasion.
So I say three snaps up in a z formation.Heeeey! Someone out there will get that reference lol.

Therapeutic Health Services was court-ordered to evaluate and treat an individual with a documented history of violence. Despite being provided comprehensive evidence that this client was actively continuing to assault women and children, their official report to the court stated that no treatment protocol modifications were necessary. This is not merely negligent; it is unconscionable.
THS took zero responsibility for their client's ongoing violent behavior and demonstrated zero concern that their "treatment" was clearly ineffective, given the continued pattern of assault. They failed to complete the court order as directed, instead providing a rubber-stamp approval that endangered vulnerable victims.
This organization has demonstrated profound incompetence in addressing domestic violence behaviors, narcissistic personality traits, deceptive manipulation tactics, and complex mental health diagnoses. This is unsurprising given that THS operates primarily as a methadone clinic; they have neither the expertise nor the infrastructure to treat significantly mentally ill individuals with violent histories.
Their business model appears centered on collecting payment for sessions while allowing dangerous individuals to construct self-serving narratives without meaningful clinical intervention or accountability. They then sign off on official documents claiming there are no issues, effectively providing dangerous offenders with institutional validation to continue their abuse.
THS is complicit in perpetuating cycles of violence by failing to properly assess, treat, or report ongoing dangerous behavior. Their inadequate protocols allow violent individuals to remain threats to their communities. Families and courts relying on THS assessments are being given false assurances about public safety. This organization should not be entrusted with evaluating or treating individuals with complex mental illness, especially with violent tendencies.

It I could give no stars I would. I have been clean for over two years with clean UAs, I switched jobs and accidentally came in a day early, they took my weekly carries away, and my weekend carries!, telling me that they won’t dose me on Sunday. They say they care about your recovery don’t believe the lies. I have severe medical problems, and them telling me to just not dose for a day almost landed me in the hospital. I have a job I’m supposed to be at by 5 am everyday but the clinic doesn’t open until 5:30 yet they require you to have a job to get carries, what an absolute joke!!!

Started Going To The 🫗Methadone Clinic At ⬛️🟪⬛️THS In EVerett WA Around The End Of October Of 2020 and Stopped Attending Last Year Around September Of 2024, I’d Have To Say I Had A Good Experience Going There, They Fulfilled All My Needs That I Needed To Be Clean And Sober💊🧬🧪, It Took Me About A Month Or Three To Get Adjusted And To Be On The Right Dose That Was Working For Me, One Of The Biggest Reasons I Stopped Attending The Methadone Clinic🫗 Was Because It Was Ruining And Eating My Teeth 🦷Away Badly And Fast, After Doing My Own Research👨🏽‍💻On The Effects And Possible Negative Sides Of Using Methadone I Quit!!! If you're a Medicare patient or expect to be billed in a timely manner, forget about it.
It took them a full year to tell me that the provider I was working with wasn't credentialed to see me and I had to start over with someone else at the Seneca branch.
I've tried to get the billing department to work with me but they never call back. I had to wait 3 days for someone to call me back just to pay my copay. And even then he didn't apply it to my copay, but my owing balance even though I said it was specifically for my copay for services in January of 2025.
They won't even tell you that you owe a bill for the whole year until right before Christmas and state that it's "seriously over due" even though it was the first invoice I ever received. You can't do that to people on a fixed income. And right before Christmas? That's diabolical.
I was told to wait to pay my bill because they were going to see what they can do about it. They never call you back and when you do finally get a hold of the person you were speaking to, she doesn't remember you or remember telling you to hold off, and kept pestering me to pay my bill, making me feel like that conversation never happened. It's easy to take advantage of the mentally ill with that.
How can a business with multiple offices not have a central and online billing system?
At least the therapist I saw for a year before I got cut off was excellent. I wish I could continue to see her but I can't.
I cannot recommend this place.

gl-aesthetics-wellness-battle-ground.text:
I have been coming to see Jess @Glo Aesthetics + Wellness since March of to 2025. It all started because I wanted to treat myself for my birthday. I have been coming to see her every month since then. This year I turned 31 and, I knew that I had to start now or I would never start taking care of my skin. I will add picture of my before and where I am at currently so you can see the difference for yourself. The biggest change that I have noticed has been, my redness has basically gone away. I do not feel the need to use so much makeup, because I feel like I do not have “anything” to hide. The first treatment I received was an acne facial, and from then on I have been getting them once a month. It’s been recommended by Jess I try other facials. I have tried the following, Lumecca IPL photofacial, gunk be gone, and signature Hydrafacial.
I have also been recommend a skincare regimen.  Here’s a list of products I have gotten; Trio rebalancing moisture treatment, AlphaRet clearing serum, balancing cleansing emulsion, Sunforgettable total protection color balm SPF 50 Bronze, Sunforgettable total protection color balm SPF 50 blush, daily power defense.  The pictures don’t lie check out Jess and Megan @Glo Aesthetic + Wellness.

Jess and Megan are amazing!! I am so happy with my results but so sad I don’t have an excuse to come back.
They focus on all the right things to help you be successful and find confidence in yourself.
5 stars isn’t enough 😊

Meghan is the absolute best! I came to her 6 months before my wedding with my skin concerns, and she suggested Morpheus 8. I did 3 treatments, hardly any pain and it made my skin so glowy and lifted. After my last treatment, I got Botox and some filler for facial balancing and I’m so happy with it. I’m ready for my wedding!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I always have an incredible experience at Glo Aesthetics and Wellness for my Botox and micro-needling treatments! The staff is exceptionally knowledgeable and provided thorough explanations of each procedure, ensuring I felt comfortable and informed. The customer service is top-notch – everyone is always welcoming and attentive. The atmosphere of the space is beautiful and calming, making it the perfect environment for relaxation and self-care. I highly recommend Glo Aesthetics and Wellness to anyone looking for professional and friendly service in a lovely setting! Megan is amazing and her passion is evident in her results and within the space itself. I cannot recommend this place enough!!

Megan is SO great, and everyone I’ve met at Glō so far is so nice.  I’ve had a few treatments done so far and really feel like Megan knows what she’s doing! May favorite thing thus far though, had been my ears.  I was self conscious about how wrinkly and weird they looked. During my Morpheus, I asked Megan if she could go over my ears (after working up the courage bc I felt sort of silly).  She told me just a little filler would fix my ears.  I am SO HAPPY WITH THE RESULTS!!  This was totally unplanned and I couldn’t have predicted how excited I am to have less crinkly ears!!!

The massage chairs and eye massager are not your average massager, they're head to toe therapeutic and a really nice perk with the monthly membership which makes the whole visit feel extra relaxing. Don't sleep on this place! Highly recommend if you’re looking for something convenient, comfortable and restorative.

It is clear this is his passion. His concern was my health and what brought me in. I can’t recommend this place enough. They are amazing. I felt at home and cared for. ♥️

All the staff were so friendly and helpful! Would highly recommend if your energy is feeling low during this season. Feeling so much better because of it!

We felt very relaxed and throughly enjoyed the experience and looking forward to enjoying many more sessions to come with this clinic and staff.

I'm not great with needles but Scott made me feel comfortable and well-informed about what to expect throughout the process. 10/10 would recommend. I'll definitely be back!

If you’re searching for a top-rated medspa in Vancouver, WA offering hormone optimization, advanced skincare, facials, and outstanding customer service, I highly recommend Ageless Beauty Rx. This team genuinely cares about your results and your overall well-being.

cohesive-therapy-healing-rejuvenation-ce.text:

Update: March 3,2026

Eva Venegas provided excellent treatment today. I saw her for my 6th treatment of lymphatic massage after my having a tummy tuck 360 with lipo and fat transfer treatment 3.5 weeks ago. I came to the appointment unable to get into a car without significant troubles, unable to raise my knees very high or put on my own under garments and leggings without assistance. After today’s treatment I was able to full dress myself, get into a car normally without discomfort and able to raise my knees up. Eva’s treatment today also provided relief for my tight stomach due to inflammation. So thank you!

Gepina’s Lymphatic Massage treatment at Cohesive Therapy truly is the key to a more speedy recovery. I highly recommend visiting them if you have an upcoming procedure or you are looking for an overall reset for health. They have a variety of journey’s that will fit your needs. Bonus- they take HSA! For example, part of treating my shoulder was to treat my side and a couple of points in my abdomen. She has a lot to offer and has a passion for helping people out of pain. Olivia has scheduled all my appointments and is professional and friendly. Highly recommend!

I spent close to 3 years researching skin damage, swelling, and inflammation from an overly aggressive CO2 laser and subscission procedure that damaged my epidermis and underlying skin. Over 2 years seeing different doctors and dermatologists who couldn’t help me beyond prescriptions or suggesting vbeam to reduce rosacea. This summer I started researching the lymphatic system and found we had was a specialist in town. I met with Gepina and she understood what was causing the chronic skin inflammation, redness, swelling, sensitivity to heat, and new scarring. These unique treatments have dramatically reduced swelling and inflammation, even the rosacea, and sensitivity to heat I didn’t think was possible for how long I had it. I highly recommend Cohesive Therapy and the lymphatic treatments work wonders.

peak-performance-prevention-puyallup.text:

For years now like over ten I’ve struggled with lower back pain, 5 years ago i injured my knee and went through physical training to get it working again but it had less movement than before and would feel swollen when it was cold out.  My wife had been going to Seth to work on her frozen shoulder and is doing great so she said that I should go see him.  On my first visit after working on my legs stretching ect I told him about my knee so he worked on that leg as he used a message tool it felt like my muscle was in a ball then finally smoothed out. After he was done he helped me up and asked how I felt and I told him that’s the best I have felt in over a decade even from that first visit my lower back felt better. I’m no BS Seth gave me back my life he is a must go see,  It’s kinda funny in a way I guess I just accepted the fact I was getting older and how I felt before was what it was but now I feel wonderful and still getting used to not having pain every time I knee down or bend down to pick something up.

Gratitude to Bill. 🙏🙏🙏

I’ve lost over 20 pounds and I absolutely credit Angelina for that and continue to plan to see her!

natural-life-medicine-puyallup.text: Found this place in the peak of covid and absolutely loved that they were not following the ridiculous mandates. Have been bringing my daughter here ever since. They really treat us like we know our bodies best and listen to what we have to say, which I whole heartedly appreciate. Acupuncture was great as well for the couple visits I did. All around a great experience every time we do visit!

Dr. Reachel is very good at her job . She listens with a sense of urgency . I
Also like that she asks me plenty of questions concerning my health . It’s also a very peaceful and professional office environment

Dr. Riecan works very hard to heal with a natural touch and a kind heart. Dr. Graklanoff does an excellent job with acupuncture. After only one visit i can tell that this will work for me.
After many years of feeling so so with a general practitioner, i truly feel that I am finally on the right track for my body.
If you are looking for true health care with a natural kind touch, I strongly recommend Natural Life Medicine.

I have nothing but positive things to say about Natural Life Medicine! Switched my entire family over. Dr.Thompson is phenomenal, I never feel rushed out, she listens, and truly cares about her patients. Dr.Graklanoff works wonders with acupuncture. Highly recommended trying this place out.

I needed to get a new naturoparh doctor when mine left the state. I've been very happy to have found Natural Life Medicine and Dr. Rachel Iacobazzi-Riecan. I had been suffering from migraines for four months. I had tried many different treatments with no relief, but have had marked improvement with Dr. Rachel's treatments, including Craniosacral therapy.

The office has a very soothing atmosphere and all the staff I've interacted with have been extremely helpful and kind.

olalla-recovery-centers-olalla-guest-lod.text: Olalla was a life changing experience and gave me the tools I needed to get and stay sober. Kevin, my counselor, is an amazing and compassionate person who guided me through the recovery process. The Olalla staff are kind and patient and were always willing to give me the help I absolutely needed. The treatment center is located on was  a hilltop forest overlooking Puget Sound, which is incredibly beautiful and the perfect environment for recovery. Walking the trail surrounding the property every morning was awesome. The food is wonderful and there is lots of it. I would recommend this treatment center to anyone who is serious about getting sober!!

I was at Ollala back in March of 2024 for a 28 days inpatient stay. It was the best decision of my life., and credit this experience and all I learned about addiction and myself for my continued sobriety today.The entire experience here at Ollala was incredible. The staff and counselors are so accepting and compassionate, they truly make you feel important. I would recommend Ollala Recovery Centers to anyone!!

The food was Horrible.  A lot of what you ate was left overs from the night before. I ate the vending machine food. And the salads. The place is very haunted . Many people experienced paranormal happening. We smudged both the girls cabin and the guys cabin. I left after a week because I liked nothing about the place. I didn't leave because of the paranormal stuff. It wasn't the right place for me.  I did hear the Rekhi experiences people had were very good.

I went to the visitors class and thought they did a good job of explaining addictive behaviors and a little of the brain science behind it without it being overwhelming. I recommend it to anyone, whether they've already had experience with loved ones in recovery or not. We are always learning new things about the brain and modalities to help us deal with it. The counselor was great and made me feel welcome.

An excellent facility with amazing caring staff your not just a number  or a patient your a guest!!
Amazing treatment alternatives that will guide you on your journey.
A secluded facility with  breathe taking views

living-medical-arts-friday-harbor.text: Dr. Gulla is extremely skilled and knowledgeable in complex medical conditions.  I am so grateful for her - she has helped me immensely with my patients.  She is dedicated to getting to the root cause of illness.  You will be in great hands as her patient!
