I recently needed to see Dr. Gulla in sort of an urgent manner and her office was able to fit me in on short notice. A quick visit  was made wherein she provided me with a supplemental protocol that expedited the duration and symptoms of my illness. I am happily healing right up. I appreciate that she has checked in to monitor my progress and has sent encouraging messages to keep me healthy through winter and beyond. Many thanks!

I have been working with Dr. Gulla for a few months now. She is incredibly knowledgeable about supplements, about the body, about nutrition… A variable encyclopedia of health and well-being.

I have been particularly working with Dr G to heal some issues with old injuries. The bodywork and remedies, adjustments and exercise suggestions have been extremely helpful in the healing process. Her ability To connect the dots and find all of the supporting issues that connect to the injuries,  have been seminal  in the relief of symptoms. Very grateful for the help and healing.

Dr. Gulla truly helped me get my life back. I had never felt truly heard by a doctor until I met her. I was in the thick of postpartum, and she was there for me every step of the way. I highly recommend Dr. Gulla to anyone looking for a doctor who listens, supports, and genuinely cares about healing.

Dr Gulla is one of the best doctors I’ve ever met.  Her level of attention to detail, exceptional knowledge, deep compassion, and tenacity for finding the root causes of her patient’s health challenges is a rare find in today’s world of healthcare.   Choosing to work with her is choosing to achieve true healing.  I am beyond grateful that she has chosen to serve our island community.

vitality-seattle.text: I love my appointments at Vitality Queen Anne.  I regularly see Stephanie who is very knowledgeable about skincare, she keeps my 60+ year old skin looking bright and hydrated.  I've been going there for a few years now so have pretty much seen everyone, they are all so welcoming and good at what they do.  I trust them all with my skin.  This is one of the things I consistently spend a good amount of money on and for a good reason. BUT at VQA there are several ways to save...join the face club and the twice per year skin events.  Highly recommend coming here!

From day one, I’ve felt completely taken care of. Every time I walk through the door, I’m greeted with genuine warmth. Jess took the time to go through my skincare routine, offering helpful education, personalized recommendations, and generous samples to try. Emily turned a stressful day into pure relaxation with a fantastic HydraFacial and the best arm and hand massage on the planet. Amanda did an AMAZING job with a color match for lip blushing and was incredibly supportive throughout the healing process. Don’t sleep on booking an appointment with this team, they’re truly the best.

I recently visited Vitality for a hydra facial treatment, and I can confidently say it was an exceptional experience! From the moment I walked in, the staff was incredibly friendly and welcoming. They made me feel comfortable right away, explaining the process and answering all my questions with patience and professionalism.

The hydra facial itself was absolutely amazing. My skin felt refreshed, rejuvenated, and glowing by the end of the session. The staff's attention to detail and genuine care for my comfort truly stood out. It’s rare to find a team that is both so skilled and so kind.

10/10 first experience at Vitality Med Spa! From the moment I checked in, the front desk gal was so sweet & friendly and offered me a beverage of my choice before my facial! Steph my esthetician took me back into such a beautiful and tranquil room, so clean and you can truly tell they take pride in their work place! My facial was amazing. Steph was so educated, walked me through my treatment, took her time and you can really see her passion for what she does! If you are looking for a great med spa in the Seattle area, you must check out the Vitality Med Spa in Queen Anne! The girls are wonderful and I’ll be back!

Vitality is the best med spa in Seattle. Their team of estheticians and injectors are not only skilled, but incredibly kind. I have a membership and go for monthly Hydrafacials and chemical peels and co-owner Jess and I always have the best conversations. It’s the highlight of my month to come see these girls. Thanks for keeping my skin young

siren-curves-body-sculpting-federal-way.text:
Siren Curves is absolutely amazing! From the moment you walk in, everyone is so welcoming and personable. The experience is great from the front desk all the way to the technicians, and they truly make you feel comfortable and taken care of.

I had the pleasure of working with Chionne and BreAna, and honestly they were both incredible. They were so friendly, professional, and easy to talk to. They explained everything really well, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt comfortable the entire time.

You can really tell they care about their clients and want you to have a great experience. I felt so welcomed and relaxed during my visit. I can’t wait to come back! Highly recommend Siren Curves to anyone considering their services. ✨

I went to Siren Curves for their fall event and it was such a wonderful experience! Parking was easy, and they really went above and beyond with the details, snacks, drinks, and even permanent jewelry. After checking in, we changed into robes and filled out paperwork, then started with the sauna. The staff brought cold towels, water, and essential oils, which made it extra refreshing. From there, we moved into the salt therapy room, where we enjoyed an amazing charcuterie board and drinks. The music set the perfect, calming vibe throughout.

The whole place was spotless and well-kept, and the staff were so kind and attentive. My husband got a vitamin injection (he recently had surgery), and they even let him rest in a quiet room while I did my chin sculpting treatment. I really appreciated the thoughtfulness and care.

Highly recommend Siren Curves if you're looking for a relaxing, well-rounded spa experience!

I’m beyond pleased and grateful that siren curves body sculpting in federal way exists as it has changed my life completely!!! The staff is beyond amazing super friendly and sweet. The place itself is a whole vibe super clean! I first tried their IV therapy and slowly got into their other services. When you do your IV therapy staff is literally so sweet they’ll offer snacks and drinks and even blankets so you can be super comfortable during your visit. One thing that I’ve been sticking to that has changed my life is the skinny lipo shot. I do the sea spritz package which is honestly such an amazing deal for me as that package offers other shots and services as well like 1 visit to the sauna room which I love and salt room. I do this shot once every week with Sam who is amazing and have lost so much weight by putting in the work as it is not magic but definitely a huge help and boost! What I love about this shot is that you can stop whenever you’ve reached your goals, it is all natural, has helped boost my energy and mood as well as calmed down all those crazy cravings I used to have. This shot doesn’t cause any headaches which is a huge factor for me as I used to deal a lot with migraines.This shot with the combination of eating cleaner and drinking more water has truly been life changing for me and am grateful to see the results within my consistency of this skinny lipo shot. Remember ladies to see results you got to put in the work but this shot does indeed work!

today i came in for my lip filler appointment with sam! she was very observant with my lips, and noticed that the previous injector i had gone to, made them a little uneven. we discussed what the goal would be during this appointment and a future appointment, and she was very knowledgeable. she made sure I was comfortable the entire time and I am very happy with my results. she went over the aftercare and was happy to answer any questions I had. this is my 3rd time getting lip filler, but my first experience with sam and let me just say, she did everything what my previous injector lacked. thank you again! i will definitely be going back to her soon!! :)

Siren Curves is truly amazing!

Sam is incredible — she does my mom’s belly burner sessions and her glutathione IVs every week, and my mom started noticing a real difference in her skin tone within just the first two weeks. We recently got our lip fillers done with Sam as well, and they turned out exactly how we wanted. She listens, understands the look you’re going for, and delivers perfectly.

Teri is also so sweet and welcoming! She always offers us snacks and drinks when we arrive, and she makes sure all our weekly appointments are scheduled ahead of time. Her customer service is top-tier — she’s really on top of everything and makes the whole experience smooth and comfortable.

Siren Curves is definitely a place we trust for all our aesthetic needs. Highly recommend! 💕👌

simply-health-dp3-federal-way.text:
I tried physical therapy and even chiropractic treatment, but I truly believe I’ve had better results with acupuncture.
From the very beginning, the customer service felt welcoming and family like, which made the experience even better.
Dr Tam is extremely professional and knowledgeable, and you barely feel the needles — even during pressure point injections.
I’ve had significant improvement in my back pain and highly recommend this clinic.

We had a wonderful experience with Dr. Bui for our I-693. She is very professional and takes the time to explain each step in a clear and easy-to-understand way. The service was incredibly fast, also both Dr. Bui and her staff were kind and pleasant to work with. I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for a civil surgeon for immigration purposes.

Every Thanksgiving, I want to thank those in my life who deserve my gratitude. But this year is different, because I want to thank Dr. Bui. Before meeting Dr. Bui, I accidentally injured my hand at work. It was a workplace accident, so the Department of Labor recommended different doctors, and I saw five in total. Including highly respected surgeon Dr Trumble from Bellevue, who even performed surgery and followed physical therapy, then, manipulation, and injection of steroids, but none of the treatments were successful. And L& I started talking about settle the case with me. After more than three years passed, and my hand still hadn't improved. As time went on, the pain gradually affected my mood and daily life, and I almost gave up hope of treatment. Before I went along with the settlement, I asked L & I for 2nd opinion, and they agreed. I found Dr Robon in Bellevue for 2nd opinions , and he gave a steroid injection twice same as Dr Trumble did. Well, still no results from the treatments. So, I decided to consult a lawyer, hoping to find other solutions. Unexpectedly, after 1st visit, my lawyer recommended Dr. Bui, and gave me his phone number, hoping I could make an appointment. I stared at that phone number for several days because his clinic was a bit far from my home, and I never thought to call and make an appointment. It wasn't until my lawyer reminded me again that I reluctantly dialed the number. During our first meeting, Dr. Bui gave me four injections. A few hours after leaving the clinic, I felt the symptoms in my hand begin to subside. I kept wondering if it was just my imagination. A few days later, I found that my hands were indeed much more flexible. Therefore, if you have had a similar experience, I suggest you give yourself and Dr. Bui a chance and schedule an appointment! ✌️
Dr Bui, you are a miracle Doctor. I feel so much better now. Tqvm for being a wonderful doctor and a wonderful person to helping people. Wishing you all the best in the future and a thriving career. God bless you and your family! 🙏

All of the staff, including Dr. Bui, were super nice. The website has a lot of detailed information.  It’s rare to find a place that truly cares about patients, and I can say that Simply Health DP3 really does care about the patients. They communicate clearly and make you feel supported throughout your visit. I would highly recommend Simply Health DP3 for any appointments or medical examinations!

Dr.tam Bui has been treating me for a tbi, lower back pain, knee pain that happened a year ago. the pain has been so much better since i been under his care. Really clean nice staff. I'm so great full that I found him.

skin-unfiltered-medical-aesthetics-zilla.text:
This review is long overdue, and honestly, no amount of stars feels sufficient. If I could leave a million five-star reviews, I would without hesitation.

I've been a loyal client of Amy's for the past five years, and in that time I have never experienced anything less than exceptional. The quality of her work and her team's work has been so consistently outstanding that for the last several years I've made the drive all the way down from King County just to be seen at her clinic. That alone should say everything.

But beyond the incredible results and seamless customer service, what truly sets this place apart is the people. Amy has built something special — not just a business, but a genuine community rooted in warmth, care, and professionalism. She has surrounded herself with staff who are true extensions of her spirit, and walking through the door always feels like being welcomed by people who genuinely want you there.

Amy herself is one of those rare humans who lights up every room she walks into. She has the kind of energy that makes you feel seen and uplifted, and her heart is as big as her talent. Over the years, I've had the privilege of sitting with her and hearing about everything she's working on and working toward. She is generous with her wisdom — always willing to share career insights and life advice that have genuinely stayed with me.

What she may not know is that I consider her a true role model. Her perseverance, her intelligence, and her unwavering kindness make her someone I deeply admire — not just as a business owner, but as a person. She is beautiful inside and out, and her leadership reflects that in everything she does.

Highly recommend. Amy was so warm and welcoming. She was very knowledgeable. I brought my 7 month old with me and the wonderful front desk staff offered to play with her during my service. I had only had my lips and Botox done by one person prior to but I have since moved and I was worried about finding the right injector. I looked for months and read reviews. And I am very pleased to say I have found them! I drove 1.5 hours to come here. Worth it.

I went to Skin Unfiltered in Zillah and saw Amy for Botox and Voluma based on a friend's recommendation. Amy was wonderful! She explained everything clearly, went over different options, and made me feel totally at ease. I'm 50, so I tried to keep my expectations realistic, but the results honestly turned out better than I ever hoped for. After my first round of Voluma filler, the results were immediately noticeable. I left feeling confident and well taken care of. I've since gone back for PRF ezGEL and I just couldn't be happier.

Started prf gel treatments after my initial treatment I saw results within the first week. Then after my second treatment, results exceeding my expectations. My skin is so soft and glowing. I’ve stopped wearing foundation, I also work nights and my under eyes do not give nightshift. I’m honestly O B S E S S E D! If you’re thinking about doing, do it!! You won’t regret it!!

I have been going to see Amy for 2 years now. She is amazing in every sense of the word. She makes me feel like we have been friends forever. She provides many services and makes sure I walk away with the knowledge and assurance that my treatments are Tailored to my specific needs. Her staff is incredibly wonderful and reflects Amy’s awesome business and special attention to her clients. I look forward to returning. I would recommend skin unfiltered in zillah Wa, see ya soon.

renew-medical-emma-c-doody-nd-edmonds.text: I've had chronic skin issues for over 20 years. When I heard about Dr. Emma Doody at Renew Medical a few years ago, I've always wanted to try her services. After some testing, she was able to identify some of the root causes triggering my conditions and gave me specific guidance about my diet and to better support my body. After trying various medications over the years, it's great that she is focused on getting me off the meds. With just a few dietary and lifestyle adjustments, I've already noticed significant improvements in my skin and overall digestive function. I can't wait to see even more results and real lasting healing with my continued care under Dr. Doody.

I am leaving a review for ReNew Medical because they truly do need to be recognized as a professional healthcare / healing force. Dr. Emma has shown me time and time again that she knows what she is doing, and it’s fun to see the joy that she gets from making everyone feel better. I don’t know why I even still have a regular health care doctor, because I haven’t seen him since I started visiting ReNew Medical. He would just give me another prescription to stay on for the rest of my life. But It’s certainly not that way with Dr. Emma, she’s helping me to find the source of my health problems so that I can get off of those medications, especially those that have long term effects and can bring about other issues! I’m starting to ramble on but I do want to share also that she has ways to replenish the things that our bodies stop producing through her custom made
IV fluids and I always feel so much better and more energized afterwards. My wife had told Dr. Emma that I would never go to a ND, but she was wrong and I am thankful to have found such a caring health professional! Thank You Dr Emma and gang!

I have been a healthcare practitioner in the Edmonds Lynnwood area for over 30 years. I’m so grateful to have found Dr. Emma’s office. I explained my symptoms and she knew exactly what I needed. I did one NAD IV treatment … The difference in my energy level, and my cognitive function was immediate. I also did the medical compression for my lymphatic issues in my swollen legs.. After only 20 minutes my legs felt like they used to 10 years ago!!! Thank you so much, Dr. Emma
I have had multiple visits with Emma and strongly recommend her services. She is soo knowledgeable about all of her procedures and medicines. I feel fantastic every time I leave her office.
I am so happy I started going to ReNew Medical. I feel healthier, have more energy and the brain fog I had after menopause is gone. I definately recommend..

soma-aesthetics-yakima.text: From the moment I walked into Soma Aesthetics, I was impressed. The beauty and cleanliness were my first impression. Check in was easy and we had great conversation. Stephanie gave me my wonderful facial. She was so friendly and kind and made sure I was comfortable throughout the treatment. I can’t wait to go back for another soon!  I highly recommend visiting Soma Aesthetics!

This place is super nice and the people are amazing no doubt about that, but I had an appointment on jun 3 for a consult but due to a skin condition that I have she couldn’t give me any direct answers she said that she would consult with the Dermatologist because there is not much known about it and she would call me soon. It’s September and I still haven’t gotten word back. I called like a few days ago and I was told I would get a call back in 15min and never did. Don’t get me wrong I would totally recommend this spa to anyone of my girlfriends but I just wish I would get some answers :( I had mentioned that I have a hard time trusting doctors so most of the time I travel many hours to other states for care,  I really would have loved to find someone closer :( I’m sure if I had easier skin problems I would have already had answers. Also upon arriving to appointment I was also made aware that the dermatologist works out of a practice in tri-city’s and actually does not regularly see patients at soma I was hoping I would have had time with him. Darn it :(

Soma Aesthetics is the best place to go if you want anything beauty! My family and I LOVE the laser, and everything they offer. It is so clean and neat, and you really feel so welcomed. I love the girls here at Soma they are super sweet and understanding if you want to reschedule. You feel like all these girls are your friends because of how nice they are! Thank you Soma, we will forever come here 🤍
Very professional, I am very happy with my eyebrow retouch, reasonable price, thank you Soma 😊

Just left Soma Asthetics and had an amazing experience. I went for an Oxygen Facial and an IV Therapy. The staff was friendly and patient, explaining everything that was happening. This was my first experience with both procedures and will be back again. My skin looks amazing and I feel great.

wilkinson-wellness-clinic-yakima.text: I've been seeing Dr Wilkinson for many years. He's the only one that has ever been able to help me with my thyroid symptoms, and any other issues I've had. It's a great office, with excellent customer service.
Very helpful doctor who works to get to the root of your issues rather than just treating the symptoms and cares about the well-being of his patients. Highly recommend.
Very helpful with hormones and autoimmune conditions. Staff is friendly and helpful. Reminds me of how doctor’s offices used to treat patients.

This clinic is the best of Yakima, I can not express how nice and respectful these ladies are at the front desk. There always willing to help out and figure out what we need! The doctor as well, he is very kind and willing to figure out what is wrong with our health. I appreciate everything these ladies do, and especially the doctor. Even though there is only one doctor, you can see how much work he puts in to make our health better. I honestly would recommend everyone to go to this clinic. One of the best!!

I have been going to Dr Wilkinson for years now. He listens and researches to figure out what the best treatment is for the problem at hand. I can’t say enough good about my experience here. The front desk can be frustrating as many times prescriptions don’t get called in on time. But the gals are super sweet so that makes up. Dr Wilkinson is the only doctor willing to get to the bottom of problems. He has my thyroid at optimal levels now and I feel so much better. Highly recommend!

vita-weight-loss-iv-infusions-yakima-yak.text: Tracy of IV Infusions of Yakima provided a welcoming experience for us. My daughter, an athlete was in need of some extra fluids and vitamins after a head cold and before a weekend of basketball games and Tracy was able to see her on short notice. Tracy was knowledgeable and able to recommend a combination of infusions suited to my daughter's needs and symptoms. My daughter left her office rejuvenated and energized. We 100% recommend for anyone needing that boost after a cold.

So happy I decided to try iv infusions. My daughter was so sick and needed fluids and a boost. By the end of the session you could see the difference it made. Highly recommend Tracy who makes you feel very comfortable during the visit. I will definitely be returning for myself as well! Thank you!!

I went in for my first try at IV therapy after a sickness. It was very calming and my body showed improved stamina almost immediately. Tracy was knowledgeable, caring, and provided amazing insight. Excited to see her in her new space soon!

Tracy was kind enough to fit my son in on a Saturday. My son was very sick and needed to get on a flight the next morning. IV therapy was new to us but what a game changer it was! My son responded quickly and was able to make his flight the next morning. I found Tracy to be very knowledgeable and kind. I look forward to learning more about IV Therapy and using it myself.

I love coming here, Tracy does such a good job making me feel right at home while I get my IV’s. She is an A+ IV therapist and always makes sure I don’t experience any pain or discomfort. I always receive excellent service and care from her and she is very knowledgeable in her field of expertise. I recommend this place as 5 stars! It has been a night and day difference in my body before and after getting help from Tracy. Great work!

pure-infusion-suites-of-yakima-yakima.text: Pure Infusion Suites always goes the extra mile. At my last appointment, they helped me get the Mariens playoff game on my suite TV - way better than watching on my tablet! It totally made my day. ⚾️💙 Thanks for being so thoughtful!

My partner had her first infusion today, and the staff made the whole experience feel so comforting. Everyone was so welcoming and kind. We can’t thank you enough — what an amazing place to receive care.

I’ve taken my mom to several clinics and we have never been treated as good we did at pure infusion. Staff are awesome they make you feel comfortable and their customer service is the best. They take care of you from the minute you enter the door.

The sweetest, most fun girls I've ever encountered during a medical procedure, work in the Coeur d'alene office! They were professional in every way and put me at ease with their comforting and happy attitudes through the entire process. They even turned on my favorite YouTube quilting channel!
They are wonderful!
Staff is always professional yet personable and friendly.   Sol goes the extra mile to make sure she gets the orders needed and everything is in place for the appointment!

brio-wellness-yakima-yakima.text: Annie was amazing and very welcoming. I’m usually afraid of needles but she was extremely gentle and the experience was painless. Very professional, I would definitely recommend!

Annie is absolutely amazing ! I was getting my micro bladed brows removed in a few areas at another place in Yakima and had some pretty bad experiences, then I found Annie and she did it the right way and was so professional! I’m so thankful o stopped going to the other place and found her . I am so happy with my results and am relieved that I know I’m getting it done correctly now . Thank you Annie not only are you professional you are a joy to be around ♥️
Annie was so friendly and knowledgeable! She really explained the why behind each treatment and placement & kept everything looking so good yet natural!

Annie is so knowledgeable! I’ve been trying to decide what services to get as I haven’t done much yet and want to keep it as natural as possible and she has really helped me decide what would be best moving forward!

Wow! What a great experience! My mom has had a hard time getting over her Covid symptoms, specifically dehydration. Her doctor recommended Brio Wellness to get an IV for hydration. We were able to get an appointment the next day. We arrived and the whole staff was so welcoming and kind. Kim, the nurse, was attentive and knowledgeable! She answered all of my mom questions and shared all the benefits of IV therapy. We definitely will be sharing our experience with friends and family!

flo-wellness-and-aesthetics-yakima.text:
Exceptional IV Therapy Experience at Flo Infusion

I have had the pleasure of experiencing Flo Infusions' IV therapy multiple times and I must say it was an exceptional experience from start to finish! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by Tina, she made me feel comfortable and welcomed.The attention to detail in her space, creating a soothing environment truly enhanced my overall experience. Tina, who took the time to explain the entire process of IV therapy to me, and addressed all my questions I had. Her expertise and gentle technique made the insertion of the IV needle virtually painless.

I highly recommend Flo Infusions for anyone seeking IV therapy and much more, Botox, skin products, etc. Whether you're looking to boost your immune system, recover from a long flight, or simply indulge in some self-care, Flo Infusions is the place to go. Tina’s professionalism, top-notch service, and welcoming atmosphere makes her stand out from the rest.

Thank you, Tina at Flo Infusions, for providing such an outstanding IV therapy experience. I will definitely be returning for future sessions and spreading the word about your fantastic services!

Tina is amazing! Her set up was comfortable and very professional, as if I’m seeing my own doctor!
I had an IV infusion with her after passing a kidney stone and she took amazing care of me! I reached out and was quickly responded too and was able to see her the same day!
I highly recommend Tina for so many services!

Having the option of having IV therapy in the comfort of my home is amazing. We were always able to customize treatment to specific needs at time of visit. Tina is professional and very nice. She responds to messages quickly. We have tried the IV therapy and the B12 and Vitamin D shots all are highly recommended.

Tina really helped out in a pinch after a family member came down with a stomach bug and needed some help getting fluids on board. She was prompt to respond to my text, the scheduling process was all easily done online, and Tina was knowledgeable about the infusion that would be best for our case. On the morning of the appointment Tina was punctual, very caring and compassionate, and skilled in what she does ensuring to take all measures to prevent infection at the site.

Having received care from Tina at a local urgent care, I can also say that her mobile urgent care service will be a great resource to the Yakima community. She is a great nurse practitioner with the experience and passion to provide the utmost care to her patients!

100% recommend Tina is so nice and she did the set up super fast. I have done the IV therapy in the comfort of my home and at her location. She has comfy massage chairs and the atmosphere was so relaxing! The whole IV therapy process was seamless.

healthwithin-wellness-center-yakima.text:
Thought I had a medical massage but there was a problem with my referral. Instead of canceling my appointment, I was offered an opportunity to have a regular massage.
I met with the therapist who would’ve done my medical massage. He asked why I was coming for a massage. I explained why and he tailored my massage to help with my problem.
As soon as my referral comes through I will definitely go back. When those visits are over, I will continue to go back for massages.
The staff is friendly and helpful and very welcoming.
Thank you.

This office os truly a pleasure to deal with, Mary and her staff are Professional, Friendly, Informative, when you call you actually get to speak with a human, and one that actually understands what your calling about and cares about the situation and fallows through with getting answers, the Medical Staff always puts your health and needs First! They actually care about you, your recovery, and getting you back to a healthy path that works for all!! Thats so hard to find these days, my situation has been long and drawn out with absolutely no fault to Healthwithin, they jumped on board and immediately started getting things done, as far as I'm concerned went way, way above and beyond, and continuing, I cant Thank them enough!

Susan Bell the RRN ( I think she is )
Is just the best, very caring and thoughtful plus easy to talk to, always explains things in a way that's easy to understand. The receptionists up front are always nice and polite, just over all a great group of people that really care.
Absolutely appreciate the care I received. Susan is intentional with listening and genuinely cares about her patients. Thank you

Dr. Bell and her entire staff are very kind. I was afraid to go because a couple of years ago I had a very bad experience with Dr. Cohen here in Yakima, but Dr. Bell made me feel confident that she would help me with my problem and that there were good doctors like her.

signature-vitality-pittsburgh.text: Megan was awesome! The IV helped tremendously after having a bad virus and feeling super nauseous and depleted. Megan was knowledgeable, talked me through all the options and details of what she recommended and how she’d thought it would help me recover. Beautiful, clean space that is cozy and comfortable to relax for the IV drip. 10 stars. Will definitely be back and recommend her to everyone!

I went to their office in hopes of feeling better.  I had major head congestion and feeling a little dehydrated and was leaving for vacation the next day.  I met Megan there and had a very nice experience.   I got medically cleared for a procedure from a video chat with a nurse practitioner.   Megan offered me many choices, and after explaining them we decided on a package.   She offered for me to sit in a sauna with red light therapy   which I took advantage of.  While sitting there we started chatting and I explained how I have severe arthritis in my hands.  She then went and got a  shot of something for the drip.  Well for the first time in about 2 years I was able to bend my fingers enough to touch my palms,  with little to no pain.  Veterans also get a 20% discount!!  I had a very pleasant experience.   If your looking for IV therapy,  I suggest you give this place a try !!!

Megan is the best!! We came in for niagen drips and some vitamins in our system, and left feeling super energized. Loved the sauna and red light therapy experience too. Megan explained every step of the process and made us feel super comfortable too! Can't wait to come back for more.

Absolutely great experience at Signature Vitality! Megan is super knowledgeable and went above and beyond to help treat my never-ending cold back in October.
And today, I have her coming to my house to hydrate after a nasty stomach flu. Always sweet, helpful and accommodating - highly recommend!

I had read about this location in my fibromyalgia group a few time and I was in town and called to get the scoop. My labs had metabolic deficiencies and I have been feeling fatigued and in a flare. Without being sold multiple packages she built one for my needs and I headed in. The office is calming, the red light therapy booth was cozy along with the halo therapy adding in some respite for the crazy PA weather. She was helpful and honestly out of a handful of doctor appointments over why I’m flat lined fatigued I just needed someone to tend to me and tell me what I needed and make it happen. I got on same day and was able to get what my body needed. I will be back and it will be a priority. Mentally and physically I’m feeling better as the day goes on. Super helpful and compassionate.

infusions-and-injections-st-helens.text: Dr Rachel is AMAZING! I was a 10/10 nervous, but Dr Rachel is so sweet, talked me through it all and the nerves were for no reason. Zero pain or discomfort. I actually now am excited for my appts. Dr Rachel gave me exactly what I was looking for. The entire experience couldn’t have been better and I can’t say enough good things about Dr Rachel 🩷

I can’t thank Dr. Rachel enough! She truly helped me achieve my ultimate goal and has been there every step of the way. When I was sick, she gave me the energy-boosting shots I needed to kick the cold and get back on my feet. Her care, knowledge, and genuine compassion make all the difference. I’ll forever be grateful — thank you, Dr. Rachel!

You will NOT be disappointed when you go see Dr Rachael. She is so knowledgeable and friendly. I’ve had THE best experiences with her. I’m never going anywhere else. She truly cares about her clients.

I’ve seen Dr Rachel for several different treatments and she’s been amazing every time. She’s very knowledgeable and actually cares about peoples whole health. I have several auto immune issues and she understands how these things affect normal people but also people like me, who don’t have perfect health. I couldn’t imagine trusting anyone like I do Dr Rachel.
Dr. Rachael is FANTASTIC at what she does! I highly recommend her for any injections or general medical needs. Best in town for sure

prime-iv-hydration-wellness-shadow-lake-.text: ABSOLUTELY love this place.  Great atmosphere and staff.  They have knowledge and expertise in helping with your wellness.  Highly recommend giving it it try.  I feel so much better with energy, focus, and body overall hydration.

I love all the choices of IVs and injections they have, once you step inside.. it’s calm and welcoming. The staff is amazing & so friendly. My energy has improved and love that during my IV I get to relax in the massage chairs and heated blanket… and their wellness water is so refreshing! I make sure I have a bottle at home at all times so I stay hydrated! Owner is sooo nice and doesn’t rush you. I love going every month!!!!

Amazing! I had a drip IV (which I barely felt!) and 2 shots. It was super easy throughout the whole visit. Amanda is very knowledgeable and kind! The inside is beautiful and very zen. Plus the massage chairs are VERY welcoming when you add a warm blanket and heated eye mask (I got the lavender). You should definitely give this place a try!!
Great customer service. Awesome staff there always so welcoming and kind.
Great atmosphere and services! If I could visit every week, I would - definitely feel better after each visit!

reviv-new-york-iv-therapy-nad-glutathion.text:
Esther, Alaya and Keith - The most amazing team

I had an IV service today and I can honestly say this was one of the best wellness services I’ve ever received. From start to finish, everything was professional, clean, and well-organized. The provider was extremely knowledgeable, took the time to explain everything, and made sure I was comfortable the entire time.

The IV itself was smooth and painless, and I could literally feel the difference shortly after. Increased energy, mental clarity, and an overall sense of balance—exactly what I needed. You can tell they genuinely care about your health and not just rushing through appointments.
If you’re on the fence about IV therapy or looking for a reliable, high-quality service, this is the one. I’ll definitely be back and recommending this to friends and family. Worth every dollar.
Stopped in for a quick IV boost before my flight from nyc to California and they were able to get me in same day right away and were so friendly!

I was recently traveling for work and decided to try an IV drip at Reviv New York, as I have been to the Vegas location a few times and always had an excellent experience there. I just recovered from a cold and needed a quick pick me up and I couldn't be more pleased with my experience at this location. From the moment I walked in, the front desk greeted me with smiles and got me checked in. Shortly after, a nurse came to escort me. She took the time to explain the entire process and made sure that I felt informed and at ease as I am a little fearful of needles. Her genuine care for my comfort really stood out. The IV drip itself was started quickly and without any pain. I was in and out in about 45 minutes. The entire experience was smooth, and I appreciated the kindness and attentiveness of the staff throughout my visit as they came to check in on me quite a bit. I always feel such a huge shift in my energy levels after an IV so I definitely recommend trying it for yourself!
First time getting IV drip had a great experience. All of my questions were answered and I felt super comfortable with treatment. Super quick and easy definitely coming back.

This was a super comfortable and enjoyable experience! The nurse went through the options for our iv drips with us and answered all our questions. We didn’t feel rushed and I felt heard with what I wanted to accomplish today.
I physically feel a lot better and highly recommend the royal flush to anyone.

stanwood-integrative-medicine-stanwood.text: My family and I have been Dr. Carrie Hardy's patients for over 6 years. She's been taking care of our 3 children since birth. I can't express enough how grateful we are to have her as our Primary Care Doctor. She is extremely competent, approaches every issue holistically and carefully, has always shown real care for each of us individually. She takes her time to get to the root of whatever the issue. We love her so much! I would recommend Dr. Hardy to anyone who is looking for true, meaningful, holistic healthcare - not just drug prescriptions.

★★
★★
★★
★★
★★

7 hours ago
I am new to this Clinic and have seen Dr Carrie and Janet their acupuncturist. I was seeking help with menopausal symptoms and the care I have received has been outstanding. My first appointment was a full hour where I felt really listened to and shown empathy, she is the most caring Dr I have ever met, I cannot thank her enough for all the advice and help I have gotten so far, love her!!!!  I have never even been offered hormone testing before and look forward to seeing where I am at and finding natural ways to get my hormones balanced. I am on my third session with Janet and my anxiety has been greatly reduced. Janet has been so attentive to my emotional well being, she is so kind and caring and very professional. I love that she is willing to try different approaches to get me feeling more energetic and help me sleep better. Highly recommend them, and signing up my husband and sons. It is so good to have a real relationship with a Dr, that is beginning to know me and doesn't see me for 5 minutes and write me a prescription. All their staff including Marie which did the most painless blood draw I have ever had, to the front office who are friendly and so helpful.

Acupuncture- I’ve had 11 sessions with Janet and going in for my 12th next week. In the time we’ve been working together she’s helped me with mental and emotional wellbeing. I came to her so stressed and was looking to destress and get adrenal support. I feel incredibly more balanced emotionally. I’m sleeping better, eating better, more energy! She has also helped me with pain in my neck, back, and even digestive issues. I feel like I’ve gotten a full body massage when the sessions are over. She’s absolutely amazing! She is intentional with her patients and really listens. I feel very supported. Don’t see anyone else. I’ve had acupuncture before.. nothing like this though! I highly highly highly recommend her!

Also the whole team at this office is amazing! They truly go above and beyond for everyone!!

Dr. Carrie Hardy is incredible. She is kind and truly wants to help you get to the bottom of your problem! She has been nothing but attentive and helps answer any questions that I may have (even if I have many)!

My daughter and husband see Dr. Holly Hagglund and she has also been wonderful!

They both try to find the best natural alternatives before resorting to prescription medications, which I value and appreciate greatly!

Thank you Stanwood Integrative Medicine!
We went here a few times for my daughter. Unfortunately the front desk person has always been unfriendly and sometimes rude. It’s a huge turn off when choosing an office.

stanwood-wellness-clinic-stanwood.text: Nurse Amy is one of my favorite healthcare providers.  She is kind, caring, professional, and never makes me feel like a number instead of a person.  Communication is always prompt and helpful.  Prices are excellent.  I highly recommend Stanwell Clinic and Nurse Amy for your health goals.

I was a cardiac patient and very overweight. My cardiologist recommended Amy to help with weight loss. The time and care she took into introducing me to the program was lifesaving. She is such a gem and so fair in pricing. I’m very grateful for her help. I’ve lost 41 lbs and feel great!

I’m so glad I finally reached out to Amy after months of hearing my coworker rave about her. From the very beginning, everything has been super easy — the process, the communication, all of it. It’s been such a great experience that I can’t stop telling everyone about how amazing Amy has been and how much the glp1s have helped me.

Amy is knowledgeable, warm, professional and providing a great service for an amazing price; which is actually just the cost of the glp medication (in my case). If you want guidance to rearrange your relationship with food and want to get a boost of willpower to do so, she can help! Highly recommend! Easy to find a spot on her schedule and she answered all of my questions and remains available for future questions. Also, the meds arrived within just a few days!

I’ve had a great experience with Amy! She is always available if you need her! She is very knowledgeable and listens to every single concern while helping you choose the best program for your needs and goals. I’m glad I took the jump and became her patient.

restore-hyper-wellness-bellingham.text: This place is the real deal—the only one that not only treats you right but also provides the best hospitality while you’re getting an IV. Honestly, I was pretty skeptical at first, but after my IV session, I became a total believer in what proper hydration can do for your body. The staff are super nice and they will guide you through the entire process worry free! Hope this helps you make up your mind. Just a regular guy here giving you some peace of mind—I highly recommend it. So what are you waiting for? Book your IV today!

Great experience! Got an IV drip and Becky did an amazing job! If you are feeling run down or under the weather, go get an IV and you will feel so much better. The owner Kristin came in and chatted with us and made us feel very welcome!

Update: I came back to Restore for my second visit due to ongoing back pain from a herniated L4/L5 disc, and I’m so glad I did. The localized cryotherapy worked wonders and noticeably reduced my pain.
Shea was fantastic — knowledgeable, empathetic, and made the whole experience feel supportive and positive. I felt heard, cared for, and honestly great by the time I left. Definitely recommend Restore if you’re dealing with pain or recovery issues.

I had my very first IV therapy and red light therapy visit today, and WOW—what an incredible experience from start to finish! Kristin, Amy, and Sophia were absolutely amazing.
The treatments themselves were fantastic. I left feeling refreshed, energized, and genuinely cared for. The whole team made my first visit unforgettable, and I’m already looking forward to my next session and trying more services that are available. Highly recommend to anyone considering IV or red light therapy—this place is truly something special!

From the moment I walk in the door until the time I leave the staff is incredible.They make you feel seen heard and genuinely cared for. Everyone is very knowledgeable and caring. The atmospherefere was less like a clinic and more like visiting a friend's home warm, welcoming and comfortable on top of that, the health benefits are amazing. I've experienced red light therapy, IV therapy, cryotherapy and even compression therapy. One of my favorites is combining compression therapy with Iv therapy after doing a long hike, the combination of these two leave me feeling fantastic like my body has been reset. If you're even a little curious, I would highly suggest giving it a try. It's been a game changer for me

I have had IV therapy and this was by far the best place I have ever been for treatment. The staff is so sweet with Hope and Shea and Evelin helping me every step of the way today along with the Manager Kirstin (hoping I spelled their names right) getting me set up with the intake forms and giving me a compression treatment that was awesome too. They were all totally awesome!! Thanks ladies. Looking forward to my next treatment ❤️ 💙 💜

performance-iv-hydration-federal-way.text: I was able to loose 11 lbs in 10 weeks and with nothing change in my regular routine. Less meal, eat less carb but still feel strong and feel good. If you want to loose weight in a good way for your health and body, I recommend here.

Performance Hydration is awesome! Myounghee is an amazing person and has everything you need from IV bags to various injections for various causes. She’s very patient and effective and makes sure all of your needs are met. The environment is very warm, welcoming, and comfortable. Please come here for your hydration needs!

I am so grateful i found this place! I already can’t wait for my next treatment. The environment is so clean and comfortable. You feel like you’re sitting at home! I felt immediate results. The provider is professional, knowledgeable, and you can tell she loves what she does.
it's been over a year and I will continue my visit here at performance hydration , my experience with Myounghee is super excellent !!! she is awesome !

My husband and I had a great experience at Performance IV Hydration in Federal Way. We received Glutathione (1000 mg) and Vitamin B12 treatments. Myounghee was incredibly kind, thorough, and professional. She asked detailed questions about our health and carefully monitored each step of the hydration therapy. Her experience and attention to detail gave us a lot of confidence. Highly recommend!

magnolia-steel-medi-spa-and-wellness-cli.text: This place is wonderful! Candice and Mariena are amazing! My experience here was excellent! The environment was clean, calming, and professional. All of my questions were answered and with patience! (I had a lot of questions lol) All of my emails were always answered and they were both so nice! I received filler and Botox so I was very nervous, but they helped me understand the entire process and addressed anything I had questions about. I am so excited to go back! These ladies are amazing! Nicole Mogel

Candice is truly a gem! Not only does she provide top-tier beauty services, but she does it with the biggest heart. From the moment you walk in, you feel welcomed, cared for, and genuinely seen. Her attention to detail, skill, and warm personality make every appointment a joy. If you're looking for someone who’s both talented and truly passionate about what they do, come see Candice — you won’t regret it! I love her!!!

I have struggled with my weight most of my adult lift going back and forth from being at a healthy weight to being overweight gaining between 20-30lbs each time after being fit for a period of time . I am now in my mid-40s and in perimenopause. It is downright  harder to drop the lbs due to hormonal shifts in my body and my decreased metabolism. I will also admit I was a stress eater and over ate all the time.

When  I reached my heaviest at nearly 170lbs, I knew it was time to make a permanent change. I had heard about GLP-1 injections to help with weight loss but I was nervous since I didn't know a lot about it. I also didn't personally know anyone that used this as a pathway to weight loss so had doubts about its effectiveness. I finally made the decision to start when I saw photos of  my friend Candice she posted to her FB showing what the medication has done for her weight loss. Since she was someone I personally knew, I felt more confident that this weight loss medication would work seeing her results. I was so exited that I would be working with Candice through my weight loss journey especially since she is also an RN and works at the clinic. When I found out the owner of the medi-spa Mariena was also a practicing ARNP, I felt relief knowing I would be in great hands with two medical professionals. At my first appointment, I met with both Mariena and Candice and they made me feel instantly at ease. They were so patient and answered all my questions. I was nervous about injecting myself at home but they walked me through how to inject myself at my first appt so I could do at home. 6 months in and I have lost 34.5lbs and am so HAPPY. Yes, there are options to get GLP-1 medications online, but I feel better knowing I am getting monthly in-person check-ins. I would get nervous for every single weigh-in but I had a cheerleader in Candice no matter what that scale read.  I went into this weight loss journey not to just look good but to also help with my mental health and can attest that I feel amazing physically and mentally. Candice has been through every emotion with me during this journey and my cheerleader. I make my 2 hour round trip for my monthly check-ins and it is worth every minute and mile to be able to have a personal relationship with my providers not just getting doses mailed to me and occasionally seeing a provider for a telemedicine visit where they don't know get to know me as a person. I highly recommend Magnolia & Steel Spa and Wellness Clinic. They are here to support their clients for all services they provide.

I reached out for some much needed TLC. I could not get over this virus and I needed help. Wonderful Candice came to the rescue. She came to my office and gave me the fluids and vitamins that my body desperately needed. Candice was swift yet so gentle. I highly recommend Magnolia and Steel and Candice when you need a boost, an IV of fluids and vitamins.  Thank you Candice for your care.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I couldn’t be happier with my experience at this wellness clinic! Mariena, the owner, has been absolutely amazing throughout my journey. From the very beginning, she provided me with so much information, answered all my questions, and helped me feel confident in my decision to start weight loss treatment.

I’m completing my first month of treatment this week, and the results have been truly life-changing. I’ve lost a significant amount of weight so far and have noticed so many positive changes in my life.

If you’re considering options for weight loss or looking for a clinic that truly cares about your health and well-being, I highly recommend this place!

iv-therapy-wa-renton.text: I have been very sick the last couple of days while traveling and thought an IV would be a good idea to help hydrate me again. I wasn’t feeling up for going to urgent care or paying for extra costs, so IV Therapy WA seemed like a great choice. They were able to schedule me quickly and even came to my hotel.  The experience was extremely easy I cannot recommend enough. My nurse who took care of me, Angelica, was an absolute gem. She was a real pleasure to sit and chat with during the hour that it took for a liter of fluids. Angelica was not only professional but extremely kind and caring. I would highly recommend IV Therapy WA to anyone wanting IV services, especially from Angelica.

We saw them at their pop up-it was set up really nice and relaxing. They were really nice and informative. We had the recovery bags. They were good. It was a simple and painless process. It went by pretty fast too for me. It was a really warm day so having the fluids and vitamins made me feel really refreshed and definitely helped my stamina (resisting a midday nap) through the day.
Two different people administered the IVs and they did a great job.
Thank you guys!

MUST TRY! I was nervous to receive IV therapy as it was my first time but I knew I needed something to boost my energy and immunity because I couldn’t afford to get sick with work and family. Mario and the staff made this first experience amazing. I felt welcomed and he explained different vitamins that would best fit me. I was nervous with the IV needle since I’m known to be a difficult stick but Mario got it first try and continues to! After the IV therapy, I felt amazing for 2.5 weeks, I woke up feeling like I had the best sleep and didn’t even need coffee for few days! I’ve brought my best friend (first time & loved it) and plan on bringing my mom here and book for a private event! Look out for specials, they are killer!

I have now gotten IV therapy at this location two times, the first time I came with my fiance after I had gotten food poisoning that week and was feeling like a cold was coming on. The next day I felt back to normal and felt absolutely amazing. My fiance felt like a million bucks for the next 2 to 3 weeks after. I went in again today after I went on my vacation and came back sleep deprived and exhausted, I made same day appointment which is fantastic how easy it is to book online, right after my therapy I instantly felt great again. If you have never done IV therapy before, give it a go it is definitely worth it. They have amazing service, very professional, very luxurious feeling, and also Mario is absolutely amazing and has a great family ran business. I will be back again and again!

I've been a long time client of Sandra's for years now with her as my lash artist and to see her expand and grow is always so dope to see. No matter the distance I'll travel for her cause she's always consistent with her work and she takes care of her people.

I would like to shine light on Mario though because it's just good vibes, he's amazing when it comes to keeping people calm, talking people through the process of getting an IV drip especially if you've never had one or have a fear of needles. While I don't have a fear of needles this was my first experience. I work all the time and super busy so my body was low on energy. Mario gave me the B12 which helps give you that boost of energy and hydration. I loved the experience. I highly recommend seeing them to take care of you. Thank You!

moore-family-clinic-spokane.text: I am very impressed with the team at Moore Family Clinic! I scheduled an appointment to be a new client and they were only 2 weeks out (which is unheard of nowadays!). It was easy to fill out the paperwork beforehand to be ready for my appointment. Dr. Shanna spent the time to listen to my concerns and make a plan to get everything addressed. After, Carrie made sure I understood what to expect with billing and insurance which was great. I highly recommend going to them if you're looking for a locally owned and operated clinic that provides exceptional care and service!

I had my first visit today, and it was fantastic! Shanna Moore is an excellent listener, and a fantastic provider. I felt like a person, not a number. My primary care closed their practice, and I am so happy I landed with Moore family clinic for my healthcare provider. Additionally, Carrie is amazing! She helped me make sure my insurance was covered and it was a joy to work with. Highly recommend! I don’t see me ever going anywhere else. So glad I found them!

Just to echo what everyone else has said, I am so glad I found Moore Family clinic. Shanna is an excellent care provider. She listens and provides practical solutions, and was very caring with a great bedside manner.

Shanna is a phenomenal nurse practitioner. From the moment that I met her I felt welcomed into her clinic. My initial intake was thought out, thorough, and for the first time I felt truly seen and heard by a provider. She has worked tirelessly to ensure I have the referrals, lab work, and care needed at any time of the week. Truly goes above and beyond for her patients and I do not feel like I am just stuck on the conveyor belt of healthcare. She is easy to reach out to and is quick to answer any questions I may have. I continue to recommend her to my family and friends looking for a new primary care provider in the Spokane area. I am truly grateful for the level of care that she provides me and her attentiveness to me does not go unnoticed! Thank you from the bottom of my heart!

Setting an appointment was easy and quick.   My appointment with Shanna Moore was such a pleasant difference from other care providers.   She was attentive and caring and made it very clear she was entirely focused on my visit and there to help.  I was seen on time and wasn’t rushed through my visit.   I highly recommend this clinic.

pura-vida-hydration-aesthetics-woodinvil.text: Had my second round of NAD+ IV therapy today by Jackie and have had 10/10 experience each time. She makes it a great and comfortable experience, offering blanket/pillow/snacks during my infusion. Jackie is also very skilled, never giving any pain or bruising from the IV. Also very knowledgeable regarding any questions I had about the therapy. Will definitely be recommending Jackie to any of my friends or family!

I am from out of town out in Oregon and i have a fashion show at Seatac, WA. I booked ahead of time on this MedSpa and process was easy. The aesthetic nurse, Jacqueline, was very thorough, explained everything well and very professional. The clinic is immaculately clean and most of all she is super friendly. I got my beauty IV drip, massetter and forehead botox, and the results were AMAZING!!! Thank you SO MUCH for all your help, i will be back for sure after 3 months! 😍 10/10!!

Edit: The masseter botox was AMAZING! I have chronic teeth grinding when i fall in a deep sleep and i no longer need my mouth guards at all after a week! Such a life saver!! Thank you!

Microneedling... who knew?!?!  I had some sun/aging spots on my face.  I had heard microneedling was the best tool to help me achieve the results I wanted.  It sounded scary.

Going to Jackie made it so much easier.  She's so sweet, kind, and professional.  She eased my fears, checked on me after several times and was wildly supportive during.

Her office is super clean, she's easy to be with and even though it doesn't feel great, I don't mind going because I know I have her to get me through it.  Even though I'm targeting a couple of specific areas, I'm getting sooo many compliments on my skin.  A friend even asked me if I had a facelift, and this was only after one treatment.   Exciting times with this microneedling thing.  😊

Today was my third IV drip appointment with Pura Vida, and I feel incredible! I am coming once a week with the subscription Jackie offers that makes the treatments totally affordable. I couldn't say more about her ability to make me feel seen and heard. She'll customize the IV drips to your specialized needs. So happy with the results so far... 🙌

I’ve had numerous visits at Pura Vida and I can say that the facility is spotless, warm and cozy, and very comfortable. Jacque is very kind and caring and did an amazing job and took very good care of me. She also was very helpful in explaining the process to help me to understand the outcome. I’m very happy with the services that I received and would highly recommend Jacque!

infusion-solutions-bellingham.text: Nice, clean and peaceful place.  From the friendly greeting of the receptionist to the careful and efficient treatment I received this has been a very good experience.  The training I received in the Hospital before I was discharged, and the following training I received the first time I did the infusion at home was great.  I felt very comfortable at home continuing to self-administer my medication.  The needed supplies are delivered each week and I receive a phone call - every time - asking if I need any additional supplies or if I have enough of what I need.  This way I haven't run out of anything, nor am I paying for 'extra' stuff which I do not need.  Over all a great experience.

We had a very good experience with Infusion Solutions. At first my wife was a little leery giving the medicine but the nurse made it easy,especially with the pad that explained the procedure. When we had questions the nurses got back to us right away. Hopefully I won’t need your services again but if I do you will be there. Thank you very much

Infusion Solutions of Bellingham is Amazing. Everyone is so knowledgeable and friendly. They're always on top of it. From training for feeding tube, ordering, questions, unhooking chemotherapy pack etc. They answer questions after hours and on weekends. Thank you for being so fabulous. Happy Holidays
Mike and Michelle

I recently went with my adult daughter to have an iron infusion here. I was so impressed with all staff members we came in contact with. Her nurse, Julie, was beyond kind and helpful. She had answers to all the questions we asked. She was very professional and had great concern for my daughters nervousness  about the procedure.  I would highly recommend this facility.  Thank you so much, Julie.

What a nice facility!! Clean, professional, modern and welcoming. You feel safe and cared for. I'd highly recommend Infusion Solutions to anyone! Nurse Jayme cared for me and she was INCREDIBLE - 10/10.

ivitality-bellingham-bellingham.text: Wonderful knowledgeable staff.  I feel so much better now than before I started getting hormones and supplements from Dr D.  Love the office. Feel years younger and my muscles are looking good!  Recommend to everyone I know.

I first came to Cedar Male in September 2023 after a few of my family members recommended the clinic, and I needed help managing my hormones. Dr. Wittie started me with blood work and a treatment plan, and things went well at the beginning.

However, by December I started experiencing severe migraines from one of the prescribed medications. I scheduled a phone appointment with Dr. Wittie toward the end of December, but I never received the call. The migraines continued, and I had to schedule another appointment for January 2, 2024. I explained that I never got the previous call, and they told me the next available slot was a week later. Unfortunately, that appointment was also missed—he didn’t call at the scheduled time (10:30 a.m.) but instead called the following evening around 6 p.m., saying there had been confusion due to new staff. He adjusted my medication, and thankfully the migraines went away.

Over time, the prices began to increase without notice. I was also charged for shipping several times even when I went in person to pick up my medication, and each time I was told I’d be refunded—but it never happened.

By January 2025, I had reached my limit. I called to schedule another refill and was told it would take two weeks. I also noticed larger withdrawals from my bank account without any explanation or notice of a price increase. When I called in February 2025 to ask about the charges, the person I spoke with was extremely rude. At first, she said she didn’t know about any price increase, but later admitted that she did. Her attitude and the way she handled the conversation were unprofessional and dismissive, and that’s where I drew the line.

Up to that point, I had overlooked several smaller issues, thinking maybe they were just having a rough day or adjusting to new staff—but after that call, I decided to stop going.

Later, I found out that other family members who had also been patients there had gone through similar experiences with billing problems, missed calls, and inconsistent communication, and they too decided to leave.

Overall, the experience started out promising but became increasingly frustrating. I hope Cedar Male improves their communication, customer service, and billing transparency for future patients.

I have been going to I vitality for over a year now and have nothing but good things to say, I have recommended multiple people to the clinic and have noticed a DRASTIC improvement in my day to day life since starting the hormone replacement therapy.
I had a total hysterectomy about 10 years ago and going through menopause at 25 years old was not something I would recommend 😅
They have given me my youth back, my energy, and best of all… no hott flashes!!!
I-vitality makes it quick and easy to refill my medication , picking it up or by mail is discreet and no judgment. Thanks again for a great naturopath in our community!
Wonderful help. Was dragging butt and couldn't get thru the day without a nap. My testosterone levels were real low. Dr Witte got me on a great plan and got me back to life.

sound-mind-body-integrative-therapies-be.text:
I don’t even have the words to express how grateful I am for this clinic. I was referred here by my therapist after sharing how hopeless and suicidal I felt. When I finally decided to go, Dr. Stephen's carefully explained the treatment which made me feel comfortable. It ended up being the decision that saved my life.

I started ketamine infusions in January, and from the very first visit, I was met with such genuine compassion and understanding. Dr. Stephens and his staff truly care about people. They see you, and they listen.

Traditional medications and therapy weren’t enough for me, but the care and treatment I’ve received here gave me a glimmer of hope again. I can say with absolute honesty that this clinic saved my life. They continue to check on me, and I’ll keep coming back for as long as I live in Washington.

I found Dr. Stephens a few months after my dad died, desperate for any kind of relief. For years I had been in a deep hole of depression and had little luck with medication and regular talk therapy. Ketamine therapy changed my life. Dr. Stephens, Erica, and his team are incredible, kind, and understanding. His ultimate goal is to support you through a difficult time with a curated treatment plan. I did a series of 6 sessions and can confidently say, I have never been better.
Dr. Stephens and ketamine therapy have been life-changing for me. I feel safe and supported there.i am so glad I found them, and highly recommend their therapy.

Dr. Nate Stephens and his nurse, Erica, have provided my daughter with truly exceptional care at Salish Ketamine Clinic. She is receiving Ketamine Treatment for complex PTSD and major depressive disorder, and the level of compassion and personal interaction from Dr. Stephens is beyond anything we could have hoped for. Not only is he highly skilled, but he also takes the time to counsel and coach her through the process with genuine care.

Erica has been equally incredible—her kindness and support were evident when she held my daughter’s hand through her very first treatment. The impact of their care is immeasurable. Hearing my daughter say, “I felt what hope feels like,” even if just for a short time, was a moment I will never forget. Hope is the elevator of life, and for the first time since her traumatic event, I, too, feel hope—hope that she is on the path to healing, all because of the compassionate treatment she is receiving.

Thank you, Dr. Stephens and Erica, for making such a profound difference in our lives.

I can’t say enough good things about Salish Ketamine Clinic! The benefits of ketamine therapy have been incredible—helping me achieve a level of mental clarity and well-being I didn’t think was possible. The entire team at Salish is warm, friendly, and compassionate, making every visit a positive experience.

Not only have I seen amazing results with ketamine therapy, but their aesthetic services, like fillers and Botox, are also outstanding. The staff is skilled and detail-oriented, ensuring natural, beautiful results. I’ve received so many compliments, and my friends who have also visited the clinic are just as thrilled with their results.

Salish Ketamine Clinic truly sets the bar for exceptional care in both mental health and aesthetics. I highly recommend them!

artistry-medical-aesthetics-bellingham.text: This was my first ever aesthetic treatment and Kelly did a super job!! She is truly an artist. She made me feel completely at ease, explained everything in detail in a way that I understood, and was very efficient at the procedure. It looks very natural! I'm very happy with the results! I'll definitely be going back for another procedure.

Amazing Business. Kelly is such a wonderful person and gives top notch service. I have been getting PRP in my scalp for hair growth for over a year. The results are phenomenal. I always feel so comfortable and well taken care of at my appointments. Great business and great owner!!!!

I never thought I’d get Botox, but my family kept asking me why I looked so angry (especially working from home on my laptop)
Kelly is so kind, informative and NOT pushy about adding extras or unneeded services, which I greatly appreciate. I’ve seen her twice now and highly recommend! My “11’s” are way calmer, haha! And I feel younger, which translates to feeling more confident and happy. Thank you, Kelly!

I couldn't be happier with my experience! From start to finish, the entire process was smooth, professional, and exceeded my expectations. Kelly was incredibly knowledgeable and made me feel completely at ease-answering all of my questions and making sure I was comfortable every step of the way.

The results are exactly what I was hoping for: natural, perfectly balanced, and flattering to my features. There was minimal discomfort, and the aftercare instructions were clear and easy to follow. I truly felt like I was in expert hands.

If you're considering lip injections and want a provider who is skilled, attentive, and truly cares about helping you feel your best, this is the place to go. I'll definitely be returning and recommending to everyone I know!

I love the service, attention, and detail that Kelly provides! I have been seeing her for light botox help, some very light lip fill, and have finished three intense red light treatments on my face for rosacea redness and broken capillaries. I am so pleased after regular treatments, always get my questions answered and booked out months in advance... so I don't have to worry about getting an appointment. Also the Cherry pay plans are great for monthly budgeting! Thank you, Kelly!

hydravibe-wellness-puyallup.text: I had a great experience at HydraVibe Wellness! Amanda was friendly, professional, and made everything easy and comfortable. I went in due to HG during pregnancy, and instead of spending hours in the ER for fluids, I was able to book same day and be in and out in under an hour. Such a relief and so worth it. 10/10 recommend!

Hydravibe Wellness has treated my spouse and me very well. We have been on GLP-1’s for several months and have seen phenomenal results with our weight loss journey and overall energy levels!!

Both Amanda and Seth have reached out to us promptly if we have had any questions. They are providers that genuinely care. I would highly recommend Hydravibe Wellness!!

I had a fantastic experience at HydraVibe. Seth was very knowledgeable and helped me select the treatment that fits my needs. He delivered a medically beneficial treatment in a relaxing spa like atmosphere, which elevated my experience even further. Highly recommend!

Hi!  I had my first visit with HydraVibe and I will definitely be back!  Seth was very professional and kind.  Explained everything and answered all my questions from beginning to start.  I have done hydration therapy before but this was a very unique and personalized experience!
Highly recommended!

I visited HydraVibe Wellness today for IV therapy, and my experience was very positive. I was interested in getting Vitamin C to support my immune system and improve my skin. The service was professional and informative. The nurse clearly explained the benefits and advantages of the treatment and even recommended the best option for my next visit. I highly recommend HydraVibe if you’re looking to get vitamins through IV therapy. Their prices are also very reasonable and more affordable compared to others in the market.

celsius-seattle.text: Always a great experience when I go to Celsius for an appointment with Madison. Parking is easy, the reception desk staff are welcoming and so helpful with advanced scheduling. They're so patient with me as I fumble around trying to figure out my own calendar. They deserve a round of applause. Madison is just wonderful, I've been seeing her for almost 2 years. She's such a talented injector and her results are consistent, they meet my expectations and most importantly I trust her judgement and feel safe with her.

So wonderful!! I was at the space needle and was looking around the area. Saw they had a deal and they were able to fit me in later that day (it was a weekday and not busy). I really appreciate it as I am just visiting. So sweet and nice! 10/10 injections.

I get laser treatment done here and really like the clinic and my nurse, Madison. She does an awesome job at making sure I’m comfortable throughout the procedure and still getting the results I’m there for. The space is clean, well lit, and beautifully decorated. The location is super convenient as it’s central, and has plenty of pearling around. The prices are reasonable for the quality of service, especially considering the great deals they have available on groupon. Very happy with the service I get here!

Wonderful experience.  The spa was clean, modern and had a relaxing atmosphere.  I came without an appt.  and the staff was able to accommodate me by just waiting for an hour.  I truly appreciate that.   I was seen by Madison.
She is awesome.  Very professional and knowledgeable.  She will address any questions or concerns you may have.  She is an absolute pleasure to work with.  Thank you.

JoAnna is an absolute gem! I came to her with sensitive skin, worried about dark circles, spots, and dryness. She managed to address 90% of my concerns in just one visit using incredibly gentle products. The experience was pure princess treatment—she’s so sweet I even fell asleep! 10/10, I’m obsessed. NEW REGULAR

peak-hydration-bellingham.text:
My doctor originally referred me to Peak Hydration so I was super pumped to see them at my company's wellness fair.   I ended up scoring an absolute win with their raffle (The Works) and here now for my first visit.
Melanie and Karen are absolute jewels - so friendly,  welcoming and seems like they know every single person that walks in the door!   I love when customer service shines and these two are a prime example.   I loved reading the other reviews and seeing something similar mentioned each time about the staff here!
I'm already plotting my next visit!

Had a great experience overall. Kid friendly place and very welcoming. I got the Immune Boost + Hydration drip IV while at the tail end of a cold. Felt like it really helped to rid myself of that cold. Comfortable seating and the staff was excellent to deal with. Will be back for sure. Thanks.

I highly recommend Peak Hydration for overall wellness.  The entire staff is extremely professional and knowledgeable and up to date on all services offered.  Aimee is always a pleasure to deal with at the front when checking in and out and Karen R.N. Is THE BEST and has years of experience with IV’s administering comfortable and pain free treatment.  Peak Hydration accesses the highest quality medications from reputable accredited pharmacies based here in the U.S. Peak Hydration offers safe and result oriented treatment for everyone.

Peak Hydration made my very first IV therapy such a great experience. The team is friendly, gentle, and really took their time to walk me through everything. If you have questions about anything as you are perusing their website - just ask them when you get there! They lay out the benefits and really cater to what YOU really need. Highly, highly recommend. :)

I’ve been to Peak Hydration multiple times now, and every single visit has been excellent. The customer service is always amazing — the staff are friendly, professional, and very accommodating. The atmosphere is relaxed and comfortable, and they always make sure I get exactly what I need.

It’s clear they really care about their clients and take pride in what they do. Highly recommend Peak Hydration to anyone looking for top-notch service and a place that truly puts your wellness first! 💧

drip-lounge-iv-bar-seattle.text: 10/10! Needed a quick pick me after traveling and a jet lag. Magnesium, B12, Vitamin c cocktail is the best. Lovely location with views and super quiet. Comfy chairs, relaxing music. Easy appointment, same day.
