I’ve been coming to Drip Lounge IV Bar in Seattle for a while now, and I can’t say enough good things about this place. The space itself is beautiful, clean, and relaxing. Perfect for a wellness visit! Duke is truly exceptional here, and his expertise makes a huge difference, especially when getting injections.

I typically get vitamin B and vitamin D IM injections to support my overall health and wellness, and I always leave feeling refreshed and energized. Highly recommend Drip Lounge IV Bar if you're in Seattle and looking to invest in your well-being!

Came in during posted business hours with the “open” sign on, but the lights were off and no one acknowledged me until I asked if someone was there. The employee was lying on the floor in scrubs with only his phone light on, which was immediately uncomfortable.

I asked if they take walk-ins and was told yes, but that he was on a break and to “make myself at home.” The space was dark, silent, and empty. For a place that performs IV procedures, the lack of professionalism, communication, and basic atmosphere did not feel safe or reassuring.

Comfort and trust are essential for this type of service, and unfortunately this experience had neither. I chose to leave and will not be returning.

I've been treating myself to Drip Lounge just about once a week for about 6 months now and am loving the significant changes in my overall health.
They offer hyperbaric oxygen therapy treatments, intramuscular injections, compression therapy, and the infamous IV's. You can get a single session or get a membership that includes awesome discounts.
It's nice to have a local wellness place with caring staff that caters to your needs.
Don't forget, HEALTH IS WEALTH!
Took my mom for a walk in appointment (called an hour ahead to check) the whole process was smooth. They had heated blanket and nice relaxing space. My mom was very happy.

flow-iv-seattle.text: Dr J. Is one of the most empathetic and wonderful people I have come to know lately. It’s great to have her on my side, she has gone above and beyond for me lately. She is a great doc and is an amazing podcaster! I love learning from her and the people she interviews. I highly recommend her because unlike many other docs she is constantly learning and pivoting when new information and technologies become available.

Dr. Daneals is the Bomb dot com.
You can tell she loves what she does!  She is always so attentive to our needs. Very friendly and a great listener! Fabulous in all aspects!!

Amazing experience with Jeannette. She is kind, attentive, and made me feel so welcome. For someone who hates needles, she let me have a family member in the room to calm me down for the treatments. The eboo treatments were great, and definitely gave me more energy. I'd highly recommend it!
Dr.Daneals is amazing. She takes pride in what she does and cares. She has a great sense of humor and is always professional.

I had a very positive and truly excellent experience with Dr. Daneals.   She demonstrated exceptional skill, professionalism, and care throughout my visit.  I felt completely at ease thanks to her reassuring and knowledge.  She made sure I received everything I would need for my specialized care.  I would highly recommend Dr. Daneals to everyone.  You'll be in excellent hands

zen-flow-seattle.text: Very pleased with my experience here. The staff were super attentive and friendly and the overall vibe was very peaceful. Pricing was very fair and the results were AMAZING! I felt like it’s exactly what my body needed to restore my energy.

I always wondered what an IV would feel like so I went here for my first time! Annie and everyone at Zen Flow made me and my husband feel comfortable and welcomed. We both got the Detox & Recover and it was exactly what we needed on our vacation in Seattle. After traveling from across the country on a red eye and a week of going out to restaurants & bars we felt tired, dehydrated, and depleted of our normal intake of vitamins and nutrients. After our IV, we really did feel energized, relaxed, and confident our bodies will recover from breaking out of our routine. One thing I didn’t realize would have such an effect was quality of sleep I got after treatment and how great I felt waking up the next morning. This was the best way to recover from whatever I had put my body through!

The rooms at Zen Flow were spotless and well taken care of. Choices of chairs, decoration, and all the little details were obviously well thought out. You don’t feel like you’re in a sterile hospital room, but in a serene spa far from the city’s hustle and bustle. The crew even put on music that we liked, dimmed the lights, and we had time alone while the IV dripped. It was like going on a date but instead of getting shots of alcohol, we got shots of rejuvenation!

The nurse was professional and hygienic. She made sure to check our vitals and go over all of my questions about the IV before administering our shots.

All in all, we highly recommend Zen Flow and are super happy we got IV’s. Our only downfall is that we don’t live near to be able to be regulars here. 🥹 Thank you to the whole Zen team!

This was such an easy, chill process. All of the staff here is so great and makes you feel right at home. If you’re looking for that extra boost of recovery, you should definitely come to Zen Flow for a top tier experience!

Amazing and considerate staff at this IV office! Everyone was super friendly and patient answering any questions we had. Lan took great care of me and my boyfriend from start to finish for our IV session while offering affordable prices. We will definitely coming back thank you!

UPDATE: Has been exactly one year since we visited and was greeted by nurse Lan again! She remembered us and did our IV treatment. Her patience and precision made the entire process painless and as easy going as catching with a familiar friend.  Highly recommend Lan and Zen flow for any hydration needs.

The whole experience was awesome! Every staff member was kind, caring, and helpful. The IV was affordable, painless, and left me feeling great for a big weekend. 100% would recommend Zen Flow’s IV therapy to everyone looking to recharge or for a “pick me up” anytime.

neuroveda-health-seattle.text: I cannot adequately express how amazing Dr. Squires and the team at Neuroveda are! Dr. Squires has managed my chronic conditions for many years and has truly helped me rebuild my health. She is an incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate doctor who is also a master 'needle smith' (referencing her skill!). She successfully combines cutting-edge science with the efficient use of time and resources to provide the best possible care. Honestly, I do not know where I would be without the treatment Dr. Squires has provided. Highly, highly recommend!

If you’ve found yourself scrolling desperately through the internet and feel at your wits end & like there is no hope: THIS IS YOUR SIGN.

I am not exaggerating when I say that Dr. Gillian E. (Provider + founder) has saved my life. If you have a “complex” medical history or live with a lesser known disease, you have probably felt dismissed by Western medicine and larger medical institutions. Have you ever been told “it’s all in your head” or deduced to “it’s just your anxiety”? Do you feel invalidated or stereotyped? Gas-lit by medical providers? You are not alone and NueroVeda’s providers are ready to receive you just as you are.

I was hopeless and took a chance to drive 6+ hours to see Gillian in person. She is the most compassionate, authentic, and thorough provider I have had the privilege to work with. She cares about you on a human level. You are NOT deduced to a medical ID number or diagnostic code. You are not squeezed into a box for ease or cut off when explaining long histories & things you yourself do not fully understand of your body. Gillian affirms you that you know your body best and NeuroVeda works WITH you, not ON you.

Take the leap and make the call… I promise I have nothing to gain in giving 5 stars. I’m often to shy to write a review, and if anything I want to gate-keep this clinic in fear that a large influx of new patients will leave me forgotten. However, I’ve been with Gillian for years now and as the clinic has grown, changed locations, etc. I have been anything but forgotten. Each visit is just as thorough as the first. I have nothing but good things to say and a deep gratitude for the work they do here.

Though I benefit so much from and read so many reviews myself, I never write reviews because I’m lazy. My experience with Jennifer LeValley at NeuroVeda changed that for me!! I came here because I was having issues with a late menstrual cycle and what I believed was stagnation. Jennifer recommended a few treatments (abhiyanga, dharshana, and steam sauna). She selected oil for the treatment that was stimulating and helped reduce stagnation. What was incredible is that I got my period the very next day and I can only attribute this to Jennifer! She took the time to really listen to me and really make me feel heard. I’ve had many Ayurvedic treatments done and I’ve travelled to different places for treatments so I have a lot of experience with Ayurvedic treatments. I was particularly impressed by Jennifer, as many providers can be imposing, judgmental, and stern. I realize they want to help, but they inadvertently stress you out. Jennifer is the opposite in every way! She knows her stuff and she provides the treatment consistent with Ayurvedic philosophy in a gentle, non-imposing, and deeply kind manner. I continue to come back, but I’ve also recommended it to all of my friends and I have purchased gift cards for several family members to try out NeuroVeda. Everyone should learn about Ayurveda and NeuroVeda is a great place to do that!!! 🥰

You cannot go wrong seeing DNP Gillian Ehrlich for complex illness - partnership and care coordination on point with best front desk crew I've ever experienced.  Neuroveda charges as little as they can; Dr. Gillian is one of the best history takers I have met, she critically thinks, and uses time wisely.  Worked 8 years at Harborview in med/surg for unhoused people; excellent grounding in acute care. Does not over-test or over charge.  Does telehealth. Neuroveda also has walk in fluid/infusion clinic with very reasonable prices.  RNs who do fluid care are extremely competent, caring and friendly.  Tilt table in house.  I have had success in submitting superbills to insurance and receiving partial reimbursement. Worth every penny and every minute spent.  If you have long covid, mast cell, dysautonomia, autoimmune issues, you will find help here.  I really started healing when I started working with Dr. G.

Neuroveda Health is a very special place with many special people who are all in lock-step to deliver a very special need. They have struck a perfect harmonious balance of eastern-western medical care. My own situation with Long Covid and severe PFAS toxicity (and restricted US healthcare) dictated that Neuroveda was almost my last resort, but that’s because I did not know they existed. Each doctor, practitioner, and employee is so committed to you and your health journey. They absolutely should have been - and will be now - my very first choice! Coming from someone who lives on the other side of the country, that’s saying a lot. The extra effort on my part was more than met on their part.

infusion-vibes-silverdale.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Nina and Infusion Vibes. She is truly one of the kindest, most thoughtful people I’ve ever met. From the moment you walk in, you feel completely cared for. She is incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and attentive, and she always takes the time to make sure everything is tailored to exactly what you need.

What really sets Nina apart is how far she goes above and beyond, she genuinely wants you to feel better and supported, not rushed or treated like just another appointment. You can tell she truly cares about her clients and her work.

If you’re considering IV therapy, I couldn’t recommend Infusion Vibes more. You’re in the best hands here.

This is the place if you are seeking true health and wellness. The provider, Nina has a wonderful bedside manner. She takes the time out to listen and get to know her patients. The clinc space is calming and you are able to rest and relax yourself. Infusion Vibes offers a broad selection of vitamin and mineral cocktails. Your sure to leave feeling rejuvenated. The therapy is priced in a way that keeps health and wellness a possibility for just about any budget. The added convenience of having a place like this in Silverdale Wa is invaluable. I look forward to my next visit.

A friend suggested that we should try an IV infusion when we were discussing being burnt out. And so we did and it turned out to be the best decision ever!  Nina was amazing and modified the infusion to my specific needs. She was friendly and proactive, took time to listen and offered suggestions. My friend and I got to hang out and chat while getting the infusion. What surprised me was the burst of energy I had after the infusion and the sustainability. I even woke up the next day ahead of my alarm!  I am absolutely planning my next visit and recommend this to anyone that think that this may be the time to start taking care of their wellbeing. Also.. if you know me, my birthday is in September. Infusion gift cards is on top of my list.

This was the coolest experience! I went with my mom and sister, and we felt amazing afterward. We had all the giggles and great convos while getting hydrated and boosted with Vitamins B, C, and D. Seriously, if you know, you know a good shot of sun vitamin is all you need year-round. Nina and her team at Infusion Vibes made everything so easy and fun. Highly recommend for anyone wanting a little wellness glow-up! ✨💧

I had an amazing experience with Nina of Infusion Vibes! She came right to my friend’s home, which made the entire process so convenient and comfortable. Nina is warm, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable. She explained everything clearly, made sure I was comfortable, and handled the IV placement with a gentle, expert touch.

I felt totally relaxed during the session, and afterward I noticed a real boost in my energy and hydration levels. The in-home service is such a game-changer—no need to drive or wait in a clinic!

What’s even better is that Nina also offers private IV therapy for parties and events. Whether it’s a girls’ weekend, bachelorette party, birthday, or wellness day with friends, she brings everything needed to create a relaxing, rejuvenating experience right to your door. My friends and I had the best time with her!

Highly recommend Nina for both personal wellness and group events. She’s professional, friendly, and truly cares about her clients’ well-being!

vns-aesthetics-nataliya-stavkovy-rn-rent.text:
I rarely write reviews, but this time I just have to share my experience. In a big city, it’s incredibly hard to find someone you can truly trust — and I feel so lucky to have found Natalia.

I am beyond happy with her work! She is not only highly professional but also genuinely caring. She takes an individual approach to every client, really listens to your concerns and wishes, and focuses on quality over quantity — which means so much these days.

What impressed me the most was the level of cleanliness and sterility. I felt completely safe and comfortable throughout the entire procedure.

You can truly see that she loves what she does and cares deeply about her clients and their results. I wholeheartedly recommend her — you will be in the best hands!

VNS AESTHETICS was recommended to me by friend of mine. As a first timer. I have a lot of questions. Nataliya answered all my questions with honesty. She is kind. Her hand so gentle . Definitely I will recommended her and I will be back for my next treatment. Thank you VNS.

I’ve been going to Nataliya for about 2 years. She was my first and only experience with botox. I’ve stuck with her because she is very kind and also patient with all the questions that I have had and is super knowledgeable in all that she does. She does an excellent job! I can’t wait to try other services that she offers!
Absolutely love my lip and face filler results! Everything looks so natural and balanced. The injector is very knowledgeable, caring, and professional. I couldn’t be happier❤️🥰👌
Super vitamin IV cocktail.  Absolutely loved my IV infusion!!! Very effective immune support for a winter time. I will recommend it for everyone at list once a month.

integrated-wellness-aesthetics-vancouver.text: I came into Integrated Wellness & Aesthetics experiencing severe back and neck pain from playing soccer. The discomfort had gotten to the point where even simple tasks like driving or turning my neck became difficult and painful. After visiting Dr. Jessica Jackson, I received a thorough muscle massage and adjustment. The relief was almost immediate. I was able to sit up without pain and move normally again. Dr. Jackson was professional, attentive, and truly knowledgeable in her approach. I highly recommend Integrated Wellness & Aesthetics to anyone dealing with similar issues. The care I received made a noticeable difference, and I’m very grateful for the experience.

Alette gave me THE BEST MASSAGE OF MY LIFE! First of all, she is GORGEOUS. Second of all, her massage was AMAZING!!!!!! In the one hour I had with her I feel deeply relaxed, and she was able to apply the right pressure, and work on all of troublesome spots without me even directing her! She even massaged my head which was incredible and I’ve never had that done by a masseuse before. She worked a lot on my feet that have been aching from 12-14 hour days in heels. She used hot stones and warm towels. It was the whole nine yards. I really appreciate her services. I am fortunate she is covered by insurance, but would pay out of pocket because she is worth it. Already looking forward to my next massage.

Alette is the BEST!!!  I have tried laser hair removal in the past at other places (one place on stomach, different place for face/legs) and recently have completed 2 underarm laser hair removal sessions with Alette.  The experience has been so good.  She makes me feel comfortable and the results are already starting to show.  I have DARK and THICK hair (cute, I know) and I have noticed a huge decrease in the speed at which the hair grows back and it has thinned out.  Her laser is great.  I feel warmth but the pain level is low and the session is quick. She is very careful to adjust it to my skin type and observes the reaction.  She constantly was checking in with me to make sure I was comfortable.  If you are thinking of treating yourself to avoid shaving, do it!

Highly Recommend!

Hands-down the best massages I've ever gotten! Seriously, if you aren't treating yourself or using your medical benefits (because she takes insurance!) you are crazy. I am extremely active (hard workouts 5-7 days a week) but suffer from chronic lower-hip/back pain from an overly tight IT band. Alette does AMAZING work on my lower-hip/back area AND all of the other spots that need attention after days of hard workouts.

I always leave the spa feeling like I've been on vacation!  Alette's massage is the best I've ever had...I get one monthly.  I've recently started using Tama's facial treatments and feel like my skin is improving.  I highly recommend both!

evia-medical-spa-edgewood.text: Absolutely loved my IV therapy experience! Tabitha was so kind, knowledgeable, and took the time to tailor everything to my needs. I also appreciated how accommodating she was in getting me in quickly when I felt sick. The whole experience was smooth, professional, and relaxing. I’ll definitely be back!

I cannot explain how well taken care of I feel every time I come here! There was a time where I almost left crying because Tabitha is just that good at everything she does. She’s so educated, very professional, and her services are amazing. Can’t recommend her enough!

I had such a wonderful experience at Evia Medical Spa! Tabitha is truly amazing, she’s not only incredibly professional but also genuinely caring. From the moment you walk in, she makes you feel comfortable and well taken care of. She listens to your concerns, explains everything thoroughly, and ensures you leave feeling refreshed and confident. You can tell she loves what she does, and it shows in the way she treats her clients. If you're looking for top-notch care with a personal touch, I highly recommend booking with Tabitha!

medical-seattle.text: Very nice Doctors and nurses did a good job on my brace, very talkative, and kind, and I thought today was a pretty bad day, but with how talkative all of them were, and how most of em were saying I was a champ with pain tolerance made me feel awesome,

Just wanted to rate the "Meditation" room, love the cozy feel and warm and heated room. It's slightly separated with a curtain, perfect for wanting a separate space. Great for sisters separating from praying with brothers. There are prayer mats available to use and I saw Meditation pillows.

It's really nice to have these available for visitors especially because we could be visiting our loved ones all day or weeks. As a Muslim, I'm happy that they have this for us. Thanks!

I struggle to rate Harborview Medical Center. My wife underwent a complicated surgery which required a two week stay. She ended up in different areas depending on stages before and after the surgery. For medical procedures Harborview has to get 5 stars. They are that skilled and state-of-the-art. The nursing staff should be four star. They are good, but I've seen better elsewhere. It's the administration of the hospital and the attitude toward visitors (especially primary care givers) that caused me no small amount of grief. I realize it's a big city hospital operating understaffed, dealing with lawlessness in its vicinity, coping with a pandemic, and bulging at overcapacity. But a patient's life partner is not a threat and can help the hospital by helping the patient. Many times I could not be there when she needed me most. I hope this improves in the future or Harborview could get a reputation for being a cold-hearted place.

I wanted to finally give thanks to the surgical team and nurses that fixed my knee when it was severely broken plateau fracture. You did a very good operation.  I also wanted  to apologize for my foul language and all the names I called you all when I first arrived prior to the surgery.  I'm truly grateful for the care and expertise you put into fixing my knee. All the cursing was my way to somewhat cope the pain . Once again thank you all. Sorry I cant remember who you all are or even the surgeons name . But I'm sure you'll remember fixing a type 6 tibia plateau  fracture.  There cant be too many of. That type of breaks being repaired.  So thank you all and keep up the awesome work.

Inside of hospital is really clean. There is a lot of security here. The outside is completely trashed. Homeless, trash, smells like urine everywhere. Seattle needs to clean this area up in the worst way.
